title: GigaWorld-1: A Roadmap to Build World Models for Robot Policy Evaluation
summary: Evaluating embodied robot foundation models remains a critical bottleneck; unlike large language models efficiently assessed via digital benchmarks, robotic policies require slow, costly real-world rollouts limited by hardware and human supervision, which has driven interest in world models as surrogate policy evaluators, yet the key properties that make a world model reliable for policy assessment remain poorly understood. This work presents a systematic study of world models for robotic policy evaluation and introduces WMBench, a benchmark constructed from real-robot teleoperation data and matched policy rollouts covering diverse manipulation tasks to enable controlled comparisons across model families, action encodings, rollout horizons, and evaluation metrics. Using WMBench, we analyze 7 video world models, 4 action representation schemes, and over 324,000 simulated policy rollouts paired with real robot executions, further enriching our analysis with large-scale community submissions from the CVPR 2026 GigaBrain Challenge, curated synthetic trajectories, and a training videos spanning more than 12,000 hours. Our experiments deliver three core insights: evaluator quality is dominated by long-horizon, action-faithful rollout consistency rather than short-term visual realism; pretraining gains stem not only from data scale but from balancing general world knowledge with robot-specific controllability; and architectural choices including action encoding, memory design, and evaluator-focused post-training strongly determine alignment with real-world robot behavior. Drawing on these results, we derive a practical design roadmap and realize it in \textit{GigaWorld-1}, a world model specially optimized for policy evaluation, and we fully release our code, models, datasets, and toolkits to advance scalable evaluation research for embodied foundation models.

AI.tldr: 本研究针对机器人基础模型的评估瓶颈，提出了WMBench基准和系统性实验，优化了策略评估的世界模型，并开源相关资源。
AI.motivation: 由于现实机器人策略评估耗时费钱、受硬件及人工监督限制，难以像LLM数字化评测那样高效，因此急需可靠的世界模型作为可扩展的替代评测手段。然而，目前影响世界模型评估可靠性的关键因素尚不明晰。
AI.method: 作者构建了WMBench基准，基于真实机器人操作和配套策略轨迹，涵盖多种操控任务，对比分析了7种视频世界模型、4种动作表征方案以及大量模拟和实际策略执行结果。实验还引入了由CVPR 2026 GigaBrain Challenge社区、合成轨迹和大规模训练视频的外部数据，进行了系统性实验评测。
AI.result: 实验得出了三点关键发现：1）长期一致的、动作忠实的轨迹回放远比短时视觉真实感更重要；2）大规模预训练的增益缘于通用世界知识和可控性的平衡；3）动作编码、记忆结构和评估后处理等架构设计极大影响了与真实机器人行为的对齐度。
AI.conclusion: 基于实验结论，作者提出了评估导向世界模型的设计路线，并据此实现了优化版GigaWorld-1模型，完全开源数据、模型与工具，有助于推动机器人基础模型的可扩展评估研究。

title: EVA-Client: A Unified Data Collection, Inference, and Deployment Framework for Embodied Policies on Real Robots
summary: We present EVA-Client, an open-source framework for deployment, data collection, and evaluation of trained manipulation policies on real robots. Sitting between a policy server and the physical hardware, EVA-Client unifies the real-robot stages of the policy iteration loop within a single codebase. It makes three contributions. First, a component-decoupled architecture in which robot backends, inference strategies, and transport middlewares form an orthogonal grid: adding a robot or a strategy touches only its own layer. Second, inspectable execution through Debug, Collect, and Eval workflows, with modes ranging from open-loop simulation to continuous real-time control. Third, every evaluation run doubles as a data collection, recording full rollouts in training-ready format alongside exhaustive logs and a side-by-side comparison viewer, so each evaluation feeds the next round of training rather than ending as an unrecorded impression. EVA-Client further consolidates major real-time inference strategies, synchronous and asynchronous execution, ACT-style temporal ensembling, Real-Time Chunking, and a naive-async ablation baseline, behind a single configuration surface.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了EVA-Client——一个为现实机器人部署、数据采集和策略评估而开发的开源框架，实现了机器人操作策略在硬件上的统一测试与评估流程。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人操作策略往往部署与评估流程分散，缺少统一、灵活、易扩展且可追溯的评测与数据采集平台，影响性能迭代与数据循环利用。
AI.method: 提出分层解耦的架构，将机器人后端、推理策略与传输中间件独立，便于灵活扩展，并支持多种评估与采集工作流（调试、采集、评估）以及多种运行模式（模拟、实时控制）。每次评估都自动采集训练所需的完整数据，并整合多种实时推理策略与执行方式于统一配置接口下。
AI.result: EVA-Client实现了组件独立扩展，实现了评测自动数据采集，支持多种常用实时推理和数据流模式，所有功能均纳入同一代码库，显著提升实地验证、数据积累与训练迭代的效率。
AI.conclusion: EVA-Client促进了机器人操作策略的标准化评测，提升了数据采集及训练的闭环效率，为现实机器人学习研究提供了一套高效、可扩展的基础设施。

title: MorphQuad: Morphable Quadrotor for Superhuman Maneuverability, Manipulation, and Resiliency
summary: Infrastructure maintenance, contact-based inspection, and emergency response can benefit from aerial vehicles that act as a flying human hand with extreme maneuverability, manipulation, and resiliency (MMR): maneuverability to fly in arbitrary orientations to reach remote and tight locations; manipulation to point sensors, turn valves, and press tools at arbitrary orientations; resiliency to maintain accurate motion and force control despite disturbances from arbitrary directions, such as wind, ground effects, and friction. Realizing MMR on aerial vehicles requires not only omnidirectional flight; it also requires (I) vectoring of maximum thrust in any direction, to maximize capacity for contact-force application and disturbance rejection, (II) global stability, to enable control over any orientation/position, and (III) compact, standard designs that build upon platforms such as quadrotors to inherit technological know-how. No current aerial vehicle simultaneously enables I--III, due to structural and control limitations that constrain actuation. We present MorphQuad: a morphable quadrotor that enjoys MMR. Key to our approach is a hardware and control co-design: on hardware, we independently articulate each of the four rotor systems via two-axis gimbals; on control, we introduce globally-stable control, and energy-optimal thrust allocation that permits inter-rotor thrust cancellations only to avoid downwash interference and gimbal lock. With fully-onboard autonomy, MorphQuad demonstrates multi-revolution rotation while translating or hovering, for pipe inspection and target tracking (maneuverability); valve turning, perching, and object pressing and pushing with human-level strengths (manipulation); and wind rejection from any direction, even directed to a single rotor, and push-pull recovery (resiliency).

AI.tldr: 本文提出了MorphQuad，一种具备极高机动性、操控性与抗干扰能力（MMR）的四轴飞行器，能够胜任紧急响应、接触式检测等复杂任务。其关键是硬件与控制系统的联合设计，包括旋翼系统的独立双轴万向节与全局稳定、能量最优的推力分配算法。
AI.motivation: 传统飞行器受结构和控制局限，难以实现既可全方位加力、全局稳定又能继承四旋翼平台优势的同时具备卓越机动性、操控性和抗干扰能力，无法满足复杂作业场景对空中机器人性能的苛刻需求。
AI.method: 在硬件上，设计了四套可独立双轴运动的旋翼系统；在控制算法上，实现了全局稳定控制与能量最优推力分配，并通过推力相互抵消机制防止下洗干扰和万向节锁死。整体方案基于四旋翼平台，保持结构紧凑且标准化。
AI.result: MorphQuad实现了高难度的任务表现，如在运动或悬停中多圈旋转（机动性）、对管道检测和目标跟踪；具备阀门旋转、悬停、物体按压（操作性）以及可从任何方向抗风和实现推拉恢复（抗扰能力），且具备全自主飞行能力。
AI.conclusion: MorphQuad通过创新的硬件和控制协同设计，实现了前所未有的飞行器MMR能力，显著扩展了空中机器人的应用场景，为复杂环境下的机器人作业树立了新标准。

title: Metallic Ultrasound Waveguides as a Distributed Tactile Sensing Platform for Contact Localization, Force Estimation, and Material Class Discrimination
summary: Tactile sensing is central to how robotic systems interact with the real world, yet current solutions face a tradeoff between sensing area and system complexity. This work investigates metallic ultrasound waveguides as distributed tactile sensors fully interrogated from a single proximal transducer. Using cylindrical indenters, we characterized the acoustic response to single and multi-point contacts with varying forces and contact materials. For single point indentation, the applied force was well captured by a linear relationship with the ratio of the reflection to transmission coefficients (F = a * R/T) across all nine tested materials (R2 >= 0.95). The calibration slope, a, correlated strongly with the material's effective contact modulus (log--log Pearson r=-0.98). The reflected energy partition was found to be a load-independent parameter related to the contacting material's properties, enabling material classification independent of force. For the two-indenter experiment, both contact forces were recovered from the waveguide signal and were in close agreement with reference load cell measurements (contact 1, R2 = 0.97; contact 2, R2=0.95). The approach was extended to two-dimensional metallic sheets, confirming both contact localization and material-dependent effects. Overall, these results validate metallic waveguides as a robust platform for distributed tactile sensing, providing contact localization, force estimation, and material-class discrimination for the contacting body.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用金属超声波导体作为分布式触觉传感器的方案，通过单一近端换能器实现大面积、低复杂度的触觉感知，并能够实现接触定位、力估计及材料识别。
AI.motivation: 当前机器人的触觉传感系统在感知面积和系统复杂度上存在权衡；传统方案要么感知面积有限，要么系统结构复杂。为解决这一难题，作者探索了能否用更简洁系统（单一换能器）实现大面积精准触觉感知。
AI.method: 采用金属波导，将超声信号注入其一端，通过测试不同位置、不同材料、不同力的圆柱形压头对波导的影响，分析反射与透射系数，建立信号与接触参数的关系。进行单点、多点和二维板实验，验证方法可行性。
AI.result: 单点压入实验中，反射与透射系数的比值与施加力呈高度线性相关，并可适用于多种材料（R2>=0.95）；校准参数a与材料的有效接触模量强相关。对材料反射能分配与负载无关，可以实现独立于力的材料识别。多点实验中，各接触点力的识别也与真实测值高度一致（R2>0.95）。二维实验可实现位置和材料辨别。
AI.conclusion: 金属波导是一种稳健的分布式触觉感知方式，可通过少量或单一换能器进行大范围的接触定位、力估计和材料识别，显著简化了系统复杂度，拓展了应用范围。

title: Improving LLMs via Validator-to-Generator Alignment
summary: Large language models are inconsistent: varying prompts or including unrelated information can lead to unexpected changes in model outputs. The generator-validator (G-V) gap is one manifestation of this phenomenon, where LLMs generate responses that they then deem as invalid if re-queried to validate them. In this work, we introduce a new formulation of G-V consistency that involves a principled correction for utterance frequency. Specifically, generators often assign low likelihood to valid strings simply because those strings are a priori unlikely, which makes naive notions of G-V consistency unworkable. We show that under a natural model of rational agents answering questions with multiple answers, consistency of the validator with a frequency-corrected generator score emerges naturally. Our method, \emph{\FCPAname} (\FCPA), is a training objective implementing frequency-corrected G-V consistency for real-world LLMs. Our experimental results show that training with \FCPA{} substantially improves both G-V consistency and generator performance over prior methods, with gains of up to $+27$pp in Pearson correlation on IFEval and HumanEval, while preserving validator quality across all evaluated tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种频率校正的生成-验证一致性（G-V consistency）新方法，并通过实验证明其可显著提升大语言模型输出一致性和生成性能。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型常表现出输出不一致，尤其在生成和验证阶段可能自我矛盾（即G-V gap），且现有一致性方法受限于模型对低概率语句的天然偏好问题。本文旨在解决这些一致性与概率分布的冲突。
AI.method: 提出了一种频率校正的一致性训练目标（[FCPA），修正生成器分数中的先验概率影响，使验证器更合理地评估输出；并在真实大模型上实现，并与现有方法对比。
AI.result: 采用该方法训练可显著提高G-V一致性和生成器性能，在IFEval和HumanEval指标上相关性提升最高达27个百分点，同时保持验证器在各项任务中的质量。
AI.conclusion: 频率校正的一致性训练能有效解决生成-验证器间的矛盾，为提升大模型一致性及实用性提供了新方向。

title: Learning 3D Affordances for Blade Insertion in Cluttered Stowing
summary: Many manipulation tasks require reasoning about free-space affordances: discovering volumes where an extended rigid tool can safely navigate, complementary to surface contact affordances for grasping. Robotic stowing is a canonical instance, where a blade must sweep items aside inside cluttered fabric bins to create insertion space. Production stow systems generate millions of such episodes, but standard approaches with unimodal data infer affordances as SE(3) pose distributions, a geometric question asked in the wrong domain. VulcanVoxel keeps inference spatial: a masked autoencoder over 3D occupancy fields reconstructs blade occupancy conditioned on scene geometry, computing feasibility locally at each voxel and recovering multi-modal predictions from unimodal data. Blade affordances are spatial objects, subsets of 3D space defined by geometric feasibility. Pose parameters carry no structure for reasoning whether unobserved placements are feasible, and standard generative objectives including flow matching faithfully learn the unimodal distribution produced by execution policies and cannot recover geometric alternatives. Trained on 10,000 real warehouse stow episodes without human annotation, VulcanVoxel achieves top-5 coverage of 0.89 versus 0.71 for the best pose-based baseline, with a distilled student providing RGB-to-voxel inference in 30 ms. vs. 1.4 s. for voxel-to-voxel. We have released a dataset of real blade insertion cycles with RGB-D observations and pose trajectories at https://www.armbench.com/blade_insertion. html.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种新的空间推理方法VulcanVoxel，通过3D占据场上的掩码自编码器实现工具可行运动空间的推断，在机器人仓储等任务中的表现明显优于以往方法。
AI.motivation: 传统推理工具可用空间（如抓取表面接触）的方法多基于SE(3)位姿分布，仅捕捉单峰分布，难以回归复杂的多模态几何可用空间，在实际机器人仓储任务（如刀片在杂乱布料箱内扫开物品创造空间）应用不理想。
AI.method: 提出VulcanVoxel方法，通过3D占据体上的掩码自编码器，在每个体素局部计算刀片可行性，能在仅用单项数据时获得多模态空间可用性预测，绕过了直接位姿回归的限制。模型在1万个真实仓库插刀场景数据上训练，无需人工标注，并提供从RGB到体素级推理的蒸馏学生网络。
AI.result: 顶5覆盖率上，VulcanVoxel达0.89，显著高于最优基于位姿的基线（0.71）；端到端RGB输入推理仅需30ms，远快于体素到体素推理的1.4秒。
AI.conclusion: VulcanVoxel能更好地推断和利用空间可行性，有效解决传统方法几何推理能力不足的问题，并具备高效的推理速度，对实际大规模机器人仓储任务具重要价值。

title: TACO: TActile World Model as a Self-COrrector forScalable VLA Post-Training
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have shown promising generalization in robotic manipulation, but they still struggle with contact-rich tasks, where minor contact perturbations can cause unrecoverable failures that are hard to detect from vision alone. Since these failures are localized rather than task-level semantic errors, tactile-aware corrective post-training offers an efficient way to improve recovery. However, scaling such supervision through human intervention is costly. Recent works have explored world models to synthesize imagined rollouts for policy improvement, but vision-only world models may produce visually plausible yet contact-inconsistent trajectories. We therefore introduce TACO, a tactile-aware world-model-driven framework for scalable VLA post-training in contact-rich manipulation. Given real robot rollouts, TACO follows a Recognize-Imagine-Label loop with a tactile-aware world model: a unified progress-action model recognizes failure-adjacent states using progress estimates, a visuo-tactile generation model imagines local correction segments, and the progress-action model labels them with executable corrective actions. To incorporate tactile corrective supervision into VLA post-training, TACO combines knowledge-insulated tactile adaptation with advantage-conditioned training, enabling the policy to learn from imagined corrections without degrading pretrained visual-language priors. These components enable TACO to convert real-world failures into imagined visuo-tactile corrections for iterative VLA post-training. Experiments on real-world contact-rich manipulation tasks show that TACO achieves 44% absolute success rate improvement over the base policy and 32% over the policy without knowledge-insulated tactile adaptation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了TACO框架，通过引入触觉感知世界模型，为存在大量接触的机器人操作任务提供可扩展的视觉-语言-动作后训练方法，有效提升机器人对细微接触失误的自我恢复和纠正能力。相比传统和无触觉适应方法，TACO在真实世界操作实验任务中带来显著性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型在机器人操作泛化任务上表现良好，但在丰富接触场景中，因视觉难以检测微小接触扰动，模型易出现无法恢复的失败，而通过人工监督进行触觉纠正又成本极高。因此亟需一种能扩展的触觉反馈后训练方法，提高接触富集任务的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 作者提出TACO，利用触觉感知世界模型，设计了'识别-想象-标注'回路：统一的进展-动作模型通过进展估计识别系统将要失败的关键状态，视触联合生成模型想象局部纠正片段，进展-动作模型再为其标注可执行的纠正动作。TACO整合知识隔离的触觉自适应与优势条件化训练，保证模型能从想象的纠正行为中学习，同时保护原有视觉-语言知识库不被破坏。
AI.result: TACO被应用于真实世界接触丰富操作任务实验，结果表明该方法对基础策略带来44%的绝对成功率提升，对未采用知识隔离触觉适应的策略提升32%。
AI.conclusion: TACO显著提升了接触富集机器人操作任务中的纠错和恢复能力，验证了利用触觉感知和想象生成纠正片段进行后训练的有效性和实用性，为VLA模型泛化和自适应提供了新途径。

title: Echoes of Unrest: A Multimodal NLP Framework for Early Warning of Fake News and Violence-Driven Mob Activity
comment: Accepted for publication as a book chapter (Taylor & Francis, 2026)
summary: Rapid growth in social media has transformed global communication by enabling fast information exchange, but it has also accelerated the spread of misinformation. Fake news, manipulated content, and provocative narratives are increasingly linked to social unrest, political instability, and mob violence. Incidents in South Asia and elsewhere demonstrate how false information disseminated via platforms such as Facebook and WhatsApp can trigger real-world harm, often spreading faster than fact-checking efforts can respond. To address this challenge, this chapter presents a multilingual, multimodal Natural Language Processing (NLP) framework for early detection of misinformation and violence-prone dynamics. A fused dataset of 138,256 Bangla and English samples was created by combining multiple benchmark datasets. The framework integrates XLM-RoBERTa for multilingual text representation, CLIP for visual embedding, and a multi-head attention mechanism for multimodal fusion, enhanced with auxiliary features such as sarcasm and geospatial metadata. Experiments on a stratified 30% subset achieved 98% test accuracy with strong precision and recall. The outcomes show the efficacy of multimodal approaches in early misinformation detection and highlight the added value of geospatial signals for anticipating real-world escalation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个多语言、多模态的NLP框架，旨在早期检测社交媒体中的虚假信息和暴力风险，并在大规模跨语言数据集上实验验证，获得了98%的测试准确率。
AI.motivation: 社交媒体信息传播迅速，虚假新闻和煽动性内容易引发社会动荡和暴力，目前人工核查速度跟不上虚假信息传播，急需自动化、有效的早期发现手段。
AI.method: 构建包含13万余条孟加拉语和英语样本的多源数据集，框架综合使用XLM-RoBERTa进行多语言文本编码，CLIP进行视觉特征提取，并通过多头注意力机制实现多模态融合。同时引入讽刺识别和地理信息等辅助特征。
AI.result: 在30%分层采样子集上实验显示，模型测试准确率达98%，同时精准率和召回率表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 多模态融合方法可以显著提高对虚假信息的早期检测能力，引入地理特征有助于预测信息传播引发的现实升级，为遏制社交媒体虚假信息和相关暴力提供技术支持。

title: DELTAVID: Enhancing Fine-Grained Spatiotemporal Perception with Cross-Video Differences
summary: Video multimodal large language models have made strong progress on open-ended video understanding, but they still lack precise local spatiotemporal perception. When two videos share almost the same global semantics and differ only in a short time span or a small region, current models often fail to find the change and provide reliable evidence. We propose DELTAVID, a verifiable proxy-task framework that enhances fine-grained spatiotemporal perception with cross-video differences. The key idea is to turn cross-video spot-the-difference into a trainable perception signal, where a model identifies local changes, judges temporal boundaries, and organizes spatial evidence by comparing similar videos. To make this signal scalable to train and reliable to evaluate, we further introduce DELTAVID-10K and DELTAVID-Bench, which convert controllable local differences in real videos into evidence-labeled training and test samples. Experiments show that DELTAVID substantially improves performance on cross-video difference understanding and transfers the learned local evidence ability to general video understanding benchmarks, including MMVU, MLVU, Video-MME, VideoHolmes, VideoMMMU, LVBench, TempCompass, and LongVideoBench. These results show that cross-video differences are not only an effective way to diagnose fine-grained perception failures, but also a scalable proxy supervision that moves Video MLLMs from coarse semantic understanding toward fine-grained spatiotemporal evidence reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DELTAVID框架，通过比对相似视频找差异，增强视频大模型对局部细粒度时空变化的感知能力，并引入大规模、可控、带标注的数据集验证方法有效。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态视频大模型在处理全球语义差异较小，但局部差异明显的视频时，往往缺乏精确的局部时空感知能力，难以发现细微变化。该问题制约了模型的精细化理解能力。
AI.method: 作者提出DELTAVID框架，将“找不同”任务转化为可训练的感知信号，令模型通过比较相似视频识别局部变化、判断时间边界并组织空间证据。同时，构造了带可控局部差异和证据标签的数据集DELTAVID-10K和DELTAVID-Bench，便于大规模训练和评估。
AI.result: DELTAVID在跨视频差异理解任务上显著提升了模型性能。该框架通过训练获得的细粒度证据识别能力可迁移到多种通用视频理解基准任务（如MMVU, MLVU等），表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 跨视频差异不仅是诊断视频大模型精细感知能力的有效手段，也是可扩展的代理监督方法，可推动视频大模型从粗粒度语义理解向精细化时空推理能力进化。

title: CLEAR: Closed-Loop Reinforcement Learning at Scale for End-to-End Autonomous Driving
summary: End-to-end autonomous driving (E2E-AD) aims to directly map raw sensor information to driving actions. Recently, with the rapid advancement of multi-modal large language models (MLLMs), researchers have proposed the paradigm of Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models for E2E-AD, where it seeks to integrate visual perception, language understanding and action prediction within a single policy. However, existing VLA-based policies largely adopts imitation learning, where it only learns to drive by optimizing distance-based metrics w.r.t. logged expert trajectories. Such distribution shift between open-loop training and closed-loop inference leads to suboptimal performance in closed-loop planning. To close this gap, we present CLEAR, a system that enables closed-loop training using Reinforcement Learning (RL) at scale for E2E-AD. We propose to learn a novel residual waypoint policy around the waypoint prior from pretrained VLA policies, effectively harnessing the knowledge within. On another front, one of the key challenges to scale up RL for vision-based policies is the number of parallel simulation environments since RL is data hungry. To that end, we design a heterogeneous pipeline that places the simulator and the VLA learner on distinct compute groups, which allows us to dramatically increase the number of simulation environments running in parallel while avoiding resource contention and maintaining training stability. We show that with a simple reward, CLEAR significantly outperforms previous methods and sets new state-of-the-art performance on the challenging benchmarks of CARLA longest6 v2 and Bench2Drive.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的闭环强化学习系统CLEAR，用于端到端自动驾驶，并在主流基准上取得了新SOTA表现。
AI.motivation: 现有的视觉-语言-动作（VLA）端到端自动驾驶方法多基于模仿学习，但该方法在开放环境下与闭环推理之间存在分布偏移，导致实际驾驶效果不理想。
AI.method: 1）提出CLEAR，通过强化学习实现大规模闭环训练；2）引入残差航点策略，基于预训练VLA策略进行微调，充分利用已有知识；3）设计异构训练流程，将仿真器和学习器分布在不同计算资源以扩展任务并保持训练稳定。
AI.result: CLEAR在CARLA longest6 v2和Bench2Drive等高难度基准上，实现了远超以往方法的性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过闭环强化学习和创新的系统设计，CLEAR显著提升了端到端自动驾驶的效果，并验证了方法的广泛适用性。

title: Reinforcement Learning for Data-Efficient Code-Switched ASR
summary: Audio-language models can be prompted for code-switched speech, but their decoding is not optimized for code-switching and often fails at language boundaries. We propose a practical reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards recipe for data-efficient adaptation of audio-language models to code-switched ASR using group relative policy optimization, combining an error rate reward with a script fidelity reward that penalizes wrong writing systems and a two-pass draft-and-refinement procedure. Using Qwen2-Audio as a reproducible testbed across 10 language pairs, training on only TTS code-switched speech, we show that RLVR with 10% of the data matches LoRA supervised fine-tuning trained on the full dataset, with the largest gains on typologically distant pairs. The error rate reward eliminates translation errors while the script fidelity reward separately reduces script contamination without degradation. These gains transfer zero-shot to a human-recorded code-switching corpus.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的数据适应方法，利用强化学习优化音频-语言模型在代码切换语音识别中的表现，通过组合错误率奖励和文字系统准确性奖励，显著提升多语言边界下的识别能力。
AI.motivation: 当前音频-语言模型在代码切换（即在一段话中混用多种语言）场景下的解码表现不佳，特别是在多语言切换的边界容易出错，因此亟需更有效的数据适应和解码优化方法。
AI.method: 方法采用了基于可验证奖励的强化学习框架（RLVR），结合了分组相对策略优化算法。奖励结构既包括识别错误率的减少，也包括对错误文字系统的惩罚，同时引入了‘草稿-细化’的两步训练流程。只使用TTS合成的代码切换语音，且数据量仅为全量的10%。
AI.result: 在Qwen2-Audio模型以及十种语言对上，RLVR方法用10%的数据即可达到与LoRA全监督微调（用全部数据）相当的代码切换ASR效果，尤其在语系距离较大的语言对上提升最大。错误率奖励消除了翻译错误，文字系统奖励有效减少跨文种污染，且不会影响原有表现。
AI.conclusion: 提出的RLVR方法不仅在合成数据上有效，还能零样本泛化到真人录制的数据集，显著提升代码切换ASR在现实多语言环境下的适用性和效率。

title: Interpretable machine learning predicts Parkinson's disease severity using motion-corrected QSM MRI and multiband multiecho fMRI features
comment: 16 pages from main manuscript and 17 pages from supplementary information
summary:
Introduction: Objective neuroimaging biomarkers may improve Parkinson's disease motor assessment by capturing brain variation not directly observable from clinical examination. We used interpretable machine learning to predict current motor severity, measured by MDS-UPDRS Part III, from QSM and multiband multi-echo resting-state fMRI-derived ReHo features.
  Methods: Regional QSM and ReHo features were extracted from 28 participants, including 24 individuals with Parkinson's disease and 4 controls. Thirteen feature-set experiments evaluated imaging-only, clinical-only, imaging-plus-clinical, full, reduced, and multimodal inputs. Support vector regression, Elastic Net, Random Forest, and XGBoost models were trained using nested cross-validation. Performance was assessed using pooled held-out R^2, RMSE, MAE, Pearson correlation, permutation testing, and the proportion of participants predicted within +/-5 MDS-UPDRS Part III points.
  Results: Imaging-only models carried meaningful predictive signal, whereas the clinical-only model performed weakly. Full fMRI, full QSM, and clinical variables provided the strongest global fit, explaining 45.4% of variance in motor severity. Selected QSM plus clinical variables produced the most clinically close predictions, with 75.0% of participants predicted within +/-5 points and the lowest MAE among top-performing models. SHAP highlighted cerebellar, thalamic, striatal, insular, and motor cortical features.
  Conclusion: QSM and multiband multi-echo fMRI-derived ReHo capture distinct, interpretable dimensions of Parkinson's disease motor severity. These findings show that structural and functional imaging contribute differently depending on the clinical prediction goal.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用可解释性机器学习方法，通过QSM和多回波静息态fMRI的ReHo特征，预测帕金森病患者的运动严重程度，并发现影像学特征在预测中具有重要作用。
AI.motivation: 传统帕金森病运动评估可能无法捕捉到某些脑部变化，客观的神经影像生物标志物有望弥补这一空白，提高评估准确性。
AI.method: 从24名帕金森病患者和4名健康对照中提取区域性QSM和ReHo特征，并设计13组特征输入实验，分别使用支持向量回归、Elastic Net、随机森林和XGBoost等多种模型，通过嵌套交叉验证评估模型表现。
AI.result: 单独影像组模型表现良好，临床组模型预测能力较弱。影像与临床联合模型能解释45.4%的运动严重程度方差，且QSM结合临床变量的模型预测最接近真实值，75%的参与者预测误差在±5分以内。SHAP分析显示小脑、丘脑、纹状体等区域特征最为重要。
AI.conclusion: QSM和多回波fMRI的ReHo能够反映帕金森病运动严重程度的不同维度。结构和功能影像在不同预测目标下各有价值，有助于改善运动评估。

title: Differential Amplifier-Inspired AmpAttention for Multi-View Robotic Manipulation
summary: Multi-view robotic manipulation methods with the attention mechanism have recently achieved significant progress in both training efficiency and task performance. However, the inherent redundancy, occlusion, and viewpoint dependency in robotic view images often lead to severe attention drift. To address this challenge, we propose AmpAttention, a novel attention mechanism inspired by differential amplifiers in analog circuits. It aims to suppress attention noise and capture high signal-to-noise ratio signals for more reliable perception. Based on this, we introduce the RVAF model, which integrates task-guided intra-view and inter-view AmpAttention. Compared to previous state-of-the-art methods, RVAF achieves the optimal average success rate across 18 RLBench tasks (249 variations) while reducing training time by 33.3\%. RVAF also demonstrates strong potential in real-world high-precision tasks, exemplified by its ability to pick up a dart and accurately insert it into the red bullseye. Furthermore, we extend RVAF to RVAF++ by incorporating the SAM2 image encoder. RVAF++ achieves substantial gains on high-precision tasks, achieving a 91\% success rate on the `insert peg' task. More qualitative results are provided at the anonymous project website https://anonymous.4open.science/w/RVAF-Anonymization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的注意力机制——AmpAttention及其集成模型RVAF，显著提高了多视角机器人操作的效率与性能，并在多个任务上大幅超越了现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有多视角机器人操作方法尽管加入了注意机制，但因视角冗余、遮挡和依赖性问题，常出现注意力漂移，导致感知不稳定，影响任务表现。
AI.method: 受模拟电路差分放大器启发，设计了AmpAttention注意力机制，有效抑制注意力噪声并强化高信噪比的信号感知。在此基础上，提出了结合任务导向的视内和视间AmpAttention的RVAF模型，同时扩展RVAF++模型，融合了更先进的SAM2图像编码器。
AI.result: RVAF模型在RLBench的18项任务（共249种变体）上平均成功率最优，训练时长减少33.3%；现实高精度任务中表现优异，如飞镖精准插入红心。升级版RVAF++在高精度任务如插销任务上成功率达91%。
AI.conclusion: AmpAttention及其集成模型有效缓解了多视角感知中的注意力漂移，大幅提升了机器人操作的可靠性和精度，为高精度操作场景提供了新的解决方案。

title: LuxSQA: Ask Me in Luxembourgish with TTS-Augmented Spoken Question Answering
summary: Spoken Question Answering (SQA) remains largely focused on high-resource languages and carefully recorded speech, limiting the reach of speech-LLM methods in low-resource settings. This paper investigates whether text-to-speech (TTS) can provide task-specific training data for Luxembourgish SQA without requiring a large human-recorded QA corpus. Starting from existing text-based QA resources, we translate questions into Luxembourgish, synthesize spoken questions with multiple TTS systems, and pair them with textual answers. We train a parameter-efficient SLAM-style architecture that connects a frozen Whisper encoder to frozen multilingual LLM backends through a learned projector and LoRA adapters. We compare MMS-TTS, Qwen3-TTS, and OmniVoice variants, including single-source corpora of about 48k questions and a 4TTS multi-source mix of approximately 230k questions. Evaluation on LLAMA-LB-Test with two real Luxembourgish speaker conditions shows that multi-source and voice-design-based synthetic training configurations yield the strongest SQA performance. The results also show that no-reference TTS quality scores do not monotonically predict downstream QA performance, indicating that synthetic speech must be evaluated as task-specific training data rather than only as natural-sounding audio.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用多种文本转语音（TTS）工具，生成卢森堡语口语问答数据，旨在解决低资源语言SQA数据匮乏的问题。实验发现，多来源的合成语音数据能显著提升模型的问答表现。
AI.motivation: 口语问答（SQA）领域大多基于高资源语言，且需要大量人工录音语料，难以应用于如卢森堡语等低资源语言。作者希望通过TTS技术，绕过对真人录音数据的依赖，快速构建低资源语言的SQA数据集。
AI.method: 作者将现有文本问答数据翻译成卢森堡语，并通过MMS-TTS、Qwen3-TTS和OmniVoice等多种TTS系统合成问题语音，将其与文本答案配对。然后在SLAM风格结构（冻结Whisper编码器，冻结多语LLM，训练投影层和LoRA适配器）上进行训练，比较单一TTS和多TTS数据的效果。
AI.result: 在真实卢森堡语语者条件测试下，多来源及声线设计丰富的数据集带来的模型性能最强。同时发现TTS质量分数与问答任务表现不严格相关。
AI.conclusion: 合成语音用于低资源语言SQA训练数据时，不应仅看其语音自然度，更要结合下游任务效果综合评估；多声源、多TTS合成语音能有效提升模型实际问答能力。

title: Reliability-Aware Monocular Depth Supervision for Sparse-View Neural Reconstruction
comment: 10 pages, 6 figures. All authors contributed equally
summary: Sparse-view neural reconstruction is challenging in outdoor driving scenes, where cameras usually move along a narrow forward-facing trajectory and provide limited multi-view overlap. Although monocular depth estimators can provide dense geometric priors, their predictions are noisy, and not uniformly reliable across image regions. In this work, we study monocular depth supervision for sparse-view neural reconstruction. We use Depth Anything V2 as a dense monocular depth prior, align its predictions to metric depth using scale-shift fitting, and apply depth supervision selectively through photometric masks generated from an RGB-only baseline model. We evaluate this strategy on two representative scene representations: Mip-NeRF-360 and Splatfacto. On KITTISeq02 under an every2 sparse-view setting, masked monocular depth supervision gives only marginal rendering gains for Mip-NeRF-360 and does not improve metric geometry. In contrast, Splatfacto benefits more clearly, improving PSNR from 14.903 to 15.932 and reducing RMSE from 0.542 to 0.100. Additional KITTISeq05 experiments and matched-ratio mask ablations further show that the gains for Splatfacto come from selecting reliable low-error regions rather than simply reducing the number of depth-supervised pixels. Additional experiments on the Bicycle scene show that depth supervision can improve geometry while hurting RGB rendering quality when multi-view coverage is already strong. Overall, our results suggest that monocular depth priors are useful for under-constrained sparse-view reconstruction, but should be applied selectively and with moderate weighting.

AI.tldr: 针对稀疏视角（Sparse-view）下的神经重建问题，本文提出利用单目深度先验，并结合掩码选择性地加以监督，可提升特定场景下的几何精度，且适用于受限视角覆盖的自动驾驶场景。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶场景中由于摄像头通常沿前方移动，导致多视角重叠区域有限，进而增加了稀疏视角神经重建的难度。传统的单目深度估计虽然可以提供几何先验，但预测常常有噪声且不稳定。为此，急需探讨如何高效结合单目深度信息促进稀疏视角重建。
AI.method: 本文采用Depth Anything V2作为单目深度先验，经尺度-偏移调整后与度量深度对齐，并通过RGB模型生成的光度掩码，选择性地进行深度监督。实验覆盖两类场景表征技术（Mip-NeRF-360与Splatfacto），并在KITTISeq02及其他数据集上验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 实验显示，对Mip-NeRF-360来说，深度掩码监督带来有限的渲染提升且对几何精度无明显改善。而Splatfacto受益更为显著，PSNR从14.903提升到15.932，RMSE从0.542降至0.100。进一步分析表明，提升主要来自对低误差区域的可靠选择。
AI.conclusion: 单目深度先验对于受限视角重建有促进作用，但需谨慎、选择性地应用；权重设置亦需适中，以平衡几何与渲染质量的提升效果。

title: DREAMSTEER: Latent World Models Can Steer VLA Policies During Deployment Without Any Finetuning
summary: Pretrained vision-language-action (VLA) policies show promising zero-shot generalization, but often fail under deployment-time distribution shift, leading to decreased robustness and inconsistent instruction following. While prior work commonly tackles this by finetuning on in-distribution data, it assumes demonstrations collected on tasks in the target environment. In this work, we propose DREAMSTEER, a deployment-time steering framework for pretrained VLAs without any finetuning or parameter modifications. The key insight in DREAMSTEER is to leverage a latent world model and a value model to steer pretrained VLA policies. During deployment, DREAMSTEER samples candidate action chunks from a VLA policy and predefined motion primitives, imagines their outcomes using an action-conditioned latent world model, and ranks the imagined trajectories with a language-conditioned value model. Across four real-world manipulation benchmarks with unseen objects, DREAMSTEER improves task success rate from 23.75% to 66.25% and instruction-following accuracy from 38.75% to 56.25% over the base VLA policy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DREAMSTEER框架，在无需微调或修改参数的情况下，通过引入潜在世界模型和价值模型提升预训练视觉-语言-动作（VLA）策略在分布变化下的鲁棒性及指令遵循能力。
AI.motivation: 现有的VLA策略容易在部署中的分布变化下性能下降，并且以往方法需要针对目标环境重新收集演示数据进行微调，成本高、不灵活。
AI.method: DREAMSTEER在部署阶段，将VLA策略和预定义动作原语采样得到候选动作片段，并通过动作条件的潜在世界模型预测这些动作后果，再用语言条件的价值模型对想象出来的轨迹排序，选择最优行动序列，无需对原有VLA策略微调或修改。
AI.result: 在四项涉及未见过物体的真实操作任务上，DREAMSTEER策略任务成功率由基础VLA的23.75%提升到66.25%，指令遵循率由38.75%提升到56.25%。
AI.conclusion: DREAMSTEER无需任何微调或参数修改即可显著提升预训练VLA模型在部署环境中的泛化性能和指令遵循能力，展现了良好的实用前景。

title: Gemma 4 Technical Report
summary: We introduce Gemma 4, a new generation of open-weight, natively multimodal language models in the Gemma model family. Designed to advance compute efficiency and reasoning, the Gemma 4 model suite features dense and Mixture-of-Experts architectures, ranging from 2.3B to 31B parameters. Alongside improved vision and audio encoders for all model sizes, we propose a unified, encoder-free architecture for our 12B model, which ingests raw audio and image patches. Furthermore, we integrate a thinking mode, enabling Gemma models to generate reasoning traces prior to responding. We improve inference speed, memory, and compute efficiency, as well as long-context abilities through critical design choices. Gemma 4 establishes a leap in performance across STEM, multimodal, and long-context benchmarks, and rivals larger, frontier open models in human-rated tasks.

AI.tldr: Gemma 4是一套新一代、原生多模态且开源权重的语言模型，具备2.3B到31B参数规模，专注提升推理和计算效率，实现了在多模态和长上下文任务上的性能突破。
AI.motivation: 推动多模态语言模型的研究和应用，特别是在提高推理能力、推理速度、内存和计算效率，以及长上下文处理能力方面，满足更高效、更强泛化能力的AI需求。
AI.method: 提出多种参数规模的密集和专家混合（Mixture-of-Experts）架构；对视觉与音频编码器进行改进，部分模型使用统一、无编码器结构，可直接处理原始音频与图像。引入“思考模式”，支持生成详细推理轨迹；对推理速度和长上下文能力进行关键优化。
AI.result: 在STEM领域、多模态和长上下文基准测评中表现突出，效率更高，在人工评测任务上接近甚至媲美更大规模的开放模型。
AI.conclusion: Gemma 4突破了多模态模型在推理与效率方面的性能瓶颈，并以更小规模模型在各类任务和评测中达到甚至超越业界前沿开放模型，为多模态模型发展提供了新范式。

title: Do Diabetic Foot Ulcer Segmentation Models Generalize? A Cross-Dataset Benchmark of CNN and Transformer Architectures
summary: Deep learning models for diabetic foot ulcer (DFU) segmentation routinely report high accuracy, but they are almost always trained and tested on the same dataset, leaving their behaviour on data from a different clinical source largely unmeasured. We benchmark three representative segmentation architectures -- U-Net and DeepLabV3+ (convolutional) and SegFormer-B2 (Transformer) -- under an identical, leakage-screened protocol: training on the combined FUSeg/AZH wound data and evaluating, without fine-tuning, on two independent external datasets (DFUC2022 and Medetec). All models achieve strong in-domain performance (Dice 0.80--0.83) but degrade substantially across datasets. The degradation is, however, architecture-dependent: SegFormer-B2 generalizes best on both external sets (DFUC2022 Dice 0.557, Medetec Dice 0.786), outperforming both convolutional models, while the more complex DeepLabV3+ generalizes worse than the simpler U-Net. Per-image failure analysis on 2,160 images across both external test sets confirms that SegFormer-B2 produces the fewest catastrophic failures on DFUC2022 (31.1%), compared with U-Net (38.5%) and DeepLabV3+ (43.0%). The consistent ranking across two independent external sources, confirmed by Wilcoxon signed-rank tests (p < 0.001 on both datasets), indicates that architecture family, not model complexity, drives cross-hospital generalization.

AI.tldr: 本文系统分析了三种DFU分割深度学习结构（U-Net、DeepLabV3+、SegFormer-B2）在不同医院数据上的泛化能力。结果发现Transformer架构（SegFormer-B2）在异构数据集上优于卷积架构，且模型复杂度高低并不等同于泛化能力强弱。
AI.motivation: 现有DFU分割模型多在单一数据集上验证，缺乏跨机构泛化能力的系统研究。因此，本研究动机在于评估主流结构在外部独立数据集上的性能表现，并探究模型架构对泛化能力的影响。
AI.method: 采用无信息泄露的严格训练测试分离策略，在FUSeg/AZH数据库上训练U-Net、DeepLabV3+和SegFormer-B2模型，直接在DFUC2022与Medetec两个外部数据集上评估，无微调。对2,160张测试图像进行逐图失败分析并用Wilcoxon检验统计显著性。
AI.result: 所有模型在训练集内Dice分数为0.80-0.83，但在外部数据集普遍性能下降。其中SegFormer-B2泛化最优（DFUC2022 Dice 0.557, Medetec Dice 0.786），迭代更复杂的DeepLabV3+反而劣于U-Net。SegFormer-B2在致命失败率上也最低，对架构泛化优势做出佐证。
AI.conclusion: DFU分割模型在不同医院数据间泛化显著依赖架构类型而非模型复杂度。Transformer类SegFormer-B2结构跨院泛化优于卷积类，提示开发泛化强健模型需关注架构本身。

title: Continuous-Time Gaussian Belief Trees for Motion Planning
summary: We address sampling-based motion planning for continuous-time stochastic systems under process and measurement uncertainty, with probabilistic guarantees on safety and performance. The robot dynamics are modeled as a continuous-time linear stochastic differential equation, while sensor measurements arrive at discrete time instants. We derive an offline hybrid belief propagation model in which the belief evolves according to continuous-time ODEs between measurements and undergoes discrete Kalman filter update jumps at measurement times. To ensure safety, we introduce a belief-barrier-function-based safety checker for segment-level probabilistic verification. This enables the planner to certify safety over entire continuous trajectory segments and detect inter-sample chance-constraint violations that are missed by conventional node-based checks. Together, these components provide a principled framework for sampling-based belief planning that accounts for both continuous-time uncertainty propagation and continuous-time safety requirements. We integrate the method with RRT and SST planners and evaluate it across multiple benchmark environments. The results show that the proposed method achieves high success rates and robust enforcement of chance constraints, including in narrow-passage scenarios where discrete-time counterparts fail due to missed inter-sample unsafe behavior.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于连续时间随机系统的采样运动规划方法，在不确定性下能保障安全与性能，并在多个基准环境中实现了优异的成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有采样规划方法通常依赖离散时间的节点检查，容易遗漏连续轨迹上的中间风险，特别是在存在传感和过程不确定性的情况下，难以严格保障安全性。
AI.method: 将机器人动力学建模为连续时间的线性随机微分方程，测量数据则在离散时刻采集。提出了离线混合贝尔更新模型，融合了连续时间下的信念演化（ODE）与测量时刻的离散卡尔曼滤波跳跃更新。采用基于belief-barrier-function的安全检查器，对整个轨迹段进行概率安全性验证，能发现常规节点检查所遗漏的风险。该框架被集成到RRT与SST采样规划器中。
AI.result: 所提方法在多种基准场景下进行了实验，表现出较高的成功率，对机会约束的执行更为稳健，尤其在狭窄通道等高风险环境下优于离散时间方法。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为考虑连续时间不确定传播与安全要求的采样运动规划提供了理论与实践框架，能有效检测和避免路径中的安全隐患，适用于安全性要求高的机器人系统。

title: Seduced by the Narrative: Assessing Rule Adherence in Semi-Open Textual Sandboxes
summary: As LLMs are increasingly deployed as autonomous adjudicators in semi-open textual game environments, robust rule adherence becomes critical when user intent conflicts with system rules. However, these models are trained to be helpful and compliant, leaving them vulnerable to a class of attacks we term \textit{Rhetorical Injection}, where adversarial users exploit narrative framing techniques such as pseudo-logical reasoning and authoritative coercion to bypass adjudication logic. We present CoC-Seduce, a multi-agent adversarial benchmark built on Tabletop Role-Playing Game (TRPG) mechanics, an ideal instantiation of semi-open environments where rules are explicit for adjudication, yet interaction remains entirely in natural language. Three frontier models, i.e., GPT-5.4, Claude Sonnet 4.6, Gemini 3.5 Flash, serve as adversarial generators producing 5,376 samples across 4 world settings and 16 skill categories. We then benchmark 20 target adjudicators against this corpus. Evaluation across 20 models reveals that neither model scale nor explicit reasoning mechanisms reliably confer adjudication robustness, with \textsc{Pseudo-Logic} emerging as the dominant attack vector and cross-cultural settings exposing systematic knowledge gaps across all evaluated families. Project page: https://github.com/answerrtx/CoC-Seduce

AI.tldr: 论文提出了CoC-Seduce基准，通过模拟TRPG游戏环境，分析了大语言模型在面对复杂修辞攻击（如伪逻辑和权威劝说）时的规则鲁棒性问题。研究发现，目前主流大模型在应对这些攻击时表现不佳，并揭示了其在跨文化设置下的知识空白。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型（LLMs）被广泛用于半开放的文本游戏裁决者。但是，模型的善意和顺从性使其容易被用户通过复杂修辞或伪逻辑策略绕过系统规则，造成鲁棒性风险。研究希望深入理解并量化这些攻击风险。
AI.method: 作者提出了基于TRPG（桌面角色扮演游戏）机制的多智能体对抗基准CoC-Seduce，让三种最前沿的大模型（GPT-5.4、Claude Sonnet 4.6、Gemini 3.5 Flash）生成用于攻击的样本。在四种世界设定和16个技能类别下生成5,376个对抗样本，对20种目标裁决模型进行评测，系统检验模型抵御‘修辞注入’攻击的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 评测显示，无论模型规模是否更大，抑或是否具备显性推理机制，都无法根本提升其裁决鲁棒性。尤其是‘伪逻辑’类修辞成为主要攻击方式。此外，不同文化设定下，所有模型家族都暴露出系统性知识缺口。
AI.conclusion: 当前LLMs在半开放环境的自动裁决任务中，尚未具备足够的防御修辞攻击的鲁棒性。未来研究需聚焦于提升模型对于复杂修辞攻击的防御能力和跨文化知识健壮性。

title: How many labels do you need? A decision framework for cross-habitat marine species recognition
comment: 29 pages, 12 figures, 4 tables. Includes supplementary appendix
summary:
Automated image recognition is increasingly used to scale ecological monitoring beyond manual annotation, yet ecologists lack evidence-based guidance on how much labelling effort reliable deployment at new sites requires. We present a decision framework quantifying the trade-off between labelling effort and recognition accuracy when transferring vision systems across marine habitats. The benchmark spans five datasets, three oceans, and three taxonomic groups (fish, corals, invertebrates), from tropical reefs in the Great Barrier Reef and French Polynesia to a temperate Danish fjord. We evaluated four recognition models (DINOv2, CLIP, ResNet-50, EfficientNet-B4) under four adaptation strategies (linear probing, LoRA, Visual Prompt Tuning, full fine-tuning) across three protocols: within-habitat transfer across 20 reef sites (240 runs), cross-dataset geographic transfer along a difficulty gradient (40 runs), and few-shot adaptation curves with 0-100 labelled samples per class (648 runs). Frozen self-supervised foundation features (DINOv2 + linear classifier, 1,538 trainable parameters) generalised to unseen reef sites at least as well as fully fine-tuned convolutional baselines four orders of magnitude larger; they learned species-diagnostic, habitat-invariant representations, whereas baselines encoded habitat-specific shortcuts that fail at new sites. As few as 10-20 labelled images per species sufficed to deploy reliable recognition at a new site, cutting annotation effort by roughly an order of magnitude.
  Solution. Programmes expanding to new sites can deploy reliable recognition by pairing a frozen, open foundation model (DINOv2) with a simple linear classifier and annotating only 10-20 images per species - roughly 1-4 hours per site. The framework lets programmes budget labelling effort against expected accuracy across sites, ecosystems, and platforms.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个框架，用于权衡跨海洋生境迁移时的图像识别系统标注工作量与识别准确率。研究结果显示，冻结的自监督特征结合简单线性分类器，在新站点表现优异，仅需每物种10-20张标注即可达可靠识别。
AI.motivation: 随着生态监测自动化，人工图像注释难以满足大规模多区域部署需求。生态学家需要基于证据的方法明确新地点实际所需的标注量，以优化工作效率并保证模型准确率。
AI.method: 作者收集五个数据集，涵盖三大洋、三类生物（鱼、珊瑚、无脊椎动物），比较了DINOv2、CLIP、ResNet-50、EfficientNet-B4四种模型与四种迁移学习适配策略（线性微调、LoRA、视觉提示调优、全量微调），并在三类转移任务中测评其表现。
AI.result: 冻结的DINOv2特征配合线性分类器，在新站点表现与大规模全量微调网络相当或更好，仅需少量标注（每类10-20张图像），便可可靠部署，大幅减少标注工作量；传统基线方法容易学到特定栖息地的捷径，泛化性差。
AI.conclusion: 生态监测项目若扩展至新站点，仅需采取冻结DINOv2特征+线性分类器，并标注有限样本，即可实现高效可靠识别，为资源分配和部署提供定量决策依据。

title: Longitudinal-Motion-Aware Lateral Control for Autonomous Vehicles: A Robust Nonlinear Control Framework
summary: As autonomous vehicles (AVs) operate in increasingly dynamic traffic conditions, lateral control must be performed while longitudinal speed and acceleration vary. Yet many existing lateral controllers rely on constant-speed or operating-point-based assumptions, which can degrade performance during transient longitudinal maneuvers. Moreover, most methods assume precisely known vehicle parameters, despite real-world parametric uncertainties. To address these limitations, this paper presents a longitudinal-motion-aware robust nonlinear lateral control framework for AVs. It first derives a tracking error model that depends on varying longitudinal speed and acceleration. Using this model, feedback linearization is employed to obtain a linear input-output relation for lateral error tracking while embedding longitudinal motion into the control law. The resulting internal dynamics are then analyzed to ensure overall system stability. To address parameter uncertainty, two robust control designs with distinct implementation trade-offs are proposed: (i) a Lyapunov redesign (LR) approach inspired by sliding mode control, and (ii) an incremental nonlinear dynamic inversion (INDI) method. Both are rigorously analyzed and proven to ensure ultimate boundedness, with key robustness-tuning parameters explicitly identified. Simulations demonstrate enhanced tracking accuracy, consistent performance across varying speeds and accelerations, and robustness to model uncertainties, while also examining the effects of the robustness-related parameters. Real-vehicle tests further confirm real-time implementation and practical path-tracking performance on actual hardware.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种考虑纵向运动的鲁棒非线性横向控制框架，能够在车辆纵向速度和加速度变化时保持高效的横向轨迹跟踪，并针对参数不确定性给出两种鲁棒控制器设计方案。通过仿真与实车实验，验证了跟踪精度、鲁棒性与实时实用性。
AI.motivation: 当前自动驾驶车辆的横向控制器多建立在恒速或特定工况假设下，面对复杂的纵向变速工况时性能容易下降，且往往假设车辆参数已知，难以应对实际的不确定性。需要设计一个能处理速度、加速度变化，且具备鲁棒性的横向控制方法。
AI.method: 论文首先建立了包含随纵向速度和加速度变化的横向误差模型，采用反馈线性化将非线性问题转化为线性输入输出，并嵌入纵向运动影响。接着分析了内在动态确保系统稳定性。针对参数不确定性，设计了基于Lyapunov重设计和增量非线性动态反演（INDI）的两种鲁棒控制器。
AI.result: 理论分析证明两种控制方法能保证最终有界，并明确展示鲁棒性调节参数。仿真结果显示方案在不同速度、加速度及模型不确定性情况下均有优越的跟踪精度和提升的鲁棒性，相关参数影响也被系统评估。实车实验进一步证实控制器能够在实际硬件上实时运行，具有良好路径跟踪效果。
AI.conclusion: 本文控制框架有效提升了变速工况下自动驾驶车辆横向控制的准确性与鲁棒性，为实际应用奠定基础。

title: Jointly Improving Dialect Identification and ASR in Indian Languages using Multimodal Feature Fusion
summary: Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) and Dialect Identification (DID) are crucial for Indian languages, many of which are low-resource and exhibit significant dialectal differences. Existing methods often optimize ASR or DID individually, resulting in performance trade-offs. In this work, we propose a multimodal framework that jointly improves ASR and DID. Our method employs a Bottleneck Encoder to extract dialectal features from Conformer-based speech representations and a RoBERTa encoder to process ASR-generated CTC embeddings. A gating mechanism merges these features, followed by an attention encoder to refine the representations. The learned embeddings are concatenated with Conformer outputs to enhance ASR features. Evaluated on eight Indian languages with thirty-three dialects, our method achieves an average DID accuracy of 81.63% and average CER and WER of 4.65% and 17.73%, respectively. These results highlight the effectiveness of our method for joint ASR-DID modeling.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多模态联合训练框架，显著提升了印度多语言、多方言环境下的自动语音识别（ASR）与方言识别（DID）性能。
AI.motivation: 印度多语言环境下，许多语言资源匮乏，并且存在显著方言差异。传统方法多为单独优化ASR或DID，难以兼顾两者，影响整体性能。因此需一种能同时提升ASR与DID的新方法。
AI.method: 提出了一套多模态框架，结合Bottleneck Encoder与Conformer提取方言特征，通过RoBERTa编码ASR输出，利用门控机制融合多源信息，并用attention encoder优化表示，最终与Conformer输出拼接以增强ASR特征。
AI.result: 在包括33种方言的8种印度语言数据集上，DID平均准确率达81.63%，ASR字符错误率（CER）为4.65%，词错误率（WER）为17.73%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在多个印度语言及方言上均实现了ASR与DID的同步提升，验证了多模态联合建模的有效性。

title: Inpainting U-Net for seamless pedestrian-level wind prediction across urban morphologies
summary: Pedestrian-level wind prediction is essential for urban design and wind-comfort assessment, but high-fidelity simulations such as LES remain computationally expensive for rapid evaluation. This study develops a two-stage U-Net framework for efficient prediction of time-averaged pedestrian-level wind speed over realistic urban morphologies. The model is trained and evaluated using the UrbanTALES dataset, which contains realistic city configurations under different approaching wind directions. In the first stage, a baseline U-Net model (M1) predicts wind fields patch-by-patch from normalised building height and fetch information. This formulation allows application to urban domains of arbitrary size, but independent patch inference can introduce discontinuities at patch boundaries. To address this, a second U-Net model (M2) is introduced as an inpainting-based refinement model. M2 uses a larger contextual window containing the initial M1 prediction and local morphology to reduce discontinuities using neighbouring flow information. During full-field inference, M2 is applied iteratively using a Gauss-Seidel scheme until convergence. Results show that M1 captures the main spatial distribution of pedestrian-level wind speed and performs well in low- and moderate-velocity regions, although high-velocity peaks are less accurate. M2 substantially reduces patch-boundary artefacts and improves spatial coherence. Across unseen urban cases, the framework reproduces mean velocity and spatial variability reasonably well, while maximum velocities remain underestimated. Overall, the proposed framework provides an efficient and flexible surrogate model for high-resolution pedestrian-level wind prediction across realistic urban morphologies.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于两阶段U-Net的高效行人层风速预测方法，实现了对复杂城市形态下高分辨率风场的快速推断。关键创新在于通过分块推断结合修补模型，有效解决了传统深度学习方法在大尺度城市场景中预测边界不连续的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统高保真风场模拟如LES计算量大、难以满足城市风环境设计与评估中的快速需求。现有数据驱动方法面临尺度泛化、边界断裂等难题，亟需高效且能处理任意规模城市风场的预测模型。
AI.method: 方法采用两阶段U-Net架构。第一阶段用U-Net(M1)以城市建筑高度和迎风距离等特征预测局部风速分布，适用于大规模城市分块处理，但存在块间不连续。第二阶段引入修补型U-Net(M2)，基于更大上下文窗口，融合初步预测及邻域流场信息，通过迭代Gauss-Seidel方案平滑块边界，提升整体空间连续性。模型训练评估基于包含多风向、高度真实城市配置的UrbanTALES数据集。
AI.result: M1能够准确捕捉整体风速空间分布，尤其在低中风速区域表现优异，峰值风速略有低估。M2显著消除分块带来的边界伪影，提高预测空间一致性。对于新城市案例，模型较好再现了平均风速及空间变异性，高风速仍有部分低估。
AI.conclusion: 该两阶段U-Net框架为真实城市形态下高分辨率行人层风速预测提供了高效、灵活的替代模型。其优良的全局风场还原能力和计算效率，有望广泛用于城市风舒适性评估和设计应用。

title: Function-Space Diffusion for Motion Planning
summary: Diffusion-based motion planners have demonstrated strong performance in generating diverse and high-quality robot trajectories in cluttered environments with multiple feasible solutions. However, existing approaches typically operate on fixed-length waypoint sequences, making the learned model resolution-dependent, thereby preventing zero-shot generalization across resolutions. In this work, we propose Function-Space Diffusion for Motion Planning (FSD-MP), a diffusion-based motion planner that models trajectories as continuous functions and performs diffusion directly in function space, achieving discretization-invariant trajectory generation. We define a mode-wise forward process in the spectral domain, driven by Gaussian noise with a Matérn-type covariance, and parameterize the reverse process with a boundary-compatible Discrete Sine Transform-based Fourier Neural Operator (DST-FNO) that preserves start-goal constraints across resolutions. We evaluate FSD-MP on 2D point robot and 7-DoF Franka manipulator planning benchmarks. Our method achieves competitive planning performance at the training resolution and generalizes zero-shot across resolutions up to 16$\times$ higher, preserving consistent planning behavior without retraining. These results demonstrate that function-space diffusion provides an effective framework for discretization-invariant motion planning.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于函数空间扩散的新型运动规划方法（FSD-MP），能够生成与离散分辨率无关的高质量机器人轨迹，并在多种分辨率下无需重新训练即可实现零样本泛化。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于扩散的运动规划方法受限于定长轨迹点，导致模型只能在特定分辨率下工作，难以跨分辨率泛化，限制了其实用性。
AI.method: 作者提出了FSD-MP方法，将轨迹建模为连续函数，并直接在函数空间进行扩散。前向过程在谱域中以具有Matérn型协方差的高斯噪声为驱动，反向过程则利用基于离散正弦变换（DST）的Fourier神经算子（DST-FNO）建模，确保满足边界约束。
AI.result: 在2D点机器人和7自由度Franka机械臂运动规划基准上评测，FSD-MP在训练分辨率下表现优异，并能在分辨率最多提升16倍时依然保持稳定规划性能，无需重新训练即可泛化。
AI.conclusion: 基于函数空间的扩散为离散分辨率不变的运动规划提供了有效框架，显著提升了模型的泛化和实用能力。

title: PraMem: Practice-derived Experiential Memory for Long-horizon Behavior Prediction
summary: Long-horizon behavior prediction aims to infer a user's next action based on a lengthy historical sequence, playing a crucial role in artificial intelligence field. The rise of large language models (LLMs) offers a promising direction for sequential behavior prediction, yet LLMs struggle with latent behavioral pattern induction and model-intrinsic cognitive biases when tackling long-horizon behavior prediction. Prior memory management methods follow a context-compression paradigm that attempts to address this task by alleviating the historical sequence burden, yet fail to resolve the core challenges. In this paper, we advocate a paradigm shift that reframes the lengthy historical sequence from a burden into a valuable resource to be exploited, and accordingly propose PraMem, which conducts beforehand practice over the lengthy historical sequence to build an experiential memory, thereby serving as the assisted input for accurate long-horizon behavior prediction. Extensive experiments across diverse tasks demonstrate that PraMem achieves superior performance than prior methods, and more in-depth analyses provide valuable insights into the mechanism and evolution of the experiential memory. Code: https://github.com/icip-cas/PraMem.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新方法PraMem，通过事先对长历史序列进行练习，构建经验记忆，从而提升长时序行为预测的准确性，实验验证有效。
AI.motivation: 随着大语言模型（LLM）兴起，研究者希望利用其强大的序列建模能力做长时序用户行为预测，但现有方法在隐含行为模式归纳和模型内在偏差方面存在明显瓶颈，传统做法将长历史序列视为负担，仅通过压缩历史解决上下文负载问题，未触及根本。
AI.method: 文章提出将长历史序列视为可利用的资源而非仅是负担。具体方法PraMem在实际预测前，对用户的历史行为序列进行‘练习’，从中主动构建经验记忆，将其作为辅助输入提升长时序行为预测准确率。
AI.result: 通过在多种行为预测任务上的大规模实验证明，PraMem在预测准确率等多个指标上超过了以往的方法，并且深入分析了经验记忆结构的机制和演化过程。
AI.conclusion: 长时序行为预测应该利用而非简化历史信息，PraMem以其主动经验记忆机制在该领域取得了优异的效果，并为后续相关研究提供了新思路和新机制。

title: Double-Helix Active Geometry: LiDAR-Anchored Multi-View Depth with Selective Abstention
summary: Consumer depth sensors such as the LiDAR scanner on recent iPhones provide metric range, but their useful range is short and their returns are sparse. We present DH-Active, a lightweight, training-free geometry back-end that treats the sensor as a metric ruler rather than the sole source of depth. Near-field returns anchor the metric relative pose of two views through PnP; visually trackable samples without a valid depth return are then triangulated under that pose. A parallax/reprojection gate abstains wherever the geometry is ill-conditioned, leaving an explicit hole and a selective score instead of forcing an estimate. The measured core front end, including spiral sampling, sparse back-projection, and hole taxonomy but excluding preprocessing and multi-view recovery, runs at 1.11 ms median latency on CPU (OpenCV using 14 threads), about 38 times faster than a DINOv2-L visual branch on GPU in our timing setup. Across two iPhone captures and the public TUM RGB-D and ARKitScenes benchmarks, held-out depth is recovered at 1.4 to 6.7 percent median relative error. In a controlled ARKitScenes protocol that uses only returns within 2 m to set scale and an independent laser scan as ground truth, DH-Active achieves 64.2 percent scene-median coverage of evaluable far-field candidates at 13.4 percent scene-median relative error; direct triangulation from the device trajectory is not usable. We also report the alternatives that failed in our tests: single-frame defocus, classical focus-stack depth, defocus-LiDAR fusion, point-to-point ICP over a good visual-inertial track, and attention-to-holes resampling. A 1.26 B learned model remains more accurate after oracle scale alignment. The contribution here is narrower: metric sparse depth, explicit abstention, zero learned parameters, and near-millisecond CPU cost.

AI.tldr: DH-Active 是一种轻量级、无需训练的几何后端算法，可高效从消费级深度传感器（如iPhone上的LiDAR）和视觉信号恢复稀疏测距，速度远超视觉模型，且无需深度学习。
AI.motivation: 近年来消费级深度传感器（如iPhone的LiDAR）普及，但其测距范围短、点云稀疏，难以广泛获得高质量深度信息。现有方法或过度依赖深度学习，或难以高效处理稀疏测量。本文动机是突破传感器限制，在几乎不增加计算开销的条件下获得高准确性的稀疏度量深度。
AI.method: DH-Active 方法将深度传感器视为“标尺”而非唯一深度来源，结合PnP利用近距深度点锚定相对姿态，对无深度回传但可视觉跟踪的点进行三角测量，并用视差/重投影门控对几何不良区域显式保留空洞，无强行拟合。此外，该方法包含螺旋采样、稀疏反投影、空洞分类，整体不含深度学习训练。
AI.result: 在两组iPhone实拍数据及公开TUM RGB-D、ARKitScenes基准上，DH-Active对保留深度点的恢复误差为1.4%~6.7%（中位相对误差）。在严格协议下，对远距有效候选覆盖率64.2%，误差13.4%；对比多种失败的替代方法，DH-Active在无深度学习前提下表现突出，且CPU延迟极低（1.11ms），比DINOv2-L快约38倍。
AI.conclusion: DH-Active无需学习、低延迟、度量精度高，能有效重建稀疏深度并显式区分计算空洞，为消费级传感器拓宽了高效利用场景，但覆盖和整体精度仍不及大型深度学习模型。

title: Beyond Heuristics: A Standardized Real2Sim Pipeline for Physical Human Robot Interaction in Human-in-the-Loop Simulation
summary: The aging global population drives demand for assistive robots, yet the safety risks and costs of physical testing make Human-in-the-Loop (HITL) simulation an attractive alternative. Its fidelity for coupled systems, however, is limited by interaction models whose impedance parameters are tuned heuristically rather than identified from data. We present a Real2Sim pipeline that identifies the coupled Physical Human-Robot Interaction (pHRI) dynamics of a pelvis--strap interface on an overground mobile balance assistant. The interface is modeled as a 6-DoF viscoelastic mechanism whose 12 directional stiffness and damping parameters are identified per subject via Covariance Matrix Adaptation Evolution Strategy (CMA-ES), using the user's ``Safe \& Comfortable'' feedback as a reproducible operating point that resolves harness-tightness ambiguity across anthropometrics. An intraclass-correlation analysis over a five-subject cohort separates shareable from subject-specific parameters, yielding a set of prior parameters derived from the existing data. Deploying this prior configures a previously unseen subject by refining only 5 of the 12 parameters. The calibrated model then reproduces the real interaction envelope and induces biomechanically accurate gait adaptations in the Human Digital Twin (HDT). Overly compliant and overly stiff settings, by contrast, fail as extreme settings, confirming a correct operating point that no heuristic tuning procedure can reliably select. The pipeline thus improves HITL simulation fidelity and supports the Human Digital Twin as a predictive tool for pre-clinical verification of personalized controllers.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新颖的Real2Sim流程，通过数据驱动的方法自动识别人-机器人耦合系统中的物理交互动态参数，从而大幅提升人体在环仿真的精度和实用性。
AI.motivation: 全球老龄化加剧，助老机器人需求激增，但真实物理测试既昂贵又有安全风险。因此，提升人体在环仿真的精度具有重要意义。然而，现有方法对人机交互模型参数多靠经验调整，影响了仿真保真度。
AI.method: 作者设计了一条Real2Sim流程，将人机物理交互建模为6自由度粘弹性结构，针对每位用户，用协方差矩阵自适应进化策略（CMA-ES）算法根据用户“安全舒适”反馈自动识别12个方向的刚度和阻尼参数。同时，通过组内相关分析区分了可跨用户共享与个性化参数，并用先验参数简化了新用户的模型校准过程。
AI.result: 实验证明，根据该流程校准后的模型能准确再现真实的交互包络并诱导数字孪生人（HDT）产生真实的步态适应。极端参数会导致仿真失真，反证所提方法优于经验调参。5名受试者实验显示，此流程能兼顾个体化与通用性。
AI.conclusion: 本文流程显著提升了人体在环仿真的精度，为数字孪生人预临床个性化控制器开发和辅助机器人的验证提供了更可信的工具。

title: Where do LLMs Fall Short in CBT-Guided Affective Reasoning?
comment: 12 pages, 7 figures, accepted for publication in Affective Computing and Intelligent Interaction (ACII), 2026
summary: Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT) provides a structured framework for understanding a user's mental state by examining the interaction between cognitive and behavioral factors. However, out-of-the-box LLMs respond fluently and empathetically, yet collapse into validation & reflection, regardless of what the user actually needs. They know theoretical CBT (scoring up to 96% accuracy on licensing exam questions) but fail to apply it effectively. We explore this gap with a knowledge-guided framework that treats CBT dialogue as controlled affective reasoning: user narratives are decomposed into Beck's Cognitive Conceptualization structure, grounded in clinical SNOMED CT concepts validated via Natural Language Inference, and a Multiple Chain-of-Thought (MCoT) strategy selection between Validation & Reflection, Socratic Questioning, or Alternative Perspectives. To measure whether such guidance actually changes behavior, we introduce the Protocol Leverage Force (F), a behavior-level metric that captures how far an intervention shifts a model away from its default response. Across three open-weight LLMs and 14 RealCBT-derived case studies, evaluated with human experts, valence-arousal trajectories, and linguistic entrainment, F shows that simply introducing protocol definitions via single chain-of-thought prompting fails to change LLM behavior, while MCoT on these definitions guides strategy selection better. Still, the effect stays within 1% (approx. 1.2-1.3%), and all models remain biased toward Validation & Reflection. These results show CBT knowledge alone does not ensure effective application, giving the affective-computing community instrumentation to measure where LLMs fall short.

AI.tldr: 本文通过引入知识引导框架，分析当前大语言模型（LLMs）虽掌握认知行为治疗（CBT）理论知识，却难以高效应用于真实CBT对话中的原因。作者提出新的行为级指标并验证影响。
AI.motivation: 已有LLMs在理论层面能很好地回答CBT相关考试题，却难以在实际对话中有效执行CBT技巧，总倾向于简单的“认可与反思”策略，不符合用户实际需求。作者希望分析并缩小这种理论与应用的鸿沟。
AI.method: 提出将CBT对话作为受控情感推理问题，采用贝克认知概念化框架分解用户叙述，对齐SNOMED CT临床概念，并引入多链式思维（MCoT）策略进行方案选择。开发新行为级指标F（Protocol Leverage Force），衡量模型行为变化，并在3个开源LLMs和14个真实案例下进行专家与定量评估。
AI.result: 仅用单链式思维提示输入协议定义，无法实质性改变LLM行为。而用MCoT能更好引导策略选择，但行为偏移幅度依然很小（约1.2-1.3%），所有模型依然倾向默认的“认可与反思”。
AI.conclusion: 单纯具备CBT相关知识并不足以保证LLM能有效应用于实际CBT对话。作者的方法和指标可帮助情感计算社区更精准地衡量和定位LLM在应用CBT时的短板。

title: Entropy-Coded MS-VQ-VAE with Learned Priors for Ultra-Low Bitrate Video Compression
summary:
Learned video codecs based on continuous latent representations struggle to operate reliably below 0.1 bits per pixel~(bpp): without a differentiable rate signal, Lagrangian optimisation cannot effectively trade reconstruction quality for bitrate at extreme compression ratios. We demonstrate that discrete latent representations sidestep this limitation entirely. In a vector-quantized~(VQ) codec, the codebook size~$K$ imposes a hard information ceiling of $\log_2 K$ bits per symbol; a learned autoregressive prior then exploits the non-uniform distribution of code usage -- which we show follows a power law -- to push actual bitrates well below this ceiling, without any rate-penalty tuning.
  Building on the MS-VQ-VAE architecture introduced in~\cite{kotthapalli2026msvqvae}, we sweep $K \in \{128, 256, 512, 1024\}$ under a uniform training protocol to trace four operating points on the rate-distortion~(RD) curve. We identify and resolve a critical training instability: gradient-based VQ collapses catastrophically at $K \leq 512$, whereas EMA-stabilised codebook updates with dead-code restart maintain full utilisation across all configurations. On 500 UCF101 test clips ($64\!\times\!64$, 32~frames), our models operate at 0.043-0.064~bpp -- 3.3-5$\times$ below H.264's practical floor and $5$-$7.6\times$ below H.265's floor at this resolution. Every MS-VQ-VAE configuration outperforms H.265 CRF\,36 on perceptual quality (LPIPS) despite using $5$-$7.6\times$ fewer bits. At $K{=}1024$, the model surpasses H.265 CRF\,36 on LPIPS by a margin of 0.072 absolute while using $5.1\times$ fewer bits. Codebook analysis confirms power-law index distributions and 70-85\% entropy efficiency, establishing the pipeline as a principled learned entropy coder.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于离散向量量化（VQ）隐变量的新型学习式视频编解码器，能在极低比特率（低至0.043-0.064 bpp）下保持高视频质量，显著优于传统H.264/H.265标准。
AI.motivation: 现有基于连续隐变量的学习视频编解码方法在极低比特率（如低于0.1 bpp）下，因缺乏可微分的码率信号，难以有效权衡重建质量与压缩率。本文旨在解决该极低比特率下的性能瓶颈，实现更高效的视频压缩。
AI.method: 用离散向量量化（VQ）隐变量代替连续隐变量，并结合自回归先验对码字使用的非均匀性进行建模，通过EMA稳定的码本更新解决VQ训练不稳定问题。模型基于MS-VQ-VAE架构，系统性实验不同码本大小（K=128,256,512,1024），评估在UCF101数据集上的端到端性能。
AI.result: 在500个UCF101测试片段上，编解码模型比H.264和H.265最低码率分别低3.3-5倍和5-7.6倍，同时在感知质量（LPIPS）全面优于H.265 CRF 36配置。在最大码本（K=1024）下，模型以5.1倍更低码率显著提升了LPIPS分数（提升绝对值0.072）。码本使用效率高达70-85%，并呈现幂律分布。
AI.conclusion: 基于VQ的离散隐变量学习编解码器突破了极低比特率下的性能瓶颈，实现极高压缩比的同时保有极佳视频感知质量，以高熵效率成为新一代高效学习视频编码工具。

title: DRBA: Dynamic Robotic Balance Assistant -- An assist-as-needed gait and balance rehabilitation robot for versatile training
summary: The decline of human balance control due to aging and pathological conditions increases fall risk, a major concern in geriatric care and rehabilitation. Gait training is essential for balance recovery, enhancing walking ability and postural control. However, existing overground robotic gait trainers have limitations: body weight support systems are bulky and impractical for daily use, while end-effector-based systems often compromise transparency, altering natural gait dynamics. This paper presents the Dynamic Robotic Balance Assistant (DRBA), a novel gait trainer providing assist-as-needed body weight and balance support for various training scenarios. DRBA integrates a 3-degree-of-freedom (3-DoF) robotic arm for pelvic support with flexible motion, a compact sit-to-stand assistance module, and user-following and fall detection algorithms to ensure minimal interference and responsive support. Experimental results demonstrated high transparency, with minimal impact on natural gait dynamics. A patient trial with nine elderly patients with varying medical conditions and balance impairments (ranging from severe to mild) further validated DRBA's effectiveness. The results showed that DRBA-assisted training increased step length and walking speed compared to therapist-assisted gait training. Additionally, DRBA enabled users to perform tasks beyond their unaided ability, expanding rehabilitation possibilities. These findings highlight DRBA's potential to enhance rehabilitation outcomes by facilitating higher training intensity and enabling task-oriented exercises.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型步态训练机器人（DRBA），能够根据需要辅助老年人或病患恢复行走和平衡能力，实验和患者验证显示其优于传统训练方法。
AI.motivation: 老年人及病患因年龄或疾病导致平衡控制能力下降，增加了跌倒风险，严重影响生活质量。现有步态训练器存在使用不便及影响自然步态的问题，因此需要更高效便捷的训练设备。
AI.method: 研究团队设计了具备3自由度骨盆支持机械臂的DRBA，结合灵活运动、紧凑型坐到站起辅助模块，以及用户跟踪和跌倒检测算法，实现按需辅助平衡和体重支撑。通过实验测试其对自然步态的影响，并在9名有不同医疗状况的老年患者中进行对比训练验证。
AI.result: 实验显示DRBA对步态的干扰极小，能够高度还原自然步态。患者临床试验结果表明，使用DRBA进行训练显著增加了步长和步速，并允许用户完成原本无法独自完成的训练任务。
AI.conclusion: DRBA提高了步态训练的强度和针对性，有望提升康复效果，拓展康复训练内容，是一种具有实际应用与推广价值的平衡辅助设备。

title: Distill Where the Student Goes: Teacher-Regularized RL for English-Evidence Cross-Lingual RAG
summary: Cross-lingual retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) is often deployed in an English-evidence regime, where users query in diverse languages but retrieved passages remain English. In this setting, generation can fail despite strong base models: English evidence induces language drift (English or code-switching outputs) and models use evidence unreliably when producing non-English answers. We attribute these failures to two post-training challenges: (i) errors are prefix-dependent, so fixed-trajectory supervision suffers from prefix mismatch; and (ii) sequence-level (partly discrete / judge-based) rewards yield noisy credit assignment and high-variance updates. We propose TR-RAG, a teacher-regularized RL recipe that couples reward optimization with on-policy distillation on student-visited prefixes. A compact student samples on-policy answers, while a stronger frozen teacher is queried only on those prefixes and provides a prefix-wise student-to-teacher reverse-KL anchor. We further introduce a reward decomposition for English-evidence multilingual generation, combining language consistency, character 3-gram recall, and an LLM-judge score for evidence-grounded correctness. Across three benchmarks -- BioASQ-ENKB5, Hotpot-ENKB5, and naturally multilingual MKQA -- and two backbones, TR-RAG improves the composite of language adherence and evidence-grounded correctness over strong baselines. Crucially, the teacher anchor acts as a safety net: on in-domain languages it prevents the large language-consistency collapses (up to ~27 percentage points) that reward-only RL can suffer by drifting below even the base model, while on distant out-of-distribution languages -- where reward-only RL stalls at the base model's ceiling -- it still improves evidence grounding; and on character 3-gram recall the compact student sometimes surpasses its 70B teacher.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的跨语言检索增强生成（RAG）方法TR-RAG，通过结合教师正则化的强化学习解决现有多语言英文证据RAG在输出语言一致性和证据可靠性方面的问题，实验证明其在多个基准上超越现有强基线。
AI.motivation: 现有跨语言RAG系统广泛采用英文知识库支持多语言查询，但生成结果常常出现语种漂移（如英文或混合输出）及证据利用不佳等问题，影响了非英文答案的质量。这主要归因于后训练阶段遭遇的两大挑战：一是错误发生依赖于生成前缀，固定轨迹学习会因前缀不符导致困难；二是序列级奖励反馈不稳定，易出现噪声和高方差。作者因此致力于提出更稳健的优化策略。
AI.method: 作者提出TR-RAG框架，将强化学习奖励优化与在学生生成轨迹上的政策蒸馏相结合。具体做法是：由规模较小的学生模型负责在线生成答案，并仅在其生成的前缀上调用冻结的大型教师模型进行比对，以前缀级的反向KL惩罚作为锚点，减少语言漂移和奖励引导过度的风险。同时设计了多元化的奖励，将语言一致性、字级三元组召回率以及由LLM判断的证据可靠性分解组合，提升多语言RAG系统的多维表现。
AI.result: 在BioASQ-ENKB5、Hotpot-ENKB5及多语言MKQA三个主流跨语言生成基准和两种主干模型上，TR-RAG在语言一致性和证据可靠性等综合表现上显著优于现有强基线。实验发现，教师锚点机制对同域语言可有效防止奖励强化学习导致的语言降解问题，对远域语言则实现了超越初始基线的证据利用提升。此外，紧凑学生模型在字3-gram召回等指标上表现甚至优于其庞大的70B教师模型。
AI.conclusion: 教师正则化RL与多维度奖励设计能有效提升英文证据的多语言RAG输出质量，同时增强小型学生模型利用证据和维持语言一致性的能力，避免了单纯奖励方法带来的极端输出风险，为多语言检索增强生成任务提供了更强的技术保障。

title: Attention Dynamics in Diffusion Models: A Visual Analytics Framework for Human-AI Collaboration
summary: Diffusion-based text-to-image models can synthesize complex and highly structured visual content, yet the emergence and evolution of semantic structure remain difficult to interpret. Many existing workflows rely on aggregated attention or scalar summaries that separate temporal change from image-space evidence. To address this gap, we present a visual analytics framework for exploring attention dynamics in diffusion models: the step-indexed evolution of token-level cross-attention maps, their temporal concentration, and their spatial relationships. Our approach enables structured analysis of attention behavior across generation steps by integrating quantitative measures with data-driven stage identification in an interactive workflow. Case studies on a structured 60-prompt Stable-Diffusion-class benchmark illustrate recurring, interpretable patterns within this setting and show how linked temporal and spatial views facilitate the observation and discussion of generative processes, supporting more effective human-AI collaboration.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一套视觉分析框架，用于探索扩散模型中跨步注意力动态的演化，以便更好理解文本生成图像过程中语义结构的形成。
AI.motivation: 现有对扩散模型中注意力机制的分析多依赖聚合后的注意力或标量总结，难以同时结合时间变化与图像空间证据，导致对语义结构产生过程的理解较为有限。
AI.method: 作者提出可视分析框架，跟踪和分析跨步token级注意力图的演化，结合定量度量和数据驱动的阶段识别，在交互式工作流中揭示注意力的时间集中性及其空间关系。
AI.result: 在Stable-Diffusion类的60个结构化prompt基准上，分析发现了可解释且重复出现的注意力动态模式，展示了该框架能够联结时间与空间视角，帮助观察和讨论生成过程。
AI.conclusion: 该框架支持更有效的人机协作，为扩散模型生成过程中的语义结构理解和分析提供了有力工具。

title: Exp2VLA: Enabling Vision-Language-Action for Drone Navigation from Expert Demonstrations
summary: Vision-language-action (VLA) models open a new path toward intuitive robot control by directly linking perception, language, and action in a single end-to-end framework. Yet for UAVs, practical adoption remains difficult because existing solutions are either computationally heavy or insufficiently capable in complex environments. In this work, we propose a practical expert-distillation pipeline (Exp2VLA) for language-conditioned drone navigation. The core idea is to distill expert behavior, obtained from reinforcement learning, teleoperation, or other controllers, into training data that can be used to fine-tune compact VLA models. This allows existing control strategies to be transferred into a unified language-guided navigation model, reducing manual system integration and lowering the barrier for deploying new robot behaviors. Experiments in both sim-to-sim and simulation-in-the-loop settings across multi-object scenes show that the fine-tuned models can handle varied semantic commands and generalize to unseen target compositions. The proposed framework demonstrates how expert-policy distillation can help mechatronic systems move from specialized control modules toward more flexible and reusable robot intelligence.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于专家蒸馏的轻量级视觉-语言-行为（VLA）模型训练流程（Exp2VLA），实现了语言条件下无人机高效导航控制，并兼具泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA模型在无人机领域实际应用受限，主要因为其计算成本高或在复杂环境下效果不佳。为改善无人机在实际任务中基于语言指令的灵活控制，亟需有更高效、易推广的方法。
AI.method: 提出一个专家蒸馏流程，将专家行为（如强化学习、人工操作等）转化为可用于紧凑型VLA模型微调的训练数据，实现现有控制策略的知识迁移，从而打造统一的语言引导型导航系统。
AI.result: 在多目标任务下的sim-to-sim及仿真闭环实验中，微调后的VLA模型可处理多样的语义命令，并对未见过的目标组合表现出良好泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该专家蒸馏框架展示了用更灵活、可复用的机器人智能替代传统、分散的控制模块，为实际无人机控制系统的部署降低了门槛。

title: Hierarchical Sparse Attention Done Right: Toward Infinite Context Modeling
summary: Scaling modern large language models (LLMs) to long contexts is limited by the quadratic computation cost, and poor length extrapolation of dense attention. Chunk-wise sparse attention offers a promising alternative, but all existing methods fall short of full attention because of their inaccurate chunk selection. We propose Hierarchical Landmark Sparse (HiLS) Attention, a chunk-wise sparse attention mechanism that learns chunk selection end-to-end under the language-modeling (LM) loss. HiLS factorizes attention hierarchically: each query performs attention independently with each retrieved chunk to extract chunk-specific information, and the resulting outputs are fused according to chunk retrieval scores. By incorporating retrieval scores into the forward attention computation, HiLS optimizes them directly with the LM loss, enabling end-to-end retrieval learning and native sparse training. Experimental results show that HiLS-Attention achieves performance comparable to, and in some cases better than, full attention at in-domain context lengths. Meanwhile, HiLS-Attention extrapolates more than $64\times$ the training context length with 90% retrieval accuracy, far beyond full attention. Moreover, existing full-attention models can be converted to HiLS-Attention with lightweight continued pretraining, preserving in-domain performance while acquiring ultra-long-context extrapolation. Together with its sparse KV access and computation, HiLS-Attention breaks the usual efficiency-performance trade-off, enabling long-context LLMs that are both more efficient and more effective on general long-context tasks than their full-attention counterparts.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新型稀疏注意力机制（HiLS Attention），能在不降低性能的情况下支持大语言模型更长上下文输入，并显著提升运算效率。
AI.motivation: 传统全连接注意力在处理超长上下文时计算量随长度呈二次增长，且稠密注意力在长度外推时表现较差，现有稀疏注意力机制因块选择不准确导致性能不如全注意力。
AI.method: 提出Hierarchical Landmark Sparse (HiLS) Attention，将注意力层次化分解，每个查询会独立与所检索到的块进行注意力计算，并依据检索得分融合这些输出。检索得分融入前向计算流程，在语言模型损失下端到端优化，实现块选择和稀疏训练一体化。
AI.result: HiLS Attention在与全注意力机制对比下，在训练范围内取得了相当甚至更优的表现；在长度外推上能达到训练长度64倍以上时保持90%检索准确率，远超全注意力。且全注意力模型能通过轻量续训迁移为HiLS架构，保留原有域内性能并获得超长外推能力。
AI.conclusion: HiLS-Attention机制兼顾了高效和高性能，突破了以往效率与性能的矛盾，使大语言模型在处理超长上下文任务时表现优于全注意力模型。

title: From Raw Segmentations to Simulation-Ready Cardiac Meshes: An Automated Framework for Anatomical Reconstruction and Virtual Cohort Generation
summary:
Computational models of the human heart are widely used to study electromechanical and fluid-dynamical cardiac function and to support applications such as in silico clinical trials. However, most studies remain limited to single or patient-specific anatomies, restricting the inclusion of population-level variability required for uncertainty quantification. A key challenge is translating medical-image segmentations, which may contain artifacts, mesh defects or disjoint domains, into topologically coherent geometries suitable for multiphysics simulations.
  In this work, we present a semi-automatic pipeline that converts CT-based segmentations into simulation-ready cardiac meshes within a few minutes while preserving anatomical and topological consistency. Building on modern deep learning segmentation methods, the framework incorporates a template-based registration stage to regularize artifacts and enforce mesh-quality constraints. A Chamfer-distance morphing strategy deforms a high-quality template toward each segmented heart, matching individual chambers while preserving topology.
  The resulting meshes are watertight, isotopological, and endowed with consistent point-to-point correspondence. The pipeline is validated on 58 healthy cardiac CT scans, including all cardiac chambers and proximal vessel segments. The resulting meshes can be represented in a unified shape space, enabling the construction of a statistical shape model of the heart and major vessels. Principal Component Analysis shows that a low-dimensional latent space efficiently captures population variability, while Gaussian Mixture Modeling enables synthetic anatomy generation. Overall, the proposed framework (released open-source) provides a pathway from raw segmentations to simulation-ready cardiac geometries, enabling anatomically consistent virtual cohorts for large-scale in silico studies.

AI.tldr: 提出一种将CT心脏分割数据快速自动转化为高质量、仿真可用心脏网格的流程，可在大规模体虚拟队列研究中应用。
AI.motivation: 当前心脏计算建模通常仅基于单个或个体化解剖结构，缺乏对群体多样性的量化。不规则分割与网格瑕疵常阻碍了多物理场仿真的几何准备。
AI.method: 构建了一个半自动化流程：利用深度学习分割，结合模板配准正则化分割伪影与网格质量，通过Chamfer距离形变高质量模板以适应个体分割，最终得到一致、连通且拓扑无缺陷的网格。
AI.result: 在58例健康心脏CT上验证，获得了水密、等拓扑且有点对应的网格，可在统一形状空间表达，进而建立心脏及大血管的统计形状模型，PCA和高斯混合模型证实捕捉了群体变异并生成合成解剖结构。
AI.conclusion: 提出的开源流程为从原始分割到仿真可用心脏几何体提供了高效通路，支持大规模、解剖一致的体虚拟队列研究。

title: Hope for the Best, Prepare for the Worst: Occlusion-Aware Contingency Planning for Autonomous Vehicles
summary: The deployment of autonomous vehicles in urban environments introduces significant safety challenges, particularly in scenarios with occlusions, where critical traffic participants may be hidden from view. Recent accidents involving driverless vehicles highlight the importance of motion planners that explicitly addresses the risks posed by occlusions. In this work, we propose a formal, occlusion-aware trajectory planning framework that guarantees collision avoidance even when there are possible hidden traffic participants. Building on our previous methods that apply reachability analysis to sequentially determine the possible states of hidden traffic participants, we integrate a tree-based motion planner capable of reasoning over future observations and the absence thereof. This approach reduces conservativeness while maintaining safety guarantees. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our framework in a challenging simulated occluded scenario, showing that it pro-actively and efficiently guarantees collision-avoidance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对自动驾驶车辆在城市中存在视觉遮挡情况下的轨迹规划框架，可在有潜在隐藏交通参与者时，确保规避碰撞。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶车辆在城市环境中部署时，容易因有遮挡导致部分交通参与者被隐藏，增加了安全风险。近期无人驾驶汽车的事故凸显了应对遮挡风险的运动规划需求。
AI.method: 提出了一种基于可达性分析和树结构运动规划器的轨迹规划框架。该方法能够推断潜在隐藏交通参与者的可能状态，并通过对未来观测及其缺失进行推理，减少了过度保守性，同时可保持安全保障。
AI.result: 在具有挑战性的遮挡仿真场景下测试，结果表明该框架能主动高效地保证自动驾驶过程中的避撞安全。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升了自动驾驶车辆在遮挡复杂城市环境中的安全性，为相关运动规划提供了新的思路，并具备实际应用前景。

title: psytechlab at CLPsych 2026: Utilising Natural Language Processing methods and Large Language Models for Social Media Text Analysis
comment: Accepted by CLPsych2026. CLPsych 2026 will be held at ACL in San Diego July 4th, 2026
summary: Social media posts are a rich and valuable source of data for analyzing mental health states and users' well-being using automated analysis tools. In this work, we demonstrate how we used a range of Natural Language Processing (NLP) methods, including Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM), BERT-based models, and Large Language Models (LLMs), for self-state and well-being analysis and summarization during the CLPsych Shared Task 2026. Our approach achieved one of the top Consistency and Contradiction scores for the summarization task and also middle-level results for the other tasks. By testing and developing such mental health-state estimation systems, we contributed to improving mental health support systems. We make our code available https://github.com/psytechlab/CLPsych2026/.

AI.tldr: 本论文利用多种NLP方法对社交媒体用户的心理健康状态进行自动分析和总结,并在CLPsych 2026竞赛中获得一致性和矛盾性指标的优异成绩。
AI.motivation: 社交媒体数据为分析用户心理健康状态提供了丰富资源。提高自动化分析工具可支持心理健康干预和辅助决策。
AI.method: 采用了一系列NLP技术,包括LSTM、BERT模型和大语言模型(LLMs),对自我状态及幸福感进行分析和摘要,并在CLPsych 2026共享任务中参赛。
AI.result: 在摘要任务中取得了一致性和矛盾性评分的前列成绩,其他任务中达到了中等水平。
AI.conclusion: 本系统对心理健康估测系统的研发有积极作用,推动了心理健康支持系统的改进,相关代码已开源。

title: Coordinate Singularities Break Conformal Coverage for Gaze and Head Pose
