AI.tldr: 提出了一种高效且几何精确的新型多边形带符号距离函数（PSDF），并将其应用于模型预测控制，实现了在障碍密集环境下的实时轨迹规划和碰撞规避。
AI.motivation: 在障碍物密集的环境下，传统的轨迹优化和控制方法在碰撞约束的高频率评估时计算负担极重，容易成为系统瓶颈。因此，亟需一种兼顾计算效率和几何精度的碰撞约束方法。
AI.method: 定义并实现了多边形带符号距离函数（PSDF），该函数能精确计算任意凸多边形机器人与障碍边界间的带符号距离。PSDF以无分支、无权重的张量化方式实现，便于批量GPU并行及自动微分。将PSDF嵌入到基于顺序二次规划的模型预测控制框架（PSDF-MPC）中，通过局部线性化处理约束，分离GPU和CPU计算任务。
AI.result: 微基准测试显示PSDF相比其他距离查询方法具备更好的扩展性。仿真与实地闭环实验表明，PSDF-MPC在密集多边形环境中可保持实时性和鲁棒碰撞规避，同时优于部分优化基线方法。
AI.conclusion: PSDF与PSDF-MPC可有效缓解优化型局部规划中的碰撞检测计算瓶颈，为实现具备高效、精确碰撞规避能力的机器人在复杂环境中实时运动奠定基础。

title: Semantic Integration and Lexical Expectation Shape N400 and P600 Dynamics During Naturalistic Reading
summary: Word surprisal is a well-established computational predictor of human neural responses during language comprehension, but it remains less clear whether local semantic fit explains neural response variation beyond lexical expectation during naturalistic reading. Using the Dublin EEG-based Reading Experiment Corpus (DERCo), this study examined whether contextual semantic relevance predicts word-locked EEG activity in the N400 and P600 windows. Contextual semantic relevance was computed as an attention-aware measure of how strongly a target word is semantically connected to its recent discourse context, and it was compared with GPT-based word surprisal. Across 22 participants and 32 EEG channels, we tested both predictors using regression-based ERP analyses and generalized additive mixed models while controlling for lexical variables and repeated observations. Both predictors were reliably associated with EEG responses, but they showed partly different temporal and scalp-level patterns. Surprisal captured expectancy-related variation, whereas contextual semantic relevance showed robust effects across N400- and P600-window mean voltages, with particularly strong explanatory support in the P600 window. Model comparisons indicated that contextual semantic relevance contributed explanatory value beyond lexical controls and surprisal. These findings suggest that naturalistic reading depends on both lexical expectation and local semantic integration, and that contextual semantic relevance offers an interpretable computational link between discourse semantic fit and ERP dynamics.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在自然阅读中，语义契合度是否能在词汇预期之外独立预测EEG神经反应。结果显示，局部语境下的语义契合度对脑电中的N400和P600窗口均有解释力，并且具备独立于词汇预期的预测价值。
AI.motivation: 此前研究表明，词汇意料性（surprisal）是预测语言理解时人脑神经反应的有效计算指标，但不清楚语义契合度能否在意料性之外解释神经反应差异。作者旨在揭示自然语境下，局部语义契合（词语与上下文的语义关联强度）是否能为脑电反应多带来解释能力。
AI.method: 基于Dublin EEG-based Reading Experiment Corpus（DERCo），作者选取22位被试和32个脑电通道，使用回归型ERP分析和广义加性混合模型（GAMMs），同时控制词汇变量和重复观测。通过引入语境语义契合度指标（考虑注意分配的语义关联性）与GPT生成的词汇意料性进行比较分析。
AI.result: 两种指标都能显著预测词语锁定事件相关电位（ERP）反应，但时程和脑区分布有所不同。词汇意料性主要反映预期性变化，语义契合度则在N400和P600窗口（尤其是P600）对ERP有强烈解释力。模型对比表明，语义契合度在控制其他因素后，仍对EEG反应有额外解释作用。
AI.conclusion: 自然阅读过程中，既有词汇层面的预期处理，也有依赖于局部语境的语义整合。语境语义契合度为话语层面的语义契合与脑电ERP动态间提供了可解释的计算联系。

title: Biomechanics-aware Multi-view Markerless Motion Capture of Dexterous Hand Movements
summary: Markerless motion capture (MMC) techniques have been widely beneficial in biomechanical analysis of human movement; however, application to complex motions of the hand lags other musculoskeletal systems. The primary goal of this study was to evaluate the performance of a biomechanical reconstruction method that implements a gradient-based optimization approach with a biomechanical model in the loop for tracking dexterous, unconstrained hand movements using MMC. Using a custom, 8-camera setup, we acquired 121 video recordings from 6 participants performing 11 different tasks that spanned 6 hand postures, 5 object manipulation tasks, and involved motion of the proximal upper limb joints. Performance of the proposed MMC pipeline was directly compared to a more commonly adopted two-stage reconstruction method that first triangulates 2D keypoints from computer vision pose estimation algorithms to 3D and then enforces biomechanical constraints by solving a constrained inverse kinematics problem. Relative performance was assessed qualitatively by visual inspection and quantitatively using a computer vision metric. Our method generated solutions for all 121 video recordings; the two-stage method did not converge for 15% of the recordings. Across the remaining videos, our method produced more biomechanically plausible hand kinematics than the two-stage method and was more robust to occlusion effects during tasks that involved objects. The relative robustness of the end-to-end method suggests that it is more effective in utilizing the available 2D digital keypoint information. Automatic and biomechanically meaningful tracking of hand kinematics during dexterous movements has the potential to support clinical evaluation, rehabilitation monitoring, and studies of human motor control.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出并评估了一种基于梯度优化的无标记手部运动捕捉（MMC）方法，在复杂灵巧手部动作捕捉方面优于传统两阶段方法，具备更强健和更生物力学合理性。
AI.motivation: 尽管无标记运动捕捉技术已广泛应用于下肢等其他肌肉骨骼系统的运动学分析，但对于手部复杂动作的应用仍处于起步阶段。当前主流的两阶段重建方法在手部高自由度、受遮挡等情况下效果不佳，亟需更准确、鲁棒的解决方案。
AI.method: 本研究设计了一个包含8台摄像头的采集系统，采集了6名受试者完成11个任务（涉及6种手部姿势、5种物体操作任务及上肢近侧关节运动）的121段视频。提出的方法采用了带生物力学模型的梯度优化“端到端”方案，并与主流的两阶段方法（2D关键点三角化至3D后再逆向解算生物力学约束）进行定性和定量对比。
AI.result: 端到端优化方法对所有121段视频均成功生成了解析结果，而两阶段方法有15%的数据未能收敛。对于成功重建的数据，新方法在生物力学合理性、关键点遮挡鲁棒性等方面均优于传统方案。
AI.conclusion: 该项研究表明带生物力学模型的端到端梯度优化方案在无标记手部运动捕捉中具有更好的准确性和稳健性。该方法有望应用于临床评估、康复监测以及运动控制研究等领域。

title: Agent-driven Long-tail Simulation for Autonomous Driving
summary: Evaluating autonomous driving systems in closed-loop settings requires realistic and interactive simulation, yet existing simulators largely rely on log replay or rule-based agents, limiting behavioral diversity and long-tail coverage. We propose an agent-driven simulation framework in which surrounding road participants are controlled by instruction-following large language models through a structured action interface, enabling intentional and reactive behaviors while preserving physical plausibility. Furthermore, we introduce SemanticPlan, a benchmark of closed-loop planning in long-tail and semantically rich scenarios that augment real nuPlan scenes with multiple interactive agents following diverse language instructions. Evaluation results show that state-of-the-art planners still struggle to consistently achieve safe and effective task completion, suggesting that these long-tail scenarios remain challenging.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于大语言模型的自动驾驶仿真框架，并引入了复杂语义场景的测试基准，用于更真实地评估自动驾驶系统。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶仿真大多依赖日志回放或基于规则的虚拟交通参与者，这限制了行为多样性和对罕见情况的覆盖。为提升仿真真实性和挑战性，需要能够主动响应各种复杂指令的参与者。
AI.method: 提出一种以大语言模型为核心、通过结构化接口控制周围道路参与者的仿真框架，使其能根据自然语言指令产生多样且合理的行为。同时，设计了SemanticPlan基准，将多智能体和多样化指令引入实际场景中，系统评测现有规划方法。
AI.result: 评测表明，在包含多智能体和语义复杂性的长期罕见场景下，当前最先进的自动驾驶规划器仍然难以稳定地完成安全有效的任务。
AI.conclusion: 具有语义丰富及互动复杂度的长尾场景对自动驾驶系统构成很大挑战。提出的方法和基准有助于推动更真实、更具挑战性的系统评估与算法发展。

title: Detecting Hallucinations in Retrieval-Augmented Generation through Grounding-Aware Sensitivity by Perturbation (GASP)
summary: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) reduces but does not eliminate hallucination, and existing detectors return a single answer-level score that does not indicate which sentence is unsupported, or why. To close this gap, we introduce Grounding-Aware Sensitivity by Perturbation (GASP), a span-level detector that scores each answer sentence by how strongly its likelihood depends on the retrieved evidence, a quantity we term grounding sensitivity. GASP holds the answer fixed and re-scores it under the full context, under no context, and with each chunk removed, then measures the log-likelihood drops and Jensen-Shannon divergences (JSD). The likelihood of a grounded sentence collapses once its supporting passage is removed, whereas a hallucinated sentence is almost unaffected, a contrast we interpret by casting decoding as a random nonlinear iterated function system (RNIFS). We evaluate GASP on three benchmarks (RAGTruth, TofuEval, RAGBench) with three instruction-tuned scorers from two model families (Qwen2.5-0.5B, Qwen2.5-1.5B, and SmolLM2-1.7B) under a leakage-clean protocol. On RAGTruth it reaches a response-level area under the ROC curve (AUC) of about 0.73 and a span-level AUC of about 0.67, improving significantly over perplexity and by clear margins over length, whole-context natural language inference (NLI), and self-consistency baselines. The only baseline competitive at the span level is a well-configured chunk-level entailment verifier, which requires a separate model, whereas a training-free threshold on the grounding features matches the trained classifier without labeled data and serves as the default detector. Beyond RAGTruth, the signal transfers to TofuEval but not to short-answer question answering in RAGBench, showing GASP is best suited to outputs constructed from the retrieved context rather than answers recoverable from parametric knowledge.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种更细粒度的RAG（检索增强生成）幻觉检测方法GASP（Grounding-Aware Sensitivity by Perturbation），能对答案中的每句话判断其是否依赖检索证据，并在多个基准集上取得优异表现。
AI.motivation: RAG方法无法完全消除模型幻觉，且现有检测方法只能输出整体评分，难以定位具体不可信内容。缺乏对细粒度内容（如句子或片段）的支持性分析和直观解释。
AI.method: GASP针对每句话，分别在完整上下文、无上下文以及去除各证据chunk条件下，重新计算该句似然，并度量似然变化及JSD。依据似然变化（grounding sensitivity）区分受证据支持的句子和幻觉句。评测用RAGTruth、TofuEval、RAGBench数据集以及Qwen2.5和SmolLM2等模型，采用无监督阈值与训练分类器对比。
AI.result: GASP在RAGTruth上，整体AUC约0.73、句子级AUC约0.67，显著优于困惑度、NLI、长度及一致性基线。唯一具备竞争力的基线是独立的蕴涵验证器，但需额外模型；而GASP无需标注训练即可取得类似结果。信号能迁移到TofuEval，但对RAGBench短答案效果较差。
AI.conclusion: GASP能细粒度判定RAG生成内容中哪些句子有可靠证据支持，训练自由、解释性强，适合评估高依赖检索文档的生成内容，而对模型内知识直接恢复的回答适用性较低。

title: Track the Noise, Move the World:3D-Grounded Motion-Consistent Noise for Controllable Video Generation
summary: Modern image-and-text-to-video diffusion models can synthesize highly realistic videos by iteratively denoising an initial Gaussian noise tensor conditioned on reference image and text inputs. However, existing approaches still lack precise and unified controllability over both object motion and camera motion within a single generation process. We present UniCaMo, a unified framework that enables simultaneous control of object trajectories and camera viewpoints by directly constructing the input noise of the diffusion model. Specifically, UniCaMo builds a shared 3D-grounded motion-consistent noise space across latent video frames. Sparse 3D point tracks are used to warp the Gaussian noise of the reference frame along desired object trajectories, while a virtual spherical noise representation provides globally consistent noise values for newly revealed scene regions under camera motion. By combining local track-guided noise warping with global sphere-based noise sampling, UniCaMo maintains geometric and temporal consistency under both object movement and viewpoint changes. Because UniCaMo modifies only the input noise, it requires no auxiliary adapters, control branches, or architectural changes to the underlying video diffusion model. With lightweight LoRA fine-tuning on large pretrained video diffusion models, including Wan 2.1 (14B), UniCaMo achieves state-of-the-art results in both video quality and motion controllability on standard controllable video generation benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了UniCaMo，一种通过直接构建扩散模型输入噪声，实现对图像文本驱动视频生成中物体运动与相机运动统一精准控制的框架。
AI.motivation: 现有视频扩散模型虽能生成高质量视频，但难以在单次生成过程中统一、精准地控制物体运动和相机运动，限制了视频生成的可控性与应用范围。
AI.method: UniCaMo通过在潜在视频帧间构建3D一致的运动噪声空间：利用稀疏3D点追踪将参考帧高斯噪声依照期望物体轨迹扭曲，同时用虚拟球形噪声表达确保相机运动下新场景区域的一致性。局部追踪引导与全局球面采样相结合，实现几何和时序一致的运动控制。只需对输入噪声处理，无需修改扩散模型结构或引入辅助分支。
AI.result: UniCaMo在主流的大规模预训练视频扩散模型（如Wan 2.1）上，仅用轻量LoRA微调，即可在标准可控视频生成基准上实现视频质量和运动可控性方面的最新最优结果。
AI.conclusion: UniCaMo证明了仅修改输入噪声即可实现统一、高效的运动控制，无需结构修改且泛化能力强，有望推动可控视频生成的发展。

title: A Perception-Manipulation Robotics System for Food Cutting
summary: In the development of cooking robots, mastering the task of cutting is crucial. A significant challenge lies in the diverse properties of food, which necessitate distinct cutting policies and even different knives for optimal processing. This paper presents a perception-manipulation framework for food-cutting tasks. Our system features a knife selection module that utilizes force data from a preliminary fixed trial cut to select the appropriate knife for the given food. This is followed by an adaptive cutting phase using reinforcement learning (RL) to balance cutting speed and energy efficiency. In our experiments, the knife selection module achieved 100% successful rate on unseen food, and we compared the performances of fixed policy, RL policy, with human operators. Our method not only achieves high performance but also demonstrates comparable results to those of human participants.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向食物切割任务的感知-操作一体化框架，包括刀具选择模块和基于强化学习的自适应切割方法。该方法在实验中表现优异，实现了对未见食物的高效切割，并与人类表现相当。
AI.motivation: 烹饪机器人发展过程中，切割任务至关重要，但食材多样的物理属性带来了切割策略和刀具选择上的挑战。有效解决这一问题对于提升机器人处理能力和实用性具有重要意义。
AI.method: 提出一个包含刀具选择和自适应切割策略的框架。刀具选择模块通过初步固定试切时收集的力数据，确定适合该食物的刀具；随后利用强化学习方法调整切割策略，在切割速度和能效间寻求最佳平衡。
AI.result: 刀具选择模块在未见食物上达到了100%的成功率。具体实验对比了固定策略、强化学习策略及人类操作，所提方法综合表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法在食物切割任务上的高性能表明，结合传感数据驱动的刀具选择和强化学习优化切割策略的框架可以有效提升机器人厨师的智能化与实用性，趋近于人类操作水平。

title: Spinning Straw into Gold: Relabeling LLM Agent Trajectories in Hindsight for Successful Demonstrations
summary: Large language model agents operate in partially observable, long-horizon settings where obtaining supervision remains a major bottleneck. We address this by utilizing a source of supervision overlooked in existing post-training methods: unintended yet successful goals embedded within agent rollouts. Specifically, we introduce Hindsight Supervised Learning (HSL), where an auxiliary LLM reviews each completed trajectory and relabels it with all of the natural-language goals the agent actually achieved. HSL then pairs the trajectory with its relabeled goals and uses these pairs for additional fine-tuning. To mitigate suboptimality in the relabeled data, we propose two learning techniques for HSL, irrelevant-action masking and sample reweighting. Our experiments show that HSL is flexible and compatible with existing post-training pipelines. It improves both SFT and DPO, with larger gains on long-horizon tasks with more diverse goal spaces. Moreover, HSL is sample-efficient: on ALFWorld, it surpasses baselines trained on the full dataset while using only one quarter of the ground-truth demonstrations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的后训练方法，利用语言模型智能体执行过程中无意间实现的目标，进行高效监督和微调，从而提升了智能体的能力，尤其是在长时序和多目标任务上效果显著。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型智能体在部分可观测和长时序任务中，因监督数据短缺而难以高效提升性能，传统方法未能充分利用智能体自身执行过程中达成的附带目标。
AI.method: 提出Hindsight Supervised Learning（HSL）方法。它让辅助的大模型复查每条执行轨迹，并用自然语言标注所有实际达成的目标，将轨迹与新目标配对作为微调数据。为克服标注子最优问题，设计了无关动作掩码和样本重加权两项技术。此外，HSL可以灵活嵌入现有后训练流程，并用于补强SFT和DPO等主流方法。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，HSL能兼容多种主流流程，对长时序、多目标任务提升更明显。在ALFWorld任务上，用仅1/4人工示范数据即可超越全量数据基线，表现出优异的数据利用率。
AI.conclusion: HSL方法为大模型智能体高效自我提升打开了新的途径，尤其在监督稀缺、目标多样的复杂环境中显示出巨大潜力。

title: Conversational Human Audio-visual Talking Dialogue Generation
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2026 as a main paper
summary: Large-scale dyadic interactive audio-visual dialogue (DIAD) datasets provide fundamental data resources for developing humanoid interactive virtual agents and digital humans. However, collecting such data is time-consuming, expensive, and ethically sensitive. To address this, we propose CHAT, a new dyadic interactive audio-visual dialogue generation (DIADG) framework that generates diverse, paired, and mutually responsive speech-face dialogue clips from a single textual prompt. CHAT unifies large language models and talking face models with interactive audio and facial behaviour refinement modules, enabling the generation of aligned dyadic dialogue clips with diverse contents and facial identities. Experiments show that CHAT outperforms existing related methods designed for similar tasks under both objective and subjective evaluations. Moreover, our synthesised CHAT-AVD-50k dataset serves as effective pre-training data for downstream interactive head generation, consistently improving PerFRDiff and ReactDiff on REACT 2024. CHAT offers a scalable alternative to the costly and ethically sensitive collection of real dyadic interaction data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CHAT，一种生成双人音视频对话片段的系统，可作为大规模对话数据集的低成本替代方案。实验显示其优于已有方法，并能提升下游任务性能。
AI.motivation: 真实大规模双人音视频对话数据的采集成本高、流程繁琐且涉及伦理风险，限制了虚拟人研究的发展。作者希望寻找低成本、高效且无伦理负担的数据替代方案。
AI.method: 提出CHAT框架，结合大语言模型与说话人脸模型，配合音频和面部行为细化模块，实现从单一文本提示生成多样化、配对且互动性强的语音-人脸对话片段。并构建CHAT-AVD-50k合成数据集。
AI.result: CHAT在客观和主观评价中均优于同类任务的现有方法。合成的CHAT-AVD-50k数据集用作下游交互头部生成的预训练时，有效提升PerFRDiff和ReactDiff等评价指标。
AI.conclusion: CHAT为高成本、敏感的人类双人音视频对话数据采集提供了一种可扩展、高效且无伦理风险的替代方案，推动数码人和虚拟互动代理的研究发展。

title: SurgAM: Surgical Affordance Map Prediction with Multimodal Feature Fusion for Robot Autonomy
summary: Surgical automation is being increasingly studied, yet bridging visual scene understanding with autonomous action planning remains a fundamental challenge. While much research effort has been made on scene perception (e.g., tool recognition and scene segmentation), understanding and predicting actionable possibilities for surgical automation is still underexplored. In this paper, we introduce surgical affordance prediction, which identifies actionable regions for fundamental surgical actions from visual data. Specifically, a novel adaptive feature fusion framework is proposed that leverages the complementary strengths of a self-supervised vision transformer encoder for its superior semantic understanding and a large-scale generative model encoder for its spatially-aware capability. Furthermore, we introduce a hierarchical prompt learning mechanism to adapt to varying procedural contexts. Finally, a scene-guided attention decoder is proposed to focus on critical surgical areas while suppressing background distractions. To validate the effectiveness, we established a new dataset, derived from publicly available surgical datasets with affordance annotations for three basic surgical actions: aspiration, clipping, and retraction. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance. Moreover, we validate our framework's applicability for downstream automation on a realistic lung and prostate phantom, and results show that the predicted affordance maps successfully enable autonomous surgical actions.

AI.tldr: 这篇论文提出了一种外科操作可供性（affordance）预测方法，通过视觉数据识别可用于基本外科动作的操作区域，并实现了外科自动化的进一步发展。
AI.motivation: 虽然现有工作在外科场景感知（如工具识别或场景分割）方面取得了进展，但如何让视觉理解与自动操作规划紧密结合，仍然是外科自动化面临的核心难题。当前很少关注于利用视觉数据预测实际可以执行外科动作的区域，因此本研究旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 提出一种自适应特征融合框架，将自监督视觉Transformer encoder的语义优势与大规模生成模型encoder的空间感知能力结合起来。同时，采用层次化提示学习机制，使模型能适应不同手术流程上下文，并利用场景引导注意力解码器聚焦关键手术区域、抑制干扰。为了验证方法有效性，构建了带有三种基本外科动作（抽吸、夹闭、牵拉）可供性标注的数据集。
AI.result: 大量实验证明，该方法在可供性预测任务上取得了最先进的性能。同时，在逼真的肺和前列腺模型环境下，验证了所预测的可供性图能够有效驱动自主外科操作。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的可供性预测框架不仅提升了可供性区域识别的精度，而且为外科自动化提供了坚实的基础，实现了自动外科动作的落地应用。

title: Risk-Constrained Freshness-Aware Semantic Caching for Open-Web Retrieval-Augmented LLMs
summary: Semantic caching reduces the latency and cost of retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) by serving cached answers to semantically similar queries, but most existing methods do not model the time-varying freshness of open-web evidence. We present FreshCache, a three-tier semantic cache that treats cache reuse as a risk-constrained temporal inference problem: before approving a cache hit, FreshCache estimates the probability that the cached result is stale using a fitted exponential decay model enhanced by a learned MLP, and approves reuse only when that probability falls below a per-tier error budget across answers (epsilon = 0.10), URL lists (epsilon = 0.20), and page content (epsilon = 0.35). This allows the system to degrade gracefully as entries age rather than forcing a binary choice between a stale hit and a full pipeline execution. We introduce FreshCache-Bench, a benchmark of 8,072 base queries across five freshness classes with ground truth staleness labels drawn from real web snapshots at 1, 12, 24 hours, and 7 days after a baseline crawl, expanded to 31,201 queries via paraphrase generation. At the 24-hour evaluation window, FreshCache_MLP achieves 97% search API savings at 0.1% hash-based stale error, and an LLM-judge evaluation on 396 confirmed change pairs shows that only 34.3% of detected content changes actually affect answer correctness, placing true answer-affecting stale error at approximately 0.034%. The rule-based FreshCache achieves 98% search savings at 3.3% stale error under a temporal holdout calibration, outperforming SemanticTTL (14.9% stale, 72% saved), vCache (7.2% stale, 47% saved), and SCALM (5.2% stale, 96% saved). Ablations show the temporal risk gate accounts for an 11.6 point reduction in stale error over similarity-only reuse, and the learned MLP reduces stale error a further 3.2 points over the rule-based model.

AI.tldr: FreshCache是一种三层语义缓存系统，通过时间推断模型智能判断缓存结果的新鲜度，在保证低过时风险下提升检索增强生成（RAG）的效率。
AI.motivation: 现有语义缓存忽略了网络内容新鲜度随时间变化，容易导致答案过时。为提高准确性和缓存利用率，需对缓存命中时结果是否过时进行风险控制。
AI.method: 提出FreshCache，将缓存分为三层（答案、URL列表和网页内容），利用指数衰减和MLP混合模型预测缓存内容过时概率，并针对不同类型缓存设置错差上限（例如答案为10%、网页内容为35%），只有概率低于阈值才返回缓存结果。提供FreshCache-Bench基准，用实际网页快照和多时间窗口验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 在24小时窗口，FreshCache_MLP可减少97% API请求，过时错误仅0.1%；更进一步，真正影响答案准确性过时错仅0.034%。规则模型也优于以往方法，如对比SemanticTTL、vCache和SCALM具更低过时错误和更高缓存命中。消融实验发现时间风险门控可显著降低过时风险，MLP进一步优化效果。
AI.conclusion: FreshCache通过精细的时间风控与缓存分层管理，有效提高了语义缓存的新鲜度和利用率，为RAG系统高效可靠服务提供了新思路。

title: Prior Bias in Vision Language Models on UML Diagram Interpretation
summary: Vision Language Models (VLMs) are increasingly applied to software engineering artifacts, especially UML class diagrams whose meaning depends on visual notation. Yet, it is unclear whether VLMs actually read such diagrams or instead answer from pretrained priors about how classes typically relate. We introduce a controlled UML benchmark in which each prior-conforming diagram is paired with its prior-conflicting counterpart that (1) preserves the same class names and layout while (2) reverses only the relation arrow. We evaluate eight open-source VLMs from two model families, InternVL3.5 and Qwen3, alongside two closed-source frontier models GPT-5.4 and GPT-5.4 Mini. Across the eight open-source models, reversing the arrow reduces relation-direction accuracy by 33.48% on average, while GPT-5.4 Mini retains a 10% gap. In the harder three-class condition, accuracy drops sharply by 45.28% for open-source models, and even 18.62% for the GPT-5.4 family on average. Scaling provides only limited improvements and is family-dependent. Our benchmark presents a diagnostic prior-driven failure in diagram-grounded software understanding. Our artifact is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/UMLKnowledgeConflict-8461.

AI.tldr: 本论文评估了视觉语言模型（VLMs）对UML类图中关系方向的理解，发现模型常受训练先验影响而忽视真正的图形语义。通过引入关系箭头逆转的对照基准，测试了不同模型在处理此类认知冲突时的表现。结果显示大多数模型在依赖视觉信息处理时出现显著失败。
AI.motivation: 随着VLMs在软件工程中的应用增加，尤其是对UML类图等具备视觉和语义依赖的结构，亟需了解这些模型是否真正理解图形语义，还是仅凭既有的训练先验回答问题。
AI.method: 提出对照UML测试集，每组包含一个与模型先验一致的图和一个仅反转关系箭头的冲突图，评测八个开源与两个人工智能前沿闭源模型在识别关系方向上的准确率变化，从而衡量模型是否依赖视觉语义。
AI.result: 八个开源模型在关系箭头反转后平均准确率下降33.48%，GPT-5.4 Mini下降10%；在更复杂的三类关系场景下，开源模型准确率下降45.28%，GPT-5.4家族平均下降18.62%；提升模型规模和类型只带来有限改进。
AI.conclusion: 现有VLMs在基于图形的UML关系语义理解上容易受到先验影响而失效，模型对关系细节的视觉理解能力较弱。提出的基准可用于进一步诊断和改进该类系统。

title: ACE-Brain-0.5: A Unified Embodied Foundational Model for Physical Agentic AI
summary: Embodied AI is moving from isolated perception or action modules toward physical agents that understand, plan under goals, act through robot bodies, monitor progress, and improve from experience. Existing systems address this loop only in parts: end-to-end policies generate actions but often lack spatial reasoning, planning, and execution assessment, while robot-agent systems orchestrate tools or specialists but do not learn a shared representation. This fragmentation limits general Physical Agentic AI. We present ACE-Brain-0.5, a unified embodied foundation model that organizes robot intelligence into five coupled functions: spatial perception, decision making, embodied interaction, self-monitoring, and self-improvement. Built on ACE-Brain-0, which established spatial intelligence as a shared scaffold across robot platforms, ACE-Brain-0.5 extends an understanding-centric model into a closed-loop foundation model. A single 8B backbone instantiates the first four functions: grounding objects and affordances, reasoning over 3D and egocentric spatial relations, decomposing instructions into subgoals, generating navigation and manipulation actions, and estimating progress for verification and recovery. To unify these capabilities without cross-task interference, we introduce SSR+, which extends Scaffold-Specialize-Reconcile with a Reactivate stage after task-vector merging. The fifth function, self-improvement, is realized by a companion framework that updates external execution state, including task schemas, spatial memory, and failure-recovery cases, from rollouts. Across fifteen benchmarks, ACE-Brain-0.5 improves over ACE-Brain-0 on 14 of 18 spatial perception and grounding benchmarks, achieves competitive navigation and manipulation performance, and provides strong progress estimation in ID and OOD settings. Together, these results mark an early step toward general Physical Agentic AI.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了ACE-Brain-0.5，这是一个集成五大核心功能的统一体感基础模型，显著提升了机器人在空间感知、决策、操作、监控和自我提升等方面的能力，在多个基准评测中实现了领先表现。
AI.motivation: 现有体感AI系统通常只关注感知、行动、空间推理、计划或执行评估中的部分环节，导致机器人智能碎片化，限制了对通用体感智能体的实现。因此，亟需一个统合感知、推理、行动监控和自我进化的平台。
AI.method: ACE-Brain-0.5将机器人智能归纳为五个互相关联的功能：空间感知、决策、体感交互、自我监控和自我提升。核心是一个8B参数的基础模型，负责多模态空间推理、命令分解、动作生成与进度评估。为避免跨任务干扰，提出SSR+机制，通过新增Reactivate阶段改善多任务能力。自我提升则通过外部状态和失败恢复经验的更新实现。
AI.result: 在18项空间感知与定位基准中，ACE-Brain-0.5于14项超越前代ACE-Brain-0，在导航与操作等关键任务上展现与最新系统媲美的性能，且在进度估计方面具备强泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: ACE-Brain-0.5通过统一五大功能并采用创新的多任务机制，为实现更通用、智能、高自适应的机器人体感AI模型迈出了重要一步。

title: CausalGame: Benchmarking Causal Thinking of LLM Agents in Games
comment: Zhenhao, Yongqiang, and Chenxi contributed equally to the project. A short version is accepted at the Forty-Third International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML) 2026 as an Oral presentation. Project website https://causalgame.github.io/
summary: Building AI Scientist agents with Large Language Models (LLMs) has recently attracted growing attention. Since scientific discovery fundamentally relies on uncovering causal relationships from observations, the capability of causal thinking, i.e., distinguishing causation from correlation and recognizing hidden biases, is essential to LLM agents. Although a number of benchmarks exist for AI Scientists, none explicitly incorporate challenges from selection bias, measurement error, and hidden confounders that widely exist in real-world scientific discovery. To this end, we present CausalGame, a benchmark that evaluates the causal thinking capabilities of LLM agents through interactive games. CausalGame asks LLM agents to actively design experimental protocols, collect observation data, and derive a final solution with an explanation report. To emulate realistic scientific discovery challenges, we design 14 scenarios that incorporate selection bias, measurement error, and hidden confounders. Across 30 LLM agents, none demonstrates reliable causal thinking: the best model reaches only 68.0% survival against analytical optima of 78-85%, and merely 5-7% of sessions receive credits on the causal-reasoning rubrics. CausalGame provides a scalable and controlled testbed for evaluating the causal thinking of AI Scientist agents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了用于评估大语言模型（LLM）因果推理能力的新基准CausalGame，发现现有LLM在因果思维任务中的表现有限。
AI.motivation: 现有AI科学家基准未能充分模拟现实科学发现中的选择偏差、测量误差和隐藏混杂等因果挑战，导致LLM在科学应用中的评估不全面。
AI.method: 作者设计了CausalGame基准，包含14个结合选择偏差、测量误差和隐藏混杂因素的现实场景，通过交互式游戏让LLM主动设计实验、收集数据并给出解释性报告，以检验其因果推理能力。
AI.result: 对30个主流LLM的实验发现：没有模型展现出可靠的因果思维，最佳模型生存率为68.0%（低于理论最优的78-85%），仅有5-7%的实验被评为达到了因果推理标准。
AI.conclusion: CausalGame为AI科学家因果推理提供了可控、可扩展的测试平台，并揭示当前LLM在复杂因果推理能力方面存在明显不足。

title: Cancelable Biometric Template Protection Based on Multi-Instance Fusion: A Contralateral Iris Approach
summary: Biometric templates are vulnerable to theft if stored without protection. Unlike passwords, a compromised iris cannot be reissued. Although existing cancelable biometric schemes address this problem, most still require an external key or token, introducing an additional attack surface. This paper proposes a cancelable contralateral iris template protection scheme that eliminates the need for a separate token or stored secret, satisfying the three requirements of ISO/IEC 24745: irreversibility, unlinkability, and confidentiality. The method fuses three enrollment samples per eye using Majority Vote Fusion to produce a stable template, and applies a salt-based bit permutation derived from the subject's enrollment ID. Combining the left- and right-permuted templates via a bitwise XOR produces a single Protected Fused Template. Since left and right iris patterns are statistically independent, fusing contralateral irises improves the accuracy of the system. An attacker must possess both iris codes and both salts to recover any useful information, yielding a larger effective key space than single-iris schemes. Experiments on three datasets, CASIA-IrisV4-Interval, CASIA-IrisV2 (two devices), and CASIA-Iris-Thousand, yield EERs of $0.36$\%, $4.88$\%, $10.80$\%, and $3.35$\%, respectively; the highest value reflects the more challenging cross-device scenario. These results demonstrate that our contralateral approach outperforms unprotected baselines while remaining competitive with state-of-the-art cancelable methods. %In addition, an ablation study confirms the benefit on both recognition performance and security. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first scheme to combine tokenless multi-instance fusion and contralateral binding under ISO/IEC 24745.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需外部令牌的可撤销对侧虹膜模板保护方案，通过融合左右眼虹膜的特征，并利用用户ID生成盐值进行比特置换，实现模板的不可逆、不可关联和保密性。实验结果表现优异，且满足ISO/IEC 24745标准。
AI.motivation: 传统生物特征模板若未加保护易被盗用，且虹膜一旦泄露无法重新分配。现有可撤销生物特征方案大多需要外部密钥或令牌，这增加了攻击面和管理复杂度。因此，亟需一种无需外部令牌、且安全性更高的保护方法。
AI.method: 方法通过对每只眼分别录入三次虹膜图像，采用多数投票法融合生成稳定模板，再使用基于用户ID的盐值进行比特置换。随后，将左右眼的置换模板通过按位异或生成最终受保护模板。该方案无需额外存储密钥，依靠左右眼的独立性提升安全性。
AI.result: 在CASIA-IrisV4-Interval、CASIA-IrisV2（两设备）和CASIA-Iris-Thousand三大数据集上实验，EER分别为0.36%、4.88%、10.80%和3.35%。结果显示该方法优于无保护基线，且与最先进的可撤销方法具备竞争力。消融实验证明该方案在识别性能与安全性上均有提升。
AI.conclusion: 本方法首次实现了符合ISO/IEC 24745的无令牌多实例融合及对侧绑定的可撤销虹膜模板保护，在安全性和性能上优于现有方案，具有良好的应用前景。

title: RoboDojo: A Unified Sim-and-Real Benchmark for Comprehensive Evaluation of Generalist Robot Manipulation Policies
summary: Generalist robot manipulation policies have advanced rapidly, yet existing benchmarks remain limited in systematically evaluating their capabilities. Many rely on simple, short-horizon, or skill-narrow tasks with limited capability coverage, and are often conducted only in simulation or only in the real world. Simulation enables scalable feedback but misses physical deployment challenges, while real-world evaluation is costly, time-consuming, and difficult to reproduce. We introduce RoboDojo, a unified sim-and-real benchmark for comprehensive evaluation of generalist robot manipulation policies. RoboDojo includes 42 simulation tasks and 18 real-world tasks covering diverse and complementary manipulation capabilities. The simulation benchmark evaluates five dimensions: generalization, memory, precision, long-horizon execution, and open-vocabulary instruction following, while the real-world benchmark exposes policies to challenging physical-world deployment conditions. RoboDojo supports scalable evaluation through heterogeneous parallel simulation in Isaac Sim and provides RoboDojo-RealEval, a reproducible real-world evaluation system with remote cloud access, standardized hardware, scene reset, evaluation protocol, and deployment interface. Together with XPolicyLab, policies can be integrated once and evaluated across simulation and real-world settings with minimal adaptation. We integrate 30 policies into XPolicyLab and evaluate them on RoboDojo, establishing a public leaderboard and systematic analysis of current policy performance. The website is available at http://robodojo-benchmark.com/.

AI.tldr: RoboDojo是一个结合仿真与现实的通用机器人操作能力评测基准，系统性覆盖多维度任务和实际环境，支持可扩展评测并提供公开榜单。
AI.motivation: 现有通用机器人操控策略评测基准覆盖有限，多数仅关注简单或单一能力的任务，缺少系统化、多维度及真实部署下的综合检验。
AI.method: RoboDojo设计了包含42个仿真任务与18个现实任务的评测体系，覆盖泛化、记忆、精度、长时规划、开放指令理解等维度。利用Isaac Sim实现异构并行仿真，现实评测系统支持云端访问、标准硬件、自动场景重置和协议，并可轻松集成评测多策略。
AI.result: 将30种操作策略纳入XPolicyLab，在RoboDojo平台完成仿真与现实环境系统化评测，建立了公开排行榜并进行现有策略系统性性能分析。
AI.conclusion: RoboDojo推动通用机器人操控评测基准的发展，解决了仿真与现实间评测割裂的问题，为社区提供了统一、可扩展的评测标准，有助于促进策略进步与公平比较。

title: Legible-by-Construction: Attention and End-to-End Transformers
summary: A companion paper showed that a transformer's feed-forward layer can be rebuilt from explicit fuzzy set operations - intersection, set-difference, and a self-forgetting sequence quantifier - so its hidden units read as named logical operators at no cost to language-model quality. That left the other half of the transformer opaque. Here we carry the same idea into attention and join the two into one model. The mechanism is minimal: a head's value is passed through a sigmoid, so each value channel becomes a readable detector of whether a feature holds at a token. This adds no parameters and leaves the standard head otherwise untouched. A Boolean variant goes further, restructuring the value into an explicit within-token intersection and negation-capable set-difference. In both designs the output projection is left free, not tied to the vocabulary, which is the load-bearing decision: bounding what a head detects while leaving what it writes unconstrained yields selective detectors, whereas constraining the write does not. A bounded value is shaped into a readable detector by two selectivity pressures - one for sparse firing, one for decisive firing at the rails - and which a design wants is not universal. Across five specialized-attention designs at 125M parameters, 44 to 62 percent of value channels become crisp, contextually selective detectors, and their legibility rises with depth rather than crystallizing only on punctuation. Language-model quality is at parity with a conventional baseline. Finally, we couple the Boolean attention to the legible feed-forward layer and train an end-to-end legible-by-construction language model at benchmark parity: its feed-forward units are named set and quantifier operations throughout, and we can take a token it generates and read the named units that compose to produce it.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种将Transformer中注意力机制与前馈层重构为透明的模糊集合操作和可读判别器的方法，实现了可解释的语言模型，同时保持与传统模型相当的性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管Transformer模型在自然语言处理任务中表现优异，其内部机制（尤其是注意力和前馈层的中间表示）仍不透明，影响了人类对模型推理过程的理解和信任。作者希望通过重构，使得每个神经元都能具象为易于理解的逻辑或集合操作，从而提升模型的可解释性。
AI.method: 首先将前馈层重构为显式的模糊集合操作（如交集、差集、自遗忘序列量化器），使中间单元对应于有明确语义的逻辑算子。随后，将类似思想推广到注意力机制：对每个head的value通道施加sigmoid，使其成为可读性强的特征判别器，并提出布尔变体，实现更丰富的集合操作。整个过程不增加参数，并通过设计对选择性施加压力以提升单元的判别性和稀疏性。最终把可解释前馈层与可解释注意力结合，端到端训练一个高度可读的语言模型。
AI.result: 5种特殊注意力设计（参数规模125M）中，44%-62%的value通道成为清晰的、语境选择性的判别检测器，并且其可解读性随深度增加提升。布尔注意力与可读前馈层结合训练的语言模型性能与普通模型持平，并能明确追溯每个生成token的逻辑组成。
AI.conclusion: 采用透明的集合/布尔操作重构Transformer关键模块可显著提高其可解释性，而不会损失性能。这为理解大型语言模型的推断机制、增强其透明度迈出了重要一步。

title: E-TraMamba: A New Paradigm for Efficient Long-Term 3D Feature Tracking with Event Cameras
summary: Event-based 3D tracking enables low-latency and high-speed perception, while existing CNN- and Transformer-based trackers struggle to capture long-range spatiotemporal dependencies in sparse, noisy event streams, especially under real-time and efficiency constraints. To address these challenges, we present E-TraMamba, the first Mamba-based framework for 3D feature tracking on event data. This new framework adopts a linear state-space model for efficient long-range modeling and integrates a lightweight affine-transform predictor to maintain stable tracking under motion blur and occlusion. We also design an effective scheme to fuse multi-scale cues -- local spatiotemporal patches, correlation maps, and positional embeddings -- into a unified representation that enables stable and smooth 3D tracking. We construct a large-scale synthetic dataset, named EvD-PointOdyssey, which is generated with monocular rendering and provides synchronized event streams, depth maps, and accurate 3D trajectories for training and evaluating event-based 3D tracking models. Extensive experiments on event-based benchmarks demonstrate that E-TraMamba achieves state-of-the-art performance, delivering over $2\times$ longer feature lifetimes under strict accuracy thresholds (e.g., 0.1 m), with higher tracked-feature ratios and lower RMSE than all baselines. These results make E-TraMamba a strong candidate for low-latency visual odometry, real-time SLAM, and interactive robotics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了E-TraMamba，一种基于Mamba的新型事件流3D特征追踪框架，在高效长程建模和鲁棒性方面优于现有方法，显著提升了3D追踪性能。
AI.motivation: 现有CNN和Transformer方法在事件数据的稀疏性、噪声、实时性和效率需求下，难以捕获长程时空依赖，影响3D追踪的准确性与稳定性。
AI.method: 提出E-TraMamba框架，采用线性状态空间模型（Mamba）以实现高效的长程建模，结合轻量级仿射变换预测器增强在运动模糊和遮挡下的稳定性。设计多尺度融合方案，将本地时空特征、相关性图和位置嵌入整合到统一表示中。并构建了大规模合成数据集EvD-PointOdyssey，用于训练和评估。
AI.result: 在多个事件数据集基准上，E-TraMamba在严格精度下实现了追踪特征寿命翻倍，追踪比率更高、RMSE更低，超越所有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: E-TraMamba有效提升了事件数据的3D追踪性能，非常适合用于低延迟视觉里程计、实时SLAM和交互式机器人等场景。

title: Robustness Verification of an Autonomous Underwater Vehicle-based Plankton Classifier
comment: 6 pages, 2 figures, Accepted in IEEE OES AUV Symposium 2026
summary:
The assessment of planktonic standing stocks and microorganism structures is critical for understanding upper ocean biological processes. Currently, autonomous underwater vehicles (AUVs) equipped with in-situ optical imaging and artificial intelligence (AI) methods offer a promising solution for persistent surveillance, mapping and monitoring of planktonic life. However, current AI methods often lack robustness in dynamic, unstructured environments, where environmental noise and non-biological artifacts lead to frequent misclassifications. Standard convolutional neural network (CNN) classifiers often struggle with such conditions, leading to misclassifications that require time-consuming manual validation by marine biologists.
  To address this issue, we propose a novel robustness verification framework for in-situ plankton classifiers based on reachability analysis. We also introduce a continuous-time neural ordinary differential equation (neural ODE) classification model leveraging the high-resolution imaging capabilities of the SilCam particle imager. In this paper, we demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed framework by formally verifying the robustness of the neural ODE model against environmental perturbations. We demonstrate that our verification framework acts as an automated filter providing formal guarantees of model stability against ambiguous data, thereby improving the reliability of autonomous sampling and reducing the post-processing workload.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向浮游生物分类AI模型的鲁棒性验证框架，结合神经ODE方法，以提高AUV水下实时成像分类的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 目前AUV搭载AI进行浮游生物监测时，在复杂的自然环境中易受噪声和非生物干扰，CNN等标准分类器常常判错，造成大量后续人工核查负担。
AI.method: 提出了一个基于可达性分析的鲁棒性验证框架，并引入神经常微分方程（neural ODE）分类模型，利用SilCam粒子成像仪高分辨率图像，对模型在环境干扰下的表现进行形式化验证。
AI.result: 实验证明新框架可以为神经ODE模型在面对环境扰动时提供形式化的鲁棒性保证，有效过滤不确定、模糊的输入数据，提高模型稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法提高了水下自动采样系统的数据可靠性，减少了对人工后处理的依赖，对浮游生物分类的AI应用具有重要推动作用。

title: WPG-MoE: Weak-Prior-Guided Dense Mixture-of-Experts for User-Level Social Media Depression Detection
summary: Online social media posts provide scalable signals for early depression screening, and recent studies mainly improve pre-classification evidence through risk-post selection, symptom grounding, and clinically informed feature construction. However, these screening-stage designs often leave final decisions to a single detector, overlooking how users heterogeneously express depressive risk after screening. A monolithic classifier must average across heterogeneous users, which may dilute localized evidence and cause misclassification, especially for non-self-disclosing users. To address this issue, we propose WPG-MoE, a weak-prior-guided dense mixture-of-experts framework built on a shared large language model (LLM) backbone. WPG-MoE derives user-level weak semantic priors to softly route users to experts matched to different evidence layouts. We formulate this process as learning using privileged information (LUPI): rich LLM-extracted structured evidence guides training-time routing, while inference retains only Patient Health Questionnaire-9 (PHQ-9) template screening and the deployable backbone. Experiments on Chinese and English datasets show that WPG-MoE outperforms strong baselines with interpretable routing behavior.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于大模型骨干的新型专家混合架构（WPG-MoE），在早期抑郁筛查任务中实现更精细、个性化的用户风险识别，并在中英两种数据集上优于传统方法。
AI.motivation: 当前社交媒体抑郁筛查方法，多依赖单一分类器对所有用户进行决策，未能充分考虑不同用户表达风险信号的差异性，可能导致证据稀释、分类错误，尤其对不愿自我揭露的用户不友好。
AI.method: 提出WPG-MoE模型，通过LLM抽取用户弱语义先验，柔性地将用户路由到适配不同抑郁证据模式的专属专家模块，实现多样化证据的个性化建模。训练阶段利用结构化的丰富证据进行引导（LUPI框架），推理阶段只依赖PHQ-9问卷和主干模型，确保部署简便。
AI.result: 在中英文数据集上的大量实验表明，WPG-MoE模型优于现有各类强基线，并且模型的专家路由结果具备良好可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 通过弱先验引导的专家混合机制，可有效提升社交媒体上的抑郁筛查精度和个性化水平，且易于实际落地，对于异质性表达人群尤其具有优势。

title: SPLIT: Training-Free AI-Generated and Partially Edited Video Detection via Spatial Patch-Level Incoherence and Temporal Roughness
summary: Deploying AI-generated video detectors in real-world services demands an ultra-low false positive rate (FPR) on real videos to avoid falsely rejecting authentic content, a regime where standard metrics such as AUROC fail to reflect actual operating behavior. We introduce Spatial Patch-Level Incoherence and Temporal Roughness (SPLIT), a training-free detector that operates on patch tokens from a frozen vision encoder to detect both fully generated and partially edited videos. SPLIT computes two complementary signals: Two-step Temporal Roughness (TTR), capturing non-smooth patch trajectories via one-step and two-step feature variation contrast, and Local Spatial Motion Incoherence (LSMI), measuring spatially inconsistent temporal changes through gradients of a feature-space motion field. The two are fused multiplicatively with gamma correction to sharpen real-fake separation at strict thresholds. We further propose a service-aligned evaluation protocol based on Fake Recall at fixed FPR with real-only threshold calibration and cross-real threshold transfer. Across three benchmarks (FakeParts, GenVideo, and ViF-Bench), SPLIT achieves the highest Fake Recall at FPR = $0.1\%$, substantially outperforming supervised and training-free baselines while remaining robust to post-processing with negligible overhead. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/mldljyh/SPLIT .

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需训练的AI生成视频检测方法SPLIT，能在极低误报率下有效检测完整或部分伪造视频，且对后处理稳健，优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有AI视频检测方法在实际服务中因误报率过高，难以有效应用。尤其是低误报率（FPR）场景下，标准指标（如AUROC）无法真实反映性能，实际对真实视频的误伤会导致用户体验和信任问题。因此需要开发一种在极低FPR下依然高效、可靠的检测方法，并匹配实际服务需求的评价协议。
AI.method: 提出SPLIT，一种基于冻结视觉编码器patch token的检测器，通过：1）两步时序粗糙度（TTR）分析patch特征变化捕捉异常时序轨迹；2）局部空间运动不一致性（LSMI）度量特征空间内的时空变化异常。两种信号通过乘法融合与gamma校正，实现真伪分离。支持服务化评估协议（Fake Recall@FPR）及门限迁移，全面对标主流基准。
AI.result: 在FakeParts、GenVideo和ViF-Bench三个基准上，SPLIT在FPR=0.1%下的伪造视频召回率最高，显著优于监督式和无训练基线方法。对后处理鲁棒，计算开销极小。
AI.conclusion: SPLIT实现了极低误报下对AI生成视频（包括局部编辑）的高效检测，并通过服务对齐的评估协议保证了实际可用性。代码已开源，可促进实际服务中广泛部署。

title: Mask2Real-WM: Segmentation Masks as a Sim-to-Real Bridge for Controllable Dexterous World Models
comment: 23 pages, 24 figures, 4 tables. Preprint. Project page: https://srl-ethz.github.io/Mask2Real-WM/
summary: Action-conditioned world models allow robots to predict the future consequences of candidate actions without additional physical interaction, supporting policy evaluation, planning, and data augmentation. We present Mask2Real-WM, a two-stage action-conditioned world model for dexterous manipulation that decouples pixel prediction into a dynamics model and a rendering model. The dynamics model predicts future segmentation masks from past masks and 23-DoF action sequences. The rendering model maps the predicted masks to photorealistic RGB using a ControlNet-augmented Stable Video Diffusion backbone. The smaller sim-to-real gap in segmentation space enables the dynamics model to benefit from large-scale pretraining on over 50 h of synthetic simulation data, followed by fine-tuning on fewer than 2.5 h of real demonstrations. Experiments on a dexterous pick-and-place benchmark show that mask conditioning and simulation pretraining are both required for per-DoF action controllability across all 23 degrees of freedom. In contrast, monolithic baselines capture broad hand and end-effector trajectories but do not reliably reflect fine-grained, per-joint action effects.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为Mask2Real-WM的两阶段动作条件世界模型，通过分离动态建模和渲染，提升机器人精细操作任务的动作预测能力。
AI.motivation: 现有的动作条件世界模型在高自由度手部操作和精细动作预测方面存在性能瓶颈，特别是在现实与仿真转移时。
AI.method: 方法将像素级预测分为两个独立阶段：1）动态模型预测未来的分割掩码，输入为历史分割掩码和23自由度的动作序列；2）渲染模型基于ControlNet增强的Stable Video Diffusion，将分割掩码映射为逼真的RGB帧。动态模型先用超过50小时的仿真数据大规模预训练，再用不超过2.5小时的真实演示数据微调。
AI.result: 在高自由度抓取和放置基准测试中，该方法能实现对每个自由度动作的细致、可控预测。而传统单块模型只能捕捉整体运动轨迹，无法区分细微的关节动作。
AI.conclusion: 分阶段分割学习与仿真预训练对于提升高自由度细粒度操控任务的动作可控性至关重要，优于一体化基线方法。

title: Memory-Orchestrated Semantic System (MOSS): An Auditable Agentic Memory Architecture
summary: Long-term memory remains a structural weakness of AI agents. The dominant approach, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), relies on embedding-based similarity search, which is opaque by construction, difficult to audit, and bounded by the theoretical limits of vector representations. We present the Memory-Orchestrated Semantic System (MOSS), an agentic memory architecture in which the agent drives retrieval over a structured relational database. MOSS is model-agnostic, storage-agnostic, and API-agnostic: it runs on any relational engine, connects to any LLM provider (or to deterministic non-LLM processes), and deploys on any infrastructure, local or cloud. Its retrieval execution is symbolic and reproducible (once a query is formulated, no LLM participates in the retrieval loop) and every step of the system, from indexing to answer formulation, is logged and inspectable, making MOSS auditable by construction. Rather than imposing an external ontology, MOSS derives its conceptual vocabulary from the corpus itself. We report on a longitudinal deployment unique in the agentic-memory literature: a year of continuous production over an individual scholar's working corpus--a conversational corpus reaching back to October 2024 (some 44 million tokens, retroactively indexed) comprising 110,183 segments, alongside 163,494 catalogued documents, 569 inductively derived concepts, 322,662 concept annotations, and eleven metadata graphs totaling approximately five million relations--across four successive infrastructure generations. While the present case is that of a single researcher, the architecture is in no way specific to one person: it serves a team, an institution, or any entity that accumulates knowledge over time. We argue that auditable, sovereign, structurally unbounded memory is a precondition for AI agents intended to accompany a person or an organization over years rather than sessions.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种新的基于结构化关系数据库的AI记忆架构MOSS，用以克服现有基于向量检索的RAG方法的局限，实现可审计、可扩展的长时记忆。
AI.motivation: 现有AI长时记忆主要依赖向量检索（RAG），存在不可审计、不透明及理论上容量有限等弱点，且检索结果难以追溯和解释，限制了AI成为长期智能体助手的能力。
AI.method: MOSS是一种由智能体驱动的记忆系统，采用结构化关系数据库存储知识，支持任何关系型引擎、任何LLM或确定性流程，并可部署在本地或云端。其检索过程为符号化、可复现，系统每一步均可日志审计。MOSS的概念词汇自语料中自动导出，无需外加本体。作者进行了为期一年的实际部署，服务于单个学者的大型知识语料库。
AI.result: 在四代基础架构更迭下，MOSS系统稳定服务于包含4400万token、逾11万条片段、16万份文档、569个自动归纳概念、32万余概念标注及500万条元数据关系的大型知识库，展现了在实际业务中连续长时间运行和跨平台的强大能力。
AI.conclusion: MOSS作为一种可审计、自治、容量无上限的结构化记忆系统，为AI伴随个人或组织长期运作提供了关键基础，远优于会话级短时记忆系统，为真正的长期智能体打开了可能。

title: ProLaViT: Learning Progressive Latent Visual Thoughts in Structured Latent Space
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable progress but still struggle with complex visual reasoning tasks requiring multi-step perception and logical deduction. While explicit visual generation incurs prohibitive computational costs, existing latent approaches often rely on external experts or lack rigorous cognitive logic. In this paper, we introduce ProLaViT (Progressive Latent Visual Thought), a framework empowering MLLMs to perform structured visual derivation in the continuous latent space. Unlike works dependent on heterogeneous external models, ProLaViT leverages an endogenous self-distillation mechanism, utilizing the model's own visual encoder to supervise latent thoughts. To facilitate this, we construct a scalable programmatic synthesis pipeline enabling the model to internalize algorithmic precision without inference time tools. We design two reasoning paradigms: (1) Coarse-to-Fine Causal Chain for spatial tasks, guiding attention from global context to local targets. (2) Dialectical Reasoning Chain for logical tasks, incorporating counter-factual thinking for verification. Furthermore, we propose a Distance-Weighted Diversity Loss to impose topology-aware constraints, preventing feature degeneration by enforcing semantic distinctiveness. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ProLaViT outperforms baselines on vision-centric benchmarks, achieving superior accuracy and interpretability with high efficiency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了ProLaViT框架，提升了多模态大模型（MLLMs）在复杂视觉推理任务中的能力，不依赖外部专家，能有效执行结构化推理且兼顾效率与准确性。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态大模型在多步推理和复杂逻辑感知任务上表现有限，主要受限于高计算成本或过度依赖外部专家模型，缺乏严谨的内生认知逻辑能力。
AI.method: ProLaViT框架包括两种推理范式：（1）粗到细因果链，用于空间推理，将注意力从全局到局部；（2）辩证推理链，用于逻辑推理，引入反事实验证。方法主要基于自蒸馏机制，利用模型自身视觉编码器监督潜在过程。引入可扩展的程序化合成流程，使模型无需推理阶段外部工具即可习得算法化精度。此外，提出距离加权多样性损失，保持特征语义区分。
AI.result: ProLaViT在多个视觉基准任务上超越主流基线模型，表现出更高的推理精度、解释性与运算效率。
AI.conclusion: ProLaViT能够高效赋能MLLMs，实现更结构化、可解释且高效的视觉推理，为该领域提供了新的范式和方法。

title: HUGS: Guiding Unified Dexterous Grasp Synthesis Across Modes and Scales via Learned Human Priors
comment: The first two authors contributed equally. Project website: https://hugs-dex.github.io/
summary: Dexterous grasping across diverse object scales requires contact modes ranging from two-finger pinches to bimanual grasps. Existing dexterous grasp synthesis methods reduce the high-dimensional optimization space with manually designed expected contacts and initialization heuristics, which struggle to balance synthesis success rate and diversity. We present HUGS (Human-prior-guided Unified Dexterous Grasp Synthesis), a human-prior-guided framework for unified dexterous grasp synthesis across modes and scales. Instead of directly retargeting human demonstrations, HUGS learns an object-conditioned human prior that captures human grasp preferences and guides downstream force-closure-aware optimization. The prior is trained on a compact self-collected human grasp dataset with 1.8K grasps over 304 objects, providing broad coverage of object scales and contact modes. During synthesis, HUGS adaptively proposes contact modes and wrist initializations, substantially improving the balance between contact-mode coverage and synthesis success rate over heuristic-based methods. With HUGS, we synthesize 3.2M robotic grasps over 157K scenes, spanning object half-diagonal lengths from 2 cm to 30 cm and modes from two-finger to bimanual grasps. Models trained on the synthesized dataset autonomously select appropriate contact modes in the real world, enabling grasping from screws to large boxes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了HUGS框架，通过人类先验数据统一解决不同对象尺寸和手抓接触模式下的灵巧抓取合成。该方法有效提升了合成多样性和成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有灵巧机械手抓取合成方法依赖手动设计的期望接触点和初始化策略，难以兼顾抓取的多样性和成功率，且很难适应不同对象尺寸和多样的抓取方式。
AI.method: HUGS框架采用人类先验的数据引导抓取合成。具体做法是先收集包含1.8K个抓取、覆盖304件物体的人抓数据，然后学习一个物体条件化的人类抓握先验模型，引导后续的力闭合优化过程，动态选择抓取接触模式和初始手腕位置。
AI.result: HUGS在抓取合成过程中提升了多样性与成功率，在157K场景生成了3.2M组机械手抓取数据，适用于不同大小(半对角线2cm到30cm)和不同接触模式(如二指、双手)的抓取。利用这些数据训练的模型能在现实场景中自主选择合适的接触方式，有效抓取从螺丝到大箱子的物体。
AI.conclusion: HUGS通过引入人类先验和自适应设计，实现了统一、高效、多样的灵巧机械手抓取合成，并显著提升了在实际任务中的适应性和成功率。

title: AI Wizards at EXIST 2026: Hierarchical Soft-Label Learning for Multimodal Sexism Identification in Memes
summary: We present the AI Wizards submission to EXIST 2026 for multimodal sexism identification in memes. The task is composed of three, increasingly harder subtasks. We model them hierarchically as conditional soft-label prediction over empirical annotator distributions. Our system maps fixed Gemini Embedding 2 vision-language representations through a lightweight Gated MLP trained with KL divergence and homoscedastic uncertainty weighting. Our submissions ranked first on Task 2.3 and fourth on Tasks 2.1 and 2.2 on the official Soft-Soft leaderboards. The code is available at https://github.com/NLP-AI-Wizards/EXIST-2026

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多模态的性别歧视识别方法，应用于EXIST 2026竞赛的meme分析任务，取得了优异排名。
AI.motivation: 性别歧视内容以迷因(meme)等多模态（图文结合）形式广泛传播，现有方法无法有效从多模态数据中准确识别不同层次的性别歧视，因此需要设计新的识别技术。
AI.method: 该方法将任务拆分为三个递进难度的子任务，并以条件的软标签预测和经验标注者分布建模。技术上，采用Gemini Embedding 2作为图文嵌入特征，通过轻量级门控MLP进行映射，并结合KL散度和同质不确定性加权进行训练。
AI.result: 在官方Soft-Soft榜单上，该系统在2.3任务获得第一，在2.1和2.2任务获得第四。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法在多模态性别歧视识别任务中有效，尤其在难度更高的子任务上表现突出，为相关领域技术发展提供了有竞争力的工具。代码已开源。

title: Holo-Captioning: Toward the Text Equivalent of 3D Scenes
summary: This work introduces holo-captioning, a novel task that strives to seek the text equivalent of 3D scenes. As the initial step, we formulate holo-captioning as generating a structured textual description that comprehensively depicts all entities within a 3D scene -- including their semantic tags, spatial locations, attributes, and inter-entity relations. To tackle this challenging task, we first develop an effective captioning engine to produce detailed descriptions of individual entity instances and instance pairs, and contribute a large-scale benchmark comprising over 15K scenes for training and evaluation. Building upon this foundation, we propose HoloScribe, a novel model that features an instance-aware decoupled pipeline for generating structured holo-captions, and further incorporates anchor-aware instance linking to identify relational instance pairs. Additionally, we propose a comprehensive evaluation metric named HoloScore, and provide a human-curated test set to ensure reliable model assessment. Experimental results demonstrate that HoloScribe significantly outperforms state-of-the-art 3D dense captioners and 3D LLM generalists, underscoring the effectiveness of our approach. Project page: https://visual-ai.github.io/holocap/

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一项新任务“holo-captioning”，即为3D场景生成结构化文本描述，包括场景中的所有实体、关系和属性。针对这一难题，作者开发了新的模型HoloScribe，构建了大规模数据集，并提出了评估指标。实验显示方法优于现有3D描述方法。
AI.motivation: 目前3D场景的理解和表述主要集中于简单描述，缺少能够全面、结构化体现空间和对象关系的高级文本表达方法。为更好地描述和应用3D场景信息，作者提出需要为3D场景生成包含语义、空间、属性、关系的完整文本描述。
AI.method: 1) 首次将holo-captioning定义为全面结构化描述3D场景的任务。2) 建立一个包含15000+场景的数据集，用于训练和评测。3) 提出HoloScribe模型，采用实例感知分离的生成流程与锚点感知实例关联机制，生成详细的结构化描述。4) 设计HoloScore综合评测指标与人工标注测试集，全面评估效果。
AI.result: HoloScribe在所构建的基准数据集上，明显超过现有3D密集描述模型和通用大模型，在准确性、全面性等方面表现更佳。
AI.conclusion: 提出的holo-captioning任务及其配套方法为三维场景的结构化文本描述提供了新路径，对3D理解和下游应用有积极推动作用。HoloScribe模型和评价体系具有先进性，推动了领域发展。

title: Simple-to-Complex Structured Demonstrations for Vision-Language-Action Learning
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have demonstrated strong capabilities in robotic manipulation by integrating visual perception, language understanding, and robot action generation. Existing research has primarily focused on improving model architectures, training strategies, and dataset scale, while little attention has been paid to how demonstrations are collected and organized. We identify demonstration organization as a fundamental yet overlooked aspect of imitation learning, as it directly affects policy learning efficiency, training stability, and policy generalization. To address this gap, we propose a simple-to-complex structured demonstration collection strategy for VLA learning using a dual-arm robotic platform. Our approach systematically organizes data through three general principles: (i) decomposing complex manipulation tasks into progressively learnable sub-skills, (ii) standardizing the interaction environment to reduce unnecessary variability, and (iii) organizing demonstrations according to progressively increasing task complexity. This structured design enables VLA models to first acquire fundamental manipulation skills before learning increasingly complex task compositions, facilitating more effective learning of long-horizon manipulation tasks. We evaluate the proposed strategy on two representative robotic manipulation tasks: block grasping and sorting, and towel folding. Experimental results show consistent improvements in task success rate and training stability compared with the baseline method of directly collecting end-to-end complete task trajectories. These findings highlight demonstration organization as a previously underexplored but important factor in VLA learning and provide practical insights into efficient skill acquisition, scalable dataset construction, and long-horizon robotic manipulation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种由简单到复杂的演示数据组织策略，在Vision-Language-Action（VLA）机器人学习中通过结构化采集示范，提高了模型学习效率和泛化能力。实验表明该方法相比传统端到端采集，显著提升了任务成功率和训练稳定性。
AI.motivation: 尽管VLA模型在机器人操作中表现强劲，但以往工作主要关注于模型和数据集本身，忽视了示范数据如何组织和采集。作者认为数据组织方式直接影响模仿学习效率和泛化能力，是一个被忽略的重要问题。
AI.method: 作者提出一种分阶段结构化采集演示数据的方法：1）将复杂任务分解为可逐步学习的子技能；2）标准化交互环境，减少无关性变化；3）按照任务难度递增的顺序组织示范。所用平台为双臂机器人。
AI.result: 在两个具有代表性的机器人操作任务（积木抓取与排序、毛巾折叠）上，结构化组织的采集方式在任务成功率与训练稳定性上均优于直接采集完整任务演示的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 结构化演示采集是提升VLA学习效率、训练稳定性和长时序任务泛化能力的关键因素，对规模化数据集构建与高效技能获取具有重要实践意义。

title: UI-MOPD: Multi-Platform On-Policy Distillation for Continual GUI Agent Learning
summary:
Recent advances in multimodal foundation models and agent systems have driven GUI agents from single-platform task execution toward cross-platform interaction. However, building multi-platform GUI agents remains challenging. On one hand, high-quality and executable cross-platform interaction trajectories are still scarce, and existing data often suffer from limited platform coverage. On the other hand, different platforms exhibit distinct interaction conventions, making joint or continual training prone to behavioral pattern mixing, platform-specific capability degradation, and catastrophic forgetting. To address these challenges, we construct Uni-GUI, a high-quality cross-platform GUI interaction dataset, and propose UI-MOPD, the first method that incorporates multi-teacher on-policy distillation into continual learning for GUI agents. UI-MOPD dynamically selects a platform-specific teacher according to the current environment and transfers platform-specific behavioral priors to a shared policy through platform-conditioned distillation, enabling adaptation to new platforms while preserving capabilities on existing ones. Experiments on OSWorld and MobileWorld show that UI-MOPD achieves task success rates of 38.2% and 12.0%, respectively, demonstrating its effectiveness in balancing cross-platform capability retention and new-platform adaptation.
  Project page: https://elispectre.github.io/UI-MOPD/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个创新的方法UI-MOPD，通过多教师策略蒸馏和持续学习，提升GUI智能体在多平台上的泛化和适应能力，同时发布了高质量跨平台数据集Uni-GUI。实验表明，UI-MOPD兼顾了现有平台能力保持与新平台适应性。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态基础模型和智能体系统推动了GUI智能体跨平台发展，但面临高质量跨平台数据稀缺和平台间交互习惯不同导致的训练困难，如行为混淆、特定能力遗失等。
AI.method: 构建了Uni-GUI跨平台数据集，并提出UI-MOPD方法。该方法采用多教师在策略学习中的动态蒸馏，不同平台选用不同教师，将平台特定行为知识迁移至共享策略，实现持续学习和跨平台适应。
AI.result: 在OSWorld和MobileWorld测试集上，UI-MOPD分别获得38.2%和12.0%的任务成功率，优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: UI-MOPD在提升多平台GUI智能体的泛化和适应能力方面有效，同时能保持已有能力并适应新平台，推动GUI跨平台智能体的发展。

title: Learning Taxonomic Trees with Hierarchical Representation Regularization for Large Multimodal Models
comment: Published as a conference paper at ICML 2026
summary: Taxonomies provide key information about the semantic relationships between concepts and the inherent organization of vision and language. Despite their impressive capabilities, large multimodal models (LMMs) often lack taxonomic knowledge, leading to low hierarchical visual recognition (HVR) consistency. These models typically only rely on language modeling objectives during fine-tuning and lack explicit taxonomy-aware regularization. To address this, we propose Hierarchical Representation Regularization ($HiR^2$), a simple plug-and-play regularizer that improves hierarchical consistency in LMMs. Specifically, we introduce a semantic-aware visual tree construction framework that extracts coarse-to-fine visual features from intermediate LLM layers guided by textual cues. The regularizer combines two complementary objectives: a taxonomic entailment loss that enforces hierarchy via hyperbolic entailment cones in the Lorentz model, and a discriminative dispersive loss that promotes angular separation of semantically similar embeddings on the unit sphere without disturbing the radial hierarchical structure. Extensive experiments demonstrate that $HiR^2$ effectively captures taxonomic structures across diverse LMMs and fine-tuning methods. Code is available at https://github.com/PKU-ICST-MIPL/HiR2_ICML2026.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的正则化方法HiR^2，用于提升大规模多模态模型（LMMs）在层级视觉识别任务中的一致性，显著增强其对类别层级结构的理解能力。
AI.motivation: 现有大规模多模态模型虽然在多个任务表现出色，但在处理具有层级语义结构的信息时存在不足，特别是在缺乏显式的类别层级知识时容易导致识别不一致。因此，亟需提升其在层次化语义上的表达能力。
AI.method: 作者提出了一种可插拔式正则器——层级表征正则化（HiR^2），其核心包括：（1）语义感知的视觉树构建，通过LLM中间层在文本提示指导下提取粗到细的视觉特征；（2）引入两种损失：一是基于洛伦兹模型的超曲面蕴涵锥实现层级约束的taxonomic entailment loss，二是将相似嵌入向量在球面上做判别性扩散的dispersive loss，用于增强语义区分力。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，HiR^2在多种主流多模态模型和下游微调方法下，均能有效捕获并强化分类体系中的层级结构，提高识别一致性。
AI.conclusion: HiR^2不仅方法简单且易用，能够显著提升多模态模型对类别层级结构的理解和表达，在层级视觉识别等相关任务中具有推广价值和实用意义。

title: SEAM: Smooth Execution of Action-Chunked Motion for Vision-Language-Action Policies
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) policies that execute fixed-length action chunks can exhibit multimodal bifurcation: a cross-chunk inconsistency in which adjacent chunks generated from independent Gaussian latents can converge to incompatible trajectory modes, producing abrupt discontinuities at chunk boundaries. Existing remedies either require backpropagation through the policy at each denoising step, rely on rejection sampling, or require retraining, each trading computational cost or task reliability for smoother transitions. We propose SEAM (Smooth Execution of Action-Chunked Motion), a training-free inference-time method for flow matching VLAs. SEAM exploits a simple synchronous-execution insight: after the robot consumes the executed prefix, the previous chunk's unexecuted tail is already available as an analytic consistency reference. Its core mechanism, Velocity-guided Loss Steering (VLS), derives a time-dependent target from this tail and applies a closed-form correction after each Euler step without backpropagating through the policy network. On LIBERO-10 with pi_0.5, SEAM reduces boundary jerk by 28%, reduces chunk transition discontinuity by 27%, preserves baseline-level task success, and keeps denoising-loop cost near the unguided baseline.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种名为SEAM的新方法，解决了视觉-语言-动作（VLA）策略在执行固定长度动作片段时产生的多模态分叉和轨迹不连续问题。
AI.motivation: VLA策略在动作分片时会因独立高斯潜变量导致相邻分片轨迹不一致，进而在片段分界处发生突兀的不连续，影响任务流畅性。但现有方法要么计算开销大（如每步反向传播），要么需要重训练或牺牲可靠性，因此需要一种无需重训练且高效便捷的新方法。
AI.method: 提出SEAM（一种免训练的推理时一致性增强方法）。其核心机制是速度引导损失调整（VLS）：在每步推理的欧拉更新后，利用前一动作片段未执行部分的速度作为一致性参考，闭式修正动作而无需反向传播和拒绝采样。
AI.result: 在LIBERO-10数据集和pi_0.5设置下，SEAM方法显著降低了动作片段边界的冲击（jerk）28%，分片过渡不连续性降低27%，在保持任务成功率不变的同时，去噪循环的计算成本几乎与无指导基线持平。
AI.conclusion: SEAM兼顾推理效率、流畅性和任务完成率，避免了训练和高计算成本，是增强VLA策略动作分片连续性有效且实用的方法。

title: dOPSD: On-Policy Self-Distillation for Diffusion Language Models
summary: Diffusion large language models (dLLMs) generate text by iteratively denoising a masked sequence, offering a parallel alternative to autoregressive models, but eliciting strong reasoning through post-training remains difficult: supervised fine-tuning is off-policy and suffers from exposure bias, while reinforcement learning gives only sparse, sequence-level rewards and is hard to apply without tractable sequence likelihoods. On-policy self-distillation (OPSD) offers a promising alternative, using one model as both student and teacher to provide dense, token-level, on-policy supervision, but its effectiveness hinges on giving the teacher privileged information (PI) - typically an instance-specific ground-truth reference unavailable at inference - so the student ends up distilling a weak PI-free consensus policy that yields little improvement on dLLM reasoning. We introduce dOPSD, which instead derives the teacher's privilege directly from the student's own denoising trajectory, evaluating masked positions using later, more-decoded steps of that same trajectory rather than an external label, so the teacher's advantage emerges from the model's own decoding process; on Dream and LLaDA, dOPSD improves both in-domain math reasoning and out-of-domain code generation, outperforming supervised and on-policy baselines.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出dOPSD方法，通过利用模型自身解码过程中的信息提升扩散大型语言模型（dLLMs）的推理能力，并在数学推理和代码生成任务上超越现有标准。
AI.motivation: 当前dLLMs在训练后提升推理能力存在困难，传统监督微调和强化学习都存在局限，亟需能高效利用在线策略密集监督的新方法。
AI.method: 提出了dOPSD方法，将模型自身解码过程中后期步骤的输出作为教师信息，无需依赖外部标签，将模型自监督过程中的特权信息直接用于优化学生模型参数。
AI.result: dOPSD方法在Dream和LLaDA两个基准上，无论是数学推理还是跨领域代码生成任务，相较于传统监督微调和现有在线自蒸馏方法均取得了更优表现。
AI.conclusion: 通过将教师的特权信息来源于模型自身的解码轨迹，dOPSD有效提升了dLLMs在多领域任务中的推理能力，为大模型推理能力的提升提供了新方向。

title: See the Emotion: A Facial Emoji Proxy Modeling for EEG Emotion Recognition
summary: Despite the high accuracy of EEG-based emotion recognition, existing models remain opaque "black boxes", lacking semantic grounding between abstract neural features and human-interpretable states. In this paper, we reframe EEG explainability as a cross-modal generation task, shifting the paradigm from feature attribution to behavioral visualization. We introduce Facial Emoji Proxy Modeling, a novel framework that translates high-dimensional EEG signals into identity-anonymized facial emojis. Guided by the neuroscientific inspiration of neural-facial association, this approach grounds neural representations in the manifold of observable facial dynamics. Technically, our framework integrates FMENet, a specialized backbone modeling expression-relevant spatial synergies, and the Facial Emoji Learning Branch (FELB), which treats emoji reconstruction as a structured semantic regularizer. Extensive experiments on EAV and MMER benchmarks demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art accuracy among EEG-only models. Crucially, it generates semantically faithful facial animations that provide a transparent, privacy-preserving window into the brain's emotional evolution, effectively allowing users to "see the emotion" directly from neural signals. Code is available at https://github.com/xian-sh/SeeEmotion

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种将脑电信号（EEG）转化为面部表情表情符号的新方法，为情感识别的可解释性提供了全新视角。作者的方法不仅提升了识别准确性，还通过生成可观察、保护隐私的表情动画让用户“可视化”神经信号中的情感变化。
AI.motivation: 现有EEG情感识别模型准确率高，但难以解释，无法将抽象的神经特征和人类可理解的情感状态联系起来。作者希望通过语义化、可观察的方式提升模型解释性，增进对情感神经机制的理解。
AI.method: 作者将EEG可解释性问题转化为跨模态生成任务，引入Facial Emoji Proxy Modeling框架，将高维脑电信号映射为身份匿名化的面部表情符号（emoji）。该框架包括适应表情动力学建模的FMENet骨干网络和以emoji重构为语义正则的FELB分支。
AI.result: 在EAV和MMER基准数据集上，该方法在EEG单模态模型中取得最新最优的情感识别准确率，并能生成与情感语义高度吻合、保护隐私的面部动画。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法兼具高性能和良好可解释性，实现了将脑电信号转化为直观情感“可视化”的突破，为理解情感神经机制和推动实际应用提供了新途径。

title: RoboVista: Evaluating Vision Language Models for Diverse Robot Applications
summary: Diverse applications for robotics, such as industry and agriculture, require robots to operate across various embodiments, changing visual conditions, and complex planning. Vision-Language Models (VLMs) offer a promising foundation for general-purpose and interpretable robotic reasoning. Aligning VLMs with diverse robot applications requires a modular understanding of the individual decision components that underlie robotic behavior. Capturing such structure is challenging for conventional robot benchmarks that are primarily based on teleoperated, end-to-end datasets. We propose Robot Question Answering (RQA), a modular evaluation framework and RoboVista, a benchmark curated from real robotic systems, research papers, and expert annotations. RoboVista contains 474 Visual Question Answering (VQA) instances with human annotated reasoning and covers 39 unique task types in agricultural, industrial, domestic, surgical robotics, autonomous driving, and open robot datasets. Experiments on RoboVista show that state-of-the-art VLMs exhibit substantial gaps. Physical robot experiments suggest strong correlation between RoboVista performance and real-world task execution.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了RQA（Robot Question Answering）模块化评测框架及RoboVista数据集，用于评估视觉语言模型（VLMs）在多样化机器人任务中的推理能力。结果显示主流VLMs在此领域表现还有明显提升空间。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人评测多数为端到端远程操控数据，难以反映机器人决策的模块化结构。多领域实际应用需求驱动，需要更有效的评测方法来对齐VLMs与机器人任务。
AI.method: 提出RQA评测框架以及RoboVista数据集，内容涵盖真实机器人场景、研究论文及专家标注，包含474个VQA实例和39类任务类型。通过VQA任务以模块化方式评估VLMs的推理能力，并结合实际机器人实验验证相关性。
AI.result: 在RoboVista上，最新VLMs存在较大性能差距，难以充分满足实际任务需求；机器人实验表明，RoboVista的表现与现实机器人任务执行高度相关。
AI.conclusion: RQA与RoboVista为评估VLMs在机器人领域的推理能力提供了更具解释性和模块化的工具，并揭示了当前VLMs与实际机器人需求之间的显著差距。

title: evalci: A Python Library for Statistically Rigorous Comparison of Language Model Evaluations
comment: 7 pages, 1 figure. Software: https://pypi.org/project/evalci/ (source: https://github.com/Shreyaskc/evalci, Zenodo DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.21201815)
summary: The dominant practice in language model evaluation is to report a single accuracy number per model and declare the higher one better, without testing whether the gap could plausibly be sampling noise. On benchmarks of a few thousand items, and under temperature sampling where a model can differ from itself run to run by more than the reported gap between models, this practice routinely overstates confidence in headline claims. The statistical machinery to fix this -- confidence intervals, paired significance tests, power analysis, clustered standard errors, multiple-comparison correction -- is well established, but no standard, pip-installable tool packages it in the shape an evaluation actually takes: a per-item results table. We present evalci, a pure-Python library (numpy/scipy/pandas only) that turns a per-item results table into a publication-ready claim -- e.g., "Model A beats Model B, $Δ=3.1$ pts, 95% CI [1.2, 5.0], paired permutation $p=0.002$, $n=1{,}319$" -- in one function call, with adapters for lm-evaluation-harness and HELM output. Every routine is validated against an independent reference (statsmodels, or brute-force exact enumeration) rather than only against itself. As a case study, we re-analyze a public comparison of nine language models' MMLU accuracy and find that 3 of the 8 adjacent leaderboard-rank gaps are not statistically significant after correcting for the 36 pairwise comparisons the ranking implies. evalci is available at https://pypi.org/project/evalci/ (source: https://github.com/Shreyaskc/evalci, DOI: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.21201815)

AI.tldr: 当前大语言模型评估普遍只关注模型间准确率的单一差异数值，却忽视了统计显著性检验。在样本量不大且采用有随机性的采样方法时，这种做法常常夸大了模型优劣的置信度。本文提出evalci，一个纯Python库，帮助研究者用严格的统计方法对模型表现差异进行显著性分析和置信区间估计。
AI.motivation: 传统大语言模型评测通常只报告一个准确率差异，并据此判定优劣，忽略了采样噪声的影响。缺乏现成的工具来实现标准统计检验（比如显著性测试、置信区间等），导致研究报告中对模型间性能差异的信心被高估。
AI.method: 作者开发了evalci工具包，基于numpy/scipy/pandas，能够自动处理逐题结果表格，输出带有置信区间与显著性检验的发表级比较结论。它集成了主流基准输出格式（如lm-evaluation-harness、HELM），并通过独立参考工具（如statsmodels或精确枚举）验证了自身计算正确性。
AI.result: evalci能够一键输出例如“模型A优于B，差值=3.1分，95%置信区间[1.2, 5.0]，配对置换检验p=0.002，样本数n=1,319”的统计结论。对公开的9个模型MMLU准确性排名重新检验发现，其中8组相邻排名有3组在多重比较校正后并不具备统计显著性。
AI.conclusion: 当前大语言模型评测中过于自信的模型优劣声明存在统计缺陷，evalci通过标准化统计工具和易用接口，推动模型评测更加严谨、可信。

title: R3D: Quantitative 3D Spatial Reasoning for Egocentric Wearables
summary: Quantitative 3D spatial reasoning from egocentric RGB-D video is a critical capability for next-generation wearable assistants. Yet existing benchmarks do not reflect the challenges of handling (1) natural egocentric video, (2) posed RGB-D video inputs, and (3) challenging quantitative 3D spatial reasoning Q&A. To fill this gap, we introduce R3D-Bench (Reasoning in 3D), a benchmark of 3,033 quantitative spatial reasoning questions across 15 types -- spanning multiple-choice, distance-based, and volumetric reasoning questions -- built on top of 57 egocentric video sequences from Aria Digital Twin. To set a strong baseline on this dataset, we introduce R3D, a model-agnostic spatial tool-calling framework. In contrast to existing approaches that directly embed 3D information into the model's input representation, R3D constructs a 3D scene from video using segmentation and depth-lifted object representations. It provides this information to an LLM through eight composable spatial tools. On R3D-Bench, R3D with Qwen3-VL 235B achieves 73.5% mean relative accuracy, substantially outperforming the best depth-enabled baseline (CuTR+Tools, 61.9%) and the best RGB-only baseline (Gemini 3 Flash, 46.5%).

AI.tldr: 本文提出了R3D-Bench，这是一个关注于第一人称（egocentric）RGB-D视频中的定量3D空间推理的全新基准，包含3,033个空间推理题目，并引入了结合空间工具调用的R3D方法，在新基准上性能优异。
AI.motivation: 现有基准不足以评估可穿戴助手对自然并且具备深度信息的第一人称视频进行高难度3D空间推理的能力，因此需要一个新的、更符合现实需求的空间推理基准。
AI.method: 构建了R3D-Bench数据集，覆盖15类、3种问题类型，并提出R3D方法：通过视频分割和深度对象表征还原3D场景，利用八种组合式空间工具将场景信息提供给大模型（如Qwen3-VL 235B），而非简单拼接3D信息进模型输入。
AI.result: R3D方法配合Qwen3-VL 235B在R3D-Bench上达到73.5%准确率，明显高于现有最优深度基准（61.9%）和RGB基准（46.5%）。
AI.conclusion: R3D-Bench有效推动了第一人称RGB-D视频空间推理任务研究，R3D方法证实了空间工具和三维场景重建在提升推理性能中的重要性。

title: DIVO: Continuous-time DVL-Inertial-Visual Odometry for Unmanned Underwater Vehicles
summary: This paper presents a novel acoustic-visual-inertial odometry solution leveraging a continuous-time trajectory estimation framework for unmanned underwater vehicles. Underwater environments present unique challenges for visual localization and mapping, such as light attenuation, illumination variance, and the presence of particulate matter. This motivates the use of additional sensing modalities and a visual tracking pipeline that is robust to diverse subsea conditions. The proposed system is the first continuous-time trajectory estimation framework based on Gaussian processes to fuse asynchronous measurements from a Doppler velocity log, a stereo camera, and an inertial measurement unit. Additionally, a novel visual frontend is proposed, incorporating learning-based feature extraction and matching that is robust to the specific challenges that subsea environments present. The proposed framework enables seamless integration of additional sensor modalities in continuous-time and is adaptable to different environments without reconfiguration. The proposed system is extensively tested on real-world underwater inspection datasets, where it outperforms state-of-the-art visual-inertial and acoustic-visual-inertial SLAM algorithms in accuracy, robustness, and trajectory coverage. Notably, the proposed system outperforms the state-of-the-art despite only forming short-term visual data associations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新颖的声学-视觉-惯性联合测程法，利用高斯过程实现连续时间轨迹估计，提升了水下无人系统在复杂环境下的精准定位能力，并在实际数据集上优于现有技术。
AI.motivation: 水下环境中视觉定位和建图面临视线衰减、光照变化以及颗粒物干扰等独特挑战，因此需要引入额外的传感器，实现更加鲁棒且适应性的感知方案。
AI.method: 采用连续时间估计框架，基于高斯过程融合多普勒速度日志（DVL）、双目相机和惯性测量单元（IMU）的异步测量。同时，提出了专门针对水下环境的、基于学习的视觉特征提取与匹配方法，显著增强了算法对复杂环境的适应能力。
AI.result: 该系统在真实水下检测数据集上进行了全面测试，在定位精度、鲁棒性以及轨迹覆盖方面均优于最新的视觉-惯性与声学-视觉-惯性SLAM算法，即使只基于短时视觉数据关联也能实现优异性能。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法能够无缝集成多种传感器数据，适应不同工作环境，无需重新配置，为水下无人系统的定位和导航提供了高效、鲁棒的解决方案。

title: Uncertainty-Aware Abstention in Large Language Models with Provable Alignment Guarantees
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in question answering (QA) systems, yet they may generate hallucinated or misaligned responses without reliable confidence estimates. Uncertainty quantification (UQ) offers a natural basis for selective answering, where a system answers only when its prediction is deemed reliable and abstains otherwise. However, existing uncertainty scores for LLMs are often heuristic: a threshold chosen on such scores does not, by itself, provide statistical guarantees on the error rate among accepted answers. We propose CIC, a confidence-interval-based calibration framework that converts arbitrary uncertainty scores into risk-controlled selective answering rules. Given a held-out calibration set, CIC evaluates each generated response using an application-specific alignment criterion and associates it with an uncertainty score and a binary error label. For each candidate uncertainty threshold, CIC estimates the acceptance-conditioned error rate and constructs a high-probability upper confidence bound using either Hoeffding-style or Clopper-Pearson confidence intervals. It then selects the largest threshold whose upper bound is below a user-specified risk level $α$, thereby maximizing the answering rate subject to a finite-sample reliability constraint. Under exchangeability, CIC guarantees with probability at least $1-δ$ that the selected threshold, if non-null, controls the error rate among accepted answers at level $α$. We evaluate CIC on both closed-ended and open-ended QA benchmarks across seven LLMs and multiple uncertainty estimators. Experimental results show that CIC consistently achieves valid risk control while retaining strong answering efficiency, providing a practical and statistically grounded mechanism for deploying LLMs in reliability-sensitive QA workflows.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于置信区间的校准框架CIC，可将任意的不确定性分数转化为可控风险的选择性回答策略，提升大模型问答系统回答的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在问答系统中的应用日益广泛，但其回答可能存在幻觉或不一致问题，且缺乏可靠的不确定性估计，难以给出可信的回答。尽管已有不确定性度量方法，但多为启发式方法，难以对被接受答案的错误率提供统计学保证。
AI.method: 本文提出CIC方法：以置信区间为基础，对任意不确定性分数，通过在校准集上关联回答的分数和二元错误标签。对每个分数阈值，估算通过该阈值后（即被接受答案）的错误率，并利用Hoeffding或Clopper-Pearson置信区间，得到高置信的上界。选择低于用户设定风险水平的最大阈值，保证风险受控同时尽量多答。
AI.result: 在七个大型语言模型及多种不确定性估计器上的闭合式与开放式问答基准上进行了实验，实验结果显示CIC能够在保障风险可控的前提下保持较高的回答效率。
AI.conclusion: CIC为部署在高可靠性需求场景下的大模型问答系统，提供了一种实用且有理论基础的选择性答题机制，实现了有效的风险控制和高效的回答能力。

title: STAC: Selective Spatiotemporal Aggregation and Compression for Video Reasoning Segmentation
summary: Video reasoning segmentation demands pixel-accurate object tracking across hundreds of frames under complex natural language queries, producing dense spatiotemporal tokens whose quadratic self-attention cost makes long-video processing prohibitive. Existing methods address this through token compression, yet typically operate on encoder features lacking temporal context, constraining selection before content redundancy can be reliably assessed. Informed compression requires contextual awareness, but acquiring that awareness at full resolution incurs the same quadratic cost compression aims to reduce. State-space models resolve this constraint, as their linear recurrence selectively conditions each token on temporal context at $\mathcal{O}(T)$ cost, producing representations where content redundancy becomes assessable. Building on this, Selective SpatioTemporal Aggregation and Compression (STAC) enriches features via decoupled bidirectional spatial and causal temporal scanning, leveraging recurrence-derived redundancy for hierarchical compression with adaptive thresholds optimised with segmentation objective. STAC achieves 85% token reduction and 1.8$\times$ speedup while surpassing compression-free baselines on reasoning segmentation benchmarks in a zero-shot streaming-compatible setting. Code is available \href{https://github.com/MCG-NKU/nku-video}{here}.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的视频理解分割方法STAC，通过高效的时空聚合与自适应压缩机制，在保持分割精度的同时显著降低计算成本和内存消耗。
AI.motivation: 视频推理分割需要在复杂语义查询下，精确跟踪视频中目标，造成巨大的时空计算资源消耗（注意力的平方复杂度）。现有方法通过特征压缩来提升效率，但多仅依赖缺乏时序上下文的编码器特征，且上下文感知的压缩需高代价。因而需要兼具时序感知和高效性的压缩方法。
AI.method: 作者利用状态空间模型，其线性递归结构使每个token在O(T)复杂度下感知时序上下文。基于此，提出了一种解耦的空间双向与时序因果扫描方式，对冗余性强的token分层自适应压缩，并通过分割任务优化阈值。
AI.result: STAC实现了85%的token压缩率，推理速度提升至1.8倍，并在视频分割基准上超越了无压缩的强基线方法。所有实验都在零样本、流式兼容环境下评估。
AI.conclusion: STAC有效解决了长视频推理分割中计算资源瓶颈，在保持或提升分割精度的同时大幅提升了速度和资源效率，具有很强的实际应用潜力。

title: SILO: Simulation-in-the-Loop Sim-to-Real Transfer for Multi-Stage Cable Routing
summary: Linear-deformable manipulation remains challenging due to the complex deformations of objects such as cables and ropes. Prior data-driven approaches, particularly imitation learning, have shown some promise in narrowly defined settings but typically require thousands of demonstrations for specific tasks and cable types, limiting scalability and generalization.
