(4) With controlled readouts, the phenomenon survives natural-language I/O: dip stratification of structural-damage failures is significant on naturalistic vignettes, and free-form fragility separates into a dip-auditable late-rescue layer and a dip-blind interface layer. Together, output-level correctness can hide a late-rescue process that governs compression risk, post-training quality, and evaluation distortion.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了对齐的大语言模型内部是如何组装“正确性”判断的，发现模型中间层经常“偏向”错误答案，只有在靠后的层才纠正成正确答案，这一现象称为“wrong-dip”。论文系统分析了其因果性、可训练性，以及对模型压缩鲁棒性的影响。
AI.motivation: 尽管现代大模型能生成高准确率的最终输出，但尚不清楚其内部是如何渐进建立正确答案偏好的。理解系统内部“正确性组装”过程对于提升模型健壮性及解释性极其重要。本文关注中间层错误偏好（wrong-dip）现象及其机制。
AI.method: 作者利用极小语料对的极性控制，并使用类似Difference-in-Differences（DiD）的方法沿着层级追踪模型内部答案偏好，检测模型在各层的变化轨迹。通过跨型号、不同家族、参数量级（0.5B-32B）、激活迁移等手段，探索wrong-dip因果性，并进行模型剪枝、量化、LoRA微调等实验。
AI.result: 发现：1）wrong-dip现象在不同模型和参数规模下呈现差异，且在某些系列具有明显的参数门槛。2）wrong-dip大小可预测压缩后的答案翻转概率。3）通过中层loss惩罚等方法可训练性地减少wrong-dip，提升压缩鲁棒性。4）该现象在自然语言输入输出时依然显著存在。
AI.conclusion: 大模型内部存在一种在中层错误偏好、后层纠错的“晚救机制”，输出端的准确性可能掩盖模型对某些压缩和结构破坏的易感性。wrong-dip可作为压缩风险和模型健壮性的重要评估指标，对后期训练及评估有指导意义。

title: GuideMe: Multi-Domain Task Guidance and Intervention in Streaming Video
summary: While multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) excel at offline video understanding, an interesting question of how far they are from serving as a real-time procedural coach remains unknown. Such a role typically requires an MLLM to continuously monitor the execution, detect mistakes, and provide corrective guidance in a closed-loop interaction. In this paper, we construct GuideMe, the first multi-domain benchmark for streaming video that supports training and evaluation of MLLMs for closed-loop interactive task guidance. It comprises 2,458 videos spanning 223.7 hours across diverse domains (\eg, cooking, object manipulation, daily-life guidance, and fitness), with 47,775 interaction samples covering next-step instructions, completion feedback, error detection, and corrective guidance. To evaluate existing models on GuideMe, we design a three-component assessment framework to measure the capabilities of representative MLLMs, which consists of temporal-semantic bipartite matching for sequence-level alignment, behavioral classification for intervention timing, and LLM-as-a-Judge for content quality. Extensive experiments highlight a critical performance asymmetry: despite excelling at providing instructions, existing MLLMs consistently fail to identify execution errors and respond with corrective feedback. Code and data are released at https://fawnliu.github.io/project/guideme.

AI.tldr: 作者提出了一个名为GuideMe的新型、多领域流式视频基准数据集，用于评测和训练多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在实时任务指导中的闭环交互能力。结果显示目前的MLLMs在实时纠错和指导反馈上表现较弱。
AI.motivation: 尽管现有的MLLMs在离线视频理解上效果显著，但其是否能胜任实时程序指导（如持续监控、错误检测和纠正建议）尚不明确。因此作者希望填补MLLMs在实时动态场景下闭环指导能力评测的空白。
AI.method: 作者构建了GuideMe基准，涵盖烹饪、物体操作、日常指导、健身等领域，共2458个视频、223.7小时视频时长和47775个交互样本。针对实时指导任务提出了包含（1）时序-语义双分配匹配、（2）行为分类、（3）由大模型评价内容质量的三要素评估框架，并用其系统评测了代表性MLLMs。
AI.result: 实验显示，虽然当前MLLMs在指令生成方面表现优异，但大部分模型难以正确检测执行中的错误并给出及时纠正反馈，暴露出在实时指导任务上的能力短板。
AI.conclusion: 现有多模态大模型在闭环指导中的实时纠错和反馈能力远落后于其指引能力，进一步提升模型针对实际互动场景的理解与反应是未来重要方向。

title: PRISM: Personalized Robotic Dataset Generation via Image-based Scene and Motion Synthesis
summary: Recent advances in large-scale pretrained vision-language-action models have improved robot policy learning, but directly deploying such policies in user-specific environments remains challenging due to limited generalization, which inevitably requires collecting a dataset tailored to the target environment. Teleoperation yields well-aligned data but is costly and difficult to scale, whereas simulation scales easily but struggles to resemble the target environment and generate task-specific trajectories. To meet both simultaneously, we propose PRISM, an end-to-end pipeline that generates personalized robotic datasets from a single image and a natural-language instruction. PRISM constructs digital cousin scenes that are semantically and geometrically aligned with the user environment yet diverse at the instance level, and synthesizes executable demonstrations without human teleoperation. Extensive experiments show that policies trained on PRISM-generated datasets outperform those trained on baseline-generated datasets on LIBERO and LIBERO-Plus, achieve up to 100\% success rate on three real-world manipulation tasks, and maintain stronger performance when evaluated in environments that differ from those seen during training.

AI.tldr: PRISM是一种通过单张图片和自然语言指令，自动生成个性化机器人数据集的系统，能大幅提升机器人策略学习在新环境下的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 当前大规模视觉-语言-动作预训练模型推进了机器人策略学习的发展，但仍难以直接应用于用户特定环境。这是因为泛化能力有限，必须针对目标环境收集新的数据集。人为远程操作数据质量好但成本高，仿真数据易扩展却与真实场景差异大、难以满足特定任务需求。作者提出亟需一种同时满足个性化、扩展性和低成本数据生成方法。
AI.method: 提出PRISM方法，通过用户提供的一张图片和自然语言指令，自动构建与用户环境语义和几何对齐的多样化虚拟场景，合成可执行的示范（无需人工远程操作），实现端到端生成个性化机器人数据集。
AI.result: 在LIBERO和LIBERO-Plus数据集上，使用PRISM生成数据训练的策略超过基线方法，并在三个真实操作任务上达到高达100%的成功率，在训练外的新环境下表现更为稳健。
AI.conclusion: PRISM有效降低了定制场景机器人物流策略训练的门槛，实现低成本、高扩展性的个性化数据集生成，显著提升机器人在新环境下的适应和泛化能力。

title: Retroactive Chain-of-Thought (RetroCoT): Forensic Reconstruction Prompts as a Safety Diagnostic Across Model Generations
summary: Safety alignment in large language models is typically evaluated against direct, imperative harmful requests. We show that this alignment is highly conditioned on pragmatic register: models that refuse a direct request frequently comply when the same underlying objective is expressed through a different communicative stance. This suggests that current alignment policies are not invariant to semantic equivalence, but remain sensitive to how a request is pragmatically framed. We introduce Retroactive Chain-of-Thought (RetroCoT), a single-turn attack that reframes harmful requests as forensic reconstruction tasks. Rather than requesting harmful instructions directly, RetroCoT presupposes that the harmful outcome has already occurred and asks the model, acting as a forensic analyst, to reconstruct in reverse the causal chain that produced it. On AdvBench (n=50), RetroCoT achieves attach success rate of 58% on gpt-4o and 52% on gpt-4o-mini, compared with direct-request baselines of 0% and 4%, respectively. We further identify a pronounced generation gap: GPT-5-family models refuse RetroCoT entirely, explicitly identifying the reconstruction premise in their refusal rationales, consistent with explicit coverage of this reconstruction register. However, this robustness does not generalize across pragmatic forms. A single adversarial feedback turn presenting an existing forensic reconstruction response alongside evaluator critique raises ASR from 0% to 48% on GPT-5.4-mini and from 58% to 94% on GPT-4o; a control condition omitting the fabricated low score achieves 85% on GPT-5.4-mini, indicating that the operative element is pragmatic continuation within the established forensic frame rather than score manipulation. These results suggest that frontier-model alignment remains conditioned on pragmatic framing rather than semantic intent, and that new pragmatic registers can continue to expose a...

AI.tldr: 本论文探讨了大语言模型在安全对齐方面对话语表达方式（pragmatic register）的敏感性，发现当前的对齐方法容易被换一种方式表达的有害请求绕过。
AI.motivation: 当前大模型的安全对齐主要针对直接的有害请求进行评估和防护，但真实世界中同一意图可以通过多种交流方式表达。因此，评估和提升模型应对不同话语框架下有害请求的能力具有重要意义。
AI.method: 提出了一种新型攻击方式——Retroactive Chain-of-Thought（RetroCoT），将有害请求重新编排为溯源性重建任务。通过让模型以刑侦分析师身份逆向推导有害结果的产生过程，从而绕过直接请求的安全防护。在现有测试基准AdvBench上，对比直接请求和RetroCoT方法，并进一步通过引入对话反馈回合增强攻击效果。
AI.result: RetroCoT在GPT-4o和GPT-4o-mini上攻击成功率分别为58%和52%，远高于直接请求的0%和4%。GPT-5系列模型能完全拒绝RetroCoT，但通过单次对话反馈后，攻击成功率大幅提升至48%-94%，显示对‘法医编排’的继续生成造成对齐破防。
AI.conclusion: 前沿大模型的安全对齐策略依然主要依赖于请求的表达方式，而非语义层面的意图，因此新颖的语言表述容易突破现有防护。模型安全需要针对不同语用框架持续演进与强化。

title: VISTA: Auditing Semantic Divergence in Vision-Language Models
summary: Vision-language models can exhibit visual concept-conditioned divergence: given images containing demographic features, corporate logos, or ideological symbols, some models produce unusually uniform responses that differ from what peer models say about the same input. These behaviors evade text-only audits because visual concepts cannot be isolated or substituted the way text tokens can. We present VISTA (Visual Inconsistency Screening Through Analysis), a black-box cross-model audit that couples semantic entropy with distribution-based divergence to flag model-specific anomalies. In a controlled study, we implant concept-conditioned stances in three VLMs via fine-tuning on small biased datasets and confirm that VISTA detects them. Auditing six VLMs across 19 topics, VISTA surfaces 142 high-suspicion cases (1.2%) and identifies selective refusal as a previously unreported divergence pattern, where models refuse demographic queries at rates varying from 0 to 65% across groups.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VISTA工具，通过跨模型的分布式发散性分析，发现视觉-语言模型在处理特定视觉概念（如群体特征、商标、意识形态符号）时会出现显著不同的模型特定反应。VISTA可有效检测出模型中被植入的偏见和异常行为。
AI.motivation: 当前视觉-语言模型在涉及敏感视觉概念（如种族、性别、品牌标识）时，容易出现一致但异常的反应，这些异常行为难以通过传统文本审计方法发现。为了解决这一挑战，需要开发能够识别并解释这种现象的审计方法。
AI.method: 提出了一种黑盒审计方法VISTA，将语义熵与分布式发散性结合分析，从不同模型对同一视觉输入的反应中找出异常。通过在模型中植入带偏见的样本进行微调，并测试VISTA检测能力。
AI.result: 在控制实验中，VISTA能够检测到被植入的偏见。对六个主流视觉-语言模型和19个主题审计，发现142个高风险案例（占比1.2%），揭示了模型针对人口群体查询选择性拒答（最高差异达65%）的新型发散模式。
AI.conclusion: VISTA作为一种黑盒跨模型审计工具，能有效揭示视觉-语言模型对特定概念或群体的异常处理方式。该方法揭示了难以被文本审计发现的模型偏见，为系统性模型安全评估提供了新路径。

title: DSWAM: A Dual-System World Action Foundation Model for Fine-Grained Robot Manipulation
summary: World Action Models (WAMs) provide a promising alternative to Vision-Language-Action (VLA) policies by using video-based world modeling as dense supervision for robot action learning. Existing WAMs excel at physically grounded execution, but typically lack the explicit language-level planning interface in VLM-based VLAs for decomposing coarse instructions. Such decomposition becomes important when household tasks involve complex multi-step goals, where coarse user commands need to be converted into sequences of fine-grained executable subtasks. Meanwhile, the field still lacks a fair real-robot comparison between VLA and WAM execution capabilities, since existing systems often differ in data, robot embodiments, and task protocols. To address both the decomposition gap and the need for a controlled WAM-VLA comparison, we introduce DSWAM, a Dual-System World Action Foundation Model for fine-grained robot manipulation. DSWAM keeps a System 1 WAM executor as the default control path and optionally activates a System 2 vision-language subtask planner only when task decomposition is useful. The planner predicts executable subtasks from short-term visual history and a global task prompt, while the WAM executor performs world-aware action generation for each instruction or subtask. The executor is trained with action prediction and video co-training, but inference directly predicts action chunks without explicit future video generation. To make this execution path practical on real robots, we further integrate TensorRT acceleration, asynchronous execution, and real-time chunking (RTC) so that policy queries do not block robot control. To provide a fair real-robot comparison with VLA policies, we build and evaluate DSWAM under the DeMaVLA real-world deformable manipulation setting with matched robot platform, pretraining data, post-training data, and evaluation criteria.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了DSWAM，一种结合了世界动作模型（WAM）和视觉-语言-动作（VLA）策略优点的机器人基础模型，可进行细粒度的任务分解和操控。在公平的真实机器人设定下对比了WAM与VLA方法，并在实际环境下验证了DSWAM的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有世界动作模型虽然在物理执行上表现优秀，但不具备像VLA策略一样的语言层面任务分解能力。这在面对复杂多步任务、需要将用户粗粒度指令转换为细粒度机器可执行子任务时，成为一个重要的瓶颈。此外，学界尚缺乏在统一条件下对WAM与VLA实际操控能力的公平评测。
AI.method: 提出了DSWAM模型，包含两个系统：System 1作为默认的WAM动作执行器，System 2为视觉-语言子任务规划器，仅在需要分解复杂任务时激活。任务分解器根据视觉历史和整体任务提示预测子任务，执行器基于动作预测和视频联合训练生成动作片段，并通过TensorRT加速、异步执行和实时分块等技术优化机器人实时操作。
AI.result: DSWAM在DeMaVLA的真实变形物体操纵任务设定下，与VLA策略在同等数据、机器人和评测指标条件下进行了综合实验，展现了在细粒度任务分解和物理执行上的强大能力。
AI.conclusion: DSWAM联合了WAM的高性能执行与VLA的子任务分解优势，在实际机器人复杂任务中表现优异，为细粒度机器人操控提供了新的基础模型，并提供了WAM与VLA公平对比的实验平台。

title: FormalRx: Rectify and eXamine Semantic Failures in Autoformalization
comment: 44 pages, 5 figures. Accepted at the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026)
summary: The veracious semantic alignment in autoformalization is significant for formal mathematical reasoning. However, existing evaluations provide only opaque binary verdicts or scalar scores, offering no interpretable insight into where or why translations fail. This opacity severely limits both human understanding and automated system improvement. To bridge this gap, we introduce FormalRx, a comprehensive diagnostic evaluation framework that transforms autoformalization assessment from black-box judgments into actionable feedback. At its core is SCI Error Taxonomy, a hierarchical classification scheme decomposing autoformalization errors into 28 distinct categories with strict priority ordering. Building on this taxonomy, FormalRx provides four critical diagnostic capabilities: alignment verdicts, error categorization, error localization, and correction. We instantiate the framework with a diagnostic model FormalRx-8B, trained on 56,287 NL-FL pairs with fine-grained diagnostic annotations, and release FormalRx-Test as the first fine-grained diagnostic benchmark. FormalRx-8B achieves F1-scores of 0.88 (verdict) and 0.71 (categorization), along with accuracies of 0.75 (localization) and 0.73 (correction), substantially outperforming both general-purpose LLMs and specialized baselines. By connecting evaluation with actionable insights, FormalRx enables systematic diagnosis and improvement of autoformalization systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的自动形式化诊断评测框架FormalRx，实现对自动形式化系统的细粒度、可解释性评测，并发布了相应模型与测试基准。
AI.motivation: 现有自动形式化评测方法大多只能给出简单的对错或分数，无法解释翻译失败的原因，既不利于人工理解，也限制了系统改进。
AI.method: 提出了SCI错误分类体系，将自动形式化错误细分为28类并建立优先级。基于该体系，FormalRx框架可提供四种诊断能力：对齐判定、错误分类、错误定位和纠正。通过在大量带标注的自然语言-形式语言对上训练诊断模型FormalRx-8B，并发布了新的测试集。
AI.result: FormalRx-8B在评测上取得F1（判定）0.88、（分类）0.71，定位准确率0.75、纠正准确率0.73，显著优于通用大模型和已有专用模型。
AI.conclusion: FormalRx将自动形式化评测从黑盒变为可操作诊断，有助于系统性分析与改进，有望推动自动形式化和形式推理领域发展。

title: CONFLUX: A Latent Diusion Model for 3D Chest-CT Synthesis with RL Post-Training
summary: Controllable generative models of 3D medical images can synthesize volumes with specified clinical attributes, but this demands samples that are simultaneously high-fidelity, natively 3D, and faithful to the requested conditioning. We present CONFLUX, a latent diffusion model for chest computed tomography (CT): a 3D variational autoencoder compresses each volume, and a rectified-flow transformer generates in the latent space. Generation is conditioned on structured radiological metadata (18 abnormality findings, sex, age, and reconstruction kernel) through adaptive layer normalization. The model leads strong volumetric baselines on tri-planar Frechet distance (FID 32.3 vs. 74.6 for MAISI) while exposing direct control over clinical attributes. To strengthen that control we add an online reinforcement-learning post-training stage (group-relative policy optimization) that rewards how reliably a classifier recovers the requested findings from each generated volume. Judged by a separate, independent classifier, post-training removes 47% of the shortfall relative to real-scan reliability. We release the model and a ~200k synthetic chest-CT dataset with conditioning metadata spanning a wide variety of clinical findings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CONFLUX的3D医学图像生成模型，能够在高保真度、原生3D和属性控制三方面同时取得良好效果，并公开了相关模型和大规模数据集。
AI.motivation: 当前3D医学图像生成模型在精准控制指定临床属性、高质量3D重建和生成样本的真实性之间难以兼顾，需要新方法提升生成图像的控制性和真实性。
AI.method: 采用3D变分自编码器对CT体积压缩、通过Rectified-Flow Transformer在潜在空间生成图像，并利用自适应层归一化以结构化放射学元数据(18种异常、性别、年龄、重建核)进行条件控制。进一步引入基于强化学习的后训练阶段，奖励生成样本被分类器准确识别出指定属性。
AI.result: 在三平面Frechet距离（FID）上优于现有体积生成基线（32.3 vs 74.6）；引入强化学习后，生成属性的可控性提升，可以由独立分类器验证，短板比真实数据减小47%。
AI.conclusion: CONFLUX在3D医学图像生成的各种关键指标上表现出色，实现了对属性更可靠的控制，并公开数据和模型以推动该领域发展。

title: Closing the Reality Gap: Zero-Shot Sim-to-Real Deployment for Dexterous Force-Based Grasping and Manipulation
comment: 9 pages, 9 figures. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2601.02778
summary: Human-like dexterous hands with multiple fingers offer human-level manipulation capabilities but remain difficult to train the control policies that can deploy on real hardware due to contact-rich physics and imperfect actuation. We present a sim-to-real reinforcement learning method that leverages dense tactile feedback combined with joint torque sensing to explicitly regulate physical interactions. To enable effective sim-to-real transfer, we introduce (i) a computationally fast tactile simulation that computes distances between dense virtual tactile units and the object via parallel forward kinematics, providing high-rate, high-resolution touch signals needed by RL; (ii) a current-to-torque calibration that eliminates the need for torque sensors on dexterous hands by mapping motor current to joint torque; and (iii) actuator dynamics modeling with randomization to account for non-ideal torque-speed effects and bridge the actuation gaps. Using an asymmetric actor-critic PPO pipeline, we train policies entirely in simulation and deploy them directly to a five-finger hand. The resulting policies demonstrate two essential human-hand skills: (1) command-based controllable grasp force tracking and (2) reorientation of objects in the hand, both of which are robustly executed without fine-tuning on the robot. By combining tactile and torque in the observation space with scalable sensing and actuation modeling, our system provides a practical solution to achieve reliable dexterous manipulation. To our knowledge, this is the first demonstration of controllable grasping on a multi-finger dexterous hand trained entirely in simulation and transferred zero-shot on real hardware.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于稠密触觉反馈与关节力矩感知的机器人灵巧手控制策略，采用端到端强化学习方式，利用高效触觉仿真与电流-力矩映射，实现了在仿真中训练、无需微调即可部署到真实硬件上，首次实现了多指灵巧手的可控抓力与物体重定向。
AI.motivation: 现有多指灵巧手在策略训练和实际部署上存在物理接触复杂、执行器模型不完美等难题，使得具有人类级操作能力的手部机器人难以普及。主要挑战包括触觉信号稀疏、仿真与现实之间的动力学差异，以及力矩传感器难以大规模应用。
AI.method: 1) 设计快速高分辨率稠密触觉仿真，通过并行运动学解析获得高频率触觉信号；2) 提出电流-力矩校准方法，无需力矩传感器即可推断力矩；3) 采用动力学随机化模型弥补实际执行器特性差异；4) 利用不对称actor-critic强化学习框架，仅用仿真数据训练策略，并直接部署到真实硬件。
AI.result: 所提出方法在五指灵巧手上成功实现了命令可控的抓握力度追踪及物体在手中的重定向，两项技能均无需在真实机器人上微调即可保持鲁棒性。首次在多指灵巧手平台上证实了仅通过仿真训练即可zero-shot部署，实现可控力抓取。
AI.conclusion: 结合高分辨率触觉、力矩感知与真实执行器建模，能够有效桥接仿真与现实的鸿沟，为灵巧手高可靠操作提供了实用性方案，在灵巧手的仿真到现实迁移领域取得了重要突破。

title: ToolFailBench: Diagnosing Tool-Use Failures in LLM Agents
comment: 18 pages, 3 figures. Published at the Workshop on Agents in the Wild: Safety, Security, and Beyond (AIWILD) and the Workshop on Failure Modes of Agentic AI (FAGEN) at ICML 2026
summary: Tool calling is central to modern language model agents, but aggregate benchmark scores often hide where tool use fails. A model that never calls a needed tool and a model that calls the tool but ignores the result can look similar under final task accuracy. We introduce ToolFailBench, a diagnostic benchmark for measuring tool-use failures across 1,000 tasks in finance, medicine, law, cybersecurity, and real estate. Tool-required tasks return values the model wouldn't guess, forcing it to trust the tool while control tasks attach the same tools but should be answered directly. We label each trace with Tool-Skip, Result-Ignore, Output-Fabrication, and Unnecessary-Tool-Use, using a rule classifier and two LLM judges aggregated by majority vote. Across 19 headline models, the best reaches 86.33% Clean Tool-Use Rate, showing that faithful tool use is not saturated. More importantly, models with similar aggregate scores fail in different ways: most stay disciplined on no-tool controls, while Llama-3.1 models show an Always-Call pattern, and at the same parameter scale Llama-3.1-70B and Qwen2.5-72B differ by 89 percentage points on control-task accuracy. Tool-use evaluation should measure not only whether agents call tools, but whether they use tool outputs correctly and avoid tools when none is needed.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了ToolFailBench，一个用于诊断语言模型工具使用失败的基准，分析了主流模型在不同任务中的具体工具使用纰漏。
AI.motivation: 当前大语言模型在代理与工具调用上的总分数掩盖了实际工具使用中的各种失败情景。不同的失败类型（如不调用必要工具、调用后无视结果等）最终在任务准确率上表现类似，因此需要更细致的评估方法定位具体问题。
AI.method: 作者设计了ToolFailBench基准，涵盖金融、医疗、法律、网络安全与房地产五大领域的1000项任务。任务分为必须用工具获得答案和可直接答复的对照任务；分别标注“跳过工具”、“忽视结果”、“伪造输出”与“不必要调用工具”等多种失败类型。评判由规则分类器及两个LLM判官以多数票方式聚合完成。
AI.result: 对19个主流大模型测试后，最佳模型的“规范工具使用率”仅达86.33%，表明正确工具使用有较大提升空间。且分数相似的模型在实际错误类型上差异明显，例如Llama-3.1系列展现出“总是调用工具”模式、同参数规模下部分模型对对照任务的准确率相差高达89个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 仅仅考查工具调用是否发生远远不够，还应关注模型是否正确处理工具输出、在不需要时避免调用。ToolFailBench能帮助细致分析工具使用行为，推动更可靠的大模型智能体发展。

title: REAL-OW: Rehearsal-free Open World Object Detection with Low-Rank Adaptation and Dual-Stage Objectness Modeling
summary: Open-World Object Detection (OWOD) requires detectors to identify previously unseen objects as unknown and incrementally incorporate them into the set of known categories, while preserving previously acquired knowledge. Existing frameworks rely heavily on exemplar replay to mitigate catastrophic forgetting, but in some real applications, storing raw data conflicts with data access restrictions and leads to data exposure risks, while incurring significant memory overhead. In this paper, we propose REAL-OW, a novel rehearsal-free framework that decouples incremental knowledge through a collaborative adapter architecture based on Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA). Specifically, we deploy General Adapters (GAs) in the backbone to enable the significance-aware refinement of cross-task universal representations, while Specific Adapters (SAs) in the decoder provide orthogonal storage for task-specific expertise. To resolve representation drift in objectness modeling under rehearsal-free constraints, we introduce Dual-Stage Objectness Modeling (DSOM), which alternates between feature aggregation and boundary consolidation to stabilize objectness distributions while maintaining the separation between known and unknown categories. Furthermore, DSOM is supported by a Calibrated Gaussian Negative Log-Likelihood (CG-NLL) distance tailored for the dispersed feature distributions inherent in rehearsal-free settings. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that REAL-OW achieves state-of-the-art performance, surpassing existing exemplar replay methods in both detection precision and unknown discovery. Our approach establishes a new baseline for rehearsal-free OWOD.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种无需样本回放(rehearsal-free)的开放世界目标检测(OWOD)新方法REAL-OW，避免了原始数据存储带来的隐私风险和内存开销，并在多个指标上超过现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有开放世界目标检测框架为防止灾难性遗忘，依赖样本回放，但数据存储会带来隐私泄露和大内存负担。因此，研究者迫切需要无需再现原始数据且能保持模型鲁棒性的解决方案。
AI.method: 作者设计了REAL-OW框架，核心是基于LoRA的协同适配器结构，将增量知识解耦。主干网络引入General Adapters(GAs)以递进优化通用特征，decoder中插入Specific Adapters(SAs)独立存储任务相关知识。为缓解无回放条件下目标检测表示漂移，提出了双阶段目标性建模(DSOM)，结合特征聚合与边界优化，并配套引入了适应分散特征分布的校准高斯负对数似然(CG-NLL)度量。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上的广泛评测显示，REAL-OW无论在检测精度还是新类别发现能力上均超越了依靠回放的主流方法，达到了SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效规避了样本回放的弊端，在开放世界目标检测场景下既保护了数据安全又提升了性能，为无回放OWOD树立了新标杆。

title: Multi-Robot Open Adaptive Teaming Across Unseen Environments, Partners, and Scales
summary: Deploying robot teams in the real world requires simultaneous adaptation to unseen environments, unknown partners, and varying team sizes, yet existing approaches often address these challenges in isolation under the closed-world assumption of fixed teammates. We formalize this as open adaptive multi-robot teaming and propose a hypergraphic-form game formulation that captures team-level cooperative relationships beyond pairwise interactions, providing a principled foundation for coordination structure inference when team composition changes dynamically within episodes. Unlike graph neural network architectures, this is a game-theoretic construct for modeling strategic interactions and payoff structures among agents. Building on this formulation, we develop the Hypergraphic Open-ended Learning Algorithm (HOLA), which progressively expands partner and environment diversity during training rather than optimizing for fixed configurations. Evaluated on cooperative pursuit with multi-drone and multi-quadruped platforms, HOLA outperforms all baselines across all three adaptability dimensions. Learned policies transfer directly to physical hardware without fine-tuning, with successful deployments on Crazyflie and Zsibot L1 platforms confirming robust real-world coordination in novel environments with unseen teammates.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了HOLA算法，用于开放且动态变化的多机器人团队，能够适应新环境、新伙伴和不同队伍规模，方法在真实机器人硬件上验证了其适应性和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现实多机器人应用面临环境未知、队友不固定以及队伍规模变化的问题，现有方法通常假设队伍固定，无法应对开放动态场景，因此亟需新的理论和方法提升多机器人团队的真正适应性。
AI.method: 提出了一种超图博弈理论方法建模多机器人团队中的合作策略，将团队协作关系扩展到超越两两关系，并据此开发了Hypergraphic Open-ended Learning Algorithm (HOLA)，在训练过程中不断扩展伙伴和环境的多样性，实现动态适应。
AI.result: 在多无人机和多足机器人平台上的协作追捕任务中，HOLA在适应新环境、未知伙伴以及队伍规模变化三方面均优于所有现有基线方法。训练得到的策略可直接迁移到实际硬件（Crazyflie和Zsibot L1），无需微调，且部署表现良好。
AI.conclusion: HOLA 实现了强大的泛化和适应能力，能够支持多机器人团队在开放世界场景下的合作，推动了多机器人自主协作从理论到实际应用的进步。

title: PAST-TIDE: Prototype-Anchored Statement Tuning with Topic-Invariant Normalization for Stance Detection
comment: Published in The Fifteenth Language Resources and Evaluation Conference (LREC 2026)
summary: We introduce PAST-TIDE, our stance detection system addressing both subtasks of the StanceNakba Shared Task at NakbaNLP@LREC-COLING 2026. The main idea is statement tuning. We redefine stance as cloze-style masked language modeling (MLM), letting a verbalizer map label words to stance categories through the pre-trained MLM head rather than appending a randomly initialized classification head. We complement this with prototypical contrastive learning, which uses learnable class prototypes for batch-size independent contrastive training, and topic-conditional layer normalization for cross-topic Arabic stance detection. PAST-TIDE achieves macro-F1 scores of 0.75 for Subtask A and 0.74 for Subtask B on the official leaderboard, indicating that minimal architectural additions to a pre-trained model can remain competitive in low-resource settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了PAST-TIDE系统，通过语句调优和对比学习实现了阿拉伯语立场检测任务，取得了优异成绩。
AI.motivation: 面对阿拉伯语立场检测任务，现有方法在低资源环境下表现有限，因此作者希望通过更有效的方式改进模型性能。
AI.method: 作者将立场检测重新定义为填空式（cloze-style）掩码语言建模任务，用MLM head的verbalizer映射标签词到立场类别，替代随机初始化的分类头。同时辅以原型对比学习（利用可学习的类别原型实现与批量无关的对比训练）和依话题条件的层归一化以提升跨话题泛化能力。
AI.result: 在官方排行榜上，Subtask A 的宏F1达到0.75，Subtask B为0.74，显示出系统在低资源环境下的竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 在预训练模型基础上仅做极少结构调整，即可达到优秀性能，PAST-TIDE对低资源阿拉伯语立场检测具备实用价值。

title: PosterHarness: Turning Scientific Poster Generation into an Auditable Instruction-Following Benchmark
summary: Text-rich image models can now design poster-scale layouts, but we lack ways to measure whether they honor scientific communication contracts: legible labels, prescribed aspect ratios, and -- above all -- abstaining from fabricated scientific figures. We present POSTERHARNESS, an auditable harness reframing poster generation as measurable instruction-following tasks, with a pilot benchmark and failure taxonomy. POSTERHARNESS uses a placeholder-first contract to separate two jobs models otherwise conflate. The model performs visual-summary design: typography, reading path, color, and background -- but never draws data-bearing figures. Every figure region must be an empty labeled placeholder; a deterministic compositor inserts real source-paper figures at detected coordinates. This makes properties measurable: placeholder count and ID accuracy, blankness, aspect-ratio compliance, abstention from synthesized graphics, public-text hygiene, and source-figure provenance -- with failures logged as explicit rejections, not hidden in plausible-looking output. We instantiate the harness on 12 papers (6 HEP, 6 AI/ML-adjacent) and report three findings. (i) A counterfactual probe shows the placeholder contract drives VLM-counted synthesized figures from 34 to 0 across three papers. (ii) A failure taxonomy identifies blocking contracts: placeholder geometry, placeholder QA, template critic, and public text. (iii) Comparison with Paper2Poster shows a trade-off: PosterHarness yields higher-resolution artifacts, lower white-canvas fraction, and stronger VLM visual preference; the deterministic baseline retains slightly more PosterQuiz-style information and runs faster. We report this as regime characterization, not a superiority claim. All artifacts, prompts, manifests, and audit scripts are released as a reusable evaluation component.

AI.tldr: POSTERHARNESS系统为科学海报生成引入可审计的评测标准，通过占位符合同，显著提高了生成内容的合规性和可测性。
AI.motivation: 现有以文本为主的图像生成模型可以自动设计科学海报，但缺乏对科学传播要求（如标签可读性、图像比例、以及禁止伪造科学数据图等）的有效衡量方法。该研究旨在提供系统化、可评估的工具，确保存真实和合规的科学传播。
AI.method: 提出POSTERHARNESS系统，将海报生成视为一系列可测量的指令执行任务。具体做法是采用"占位符优先"合同：模型仅完成版面设计（包括排版、路径、配色和背景），但所有数据性图像都被替换为带标签的空占位符，后续由确定性工具将真实论文图像插入指定位置。通过此流程，可明确检测合规性和各种细节错误，并构建评判标准和错误分类。
AI.result:
1）应用占位符合同后，模型自动生成的伪造数据图从34例降至0例。
2）建立了失败分类方法，识别出合规性障碍（如占位符几何、占位符质检、模版审查、公共文本）。
3）与Paper2Poster工具对比，POSTERHARNESS产生分辨率更高、留白更少、视觉偏好更强的海报，但信息完整性略逊一筹且生成速度较慢。
AI.conclusion: POSTERHARNESS为科学海报生成提供了新的合规性评测框架，促进了安全、可审计的自动化科学传播，但并非对现有方法的绝对超越。此外，所有方法及相关资源已公开，有助于后续研究和实践。

title: Designing Touch for Trauma-Informed Social Robots: A Design Space for Direct and Indirect Actuation
comment: Accepted as a workshop paper at Beyond Words 2, co-located with the International Conference on Social Robotics (ICSR 2026)
summary: Touch is a fundamental communication modality in human-robot interaction and may support grounding, emotional regulation, and stress reduction in therapeutic contexts. However, designing touch-based interactions for individuals with post-traumatic stress disorder (PTSD) requires careful consideration of trauma-informed care (TIC) principles, including safety, transparency, autonomy, and trigger avoidance. This paper investigates how touch actuation in social robots can be designed to align with trauma-informed care. We distinguish between direct touch, involving physical contact between a user and a robot, and indirect touch, mediated through artifacts such as wearables or smart textiles. Building on this distinction, we propose a design space comprising three dimensions: Actuation Modality, Objective of the Actuation, and Intended Effect of the Actuation. We analyze these dimensions through the lens of trauma-informed care and derive key design considerations for touch-based interventions. The resulting approach provides a conceptual foundation for developing trauma-sensitive social robots that support individuals with PTSD through touch-based interactions.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了如何将触觉交互应用于社会机器人，服务于有创伤后应激障碍（PTSD）人群，基于创伤知情护理（TIC）原则提出了交互设计要点和维度。
AI.motivation: 触摸在促进人机交流、情感调节和压力缓解等方面具有重要作用，尤其在治疗场景下可以支持有心理创伤需求的人群。现有触觉人机交互尚未充分考虑PTSD人士的特殊需求和TIC原则，因此本研究希望为该领域安全有效的设计提供指导。
AI.method: 作者区分了“直接触摸”（机器人与用户的直接身体接触）和“间接触摸”（通过可穿戴设备、智能纺织品等中介），提出了三维设计空间：触觉执行方式、触觉执行目标及意图效果。通过TIC原则分析这些维度，总结出设计创伤敏感触觉机器人的关键考量点。
AI.result: 构建了面向TIC原则的三维触觉交互设计方法，并针对每一维度给出了具体设计建议，为創傷敏感型触觉介入提供理论基础。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为研发能有效支持PTSD人士的社会机器人提供了概念和方法框架，有助于未来相关产品确保安全、透明、赋权与创伤触发点规避。

title: What You See Is What You Get: Observation-Aligned Supervision for Chart-to-Code Generation
summary: Chart-to-code generation is commonly trained with supervised fine-tuning on reference plotting scripts, implicitly treating the gold code as a fully observable target. We argue that this assumption is often invalid: many chart programs contain latent raw variables that cannot be uniquely recovered from the rendered image. For example, a boxplot exposes summary statistics rather than original samples, a pie chart reveals proportions rather than arbitrary raw values, and a histogram shows bin-level mass rather than individual observations. Supervising models to reproduce such non-identifiable quantities encourages hallucination and over-specified code generation. We introduce Observation-Aligned supervision, a rewriting framework that replaces latent raw-data targets with quantities constrained by the visual observation: box statistics for boxplots, wedge percentages for pie charts, and bin weights for histograms. Applying this framework to chart-to-code training data from two sources, we obtain the Observation-Aligned supervision target data. Experiments across multiple VLMs on ChartMimic and ChartX demonstrate consistent improvements in observable value recovery, including under both-executable evaluation. Our results suggest that improving chart-to-code models requires not only more data or advanced learning objectives or algorithms, but also supervision targets that respect what is identifiable from the chart image.

AI.tldr: 该论文指出传统图表转代码训练方法存在监督目标不可观测的问题，并提出了一种基于可观测量的新型监督方式，提升了模型还原图表实际可观数据的能力。
AI.motivation: 当前图表转代码技术大多通过参考绘图脚本进行有监督微调，假设金标代码与图像一一对应。然而，许多图表程序中的原始变量无法仅通过图像唯一还原（如箱线图只展示统计量、饼图只展示比例等）。此假设会导致模型产生幻觉或过度指定的代码，影响图表可观测要素的还原。
AI.method: 作者提出Observation-Aligned supervision（观测对齐监督）框架，通过重写训练目标，将监督信号由原始隐变量替换为由图像可识别的量，如箱线图的统计值、饼图的百分比、直方图的bin权重，并基于两类数据集进行了应用。
AI.result: 基于ChartMimic和ChartX两个数据集，以及多种视觉语言模型的实验表明，采用观测对齐监督后，模型在可观测数值还原方面取得了持续且显著的提升，并能提升代码可执行性相关的评估指标。
AI.conclusion: 提升图表转代码模型性能，除了增加数据量或改进算法外，选择符合图像可观测内容的目标进行监督同样重要。观测对齐的监督目标能够有效限制模型输出于图像中实际可识别的信息，减少不必要的幻觉和过拟合。

title: HyperVAttention: Efficient Sparse Attention with Spatio-Temporal Clustering for Video Diffusion
summary: Video Diffusion Transformers (VDiTs) have demonstrated significant capabilities in high-fidelity video generation. However, their ability to produce long-duration videos is fundamentally constrained by the quadratic complexity of the self-attention mechanism. Recent clustering-based sparse attention methods improve the quality-speed trade-off by grouping semantically similar tokens, but their practical efficiency remains limited by two bottlenecks: substantial clustering overhead and low CTA utilization caused by irregular cluster-induced blocks. We propose HyperVAttention (HVA), a training-free sparse attention framework that addresses both bottlenecks jointly. To reduce clustering overhead, we introduce 3D local-window clustering, which exploits the spatio-temporal locality of video tokens to restrict centroid search to fixed local neighborhoods, and implement it with a custom Triton kernel for efficient execution. We further propose a hybrid clustering strategy that performs full clustering only at anchor steps and updates only subset tokens at intermediate steps, leveraging the temporal stability of cluster assignments across denoising steps. To improve CTA utilization, we present hardware-aware cluster merging that minimizes CTA-aligned execution cost through parallel agglomerative merging, improving block density and approximation fidelity by utilizing idle tile capacity. Together, these components reduce clustering overhead, avoid redundant updates, and better align sparse attention with the fixed tile structure of modern GPU kernels. Experiments on Text-to-Video generation show that HVA establishes a new Pareto frontier for training-free sparse attention in video diffusion, reducing end-to-end latency by up to $2.13\times$ while improving fidelity over existing training-free sparse attention baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了HyperVAttention（HVA），一种用于视频扩散模型的新型稀疏注意力框架，在不需重新训练的情况下，显著提升了长时视频生成时的效率和质量。
AI.motivation: 现有Video Diffusion Transformers（VDiTs）虽然能够高质量生成视频，受限于自注意力机制的二次复杂度，难以生成长视频。基于聚类的稀疏注意力虽然提升了速度，但由于聚类计算开销大和硬件利用率低，依然难以实际部署。
AI.method: 提出HVA框架，包括：（1）3D本地窗口聚类，限制聚类范围以减少计算，并用定制Triton kernel加速；（2）混合聚类策略，在关键步骤执行全局聚类，中间步骤只更新部分token，利用聚类结果的时序稳定性；（3）硬件感知的聚类合并策略，充分利用GPU tile，提升硬件利用率和近似精度。
AI.result: HVA在文本生成视频任务中，在无需再训练的前提下，显著优于现有稀疏注意力基线：端到端延迟降低高达2.13倍，同时生成视频的保真度进一步提升。
AI.conclusion: HVA有效解决了聚类型稀疏注意力在视频扩散模型中的效率与硬件适配难题，为高效、长视频生成提供了新的训练自由解法。

title: InternVLA-A1.5: Unifying Understanding, Latent Foresight, and Action for Compositional Generalization
summary: Unified models for robot manipulation aim to equip one policy with both the semantic priors of pretrained VLMs and the physical dynamics learned through future prediction. In practice, existing designs tend to erode the semantics of the pretrained backbone, suffer interference among heterogeneous objectives, and learn future prediction from scratch in pixel space, leaving the dynamics priors of pretrained video generators unexploited. We present InternVLA-A1.5, which builds the policy on a native VLM backbone that keeps training on VQA and subtask prediction, and attaches a lightweight unified expert for continuous action generation. Future prediction is recast as a latent-querying problem, where a small set of learnable foresight tokens condenses the task-relevant future into a compact latent code under the supervision of a frozen pretrained video generation model, so the policy inherits world-model dynamics priors without ever learning pixel-level generation. The video branch is discarded at inference, keeping real-time control. Pretrained on 1.2M robot episodes and 3M multimodal samples, InternVLA-A1.5 achieves the best overall results on all six simulation benchmarks. In the real world, the preserved semantics deliver the strongest compositional generalization on held-out instruction bindings, and the two designs together sustain long-horizon execution.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型统一机器人操作模型InternVLA-A1.5，有效融合了VLM语义先验和预训练视频生成器动态先验，实现了语义-物理协同泛化，在六大仿真基准测试中表现最佳，并在真实任务中展现出优异的泛化与持续执行能力。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人操作统一模型在将预训练视觉语言模型(VLM)的语义与物理动态预测能力融合时，往往会导致语义先验丧失、任务目标间干扰，并未利用预训练视频生成模型的动态先验。这些问题限制了模型泛化能力及实际执行效果。
AI.method: 提出以VLM为主干的策略，不断在视觉问答和子任务预测任务上训练；结合轻量级专家模块进行连续动作生成。将未来预测抽象为隐空间查询问题，通过一小组可学习的foresight token，并借助冻结的视频生成模型监督，学习紧凑动态代码，无需像素级生成。推理时舍弃视频分支，实现实时控制。
AI.result: 使用120万个机器人操作数据与300万个多模态数据预训练，InternVLA-A1.5在六项仿真基准测试中取得最佳整体表现；在真实环境下，模型保留的语义带来了最强组合泛化能力，并能维持长时任务执行。
AI.conclusion: 通过高效融合VLM语义和预训练视频生成器的物理动态先验，InternVLA-A1.5在仿真和真实场景下均展现出优异性能，是实现强泛化、安全高效机器人操作的创新方向。

title: Turning Off-Policy Tokens On-Policy: A Plug-in Approach for Improving LLM Alignment
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) post-training for large language models (LLMs) follows a efficient paradigm of "rollout then update", which inevitably results in off-policy training data. To resolve this, Importance sampling (IS) is proposed, while the token-level ratios compound over long sequences, causing severe variance exploded. A natural idea is "transferring" these off-policy token into on-policy token, so that the importance scores for correction are unnecessary. Following this idea, we propose Selective Importance Sampling (SIS), which is inspired by rejection sampling. Concretely, SIS implements by viewing off-policy model as proposal distribution, and implement a token-level rejection test: accepted tokens are viewed as on-policy, so that receive unit importance score, while rejected tokens retain the standard IS correction. Our proposed SIS is theoretically proved reducing the gap between token-level and sequence-level off-policy gradient estimators. The SIS acts as a plug-in that only modifies the importance ratio in the policy loss, adding negligible wall-clock overhead, and can be combine with a vast vary of RL post-training algorithms. Experiments on dense and MoE LLMs across math and agent benchmarks show that SIS consistently improves all objectives, while providing substantially stronger robustness under off-policy data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Selective Importance Sampling（SIS）的新方法，旨在解决大语言模型强化学习后训练中重要性采样导致方差爆炸的问题，并提升模型在离策略数据下的鲁棒性和性能。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM的强化学习后训练常采用“先演化后更新”的策略，难以避免离策略数据。然而，使用常规重要性采样会因序列长度导致方差急剧增大，影响训练稳定性和效果。本文旨在减轻这一问题。
AI.method: 受拒绝采样思想启发，SIS方法对每个token执行拒绝测试：若通过则视为on-policy（重要性分数为1），未通过则继续使用常规重要性采样校正。该方法只需简单修改策略损失中的重要性比，无需额外重大计算开销，可与多种RL后训练算法结合。
AI.result: 理论上SIS减少了token级与序列级离策略梯度估算的差距。实验表明，在数学和智能体基准任务上，无论密集LLM还是MoE LLM，SIS都能提升各类目标效果，并在离策略数据下展现出更强鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: SIS作为一种高效的插件式方案，有效缓解了重要性采样导致的高方差问题，提升了LLMs RL后训练的效果和鲁棒性，易于集成和推广。

title: MambaLIE: Scene Light Intensity-Boosted Low-Light Image Enhancement with State Space Model
summary:
Images captured by consumer electronic devices, such as mobile phones and digital cameras, often suffer from low-light degradation due to sensor limitations and imaging pipelines, which degrades visual quality and affects downstream vision tasks.
  Existing methods based on Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) and Transformers have dominated current low-light image enhancement (LIE) due to their excellent ability to model hierarchical features.
  However, CNNs operate in local receptive fields that cannot model long-range dependencies, while Transformers overcome this problem but incur substantial computational costs.
  To address these challenges, we propose MambaLIE, a Scene Light Intensity-Boosted Low-Light Image Enhancement method based on a State Space Model (SSM).
  We first introduce scene light intensity to improve the structural distribution of illumination, which is then gated with the low-light input to guide enhancement.
  To better model the illumination while maintaining computational efficiency, we propose the Locally Enhanced State Space Model (LESSM) for efficient light enhancement.
  Our LESSM contains two branches: an SSM branch and a Local Enhanced branch, where the former is used to model the long-range dependencies with linear time complexity, while the latter is used to enhance local feature representations.
  Extensive experiments demonstrate that MambaLIE outperforms state-of-the-art CNN-based and Transformer-based LIE methods on four widely used synthetic benchmarks and five publicly available real-world benchmarks in terms of accuracy, speed, and model size, making it suitable for practical deployment on resource-constrained devices.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种基于状态空间模型（SSM）的低光照图像增强方法MambaLIE。其在改善图像视觉质量及下游任务表现方面优于现有CNN和Transformer方案，具备高精度、快速度和小模型体积，适用于资源受限设备。
AI.motivation: 消费级设备拍摄的图片常因传感器和成像流程受限而出现低光照退化问题，影响图片质量及后续视觉任务效果。现有增强方法不可兼顾全局建模能力和计算效率。
AI.method: 提出MambaLIE方法，引入场景光强，对低光照输入进行有针对性的增强。核心采用局部增强状态空间模型（LESSM），包括SSM分支（建模长距离依赖，线性时间复杂度）和局部增强分支（强化局部特征）。
AI.result: 在四个广泛使用的合成数据集和五个真实世界公开数据集上，MambaLIE在精度、速度和模型体积等方面均优于现有最新CNN和Transformer方法。
AI.conclusion: MambaLIE兼具高性能与高效性，适合在资源受限的实际设备部署。

title: ECO: Incremental Ego-Centric Octree Update for Point Streams
summary: Constructing octrees for mobile robots that process continuous point streams in real time poses significant computational and memory challenges. Standard global structures often suffer from high latency and unbalanced tree growth. We introduce the Ego-Centric Octree (ECO), a spatial data structure that acts as a 3D sliding window, dynamically bounding the mapping space to the robot's immediate surroundings. ECO uses an efficient incremental update algorithm that categorizes the environment into shift-out, shift-in, and overlap regions, eliminating redundant global coordinate transformations. Evaluations on the KITTI benchmark demonstrate that ECO reduces update times by up to 25.60% (24.87% on average) compared to full static reconstruction and by up to 67.52% (54.60% on average) compared to a bounded incremental baseline. Furthermore, ECO substantially lowers the total system latency of downstream tasks, running up to 34.17% faster than full reconstruction in voxel-map generation. In dynamic scenes, ECO naturally retains a short-term temporal memory of moving objects, providing useful temporal context while keeping update cost bounded and the tree balanced for real-time spatial perception.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的空间数据结构——Ego-Centric Octree（ECO），用于移动机器人实时处理连续点流，能够大幅降低更新延迟和系统总延迟，提升动态场景下的空间感知效率。
AI.motivation: 标准的八叉树等全局数据结构在处理机器人实时点云流时，面临高延迟和树结构不平衡等问题，难以高效应对动态场景和连续环境变化。现有的增量方法仍需冗余的全局坐标变换和结构维护，故需更高效的局部空间管理机制。
AI.method: ECO以3D滑动窗口方式局部绑定地图空间，仅关注机器人附近区域。采用高效的增量更新算法，将环境分为shift-out、shift-in和overlap区域，避免多余的全局坐标变换，仅维护滑动窗口内结构，从而极大加速信息处理和内存分配。
AI.result: 在KITTI基准测试上，ECO方案对比于静态全局重建最高可降低25.6%（平均24.87%）的更新时间，对比增量基线最高可降67.52%（平均54.6%）；在体素地图生成等下游任务中，ECO系统总延迟最高提升34.17%。
AI.conclusion: ECO为移动机器人实时空间感知场景提供了一种平衡效率、内存和复杂度的新型数据结构，不仅提升了关键任务延迟表现，还能在动态环境下保持短期时序记忆，实现了实时空间感知的高效与可靠。

title: LP-SFT: Local-Preserving Supervised Fine-Tuning via Multimodal Entropy Structure
comment: 21 pages, 3 figures. Code is available at https://github.com/Wakaka161/LP-SFT
summary: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) is the standard approach for adapting pretrained language models to downstream domains, yet it often improves target-domain behavior at the cost of degrading pre-existing capabilities. Standard cross-entropy fine-tuning promotes only the observed label token and leaves unconstrained how probability mass is redistributed over other plausible alternatives, potentially distorting the rich local preference structure learned during pretraining. We first analyze next-token predictions using Shannon and Renyi entropies, revealing that pretrained models exhibit a regular multimodal entropy structure. These entropy peaks correspond to varying numbers of plausible alternatives, indicating that the base model intrinsically encodes rich distributional knowledge beyond the single supervised token. Motivated by this observation, we propose LP-SFT, a Local-Preserving Supervised Fine-Tuning objective designed to explicitly protect this inherent entropy structure. At each step, LP-SFT constructs an adaptive support of alternative tokens and applies a locally normalized preservation loss to maintain the base model's relative structure among them, while standard cross-entropy independently optimizes the supervised token. Across mixed-domain and single-domain fine-tuning experiments, LP-SFT improves overall performance over vanilla SFT and recent SFT-enhancement baselines, achieving the best balance between pass@1 accuracy and pass@k performance. These results suggest that local preservation helps mitigate capability degradation without collapsing sampling-accessible diversity.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种新型的微调方法LP-SFT，有效在保留预训练模型能力的同时提升了下游任务表现。
AI.motivation: 标准有监督微调虽然能提升目标领域表现，但常常以牺牲已有能力为代价，原因在于交叉熵优化只关注单一标签，忽略了预训练模型学到的多样潜在分布。
AI.method: 通过分析预训练模型的Shannon和Renyi熵，发现模型具备多模态的熵结构，对此提出LP-SFT方法：在每一步选择自适应支持集（即多种可选token），并对其概率分布结构进行局部保持，使其优化目标覆盖更多备选token，而非仅针对单一标签。
AI.result: 在混合领域和单域微调实验中，LP-SFT方法在准确率和多样性之间取得了最佳平衡，整体性能优于标准SFT和其他最新增强SFT的对比方法。
AI.conclusion: LP-SFT能够在提升下游任务性能的同时，缓解能力退化问题，有益于生成式模型多样性和能力的整体维持。

title: $C^3$ASD: Multi-Level Consistency-Driven Representation Learning
summary: Active Speaker Detection determines whether a visible person in a video is speaking at each moment. While recent audio-visual fusion methods perform well on clean data, they degrade under real-world corruptions such as background noise, occlusion, or simultaneous modality degradation. We attribute this limitation to the absence of explicit consistency constraints that promote robust, semantically aligned representations across modalities. Without such guidance, models tend to learn fragile modality-specific shortcuts that fail under corrupted conditions. We propose $C^3$ASD, a multi-level consistency-driven framework with three complementary constraints: embedding-level inter-modality consistency aligns audio-visual representations during speech; sequence-level intra-modality consistency separates speaking and non-speaking clusters via track-aware contrastive learning; and prediction-level consistency stabilizes fusion through knowledge distillation. Extensive experiments demonstrate significant improvements under diverse audio, visual and joint corruptions, while maintaining competitive performance on clean data.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种多层次一致性约束方法C^3ASD，用于提升主动说话人检测在噪声和遮挡等现实环境下的稳健性。
AI.motivation: 现有语音-视觉主动说话人检测方法在理想环境下表现良好，但在实际环境中的噪声、遮挡及多模态同时受损的情况下降幅明显，原因在于缺少促进多模态语义对齐和鲁棒性的显式一致性约束。
AI.method: 该文提出C^3ASD方法，引入三种互补的一致性约束：（1）嵌入级的跨模态一致性，用于对齐语音与视觉表征；（2）序列级的模态内一致性，通过跟踪感知的对比学习划分说话/非说话簇；（3）预测级一致性，通过知识蒸馏稳定融合结果。
AI.result: 在各种音频、视觉以及联合扰动下，C^3ASD均显著提升了检测鲁棒性，并且在干净数据上仍保持有竞争力的表现。
AI.conclusion: C^3ASD有效提升了主动说话人检测在复杂现实环境下的鲁棒性和准确性，为多模态学习提供了新的方向。

title: Geometry-Aware Visual Odometry for Bronchoscopic Navigation via High-Gain Observer Fusion
summary: Navigational bronchoscopy is critical for pulmonary interventions, yet current platforms depend heavily on pre-operative CT or external sensors, limiting their use in critical care and resource-constrained settings. Vision-only navigation offers a scalable alternative, but conventional visual odometry (VO) struggles with texture-poor airway images, specularities, and the vanishing-point singularities of tubular anatomy, leading to frequent tracking failures and drift. We present a geometry-aware VO framework that explicitly leverages vanishing-point cues from airway lumens. Detected lumens are back-projected to 3D rays, whose weighted fusion yields a stable forward heading even when parallax cues are absent. This heading, together with looming-based velocity estimates, is fused with noisy VO outputs using a bespoke high-gain observer that enforces airway-following priors and rejects drift. We validate the method on ex-vivo mechanically ventilated human lungs with electromagnetic tracking ground truth. Compared to state-of-the-art pipelines (ORB-SLAM2, LoFTR-VO, DPVO), our approach reduces absolute trajectory error by more than 50% and achieves the lowest relative pose error across all test sequences.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种几何感知的视觉里程计（VO）框架，用于改善支气管镜导航在无外部传感器条件下的定位精度。该方法通过利用气道消失点线索和特定融合策略，显著降低了轨迹误差。
AI.motivation: 现有支气管镜导航系统依赖于术前CT或外部传感器，限制了其在重症监护及资源受限环境中的应用。同时，传统视觉里程计在气道图像纹理贫乏、强反光和管状解剖结构特点下，常常失效，导致跟踪中断和漂移。因此，亟需一种无需外部传感器、对极端场景鲁棒的导航方法。
AI.method: 作者提出了一种几何感知的视觉里程计方法，显式利用气道腔道的消失点信息。该方法将检测到的腔道反投影为3D射线，通过加权融合得到稳定的前进方向，并结合基于膨胀（looming）的速度估算，与噪声较大的传统VO输出一起输入特制的高增益观测器（high-gain observer），引入遵循气道的先验，大幅抑制轨迹漂移。
AI.result: 在外源机械通气的人肺体外实验中，并采用电磁跟踪器作为基准，作者验证了该方法。结果显示，与主流视觉SLAM/VO系统（如ORB-SLAM2，LoFTR-VO，DPVO）相比，本文方法的绝对轨迹误差降低超过50%，并在所有测试序列中取得了最小的相对姿态误差。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的基于消失点的几何感知VO方法，有效提升了支气管镜导航在缺乏外部传感器时的鲁棒性和精度，有望拓展该技术在临床、重症及低资源环境中的应用。

title: Evaluating the Effect of Linguistic Relatedness on Cross-Lingual Transfer in Large Multilingual Automatic Speech Recognition
summary: Extending automatic speech recognition (ASR) to low-resource African languages is constrained by the prohibitive demands of data collection at scale. A promising direction is to leverage linguistic relatedness to enhance cross-lingual transfer from a related auxiliary language to the low-resource target by sequentially adapting on both. Although this strategy has shown meaningful improvements in small ASR models, its effectiveness in large ASR remains unclear. We extend this framework to large multilingual ASR through a systematic controlled experimental design spanning six factors, two Africa-centric corpora, and four large ASR models, isolating whether linguistic relatedness reliably predicts cross-lingual transfer gains in this setting. Across all conditions, pre-adaptation on related auxiliary languages yields no practically meaningful transfer improvements given minimal target-language data, suggesting that linguistic relatedness alone may not reliably predict cross-lingual transfer gains in large multilingual ASR, or constitute an effective strategy for extending such models to low-resource languages.

AI.tldr: 本论文研究了利用相关语言促进跨语言迁移以提升低资源非洲语言语音识别表现，但在大规模多语种ASR模型中未发现语言相关性带来显著迁移提升。
AI.motivation: 低资源非洲语言的自动语音识别能力受限于难以大规模收集标注数据。目前已有方法借助与目标语言相关的辅助语言进行跨语种迁移，但对于大模型的有效性尚不明确。
AI.method: 通过系统的受控实验设计，涵盖六个因素、两个非洲语料库和四种大规模ASR模型，比对使用和不使用语言相关辅助语的迁移效果，评估语言相关性对大规模ASR跨语种迁移的预测能力。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，在所有条件下，使用相关辅助语言进行预适配并未在目标语言数据极少时带来实用性的性能提升。语言相关性对迁移效果的预测作用在大规模多语种ASR中并不成立。
AI.conclusion: 仅依赖语言相关性不足以实现有效的大规模多语种ASR跨语种迁移扩展，相关性策略对于低资源语言支持能力有限。

title: OmniDS: Dual-Stream Context Fusion for Omnidirectional Depth from Fisheye Cameras
summary: Omnidirectional depth estimation from multi-fisheye camera rigs is complicated by visibility conflicts: wide baselines cause different cameras to observe different portions, or even different faces, of the same object, so aggregating their features into a unified equirectangular (ERP) representation under fixed projection produces ambiguous matching evidence near occlusion boundaries and thin structures. Although existing methods mitigate this by down-weighting unreliable views, they do not resolve the underlying discrepancy because context formation and cross-view fusion remain tied to rigid fisheye-to-ERP sampling. We present OmniDS, an iterative depth refinement framework that replaces rigid aggregation by combining dynamic context fusion with consensus-aware multi-view similarity. A dual-stream encoder pairs a lightweight CNN for geometric detail with a frozen DINOv3 for semantic priors; their features are reprojected into ERP space at each refinement step via learned view weighting and deformable cross-attention with geometric distortion bias. In parallel, a multi-view consensus volume captures global cross-camera agreement through group-wise correlation and feature variance, regularized by a 3D U-Net. For efficient deployment, we distill the dual-stream representation into a single MobileNet-based encoder. OmniDS achieves state-of-the-art performance on the OmniThings, OmniHouse, and Sunny benchmarks while maintaining competitive inference speed. Project page and codes are available at https://parkchaesong.github.io/omnids.

AI.tldr: OmniDS是一种针对多鱼眼相机全向深度估计的新方法，通过动态上下文融合和多视角一致性机制，显著提升了遮挡边界和细结构处的深度估计精度，并在多项基准测试中取得SOTA表现。
AI.motivation: 多鱼眼相机组的全向深度估计因视角差异和大基线距导致遮挡以及物体不同面的观测不一致，常导致深度估计在遮挡边界和细小结构处产生模糊和错误。现有方法虽能弱化不可靠视角影响，但没能解决特征对齐与多视角融合的根本问题。
AI.method: 提出OmniDS，一个迭代深度细化框架，通过动态上下文融合和共识感知的多视角相似性替代固定特征融合。网络包含几何细节轻量CNN与冻结的DINOv3语义编码器，特征在每步通过可学习视角权重和带几何畸变偏置的可变形交叉注意力，重新投影融合到ERP空间。同时，利用一个多视角共识体积模块通过分组相关性和特征方差捕获全局一致性，并用三维U-Net正则化。部署时将双流特征蒸馏简化为单MobileNet编码器，提升推理效率。
AI.result: OmniDS在OmniThings、OmniHouse和Sunny数据集上达到了目前最优的深度估计精度，同时保持了与主流方法相当的推理速度，兼顾了性能和实用性。
AI.conclusion: OmniDS有效解决了多鱼眼相机组全向深度估计中的视角差异与特征对齐难题，提升了遮挡区域和复杂结构下的深度估计鲁棒性和精度，对实际多相机深度感知任务具有广泛应用前景。

title: VLM-CASE: Vision-Language Model Enabled Context-Adaptive Safety Envelopes for Anticipatory Safe Autonomous Driving
summary: Adverse driving conditions, such as bad weather, remain a principal barrier to autonomous driving because they degrade two things at once: what the vehicle can perceive and what it can physically do. Human drivers cope by anticipation, reasoning about the scene and re-budgeting speed, following distance, and steering before grip or sight is lost, whereas current autonomous driving systems at best react after the fact. This paper proposes VLM-CASE, a framework that gives an autonomous vehicle this anticipatory capacity while keeping its motion bounded by a formal safety model at all times. A vision-language model (VLM), fine-tuned with low-rank adaptation (LoRA), reasons about the scene from the front-camera image and reports the road surface and visibility conditions. This output parametrizes a context-adaptive safety envelope (CASE), derived from physical limits and the guarantees of responsibility-sensitive safety, that couples braking and steering through a shared friction budget. A model predictive controller then drives freely within the envelope, while the VLM runs asynchronously so it never blocks the real-time control loop. We validate the framework in closed-loop CARLA simulation on tasks that demand both lateral and longitudinal control, across a range of weather, road-surface, and lighting conditions. The resulting controller, VLM-CASE-MPC, completes all trials, outperforming a conventional MPC baseline and a state-of-the-art VLM-integrated controller. Ablations confirm that the gains come from context adaptation, with the friction and visibility adaptations proving complementary. Furthermore, the framework is controller-agnostic and pairs with almost any low-level controller, offering a promising direction for safe autonomous driving. The dataset and supplementary materials for VLM-CASE are available at https://github.com/ytj254/VLM-CASE.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VLM-CASE框架，通过视觉-语言模型感知路面与可见性，实现对恶劣环境下自动驾驶安全边界的适应性约束，大幅提升了恶劣天气条件下自动驾驶的安全性和可靠性。
AI.motivation: 在恶劣天气下，自动驾驶面临感知和控制双重挑战，而现有方案多为事后反应，缺乏人类驾驶员那样的预判能力。为解决这一痛点，需要赋予自动驾驶系统场景理解与主动安全调整的能力。
AI.method: 提出并实现VLM-CASE框架：基于前视摄像头图像的视觉-语言大模型（VLM），通过低秩适配（LoRA）实现场景理解，报告路面与能见度；据此动态调整基于物理极限的安全包络CASE（耦合制动与转向的摩擦预算）；利用模型预测控制器（MPC）在包络内控制车辆，VLM与控制模块异步，保证实时性，并在CARLA仿真平台系统验证。
AI.result: VLM-CASE-MPC控制器在多种恶劣天气和道路条件下所有测试任务均圆满完成，性能超越传统MPC和先进的VLM集成控制方案。消融实验表明：场景自适应是性能提升的关键，摩擦与能见度自适应互补增强。
AI.conclusion: VLM-CASE为自动驾驶提供了预判能力，显著提升了恶劣环境下的安全与适应性。该框架对底层控制器无依赖，兼容性强，为安全自动驾驶系统发展指明新方向。

title: Semantic Homogenization in Italian Popular Music: A Diachronic Analysis
summary: In recent years, studies have revealed a decline in semantic variety across popular music lyrics, particularly in English-language songs on streaming platforms like Spotify. This research examines whether a similar trend can be observed in a different linguistic and cultural context: the lyrics of all finalist songs from the 75 editions of the Sanremo Music Festival, Italy's most renowned music competition. What sets this work apart is the development of a flexible and efficient methodology for tracking changes in semantic similarity over time, which can be applied to different datasets to study similar phenomena. Drawing on a combination of full-text, segment-based, topic-based, and word-level analyses, the approach leverages both embedding techniques and large language models. When applied to the Sanremo corpus, this framework reveals a gradual move toward increasing semantic uniformity, echoing the global patterns identified in previous studies. These findings underscore the value of natural language processing tools in uncovering long-term shifts in musical language and cultural expression.

AI.tldr: 通过分析圣雷莫音乐节历年决赛歌曲歌词，发现与全球主流歌曲类似，歌词的语义多样性逐渐下降。
AI.motivation: 以往研究发现，主流英文流行音乐歌词的语义多样性呈下降趋势，这项研究旨在探究不同语言文化背景（意大利圣雷莫音乐节）下是否也存在类似现象。
AI.method: 提出灵活高效的分析方法，结合全文本、分段、主题与词汇级别分析，利用词嵌入和大语言模型等自然语言处理技术，分析历年圣雷莫决赛歌曲歌词。
AI.result: 分析结果显示，圣雷莫音乐节歌词的语义趋于统一，语义多样性逐步减少，与全球主流音乐趋势一致。
AI.conclusion: 自然语言处理工具有助于揭示音乐语言和文化表达的长期变化，不同文化背景下也可观察到歌词语义多样性的全球性下降趋势。

title: Natural Language Camera Movement Understanding
summary: Understanding camera movement in natural language is critical for training and evaluating video generation models, among other applications. However, we demonstrate that existing vision-language models (VLMs) fail this task in surprising ways, frequently confusing translation with rotation, left with right, and object movement with camera movement. To address these limitations, we establish natural language camera movement understanding as a standalone research task. We introduce a two-level cinematographic taxonomy and an extensive, atomic benchmark featuring both real and synthetic videos. Furthermore, we curate a large-scale, multi-source training set enhanced by targeted camera movement augmentation. Our fine-tuned VLM-8B outperforms Gemini 3.1 Pro by 10% and 11% on our benchmark's real and synthetic videos, respectively. Despite these gains, a significant gap remains relative to human performance, underscoring the need to promote and facilitate future research on natural language camera movement understanding.

AI.tldr: 论文提出并系统研究了自然语言描述摄像机运动的理解任务，发现现有视觉-语言模型在该任务上表现不佳，随后搭建了新的基准测试并通过模型微调取得提升。
AI.motivation: 准确理解自然语言中关于摄像机运动的描述对视频生成和其它视觉-语言应用至关重要，但现有模型表现不佳，因此需要将其作为独立任务加以研究。
AI.method: 提出了两级的电影摄像机运动分类体系和细粒度的基准测试集，涵盖真实与合成视频，构建了多来源、大规模的数据集，通过针对性数据增强实现了模型VLM-8B的微调。
AI.result: 微调后的VLM-8B在新基准（真实视频和合成视频）上的表现比Gemini 3.1 Pro分别提升了10%和11%。
AI.conclusion: 虽然模型取得改进，但与人类表现仍有明显差距，表明该领域还需更多研究。

title: GelNeuro: A Sensing-Computing Integrated Neuromorphic Tactile System for Texture Recognition
comment: 8 pages, 6 figures. Submitted to IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L)
summary: Neuromorphic visuo-tactile sensing offers a promising paradigm for low-latency and low-power robotic perception. However, existing systems still rely heavily on a host computer for event readout, preprocessing, or relaying prior to chip inference. This paper presents GelNeuro, a fully integrated sensing-computing visuo-tactile system that directly pairs a GelSight Mini-based optical tactile front end with the Speck2f neuromorphic system-on-chip (SoC). Contact-induced marker motions are captured as dynamic vision sensor (DVS) events and routed through the on-chip network to a spiking convolutional neural network (SCNN) classifier. To mitigate accuracy degradation during 8-bit deployment, a hardware-aware weight clamping strategy is introduced. Evaluated on a 15-class natural texture recognition task, hardware-in-the-loop testing on the physical chip achieves a 96.3% accuracy within an 80 ms inference window. Notably, the system consumes only 19.6 mW of board-level active power-over three orders of magnitude lower than conventional CPU/GPU baselines on the same benchmark. GelNeuro also exhibits robust generalization across unseen contact depths, demonstrating the viability of direct sensor-to-chip tactile recognition on edge neuromorphic hardware.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种集成视觉与触觉的神经形态感知-计算系统GelNeuro，实现了端到端的低延迟、低功耗机器人触觉识别。
AI.motivation: 现有的神经形态视觉-触觉感知系统仍需依赖主机进行事件读取、预处理和中继，难以实现真正意义上的传感-计算一体化和低功耗独立部署。
AI.method: 作者设计了GelNeuro系统，将基于GelSight Mini的光学触觉前端与Speck2f神经形态SoC直接结合；通过动态视觉传感器（DVS）事件驱动脉冲卷积神经网络（SCNN）分类器；为提升8位硬件部署精度，提出硬件感知权重量化策略。
AI.result: 在15类自然纹理识别任务中，物理芯片上实现了96.3%的准确率，推理延迟仅80 ms；整板主动功耗仅19.6 mW，比传统CPU/GPU基线低三个数量级。系统泛化性强，对新颖接触深度依然鲁棒。
AI.conclusion: GelNeuro展示了全硬件神经形态视觉-触觉融合感知-计算系统在边缘智能上的可行性，为低功耗、高效率的机器人触觉感知提供了新的技术路径。

title: Evaluating Large Language Models for Antisemitic Incident Classification
comment: Accepted to Digital Hate Review 2026 Issue 1
summary: Addressing hate and violence in society requires timely detection of hateful events from public reporting, but automated identification of hateful events remains underexplored. We introduce the task of hateful event detection and investigate the ability of AI systems, specifically large language models (LLMs), to discover and classify reports of antisemitic events with fine-grained labels. We evaluate OpenAI's GPT-4o and Meta's Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct on multiple expert-annotated datasets containing antisemitic event descriptions from news articles, civil society reports, and official records. We show that LLMs, particularly GPT-4o, have potential for this task, but substantial improvement is needed. Providing clear term definitions and in-context examples in prompts can improve performance: definitions are most helpful for rhetoric-oriented events (e.g. classical antisemitic tropes), while examples help label action-oriented events (e.g. physical assault). A case study of college newspapers demonstrates that LLMs can help surface relevant real-world events, supporting early monitoring and intervention. Overall, our findings highlight both opportunities and critical gaps in AI's ability to recognize complex harms and underscore the need for collaborative efforts among AI developers, policymakers, and civil society to design models, implement robust evaluation, and develop policy frameworks for defining and combating hate efficiently and effectively.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种自动检测仇恨事件的新任务，评估了大模型（LLMs）在识别和细致分类反犹事件中的能力，发现GPT-4o表现较好，但仍有改进空间。
AI.motivation: 及时发现并干预社会中的仇恨和暴力事件，需要自动化工具，但目前针对仇恨事件的检测尚不充分，尤其是在细粒度分类和实际应用中存在空白。
AI.method: 以反犹事件为例，构建并标注了多套数据集，分别来自新闻、民间报告和官方记录。实证评估OpenAI的GPT-4o和Meta的Llama-3-3B-Instruct在事件发现和细分类任务上的表现，通过调整提示（定义说明、上下文示例）测试其对不同类型事件（言辞类、行为类）的影响。
AI.result: GPT-4o在仇恨事件检测方面优于Llama-3，但总体性能仍未达到理想水平。提供明确定义能提升对言辞类事件的识别，举例则更有助于标签物理行为类事件。案例如校报分析，展现了模型在初步筛查真实世界事件中的应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: 大模型在识别复杂社会伤害事件上显示出前景，但也揭示了重大短板。需AI开发者、政策制定者与社会组织合作，完善模型设计与评估，建立健全打击仇恨的政策与技术框架。

title: CURE: Controllable Unified Image Restoration for Complex Degradations
summary: The presence of composite degradations poses a significant challenge, since the underlying corruption factors exhibit complex and interdependent interactions. Even when the degradation types are known, accurately restoring the image remains difficult due to the intertwined nature of their effects and the need for selective control during the recovery process. To address this, we introduce CURE, a unified framework that enables controllable restoration in complex degradation settings by learning disentangled and adjustable representations. CURE is driven by four complementary objectives. First, an identity embedding is incorporated, along with a reconstruction constraint, to ensure that the model can reproduce the input image when restoration is unnecessary. Second, the ratio control mechanism blends the identity embedding with degradation-specific embeddings using user-regulated mixing ratios, allowing continuous control over restoration intensity. Third, an intermediate loss is applied to supervise stepwise outputs, each encouraged to tackle the removal of only a single degradation factor within a composite mixture. Finally, a permutation-invariant loss ensures that the model achieves consistent restoration quality regardless of the order in which multiple degradations are addressed. Since CURE modifies only the training strategy and not the underlying network architecture, it can be seamlessly integrated into existing controllable restoration models. Experiments demonstrate that CURE delivers state-of-the-art performance on composite degradation benchmarks, while enabling both selective and jointly fused restoration through flexible modulation of embedding ratios. The code and dataset are available at https://github.com/bo-oseng/CURE.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了CURE框架，能够在复杂复合退化条件下对图像进行可控修复。通过嵌入身份和退化信息，结合多种损失约束，实现了退化因子的解耦和修复强度的灵活调节。该方法易于集成，实验表现优异。
AI.motivation: 复合退化图像的修复困难在于退化因子交互复杂、难以分离，即使知道退化类型也难以精确还原图像，同时用户也需要对修复程度进行可控调节。
AI.method: CURE通过身份嵌入与重建约束保证无需修复时输入输出一致；利用比率控制机制将身份和退化嵌入混合，实现修复强度的灵活调节；通过中间损失监督每一步只修复单一退化因子；采用置换不变损失，保证多退化因子顺序不影响修复结果。该方法只改训练策略，无需改动网络结构。
AI.result: CURE在多种复合退化基准上实现了最优性能，可通过调节嵌入比率进行选择性或联合修复。
AI.conclusion: CURE为复杂复合退化图像恢复任务提供了灵活高效的统一解决方案，能与现有模型无缝衔接，具有实际应用价值。

title: Socially-Aware Autonomous Doorway Traversal and Payload Delivery for Emergency Assistance
summary: In this work, we focus on the scenario of a robot-assisted emergency evacuation. We consider two capabilities relevant to such a setting. The first is opening doors ahead of the people being evacuated, so that their path toward an exit stays clear. The second is retrieving rescue equipment and delivering it to the emergency responders carrying out the evacuation. From a systems perspective, this involves several tasks at once. The robot must locate ADA-compliant door buttons and the rescue equipment it needs to retrieve. Additionally, it must remain aware of the people around it and adapt its behavior to them, so that it supports the evacuation rather than getting in the way. We address these demands with a behavior tree at the core of our framework. This structure is chosen for its ability to select high-level tasks based on environmental triggers, and to extend to new situations as they arise. We evaluate the system in 105 trials on the Toyota Human Support Robot, across five hardware and three simulation scenarios. These trials capture the decisions the robot must make in this setting: whether to press a door button, yield to a nearby person, walk through a door someone else is holding, or first retrieve rescue equipment before traversing the door. Overall, the system completes 97 of the 105 trials successfully. These results suggest our framework provides a practical basis for robotic assistance in broader emergency response tasks. Code and video demonstrations are available at https://github.com/AndrewSnowdy/hsr_mm_control.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一套用于机器人辅助紧急疏散的行为树框架，成功实现了自动开门和救援设备递送等多任务，在现实和模拟场景中表现优秀。
AI.motivation: 在紧急疏散场景中，机器人能够辅助执行如开门和设备递送等任务，有助于提升疏散效率与安全性。然而，实现多任务协调与环境适应仍具挑战，因此需要开发更智能且具扩展性的系统。
AI.method: 作者将行为树作为核心决策结构，使机器人能够根据环境变化灵活选择任务。系统涵盖检测门按钮、定位救援设备、动态避让行人等能力，应用于丰田人类支援机器人（HSR）上，并在五个硬件和三个仿真场景下总计105次实验中进行评估。
AI.result: 在105次实际与模拟试验中，机器人系统成功完成了97次任务，能够根据情境合理决定开门、让路或递送设备等操作，表现出较高的稳定性与适应性。
AI.conclusion: 行为树为机器人多任务决策和环境适应提供了有效方案，系统在紧急响应场景下表现良好，可为更广泛的应急机器人应用提供基础支持。

title: Ossetic-COT: Designing a morphologically annotated corpus and morphological analyzer for Ossetic
summary: In this work we present the first morphologically annotated corpus for Iron Ossetic that conforms to the Universal Dependencies schema. The corpus includes 5454 manually annotated sentences from the Iron Ossetic Corpus of Oral Texts, containing 74032 tokens. We use this corpus to train a BERT-based morphological analyzer. The analyzer achieves tag accuracy of 95.60%.

AI.tldr: 本文首次为伊朗语奥塞梯语构建了符合Universal Dependencies规范的形态学标注语料库，并基于此训练了BERT形态学分析器，取得95.60%的标注准确率。
AI.motivation: 奥塞梯语属于低资源语言，缺乏高质量的形态学标注资源，这限制了自动语言处理技术对于奥塞梯语的应用。研究旨在弥补该语言资源的缺口。
AI.method: 人工标注了5454句、总计74032词的奥塞梯语口语语料，符合Universal Dependencies体系。使用该数据集训练了基于BERT模型的形态学分析器。
AI.result: BERT形态学分析器在该奥塞梯语数据上达到了95.60%的标注准确率。
AI.conclusion: 本文构建了第一个符合国际标准的奥塞梯语形态标注语料库，并展示了基于现代深度学习模型的有效性，为低资源语言的自然语言处理提供了基础。

title: Text-to-Image Generation for Projector-Camera System Registration
summary: Establishing correspondence between projector and camera images in a procam (projector + camera) system is essential for achieving high-resolution pixel matching, referred to as procam registration. The highest accuracy is typically obtained using structured light patterns (e.g., stripes or blobs). However, these methods are often inefficient and lack meaningful information for human viewers. Although some have explored the use of natural images, these often fail to provide a sufficient distribution of features to achieve comparable accuracy. Additionally, existing methods struggle to cope with environmental factors such as surface textures and variations in brightness due to ambient light or changes in camera exposure. To address these limitations, we propose a method based on deep neural networks. Our approach aims to generate a single natural image from text-based prompts that not only appears realistic but also possesses rich spatial features to enhance registration accuracy in procam applications. We have developed a deep neural network trained on a synthesized dataset that simulates potential geometric and photometric distortions encountered in a procam system illuminating a relatively smooth object (see Figure 1). Our trained network predicts the correspondence between projector and camera images, significantly improving registration accuracy across various procam configurations. By jointly considering the naturalness and feature richness of the projector images, our method minimizes visual disruptions in projected content without sacrificing precision. A user study confirms that our technique enhances perceived naturalness and usability compared to existing methods, validating its practical utility in real-world applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度神经网络的方法，通过从文本提示生成自然图像，用于提升投影仪-摄像头系统(procam)的像素级配准精度，同时保证投影内容的自然性和可用性。
AI.motivation: 现有procam配准常用结构光（如条纹、点状）来实现高精度，但这些方式对人眼无意义且对环境光敏感，使用自然图像虽然观感更佳，但无法保证足够的特征分布和配准精度，因此需要一种兼顾自然性和特征丰富度的新方法。
AI.method: 作者提出用深度神经网络，从文本提示生成具有丰富空间特征的自然图像，并训练网络在合成包含几何与光照畸变的数据集上预测投影仪与摄像头图像的像素对应关系，提升各种实际配置下的配准精度。
AI.result: 提出的方法在多个procam配置下均显著提升了配准准确率，并通过用户研究验证了投影画面的自然性和可用性优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在不影响投影内容感观的基础上，显著提升了procam系统的像素级配准精度，具备现实应用价值。

title: GaP: A Graph-as-Policy Multi-Agent Self-Learning Harness For Variational Automation Tasks
summary: For robots to work reliably in commercial and industrial applications, can recent advances in agentic coding systems combine interpretable robot programming with the open-world adaptability of model-free policies? We focus on "Variational Automation" (VA), a class of tasks that have larger variations in object geometry and pose than fixed automation. Model-free policies often struggle to close the reliability gap for VA tasks, which must be executed persistently and reliably in commercial and industrial applications. Motivated by prior work on Task and Motion Planning (TAMP) and the Robot Operating System (ROS), we introduce Graph-as-Policy (GaP), a multi-agent coding harness that generates directed computation graphs with perception, planning, and control nodes from a Modular Open Robot Skill Library (MORSL). GaP then generates an internal simulation environment to rehearse task instances with different graphs in parallel to iteratively refine the graph structure and parameters to improve success rates and throughput. Evaluation with 8 new open VA task benchmarks, 4 in-simulation and 4 in real-world, suggests that GaP can achieve success rates that significantly outperform baselines. Details, code, and data can be found online: https://graph-robots.github.io/gap

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了Graph-as-Policy (GaP)方法，通过从模块化开放式机器人技能库生成能力图，实现高可靠性和高适应性的机器人任务自动化，尤其适用于具有高度变化任务情形，比现有无模型策略可靠性高。
AI.motivation: 商业和工业机器人任务往往需要在多变环境下持续且可靠地执行，现有无模型方法（例如深度强化学习）在应对对象形态和姿态高度变化（变分自动化，VA任务）时可靠性不足，因此亟需能结合可解释性和自适应性的策略。
AI.method: 受任务与运动规划（TAMP）及ROS启发，提出GaP多智能体编码系统，基于模块化开放式机器人技能库（MORSL）生成带有感知、规划和控制节点的有向计算图，内部并行仿真可变任务，迭代优化图结构和参数。
AI.result: 在8个开放型VA任务基准（4个仿真、4个真实环境）测试，GaP方法的成功率显著超过现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: GaP系统能有效提高机器人在变化任务中的可靠性和高适应性，为工业与商业自动化带来更强的泛化能力，具有实际应用前景。

title: DuplexChat: Constructing Speaker-Separated Full-Duplex Dialogue Speech at Scale for Spoken Dialogue Language Modeling
comment: 4 pages, 1 figures, submitted to SLT demo track
summary: Full-duplex spoken dialogue models are trained on conversational speech in which each speaker is represented as a separate stream, but existing large-scale public speech corpora are mostly monaural, making them unsuited for SDLM training. We present DuplexChat, an open-source corpus for full-duplex spoken dialogue models, and DuplexChat-Pipe, a pipeline for constructing speaker-separated full-duplex dialogue speech from public podcast feeds. DuplexChat-Pipe filters language-specific podcast feeds, retrieves and cleans episode audio, extracts diarization-guided two-speaker dialogue clips, and applies speech separation and restoration to produce one channel per speaker. Running this pipeline yields a speaker-separated spoken dialogue corpus covering 282,634 hours of English and 132,723 hours of Japanese. Analysis results on DuplexChat show that it contains turn-taking dynamics present in human dialogues.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了DuplexChat语料库和DuplexChat-Pipe处理流程，解决了现有公开语音语料库无法支持全双工对话模型训练的问题。
AI.motivation: 目前训练全双工口语对话模型时，需要每个说话人单独音轨的数据集，而主流大型公开语音语料库多数是单声道，不适用此需求，严重制约了相关模型的研究和应用。
AI.method: 作者提出了DuplexChat开放语料库，以及相应的数据处理流程DuplexChat-Pipe。该流程包括播客源过滤、音频获取与清洗、基于发话人分离的二人对话片段提取、语音分离与恢复等步骤，最终生成每位说话人一个通道的数据。
AI.result: 通过DuplexChat-Pipe，构建了包含282,634小时英文与132,723小时日文双声道分离对话音频的大规模语料库。分析显示，DuplexChat具有人类对话中的轮流发言特性。
AI.conclusion: DuplexChat及其生成流程为全双工语音对话模型训练提供了具备规模和结构特点的新型语料资源，推动了该领域的发展。

title: RIGS-Refiner: Risk-Guided Recursive Refinement in Prediction Space for Colonoscopy Polyp Segmentation
summary: Post-refinement can improve colonoscopy segmentation after host inference, but many designs still rely on extra correction heads or multi-stage pipelines with non-negligible parameter or computational cost. For polyp segmentation, host predictions are often already reasonable globally, with remaining errors clustered around ambiguous boundaries and difficult local structures. These residual errors matter in colonoscopy images because useful masks need correct lesion coverage and clean contour delineation across subtle mucosal transitions. This setting favors selective local repair in prediction space over reprocessing the entire mask. We therefore propose RIGS-Refiner, a lightweight post-refinement plugin for risk-guided recursive refinement in prediction space. Starting from a frozen host anchor prediction, RIGS-Refiner extracts lightweight image priors and prediction cues, applies risk-guided update, and writes back residual corrections through a shared recursive cell. The module adds only +519 parameters and +0.631 GFLOPs, keeping the refinement path compact for deployment. Experiments use Kvasir-SEG for training and Kvasir, ClinicDB, ColonDB, and ETIS for evaluation under two frozen hosts, namely PraNet and SegFormer-B0. Results show consistent gains on both hosts and a favorable efficiency-accuracy trade-off against representative post-refinement methods. Code is available at https://github.com/tyui99/RIGS-Refiner.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种轻量级的结肠镜图像分割后处理插件RIGS-Refiner，通过在预测空间中递归地、风险指导地修正分割结果，有效提升了息肉区域分割的准确率，同时引入的参数和计算量极低。
AI.motivation: 现有结肠镜分割后处理方法常采用多阶段管线或额外模块，会显著增加模型参数量和计算成本，而原始预测的主要错误多分布于局部边界处。因此，亟需一种仅针对易错局部进行高效细粒度修正的方案，以满足医学图像对于精细结构分割的高要求。
AI.method: RIGS-Refiner是一种预测空间的后处理单元，从冻结的主模型输出出发，利用轻量级的图像先验和预测线索进行风险引导的递归式局部修正，通过共享递归单元将残差修正直接传递回预测结果。该模块额外只引入约519个参数和0.631 GFLOPs计算量，整体设计非常紧凑，便于部署。
AI.result: 在Kvasir-SEG上训练，并用Kvasir、ClinicDB、ColonDB、ETIS四个数据集，在PraNet和SegFormer-B0两种主模型冻结条件下评估，RIGS-Refiner在所有配置下均取得了明显性能提升，并在效率与精度权衡上优于其他代表性后处理方法。
AI.conclusion: RIGS-Refiner作为一种高效轻量的后处理插件，能在几乎不增加计算和参数成本的前提下，稳健改善结肠镜图像分割，尤其适合对局部边界精度要求高的实际临床场景。

title: Cortex: A Bidirectionally Aligned Embodied Agent Framework for Long-horizon Manipulation
summary: While recent Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models show promise toward generalist manipulation policies, they struggle with long-horizon tasks due to their Markovian nature-relying solely on current observations. Hierarchical dual-system methods address this but suffer from a gap between high-level planning semantics and low-level execution kinematics. We introduce Cortex, a bidirectionally aligned embodied agent framework with a customized planning interface that conveys executable and tractable subtask plans from high-level VLM to low-level VLA. Specifically, we standardize manipulation subtasks into 32 canonical skill primitives and inject tractability principles, such as representative object attributes and improved trajectory reachability, into the data generation pipeline. This enables automatic annotation of over 4k hours of open-source video data and generation of 30 hours of simulation data. We further devise an event-balanced sampling strategy to construct training data for fine-tuning the framework to better handle planning ambiguity during subtask transitions, enhanced by carefully designed harness engineering from task contexts to skill constraints during inference. Both open-loop VLM and closed-loop system evaluations demonstrate Cortex's efficacy, e.g., it outperforms monolithic baselines by 3.1% on Libero-long and 4.1% on RoboTwin. Notably, Cortex's generalist VLM enables zero-shot completion of unseen real-world long-horizon tasks, such as multi-stage chemistry experiments, by simply combining with a fine-tuned VLA-a capability infeasible through VLA fine-tuning alone.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Cortex，一种结合视觉-语言-动作（VLA）和视觉-语言模型（VLM）的分层框架，显著提升了机器人在长时序任务中的规划和执行能力。
AI.motivation: 现有通用VLA模型在处理复杂长时序操作任务时，由于只依赖当前观测（马尔科夫性质），难以有效进行多阶段规划。现有分层方法虽能缓解但存在高层语义规划与底层物理执行脱节的问题。
AI.method: Cortex框架通过定制规划接口，将高层VLM的可执行、可处理的子任务计划有效传递给底层VLA。具体做法包括将操控子任务标准化为32种基本技能原语，并在数据生成流程中引入可处理性原则（如代表性物体属性、轨迹可达性），借此自动标注大量视频与模拟数据。训练时采用事件平衡采样，并利用推理时的上下文约束提升子任务间切换的规划。
AI.result: 在开放式（open-loop）与闭环（closed-loop）系统评测中，Cortex分别在Libero-long和RoboTwin任务上超越一体化（monolithic）基线3.1%和4.1%；其VLM子系统还能实现对未见过长时序真实任务（如化学多阶段实验）的零样本完成。
AI.conclusion: Cortex通过双向对齐、标准化原语和事件采样等创新，使分层方法首次实现对长时序任务的泛化和高效规划执行，弥补了高低层割裂和VLA泛化能力弱的局限。

title: You Frame It: How Conceptual Representations Shape LLM Detection and Reasoning about Antisemitism
summary:
LLMs enable the integration of external conceptual resources at inference time, creating new opportunities for detecting ideologically and historically complex phenomena such as antisemitism. We investigate how different forms of conceptual grounding affect antisemitism detection and explanation behavior across four state-of-the-art LLMs.
  Using two expert-annotated datasets, we compare definitional, fine-grained taxonomic, example-augmented, and large-context representations of antisemitism.
  We find that fine-grained taxonomic representations substantially improve recall, while simultaneously reducing precision. Surprisingly, supplying substantially larger conceptual resources yields no additional quantitative benefit. Post-Holocaust antisemitism poses the most persistent challenge across models and configurations. Analysis of explanations further reveals systematic limitations including overproduction of conceptual references, reliance on lexical cues, overconfidence, and difficulties with subtle or justificatory forms of antisemitism.
  Our findings highlight both the potential and the remaining limitations of conceptually grounded LLMs for antisemitism detection and reasoning.

AI.tldr: 研究LLMs结合外部概念资源以检测反犹主义现象，不同概念表达方式会显著影响检测效果。
