AI.motivation: 许多视觉-语言模型默认采用固定分辨率、二维patch为基本视觉输入，限制了模型的表达能力和效率。作者通过分析发现，经过fine-tune后视觉编码的特征逐渐抽象且空间连贯性减弱，这为更轻量化和抽象的特征表示提供了可能。
AI.method: 提出RADIO1D方法，采用多教师知识蒸馏结合自编码器，将图像压缩为可变长度的一维token序列。该方法保留了全局与层级语义信息，支持用更少的token实现高水平图像场景理解。同时该方法挂接于VLM，实现灵活的精度与效率权衡。
AI.result: RADIO1D生成的表示展现出较强的层级概括能力，用单一token即可实现场景准确理解，且在成分感知图像检索等任务上效果更佳。在多个多模态基准测试中，RADIO1D以更低计算开销取得了与主流方法竞争的性能。
AI.conclusion: RADIO1D突破了传统视觉-语言模型的2D patch固有限制，提供了更压缩、更灵活、更高效的视觉表征方式，对于多模态场景理解具有显著优势。

title: Probing Identity-Specific Motion Signatures: A Controlled Diagnostic Study
summary: Identity recognition (e.g., person, animal re-identification) has traditionally relied heavily on static appearance cues. Yet motion--consistent, individual-specific dynamics--can provide a complementary and potentially more robust signature, especially when appearance is weak or variable. This raises a fundamental question: when identity-specific motion cues are clearly present, to what extent do modern video models use them for recognition? To investigate this question, we conduct a systematic diagnostic study and introduce BALLER120, a controlled benchmark of 120 professional basketball players performing free-throws. By focusing on the same multi-phase action across individuals, BALLER120 reduces action-level variation and identity-correlated acquisition biases, enabling fine-grained analysis of identity-specific kinematic patterns. We find that modern video models can predict identity accurately from RGB videos, but often rely on static appearance cues such as faces and jersey regions, even when informative motion cues are available. Strikingly, when appearance is suppressed through silhouette-only or skeleton-only inputs, the same model architectures shift toward motion micro-patterns (e.g., foot placement and elbow bending). Despite containing less visual information, appearance-suppressed representations achieve competitive accuracy and stronger robustness to appearance shifts. Our qualitative analyses further show that appearance-suppressed models attend to distinctive motion patterns across individuals. Overall, our study demonstrates that identity-specific motion signatures are present, informative, and learnable, but modern video models may overlook them in favor of easier static shortcuts unless appearance cues are explicitly suppressed.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了视频模型在身份识别任务中对动态动作特征的利用程度，并引入了一个新的篮球投篮数据集(BALLER120)。结果显示，去除外观线索时，模型也能通过动作微特征准确识别身份。
AI.motivation: 传统身份识别依赖静态外观特征，但当外观线索薄弱或变化大时，运动动态可能提供更鲁棒的识别信息。作者关注现代视频模型在有明确动作区分信号时，是否有效利用动态特征，因此设计了相关实验进行探究。
AI.method: 作者提出了BALLER120数据集，收集120位篮球运动员投篮的视频，显著减少了动作层面的变化和身份相关的采集偏差。他们用RGB视频、剪影视频和骨架视频等多种输入测试主流视频识别模型，并分析模型的关注点与识别表现。
AI.result: 结果显示，模型在RGB视频中主要依赖静态外观(如脸和球衣)特征进行身份识别。当只提供剪影或骨架输入时，模型会转向依赖更细粒度的动作特征，如脚步移动和手肘弯曲。这类去除外观后的输入也能达到接近甚至可比的识别准确率，并在外观变化下表现出更强鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，不同个体的动作模式确实包含充足的身份信息且可被学习，但现有视频模型通常优先利用更易获得的静态外观线索。只有当外观信息被显式去除后，模型才会依赖动作特征进行识别。

title: Moonstone: A Multimodal Foundation Model and Benchmark for Lunar Remote Sensing
summary: Decades of orbital missions have produced multi-modal remote sensing data for the Moon, spanning optical imagery, spectroscopy, thermal emission, radar, gravity, and elemental composition. Yet these datasets remain fragmented across archives, and no benchmark exists for evaluating machine learning on lunar data. We introduce Moonstone, the first multi-modal foundation model benchmark for lunar remote sensing. Our contributions are: (1) a 28-channel, 128 pixels-per-degree (~237 m) global lunar pretraining dataset from seven instrument families across five missions, (2) MG-MAE, a modality-grouped masked autoencoder with per-group convolutional tokenizers, a shared Vision Transformer encoder, attention masking for missing modalities, coverage-adaptive masking for heterogeneous spatial coverage, and spectral continuity regularization for physically plausible reconstructions, and (3) a benchmark of six downstream tasks covering classification, regression, and segmentation. MG-MAE pretrained features outperform scratch baselines on all tasks and surpass both ImageNet-pretrained and vanilla MAE baselines by large margins. Data and code are available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/ayushprd/Moonstone and https://github.com/ayushprd/Moonstone .

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Moonstone，这是首个用于月球遥感的多模态基础模型基准，同时提供了全新的数据集与方法，验证了其优越性。
AI.motivation: 当前月球遥感数据分散，种类多样，但缺乏统一的数据集和机器学习评估基准，阻碍了相关研究与应用发展。
AI.method: 1. 构建了包含28个波段、全月覆盖、分辨率约237米的多模态遥感预训练数据集，整合了五次任务的七种仪器数据；2. 提出了MG-MAE模型，采用分组掩码自编码器架构，针对多模态和空间异质性设计了专用机制（如分组卷积Tokenizer、缺失模态掩码、自适应掩蔽、光谱连续性正则化）；3. 设计并评估了六项下游任务，涵盖分类、回归和分割。
AI.result: MG-MAE在所有下游任务上均优于从零训练、ImageNet预训练和标准MAE模型，显示出显著的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: Moonstone作为首个月球多模态遥感机器学习基准，有效整合了多源数据与先进方法，推动了该领域的研究，有望促进更多月球遥感AI应用。

title: Do Medical Vision Language Models Actually See? A Counterfactual Grounding Framework and Hard-Negative Contrastive Training for Visually-Reliant Medical VLMs
summary: Large vision language models (VLMs) report strong accuracy on medical question-answering, yet it remains unclear whether they reason from visual evidence or exploit textual shortcuts. We introduce a counterfactual evaluation framework that decouples visual and textual contributions by substituting input images with controlled surrogates blank, pixel-shuffled, image-absent, and CLIP-retrieved hard negatives and derive a suite of grounding metrics including the Visual Reliance Score (VRS) and Visual Hallucination Rate (VHR). We further introduce CORAL (COntrastive Retrieval-Augmented Learning), a 7B-parameter LoRA fine-tune of Qwen2.5-VL-7B trained with a Contrastive Grounding Objective (CGO) that penalises answer invariance under hard-negative image swaps. On a paired controlled evaluation across four closed-form medical VQA benchmarks (PathVQA, PMC-VQA, SLAKE, VQA-RAD; n=400 total), CORAL improves macro accuracy by +6.7 pp (P(Delta>0)=0.988) and reduces VHR by 8.0 pp (P<0.001) over the matched Qwen2.5-VL-7B base; neither MedVLThinker RL variant achieves a significant gain on either metric. Cross-domain diagnostics further reveal that image substitution costs only <=6.5 pp on medical benchmarks versus 48-61 pp on general-domain tasks, situating the grounding gap that CGO targets. We discuss evaluation limitations openly including train/eval benchmark overlap and underpowered secondary metrics and release our framework, training code, and model weights to support reproducible grounding audits of medical VLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于医学视觉问答（VQA）中图文分离验证的大模型测评框架，并用新方法显著提升了模型对视觉证据的依赖和正确性。
AI.motivation: 尽管大规模视觉语言模型（VLMs）在医学问答中表现出色，但尚不清楚其是否真正基于图像推理，而非仅依赖文本信息或捷径，因此需要一种方法评估模型对视觉信息的真实依赖。
AI.method: 作者设计了反事实评测框架，通过输入控制人造替代图像（如空白、像素打乱、无图、CLIP检索的难负样本），分别测量模型对视觉输入的依赖程度（VRS）和图像幻觉率（VHR）。同时提出CORAL方法，在Qwen2.5-VL-7B模型基础上，结合对比式图像溯源目标进行LoRA微调，惩罚模型在难负例图像下答案不变的行为。
AI.result: 在四个医学VQA数据集上，CORAL较基线Qwen2.5-VL-7B提升宏观准确率6.7个百分点，VHR下降8个百分点，显著优于对比方法（如MedVLThinker）。交叉域测试显示医学任务的图像替换准确率损失远低于通用任务，展示了与通用VQA领域之间的视觉溯源差异。
AI.conclusion: 该框架能有效评估并提升医学VLM对视觉证据的利用，并通过开源相关资源推动医学VLM领域的可复现性和评测规范化。

title: ClinOCR-Bench: A Comprehensive Clinical Scanned Document Dataset for Optical Character Recognition Model Evaluation
summary: Extracting textual information from scanned medical documents, such as external laboratory reports and manually filled forms, has been a major challenge in modern electronic health records (EHRs). Recent advancements in vision language models (VLMs) have shown great promise over traditional OCR tools. However, at this point, most clinical OCR studies were conducted on private, institutional data. To our knowledge, there are few publicly available datasets for evaluating OCR models in the clinical domain. Furthermore, common scanning artifacts that undermine OCR performance are not reflected in those datasets, leaving a systematic evaluation unfeasible. Therefore, we release a publicly available, realistic-looking OCR benchmark dataset, ClinOCR-Bench, with 384 scanned images across 6 subsets: Normal, Handwriting, Poor Quality, Rotation, Tables, and Mix-artifacts. ClinOCR-Bench features: 1) diverse document types and layouts, 2) full coverage of common EHR scan artifacts, 3) protected health information-free, 4) template-aware train/test split, and 5) adequate sample size for OCR benchmarking. Baseline OCR performance was evaluated using state-of-the-art open-weight and proprietary VLMs. The dataset and documentation are available on GitHub (https://github.com/ClinOCR-Bench/ClinOCR-Bench).

AI.tldr: 本文提出并公开发布了一个名为ClinOCR-Bench的医学文档扫描文本识别基准数据集，填补了该领域公开数据缺乏和难以系统评估OCR模型的空白。
AI.motivation: 现有医学文本OCR主要研究集中在私有数据，且尚无公开、能够涵盖常见扫描缺陷的系统性评测数据集，这制约了模型发展和评测。
AI.method: 研究团队构建了ClinOCR-Bench数据集，包括384张涵盖6种类型（普通、手写、低质、旋转、表格、混合缺陷）的真实感扫描医学文档图像，并明确区分了训练/测试模板，去除了敏感信息。
AI.result: 利用当前主流的开源和专有视觉语言模型在该数据集上进行了基线性能测试，同时数据集已在GitHub公开。
AI.conclusion: ClinOCR-Bench为医学文档OCR任务提供了标准化评测平台，可推动相关模型的公平比较和技术进步。

title: ViPo-MLLM: Visual-Pose Multimodal LLM for Gloss-Free Sign Language Translation
summary: Gloss-free Sign Language Translation (SLT) translates sign language videos into spoken-language sentences without gloss annotations, avoiding costly labeling but requiring fine-grained modeling of hands, body, and facial cues. Existing methods often use single-modality or weakly fused features, limiting performance. We propose ViPo-MLLM, a framework that integrates spatio-temporal RGB and human pose features. Dedicated encoders model intra-modal dynamics and cross-modal attention captures long-range dependencies. The fused representation is conditioned with a structured prompt and processed by an LLM trained with contrastive and language modeling objectives. The proposed model was evaluated on the PHOENIX14T and CSL-Daily datasets and achieved new state-of-the-art results on both datasets. Moreover, the ViPo-MLLM model attained competitive performance compared to gloss-based recognition approaches, confirming the effectiveness of the proposed pose cues and cross-modal attention mechanisms.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于无Gloss标注的手语翻译新方法ViPo-MLLM，融合了RGB和姿态特征，通过深度学习架构实现跨模态高效特征转换，并在多个数据集上取得了当前最优表现。
AI.motivation: 基于Gloss的手语翻译依赖昂贵的Gloss标注，实际应用中难以获得；而无Gloss的翻译需求精细的手部、身体和面部特征建模。现有方法只用单一模态或简单融合，表现有限。
AI.method: 提出ViPo-MLLM框架，集成时空RGB特征和人体姿态特征，通过专用编码器分别建模不同模态内动态，并通过跨模态注意力机制捕捉长距离依赖。融合后的特征用结构化提示喂入大型语言模型（LLM），并通过对比学习和语言建模目标共同训练。
AI.result: 在PHOENIX14T和CSL-Daily两个主流数据集上取得最新SOTA效果，并且结果可与依赖Gloss的识别方法媲美。
AI.conclusion: ViPo-MLLM证实了姿态特征和跨模态注意力机制在无Gloss手语翻译中的有效性，为无需昂贵标注的高效SLT提供了新路径。

title: From Geometric Labels to Semantic Understanding of Indoor Building Components Using Multimodal Large Language Models
comment: 46 pages, 13 figures, accepted by Automation in Construction journal
summary: Point cloud-based understanding has become an important enabler for facility operation and maintenance involving indoor building components. However, existing methods output only discrete labels without explaining component functions or natural language interactions. This paper proposes Building-MLLM, a point cloud-centered multimodal large language model (MLLM) for indoor components, which models point clouds and instructions to generate responses across Simple Recognition, Complex Captioning, and Multi-Engineering Question Answering tasks. Building-MLLM addresses semantic concentration through four domain-specific mechanisms: Point Information Enhancer for task-relevant semantics, Geometry-Preserving Regularization preventing geometric erosion, fixed textual prefix for domain stabilization, and multi-dimensional LoRA balancing recognition with reasoning. A multi-constraint progressive instruction-generation engine is developed to compile a synthetic point cloud-text dataset with 4198 objects, 37,782 instruction-following pairs, and 47 categories. Experiments show that Building-MLLM achieves 88.00%, 65.10%, and 68.14% on the three task types, respectively, demonstrating superior indoor component language understanding and providing initial generalizability in transfer inference on other real-world datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Building-MLLM，一种以点云为中心的多模态大语言模型，实现了对室内建筑组件的多任务理解，包括简单识别、复杂描述和多工程问答，并在多个任务上取得了优异性能。
AI.motivation: 传统点云理解方法只能输出离散标签，无法解释组件功能或进行自然语言交互，限制了其在建筑运维中的应用。作者希望解决点云语义表达有限与缺乏交互能力的问题。
AI.method: 提出了Building-MLLM模型，结合点云与指令信息，支持三类任务。创新点在于四个领域特定机制：点信息增强器、几何保持正则化、固定文本前缀和多维LoRA，并开发了基于多约束的逐步生成引擎，构建了大规模点云-文本数据集。
AI.result: 模型在三项任务上分别获得88.00%、65.10%、68.14%准确率，优于现有方法，并且在真实数据集迁移推理中展现出较好的通用性。
AI.conclusion: Building-MLLM提升了室内组件语言理解能力，为点云与自然语言交互打开了新路径，为相关领域的后续研究奠定了基础。

title: IPDiff: Diffusion-driven ORSI Salient Object Detection with Information Reconstruction and Multi-Prior Guidance
summary: Existing Salient Object Detection in Optical Remote Sensing Image (ORSI-SOD) methods mainly adopt the static inference strategy, which uses fixed trained model parameters for saliency inference in the testing phase. This means that even if the generated saliency map has errors, it cannot be further optimized. In this paper, we propose the novel IPDiff, a Diffusion-driven ORSI-SOD method with Information Reconstruction and Multi-Prior Guidance. We build IPDiff based on a unique dynamic optimization strategy, which endows IPDiff with the ability to iteratively optimize saliency maps with a dynamic parameter. Specifically, we formulate ORSI-SOD as a conditional diffusion problem in IPDiff. IPDiff first extracts informative conditional priors from ORSIs, including the saliency prior and the hierarchical priors, in the prior network with the assistance of the information reconstruction-driven attention module. The saliency prior can provide positional information of salient objects, while the hierarchical priors can provide specific detail and semantic information of salient objects. Under the guidance of these priors, IPDiff then iteratively denoises random noise as the timestep dynamically changes in the denoising network, generating saliency maps that are close to ground truths. Notably, we simultaneously supervise IPDiff in both spatial and spectral domains through a hybrid loss function to achieve efficient network training. Comprehensive experiments on public ORSSD, EORSSD, and ORSI-4199 datasets demonstrate that our proposed IPDiff achieves the best performance compared to 46 state-of-the-art methods. The code and results of our method are available at https://github.com/MathLee/IPDiff.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对光学遥感图像显著性目标检测（ORSI-SOD）的新方法IPDiff，利用扩散模型动态优化显著图，结合多种先验信息显著提高检测精度，并在多个公开数据集上实现了最佳性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的ORSI-SOD方法推理阶段采用静态策略，即固定模型参数，推理出的显著图无法继续优化，易出现误差，缺乏灵活性。本文旨在打破这一局限，实现显著图的动态迭代优化。
AI.method: 作者提出IPDiff方法，将ORSI-SOD任务建模为条件扩散过程。模型从图像中抽取显著先验与层次先验，利用信息重建驱动的注意力模块，动态引导扩散模型的参数，方法支持多步噪声去噪，结合空间与光谱域混合损失函数进行训练。
AI.result: 在ORSSD、EORSSD和ORSI-4199三个公开数据集上的实验表明，IPDiff在46种前沿方法中整体表现最佳，显著提升了检测准确率。
AI.conclusion: IPDiff实现了扩散模型在遥感图像显著性检测领域的创新应用，验证了多先验动态优化策略效果优异，对后续相关研究具有参考价值。

title: Leveraging Pathology Co-occurrence for Test-Time Adaptation in Chest X-Ray Diagnosis
summary: Medical imaging models often degrade when deployed at new clinical sites due to differences in imaging equipment, protocols, and patient populations. Test-time adaptation (TTA) addresses this by updating a pretrained model using only unlabeled target data, without access to source data. However, existing TTA methods were designed for single-label classification on natural image benchmarks, minimizing entropy uniformly across all samples without considering label dependencies. This overlooks a key property of multi-label medical imaging: pathologies do not occur independently but exhibit structured co-occurrence patterns. In this work, we propose Co-occurrence Weighted Adaptation (CoWA), which leverages disease co-occurrence patterns as a reliability signal for adaptation. CoWA estimates label co-occurrence structure from model predictions and downweights samples that deviate from expected patterns, enabling adaptation to rely more on consistent predictions while reducing the impact of noisy ones. We evaluate CoWA on chest X-ray benchmarks under domain shifts and demonstrate consistent improvements over established baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出了CoWA方法，通过利用疾病共现结构来提升无标签测试时的模型自适应能力，在胸部X光迁移任务上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的TTA方法多用于自然图像的单标签分类，未充分利用多标签医学影像中疾病共现关系，导致适应性和表现受限。
AI.method: 提出Co-occurrence Weighted Adaptation (CoWA)方法，通过模型对目标域无标签数据的预测，估算疾病标签的共现结构，对偏离常规共现模式的样本降权，提高适应过程的可靠性。
AI.result: 在胸部X光领域的多个数据集上验证，CoWA在存在域迁移时，性能持续优于主流基线方法。
AI.conclusion: CoWA能够有效利用标签共现信息，在未知环境下提升多标签医学影像模型的泛化性能。

title: ProxyUp: Training-Free Proxy-Conditioned Video Generation for Controllable Dynamics
summary: Precise control over complex dynamics remains challenging for modern video generative models, as text prompts alone often cannot specify physically plausible, fine-grained motion and interactions. We introduce $\textit{proxy-conditioned video generation}$, where a coarse proxy video from physics-based simulation or real-world recording serves as a dynamics carrier to control foreground object motion. Given a proxy video and a text prompt, the goal is to synthesize a new video that preserves the proxy dynamics while generating novel content and plausible interactions aligned with the prompt. Since paired proxy-target videos are difficult to obtain, we propose $\textbf{ProxyUp}$, a training-free framework built on pretrained video generative models. ProxyUp first inverts the proxy video into an intermediate latent representation and applies $\textbf{region-wise latent noising}$, preserving motion-critical proxy latents while injecting noise into regions intended for text-driven regeneration. To mitigate the distribution mismatch and weak foreground-background coupling introduced by this heuristic latent composition, we further propose $\textbf{Stochastic Flow Relaxation (SFR)}$, which progressively relaxes the composed latent toward the model's learned distribution before ODE sampling. Experiments on both simulation and real-world proxies show that ProxyUp outperforms strong video editing and motion transfer baselines in dynamic fidelity and text alignment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的基于代理视频的条件生成（proxy-conditioned video generation）方法，通过粗粒度的物理模拟或真实视频作为动力学载体，结合文本提示精准控制内容生成。核心贡献是无需成对数据的新框架ProxyUp，以及为此设计的区域级潜变量扰动和随机流松弛方法，在对比实验中提升了运动还原和文本契合度。
AI.motivation: 现有视频生成模型难以仅靠文本提示实现物理合理、精细的运动控制，尤其是在涉及复杂交互时。物理模拟或真实录制的代理视频可以作为动力学的强约束，提升合成视频的动态一致性。
AI.method: 提出ProxyUp框架：利用预训练视频生成模型，将代理视频反演到潜空间，再通过区域级潜变量加噪，实现对目标区域的文本驱动重生成；为处理潜空间拼接带来的分布失配与前景背景解耦，引入随机流松弛（SFR），逐步将潜变量调整到模型分布，从而提升生成质量。
AI.result: 在仿真与真实代理视频数据集上，ProxyUp在动态还原度和文本契合度上大幅优于现有视频编辑和运动迁移方法。
AI.conclusion: ProxyUp无需成对训练数据，实现了代理视频引导下的高保真、可控视频生成。区域加噪与SFR技术有效提升了运动还原和内容泛化能力，为解决复杂动态场景下的视频生成控制提供了新方案。

title: Attending to Multimodal Generation One Token at a Time
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) generate responses autoregressively, integrating visual and linguistic information in an evolving context. Prior work on interpretability has focused on individual layers and circuits (where), leaving the token-level dynamics of multimodal computation during generation (when) underexplored. We address this gap and study attention shifts as per semantic role; tracking model attention to image, text, instruction, and previously generated tokens, One Token at a Time (OTaT). We introduce multimodal tasks that require explicit switching between visual and textual context within a single response. Across two mainstream model families and four open-weight MLLMs of varying sizes, we establish consistent patterns: attention to image peaks at tokens requiring image-derived information, instruction tokens are revisited during task transitions, and attention to previously generated tokens increases as the generation progresses. Causal attention blocking interventions validate the functional role of these trends. We profile model behavior under disrupted attention and observe responses falling back to language priors, or exhibiting cross-modal leakage, denial, or recovery. Finally, informed of the attention dynamics through our novel analysis, we propose a simple test-time intervention to boost attention to the relevant modality at the right time, significantly improving multimodal task performance.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了多模态大语言模型（MLLM）在生成过程中，模型对视觉和文本信息关注的动态演变规律。作者提出了逐Token追踪注意力变化（OTaT）的方法，发现模型在需要视觉信息或在任务转换时的注意力模式具有一致性，并利用注意力干预实验进行了验证。最后，提出了一种测试时动态增强相关模态注意力的方法，显著提升了模型在多模态任务上的表现。
AI.motivation: 虽然现有关于多模态大语言模型（MLLM）的可解释性研究主要集中于模型结构层面，但对于模型在生成过程中每个Token对不同模态关注的动态变化情况缺乏分析。作者希望填补这一空白，深入理解MLLM如何在生成过程中融合视觉和文本信息。
AI.method: 作者提出了One Token at a Time（OTaT）方法，跟踪MLLM在生成过程中每个Token时刻对图片、文本、指令和已生成内容的注意力分布。同时，设计了需频繁切换视觉和文本上下文的多模态任务，通过因果注意力阻断实验，分析不同注意力模式对模型行为的影响。
AI.result: 在两大主流模型家族和四个公开权重的MLLM中，发现模型在生成与图片相关Token时对图片的注意力峰值提升；任务切换时会回溯关注指令；随着生成推进，对已生成内容的注意力增加。因果注意力切断实验验证了这些注意力变化趋势的作用。注意力被干扰时，模型会退回语言先验，出现信息泄露、否认或恢复等行为。
AI.conclusion: 模型在生成过程中对不同模态的关注存在规律性动态变化。了解这些动态后，可通过简单的测试时干预方法，按需增强相关模态注意力，显著提升MLLM的多模态任务表现。

title: Exploring SAM Supervision for Fine-Grained UAV Target Segmentation under Data Scarcity
summary: Unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) target segmentation remains challenging due to the small size of objects, appearance variations, cluttered backgrounds, and the scarcity of densely annotated data. These factors hinder the performance and practical deployment of lightweight segmentation models in real-world UAV applications. To address this problem, this paper investigates the use of SAM3 (Segment Anything Model 3) as a pseudo-label generator for training compact segmentation networks. Specifically, two supervision paradigms are explored: (i) direct pseudo-supervision using unaltered SAM3-generated masks, and (ii) a refinement strategy that re-applies SAM3 to localized image patches for improved mask quality. Based on these paradigms, a two-stage SAM3-guided pseudo-label generation framework is proposed. In the first stage, SAM3 generates coarse masks for initial object localization. The localized regions are subsequently cropped into patches and processed by SAM3 again to generate fine masks with accurate object boundaries and discard false positives. The resulting coarse and fine masks are then used as pseudo-labels to optimize a lightweight network, termed IPS-Seg, which consists of three components: an IdentityFormer backbone for feature extraction, an Atrous Spatial Pyramid Pooling module for multi-scale context aggregation, and a PixelShuffle-based decoder for spatial resolution recovery. Extensive experiments under multiple supervision settings demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed framework. The results show that IPS-Seg achieves a favorable trade-off between segmentation accuracy and computational efficiency while benefiting consistently from the proposed pseudo-label generation strategy. These findings highlight the potential of large-scale foundation models as annotation sources for training compact task-specific segmentation networks in low-label vision domains.

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用SAM3大模型生成伪标签，指导轻量化UAV目标分割网络的训练，并取得了准确率与效率兼顾的效果。
AI.motivation: UAV目标分割面临目标小、外观变化大、背景复杂和标注稀缺等难题，影响实际应用中轻量级分割模型的性能和部署。
AI.method: 提出以SAM3为伪标签生成器，探索两种方式：（i）直接用SAM3生成的掩码作为监督；（ii）对感兴趣区域再次应用SAM3提升掩码质量。搭建两阶段伪标签生成流程，并设计轻量分割网络IPS-Seg（结合IdentityFormer骨干、ASPP模块和PixelShuffle解码）。
AI.result: 多种监督设定下实验表明，所提方法提升了轻量分割模型的表现，实现了准确率与计算效率的良好权衡。
AI.conclusion: 充分利用大规模基础模型生成的伪标签，有效促进低标注条件下面向特定任务的轻量分割网络训练，显示出良好应用潜力。

title: GeoSAM-Lite: A Lightweight Foundation Model for Onboard Remote Sensing Segmentation
summary: The deployment of large-scale foundation models like Segment Anything Model (SAM) on resource-constrained Earth observation platforms is hindered by prohibitive computational costs and the domain shift between natural and remote sensing imagery. To address these challenges, we propose \textit{Geo}spatial \textit{S}egment \textit{A}nything \textit{M}odel-Lite (GeoSAM-Lite), a lightweight, prompt-free segmentation framework designed for efficient onboard remote sensing segmentation. GeoSAM-Lite incorporates two core innovations: (1) Geospatial-Domain Initialization (Geo-Init), a domain-aware pre-training strategy that distills geospatial priors from a specialized teacher to bridge the domain gap; and (2) Feature Fusion Layers (FFL), which recalibrate spatial features and restore high-frequency boundary cues to overcome the capacity bottlenecks of lightweight backbones. Experiments across representative datasets, with a primary focus on cloud scenarios to evaluate performance under extreme scale variations and complex boundaries, demonstrate that GeoSAM-Lite achieves competitive accuracy while reducing parameters by 92.8\% compared to the heavyweight RSAM-Seg. By establishing a superior Pareto frontier between efficiency and fidelity, GeoSAM-Lite offers a practical solution for real-time segmentation on edge devices.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了GeoSAM-Lite，一种专为遥感场景高效分割设计的轻量级模型，在极大减少参数量的同时，依然保持高精度表现，适用于边缘设备实时部署。
AI.motivation: 当前大规模基础模型如SAM虽然性能优秀，但因运算资源消耗大和遥感影像领域差异，难以在资源有限的地球观测平台应用。为解决这一问题，亟需将高性能模型简化以适应遥感平台，并提升其对遥感影像的适应能力。
AI.method: GeoSAM-Lite包含两大创新：一是地理空间领域初始化（Geo-Init），通过领域感知的预训练策略，提取地理空间先验，缩小与遥感领域的差异；二是特征融合层（FFL），针对轻量级主干网络的容量瓶颈，通过重校空间特征和恢复高频边界信息，提升分割能力。
AI.result: 在典型数据集上，尤其在云层场景等极端尺度变化和复杂边界任务下，GeoSAM-Lite模型在准确率基本持平的情况下，参数量较同类大模型（如RSAM-Seg）减少92.8%。
AI.conclusion: GeoSAM-Lite在效率和精度间建立了更优的Pareto前沿，为遥感端侧设备的实时分割应用提供了可行的高性能解决方案。

title: Sparse-View Surface Reconstruction using Gaussian Splatting through High-Confidence Depth Propagation with Normal Priors
summary: 3D reconstruction from sparse views is a challenging task in 3D computer vision. Recent studies on 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) have achieved remarkable results with sparse views in novel view synthesis, yet reconstructing high-quality geometric surfaces from sparse views remains a challenge, due to the limited geometry clues and the discreteness of Gaussians. In this paper, we propose a novel 3DGS-based method for high-fidelity surface reconstruction from sparse views. Our key insight is to introduce a normal-guided depth propagation approach, which can extend depth information from high-confidence regions to constrain the depth in low-confidence areas. Additionally, we propose an abnormal depth edge-aware regularization to address depth discontinuities caused by the discreteness of Gaussians. Extensive experiments on DTU and Tanks-and-Temples datasets demonstrate that our method outperforms the state-of-the-art methods in sparse view surface reconstruction. Project page: https://hanl2010.github.io/DP-GS.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于3D高斯散射（3DGS）的新方法，通过法线引导的深度传播和异常深度边缘正则化，实现了稀疏视图下高保真的三维表面重建，在多个数据集上优于现有技术。
AI.motivation: 尽管3DGS在稀疏视图新视角合成有突出表现，但稀疏视图下三维高质量表面重建因几何线索有限及高斯离散性依然困难。因此，亟需新的方法提升这一场景下的表面重建质量。
AI.method: 方法包括：1）提出法线引导的深度传播，将高置信区的深度扩展到低置信区，提高深度约束覆盖率；2）设计异常深度边缘感知的正则化，缓解高斯离散性带来的深度不连续问题。整体方法集成到3DGS框架中。
AI.result: 在DTU和Tanks-and-Temples等公开数据集上进行了大量实验，与最新方法对比，本文方法在稀疏视图的表面重建任务上取得更优表现。
AI.conclusion: 法线引导的深度传播和异常深度边缘正则化有效提升了稀疏视图下基于3DGS的表面重建质量，为相关领域提供了新的高精度解决方案。

title: Self-Improving Diffusion Classifiers with Minority Preference Optimization
summary: Prior studies have demonstrated that diffusion classifiers achieve robust zero-shot classification performance. However, their effectiveness is strongly tied to the pretraining data distribution: they perform well in majority, high-density regions of the data manifold, but are significantly less accurate in minority, low-density regions. Although prior works on minority sampling have focused on generating more minority-like images, what minority sampling fundamentally enables beyond generation remains underexplored. In this paper, we reveal a direct relationship between minority sampling in generation and the perception capability of diffusion classifiers. Specifically, we show that enhancing minority sampling broadens the coverage of underrepresented regions on the data manifold, thereby improving diffusion-based recognition. To exploit this connection, we propose \textit{Self-Improving Diffusion Classifiers with Minority Preference Optimization} (MiPO), which fine-tunes a pretrained diffusion model using minority preference rewards. Using only arbitrary caption data, MiPO generates candidate samples, rewards those that better cover minority regions, and optimizes the model with LoRA and Group Relative Policy Optimization, without additional image data, external foundation models, or external reward models. This enables stable, prompt-adaptive minority sampling and translates low-density generative coverage into improved zero-shot diffusion classification. To sum up, we show that diffusion classifier perception is biased toward majority regions, demonstrate that this bias can be alleviated through minority preference optimization, and evaluate MiPO on five standard datasets.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种名为MiPO的方法，旨在提升扩散分类器对数据流形中少数类/低密度区域的识别能力，通过优化少数类采样，缓解扩散分类器对多数类的偏见并提升零样本分类性能。
AI.motivation: 扩散分类器在多数类/高密度区域的零样本分类性能优异，但在少数类/低密度区域表现较差。此前的研究只关注于生成更多少数类图片，未深入探索采样的其他潜力。作者希望通过改进少数类采样，提升扩散模型在低密度区域的识别能力，扩大其应用范围和公平性。
AI.method: 提出MiPO方法：对预训练的扩散模型进行微调，不需额外图片数据，仅用任意caption数据，通过生成样本并对覆盖少数区域更好的样本给予奖励，结合LoRA和Group Relative Policy Optimization优化模型，从而增强模型对少数类的适应性和覆盖能力。
AI.result: MiPO方法实现了稳定且可根据提示自适应的少数类采样，将低密度生成覆盖提升为更好的零样本扩散分类能力。该方法在五个标准数据集上进行了评估，展示出对少数类的识别性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 本文揭示了少数类采样与扩散分类器感知能力的直接关系，证明通过少数偏好优化能够缓解偏向多数类的问题，显著提升少数类/低密度区域的分类表现。

title: City-Level 3D Surface Reconstruction with Viewpoint Orientation Partitioning and Scene Completion
summary: Multi-view 3D surface reconstruction is a longstanding challenge in computer vision. Although recent large-scale reconstruction methods based on 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) achieve impressive novel-view synthesis, producing high-quality surfaces over large scenes remains difficult, due to complex geometry, long optimization, and limited memory. In this paper, we propose a novel yet simple partitioning method to efficiently and faithfully reconstruct large-scale scene surfaces. Our key insight lies in a scene partitioning method based on viewpoint orientation. This partitioning approach ensures that views with similar orientations are jointly involved for more accurate depth estimations, leading to precise surface reconstructions and balanced computation on multiple GPUs in parallel. In addition, we propose a strategy to detect and repair missing regions in the initial point cloud caused by sparse viewpoints or insufficient textures, thereby further improving the geometric quality. Extensive experiments on the GauU-Scene, MatrixCity, and UrbanScene3D datasets demonstrate that our method outperforms the state-of-the-art approaches in surface reconstruction for large-scale scenes. Project page: https://hanl2010.github.io/VOP-GS.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种基于视点方向划分的高效三维大场景表面重建方法，高效提升了表面重建质量和计算效率，尤其在大规模场景下优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有3D Gaussian Splatting为代表的三维重建技术虽然在新视角生成方面表现优异，但在大规模场景下表面重建质量有限，面临几何复杂、优化耗时、内存受限等问题。亟需提升大场景的高质量表面重建能力。
AI.method: 提出了根据视点方向对场景进行划分的新方法，使具有相似视角的图像共同参与深度估计，实现更精确的表面重建和GPU上的负载均衡。还设计了一种检测并修复点云缺失区域的策略，有效改善优化过程中因视角稀疏或纹理不足导致的点云空洞。
AI.result: 在GauU-Scene, MatrixCity, UrbanScene3D等大规模数据集上实验，所提方法无论表面重建精度还是多GPU计算效率，均优于最先进方法，展现出较强的泛化与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为大规模三维场景的高质量高效率表面重建提供了新思路，在实际和理论层面都取得突破，具有广泛的应用前景。

title: Rethinking Depth Pruning for Vision Transformers: A Heterogeneity-Aware Perspective
summary: While prior studies have successfully compressed vision Transformers (ViTs) through various pruning techniques, most have concentrated on width pruning to achieve significant reductions in model size. Depth pruning, which removes entire layers from a ViT, is notoriously difficult for accuracy recovery despite its potential to deliver higher speedups, limiting the acceleration achieved by existing joint width-and-depth pruning methods. In this work, we reveal that the failure of existing depth pruning methods lies in their neglect of heterogeneity between different layers, and we introduce HetDPT, a heterogeneity-aware depth pruning method that avoids dimension mismatch. Comprehensive experiments on ImageNet-1K, CIFAR-100, COCO, and ADE20K validate our method: HetDPT achieves a 1.58$\times$ speedup for DeiT-B while maintaining accuracy and a 1.39$\times$ speedup for DeiT-S with nearly no accuracy degradation. Furthermore, when combined with width pruning, HetDPT+ sets a new state-of-the-art record in extreme ViT pruning, enhancing the acceleration ratio from 4.24$\times$ to 5.19$\times$ for the Isomorphic-Pruning-2.6G configuration while maintaining near-lossless accuracy; our code is available at https://github.com/Efficient-AI-for-All/HetDPT.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种异质性感知的ViT模型深度裁剪方法HetDPT，实现更高效的加速与压缩，同时精度损失极小。
AI.motivation: 现有Transformer剪枝方法大多关注宽度裁剪，仅部分联合深度裁剪，但深度裁剪因损失整体层导致精度难以恢复，实用性受限。作者发现现有深度裁剪忽略了不同层间的异质性，是精度恢复困难的关键问题。
AI.method: 提出HetDPT方法，利用层间异质性信息，实现避免维度不匹配的深度裁剪。方法不仅考虑每层特性，还可与宽度裁剪结合，提升极限裁剪下的加速与精度表现。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-1K、CIFAR-100、COCO、ADE20K等数据集上验证，HetDPT在DeiT-B模型实现1.58倍加速且保持精度，DeiT-S上1.39倍加速且几乎无精度损失。与宽度裁剪结合后，创下极限ViT剪枝新纪录，Isomorphic-Pruning-2.6G配置下加速比由4.24倍提升至5.19倍，精度几乎无损。
AI.conclusion: HetDPT证实考虑层间异质性能有效提升ViT模型深度裁剪可用性，并在联合裁剪场景取得极优性能；方法效果优异，有望推动高效Transformer实际部署。

title: G$^2$TAM: Geometry Grounded Track Anything Model
summary: Human spatial understanding arises from jointly perceiving geometry and semantics, enabling consistent object identification and localization across viewpoints and time. Current video segmentation models depend on explicit object appearance memory banks for instance tracking, yet they remain vulnerable to large viewpoint changes and long-term occlusions. Leveraging the spatial consistency afforded by modern feed-forward 3D reconstruction models, we propose the Geometry Grounded Tracking Anything Model (G$^2$TAM), a unified framework for promptable instance tracking in 3D using only unordered RGB images or videos. G$^2$TAM employs spatially aligned geometric representations as implicit memory, ensuring stable instance identity and localization across frames and views. At its core is a cross-modal spatial encoder that integrates visual and textual prompts into a shared geometric space, enabling end-to-end spatial reconstruction and instance-consistent mask prediction. To support training and evaluation, we construct InsTrack, a large-scale dataset with a dedicated validation split for benchmarking. Extensive experiments show that G$^2$TAM delivers strong cross-view consistency, promptable instance spatial tracking, video object segmentation and spatial reconstruction, establishing a foundation for interactive, geometry-grounded spatial reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合几何与语义的新型3D实例跟踪方法G$^2$TAM，能够做到跨视角、跨时刻稳定追踪目标，并支持交互式空间推理。
AI.motivation: 现有视频分割和目标跟踪方法主要依赖外显的外观记忆库，这使其在遇到视角大变化和长时间遮挡时表现不佳。因此需要一种更鲁棒的表征来保证时空一致性。
AI.method: G$^2$TAM利用最前沿的3D重建模型产生空间对齐的几何表征，作为隐式的目标记忆。在模型核心，使用跨模态空间编码器将视觉和文本提示整合到共享几何空间，实现端到端的空间重建和实例一致的掩码预测。并构建了大规模数据集InsTrack用于训练与评测。
AI.result: 实验结果验证了G$^2$TAM在跨视角一致性、可提示的实例空间追踪、视频对象分割及空间重建等任务上表现优异。
AI.conclusion: G$^2$TAM为交互式、几何基础的空间推理奠定了基础，有助于提升目标跟踪等相关任务的稳健性和泛化能力。

title: InfraNet: Quality-Aware RGB Guidance for Efficient Infrared Object Detection
summary: Robust object detection under adverse visual conditions remains a long-standing challenge for multi-modal perception systems. Existing fusion-based methods typically require both RGB and infrared (IR) inputs, and treat them equally during both training and inference, which compromises their robustness when the RGB modality becomes unreliable or unavailable. In this case, we propose \textbf{InfraNet}, an IR-centric quality-aware framework that regulates RGB guidance during training and supports flexible RGB--IR or IR-only deployment. InfraNet employs an asymmetric architecture where the primary IR pathway extracts multi-scale infrared features for predictions, while the auxiliary RGB pathway provides reliability-controlled supervisory signals. The core of InfraNet is \textbf{QualGate}, a quality-aware fusion module that learns a task-oriented control signal to suppress unreliable RGB guidance and compensate IR features during cross-modal training. Built upon InfraNet, we design two architectural variants: a lightweight IR-only architecture InfraNet-IR and an RGB--IR architecture InfraNet-RGB-IR. Our method is evaluated through extensive experiments on four benchmark datasets (LLVIP, FLIR-Aligned, M$^3$FD, and DroneVehicle), showing strong or competitive accuracy in challenging low-light and adverse weather conditions. Notably, InfraNet maintains high efficiency in IR-only inference, making it both accurate and computationally efficient.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了InfraNet框架，在RGB不可靠或缺失时，仍能高效、准确地进行红外（IR）目标检测，兼顾了鲁棒性与灵活部署。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态目标检测往往依赖于RGB和红外数据的融合，但在RGB信息受损时，整体性能下降明显，因此需要一种更注重红外可靠性的检测框架。
AI.method: 提出了一种以红外为主的InfraNet架构，由主IR通路和辅助RGB通路组成，设计了质量感知融合模块QualGate，可在训练时抑制不可靠的RGB特征指导，同时支持IR-only和RGB-IR灵活部署。
AI.result: 在LLVIP、FLIR-Aligned、M3FD、DroneVehicle四个基准数据集上进行了大量实验，方法在低照度及恶劣天气下表现优越，并且IR-only部署时具有高效率和强竞争力精度。
AI.conclusion: InfraNet框架提升了在RGB不可用场景下的检测鲁棒性，同时保证了效率和灵活性，证明了质量调控融合和红外主导策略的有效性。

title: Probabilistic Robustness in Medical Image Classification
summary: Deep learning (DL) has shown strong performance in medical image classification, but its trustworthy deployment remains challenging in safety-critical clinical settings, where prediction errors under perturbations may lead to severe consequences. Existing studies mainly focus on adversarial robustness (AR) from a worst-case perspective; however, such settings may be less representative of real medical applications. In this work, we investigate probabilistic robustness (PR) as a more practical measure of model trustworthiness. To this end, we construct a set of natural corruption settings for medical image classification and systematically evaluate commonly used DL models on MedMNIST v2 dataset. Our study provides a statistically grounded perspective on assessing the trustworthiness of DL models, thereby supporting their more trustworthy deployment in medical imaging applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出用概率鲁棒性(Probabilistic Robustness, PR)而非传统的对抗鲁棒性(Adversarial Robustness, AR)来评估医学图像分类中深度学习模型的可信度，并通过实际数据和自然扰动环境系统测试主流模型表现。
AI.motivation: 虽然深度学习在医学图像分类上表现优异，但在临床中仍难以直接部署，主要因为模型在输入扰动（如噪声、模糊等）下鲁棒性较差，存在误判风险。现有多数工作集中于最坏情况（对抗攻击）分析，未充分反映实际医学环境下的模型可靠性。
AI.method: 作者提出以概率鲁棒性(PR)为评价指标，模拟并构建出一组医学图像在自然扰动（如光照、模糊、噪声等）环境下的数据，选用MedMNIST v2数据集，系统测试并比较主流深度学习模型在这些扰动下的表现，采用统计方法进行评估。
AI.result: 主流深度学习模型在自然扰动下的表现存在显著差异，概率鲁棒性评价能更精准反映模型在临床真实使用中潜在的表现和风险。
AI.conclusion: 概率鲁棒性的评估方法为医学图像深度学习模型的安全可信应用提供了更贴合实际的量化标准，有助于推动模型在临床场景的可靠部署。

title: CineMobile: On-Device Image-to-Video Diffusion for Cinematic Camera Motion Generation
summary: The growing demand for image-to-video creation on mobile devices has increasingly focused on cinematic motion effects like bullet time, dolly zoom, slow motion, etc. While Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) exhibit strong performance in video generation, their large parameter sizes and multi-step iterative denoising processes lead to substantial computational overhead, making efficient generation on mobile devices challenging. We propose CineMobile to bridge the gap. In particular, CineMobile adopts a three-fold optimization strategy: (1) leveraging a distillation-guided pruning approach to derive a compact yet efficient model that retains the essential video generation capabilities required for cinematic effects; (2) optimizing the compressed model into a 4-step generator via a combination of diffusion distillation and reinforcement learning; (3) employing a hybrid post-training quantization strategy to compress the model footprint to under 1 GB. Experimental results show that compared to the teacher model with the Wan 2.1 architecture, CineMobile achieves a 40x speedup in generation while maintaining comparable visual quality. Specifically, CineMobile generates 49-frame 480p videos with a per-step denoising latency of 0.6s on an NVIDIA H200 GPU and 20s on the MediaTek Dimensity 8400 Ultimate 5G platform, with a peak memory usage of 1.8 GB, demonstrating its practical applicability for mobile-based image-to-video creation.

AI.tldr: CineMobile是一种专为移动端优化、能实现电影级特效的高效图像转视频生成模型，速度提升巨大且视觉质量基本不变。
AI.motivation: 现有优秀的视频生成模型虽然效果出色，但庞大体量与高算力需求阻碍了其在移动设备上落地。针对用户对移动端生成子弹时间、推拉变焦等电影感视频的需求，迫切需要一种小巧高效、便于部署的方法。
AI.method: 作者提出CineMobile，包含三大技术优化：(1) 采用蒸馏引导的剪枝方法获得轻量模型；(2) 结合扩散蒸馏与强化学习，将生成过程压缩至仅需4步；(3) 使用混合量化策略将模型体积压缩至1GB以内。
AI.result: CineMobile相比教师模型 Wan 2.1，实现了40倍的提速，视觉质量基本持平。在NVIDIA H200 GPU上，每步去噪耗时0.6秒；在天玑8400移动平台上，49帧480p视频仅需20秒，峰值显存1.8GB，模型体积不到1GB。
AI.conclusion: CineMobile兼顾了高效和高质量，极大推动了高质量电影特效视频生成在移动端的实际应用落地。

title: TestMate: Test-Time Domain Adaptation Aided by Lightweight Vision Foundation Model
summary: Test-Time Domain Adaptation (TTDA) aims to adapt Deep Neural Networks to distribution shifts using only streaming, unlabeled test data in real time. Current methods for semantic segmentation tasks suffer from critical limitations. Entropy minimization techniques require costly backpropagation, risking catastrophic forgetting and producing noisy segmentation boundaries. Memory-bank methods, while backpropagation-free, exhibit slow adaptation, requiring numerous samples to converge and struggle to handle continuous domain shifts. We introduce TestMate, a novel, real-time, and backpropagation-free TTDA framework that overcomes these issues. TestMate leverages generalization capability of a lightweight Visual Foundation Model to guide the adaptation. We use a zero-shot instance segmentation YOLOv8-seg based model to generate unlabeled mask proposals for objects and their parts at multiple scales in real time. These proposals are fused with the primary model via a heuristic, size-ordered competitive scheme, where small, high-confidence regions dominate and refine predictions in surrounding larger, less certain areas. This paremeter-free mechanism enables immediate adaptation from the first frame, inherently avoids catastrophic forgetting and effectively preserves fine object details and boundaries, even for small objects. TestMate can be used as a standalone, efficient refinement module or seamlessly integrated into existing TTDA methods to significantly boost their performance. We demonstrate state-of-the-art results across two benchmark datasets, proving TestMate's effectiveness in three distinct adaptation tasks: TTDA, Source-Free Domain Adaptation (SFDA), and online-TTDA. Code is available.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了TestMate框架，实现了无回传、实时的测试时域自适应，有效克服了当前方法面临的遗忘和低效率问题，在语义分割等任务上取得了领先效果。
AI.motivation: 当前测试时域自适应方法对语义分割等任务存在两大痛点：基于熵最小化的方法依赖于反向传播，导致高计算开销并易出现灾难性遗忘和噪声边界；记忆库（memory-bank）方法虽然无需反向传播，但适应缓慢，难以应对持续变化的领域漂移。因此，需要一种新的、实时且高效的自适应方法。
AI.method: 提出TestMate框架：利用轻量级视觉基础模型（如YOLOv8-seg）进行零样本实例分割，实时为无标签测试数据生成多尺度掩码建议；通过启发式、基于尺寸排序的竞争融合机制，将小而高置信度的区域用于修正大且不确定的区域，从而无需参数和反向传播即可使主模型实现自适应。该机制可以作为独立模块使用，或集成到现有自适应方法中。
AI.result: TestMate在TTDA、源自由域适应（SFDA）和在线TTDA三大任务上，在两个基准数据集上达到了当前最优的分割结果。
AI.conclusion: TestMate实现了参数无关、实时、无反向传播的测试时域自适应，有效解决了现有方法的灾难性遗忘和细节损失等问题，可作为高效的独立模块或提升现有方法性能。代码已经开源。

title: Global Logic and Local Search: Dual-Stream Multimodal In-Context Learning for Verifiable Industrial Anomaly Detection
comment: Accepted by ECCV 2026. 18 pages, 3 figures, 6 tables
summary: Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) show strong few-shot generalization, but industrial anomaly detection remains difficult because defects are small, input resolution is limited, and textual standards are not always grounded in visual evidence. Recent optimization-based methods improve alignment through fine-tuning, but they often require many defective samples, which are unavailable in early deployment. We present Global Logic and Local Search (GLLS), a training-free framework for reference-guided multimodal in-context verification. GLLS uses a Part-Aware Visual-Logical Atlas to organize normal references and structured specifications in the inference context. It combines a Global & Logic Stream, where SAM 3 extracts partially checkable visual facts, with a Fine-Grained & Actions Stream, where MCTS selects local evidence crops under a fixed budget. Experiments on MMAD-QA and additional anomaly detection datasets show consistent gains over matched and general-purpose baselines, while keeping the final diagnostic decision traceable to explicit visual evidence throughout the inspection trace.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了GLLS（全局逻辑与局部搜索）框架，实现了无需训练的引用引导多模态场景验证，在缺乏异常样本的工业检测中表现优异。
AI.motivation: 尽管大型多模态模型（LMMs）能进行少样本泛化，但工业异常检测仍面临缺陷难检、分辨率受限以及视觉文本对齐不足等挑战，特别是在异常样本稀缺的早期部署阶段。
AI.method: 提出GLLS框架，利用分部可检查的视觉事实组织正常参考，并结合两条推理流：一是基于SAM 3提取视觉事实的全局逻辑流，二是通过蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）在有限预算下选择局部证据的精细动作流。该方法在推理时无需训练，通过参考引导提高多模态对齐和异常验证能力。
AI.result: 在MMAD-QA及其他异常检测数据集上的实验表明，GLLS在各类基线方法（特定或通用）上均取得了持续提升，并保持了诊断过程的可追溯性。
AI.conclusion: GLLS为工业应用中早期部署缺乏异常样本的场景，提供了一种高效、免训练且可溯源的多模态异常检测新思路，显著提升了检测性能和结果解释性。

title: TRISTAR: Triple-Signal Stair Recognition and Vision-Only Indoor Navigation for Search-and-Rescue Micro-UAVs
comment: 10 pages, 7 figures. Project repository available at: https://github.com/tavigingu/HawkOps-Indoor-Drone-Navigation-and-TRISTAR-Stair-Climbing
summary: Indoor search-and-rescue (SAR) operations often require rapid situational awareness where GNSS signals are unavailable and human access is difficult or hazardous. While most autonomous aerial systems rely on LiDAR, stereo vision, or specialized depth cameras, such solutions increase both hardware complexity and deployment costs. This paper presents a complete autonomous indoor navigation framework for low-cost unmanned aerial vehicles based exclusively on monocular vision. Implemented on a DJI Tello platform, the system combines monocular depth estimation using Depth Anything V2 with classical computer vision and lightweight deep learning models for scene understanding, victim detection, and hazard recognition. The framework consists of two independent behaviors: (i) corridor exploration with automatic door detection, room entry, OCR-based room identification, and victim inspection; and (ii) autonomous stair ascent based on TRISTAR (TRI-Signal STair Ascent Recognition), a novel triple-sensor fusion method that integrates structural cues (Sobel filtering), texture analysis (multi-scale Gabor filtering), and geometric depth from monocular depth estimation. Evaluation used real indoor flights in a university building. Depth calibration reduced relative depth error from 27.4% to below 10%, while the door detection algorithm reached a precision of 0.93 and an F1-score of 0.91. A dedicated ablation study shows that multi-sensor fusion significantly improves stair-recognition robustness compared to individual sensing modalities, and a failure-case analysis delineates the limits of monocular perception under challenging lighting and reflective surfaces. The results demonstrate that reliable indoor exploration and stair traversal are achievable on resource-constrained platforms without specialized ranging hardware, a practical, cost-effective solution for rapid SAR deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一套基于单目视觉的低成本室内无人机自主导航系统，能够高效执行搜索与救援任务，实现走廊探索、门检测、房间识别、遇难者检测及楼梯自主爬升，无需激光雷达等昂贵硬件。实际测试中系统表现优良，验证了其在SAR场景下的实用性。
AI.motivation: 现有大多数室内无人机自主导航方案依赖于激光雷达、立体视觉或专用深度摄像头，增加了硬件复杂性和成本。而搜索与救援场景迫切需要低成本、易部署且能在GNSS信号缺失环境下运行的解决方案。
AI.method: 以DJI Tello无人机为平台，采用Depth Anything V2提升单目深度估计能力，并结合传统计算机视觉与轻量级深度学习模型实现场景理解、遇难者检测及危险识别。系统包含两大行为子模块：一是走廊探索与自动门检测、房间识别（基于OCR）、遇难者检查；二是基于TRISTAR多传感器融合（结构线、纹理和单目深度）的自主楼梯爬升。
AI.result: 系统在真实大学楼宇中飞行实测，深度校准后相对误差由27.4%降至10%以下，门检测的精度达0.93，F1分数为0.91。消融实验显示多传感器融合显著增强了楼梯识别鲁棒性，失败案例分析也明确了单目视觉在极端光照及高反射表面的局限性。
AI.conclusion: 该方案在受限资源平台上实现了可靠的室内探索与楼梯通行，无需专用测距硬件，为搜索与救援快速部署提供了实用且成本效益高的选择。

title: FDR-Occ: Factorized Dense Routing for Full-Spectrum 3D Occupancy Prediction
summary: Vision-based 3D occupancy prediction fundamentally relies on the 2D-to-3D view transformation. Current paradigms predominantly utilize explicit physical projection, which artificially restricts the routing matrix to strict, sparse camera rays. While computationally efficient, this imposes a severe Locality Bottleneck, preventing the network from constructing holistic contextual understanding and degrading sharply when camera extrinsics are unreliable or absent. To break this bottleneck, we abstract view transformation as unconstrained bipartite routing and propose Factorized Dense Routing (FDR). By approximating dense 2D-to-3D mixing through hierarchical tensor contractions, FDR guarantees a fully-global receptive field with tractable, sub-quadratic complexity. Crucially, the mandatory spatial contraction in dense routing exposes a fundamental Resolution-Context Trade-off. To address this, we introduce a Resolution-Context Decoupled Architecture. We factorize the 3D space into a global macroscopic topological anchor (via FDR) and precise local geometric planes (via explicit projection). This decoupling enables global semantic inference and exact surface localization to complement each other without mutual compromise. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our framework achieves state-of-the-art performance on the Occ3D-nuScenes and Occ3D-Waymo benchmarks. More notably, in an uncalibrated setting where physical extrinsics are withheld, our global routing internalizes the implicit multi-camera rig topology and exhibits substantially stronger structural robustness than physical-projection baselines under the same protocol.

AI.tldr: 文章提出了一种新的视觉 3D 占据预测方法，突破了以往基于物理投影带来的局部性瓶颈，通过新的密集路由方法提升了全局感知和鲁棒性，同时实现了领先性能。
AI.motivation: 当前基于视觉的 3D 占据预测严重依赖 2D 到 3D 的视角变换，现有方法采用稀疏的物理投影，虽然高效但容易导致网络上下文理解受限，对相机外参非常敏感，因此需要新的方法打破这种瓶颈，提高全局感知和鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出了 Factorized Dense Routing (FDR) 方法，将视角变换建模为非约束的二部路由，通过分层张量收缩实现稠密的 2D-3D 信息混合，并采用分辨率-上下文解耦结构，将 3D 空间分解为全局的拓扑锚点（由 FDR 实现）和局部几何平面（由显式投影实现），使全局语义与局部精确定位互补。
AI.result: 在 Occ3D-nuScenes 和 Occ3D-Waymo 等标准数据集上实现了最新的性能。在没有提供物理外参的无校准条件下，该方法内部自学习多相机系统的拓扑，比传统物理投影方法在结构稳健性上有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 提出的 Factorized Dense Routing 框架突破了物理投影方法的局部性限制，有效提升了 3D 占据预测的全局建模能力和鲁棒性，具有较强的实际价值和应用前景。

title: Q-TriM: Question-Guided Tri-Modal Attention for Audio-Visual Question Answering
summary: Audio-Visual Question Answering (AVQA) extends classical VQA by requiring joint reasoning over video and synchronized audio. However, many AVQA systems rely on deeply stacked layers of self- and cross attention across text, video, and audio. Such sequential stacking may incur loss of information such as subtle inter-modal cues over the layers, causing errors to accumulate across sequential attention layers during the fusion. We introduce Q-TriM which performs multi-modal fusion in a shallow and parallel manner instead of a deep and sequential manner. For Q-TriM, we propose a novel framework for attention operation incorporating video and audio conditioned on text. As a result, we obtain not only standard cross attention outputs but also Tri-Modal Attention representations in which Query, Key, and Value come from distinct modalities. These attention representations are combined in parallel at a single stage, thus avoiding the multi-modal fusion with deep stacks in order to mitigate error accumulation and depth-induced issues. Q-TriM achieves state-of-the-art performance on three AVQA benchmarks, including substantial gains on MUSIC-AVQA-R, which demonstrates its robustness and out-of-distribution generalization. Code is available at https://github.com/Sunghun95/Q-TriM

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种新的音视频问答（AVQA）多模态融合方法Q-TriM，通过浅层并行融合模型，在多个数据集上取得了SOTA表现，极大提升了模型的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统AVQA系统依靠深层自注意力和交叉注意力堆叠，容易导致跨模态细微信息损失与误差累积，影响融合效果和下游表现。
AI.method: 作者提出Q-TriM，采用浅层、并行的多模态融合框架，并创新性地引入三模态注意力（Query、Key、Value分别来自不同模态），在文本条件下结合视频与音频特征，在单一阶段并行融合，避免深层堆叠带来的信息损失。
AI.result: Q-TriM在三个AVQA基准上取得SOTA表现，特别是在MUSIC-AVQA-R数据集上获得显著提升，充分展示出模型的鲁棒性和对分布外样本的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: Q-TriM有效避免了深层多模融合的误差累积和信息损失，提升了AVQA任务的性能，是音视频问答领域值得关注的新方法。

title: How Do Diffusion Classifiers Decide? A Bias-Centric Evaluation
summary: Diffusion models have recently been repurposed for zero-shot classification, giving rise to diffusion classifiers that identify the best-matching text prompt by minimizing the noise-prediction error. Despite their growing adoption, how these models make classification decisions remains poorly understood. We introduce ASOB-Bench, a bias evaluation for diffusion classifiers along three dimensions: Attribute binding, Size-Order bias, and Background dependency. These dimensions serve not as an exhaustive taxonomy but as targeted probes of how the text-conditioned reconstruction-error score reaches a decision. Such a perspective is well studied for discriminative vision-language models, yet remains overlooked for diffusion classifiers. Extending an existing framework with five new attribute categories on newly constructed datasets, we find diffusion classifiers are less prone to attribute misbinding than an OpenCLIP baseline; on the established ComCo benchmark they are substantially more susceptible to size-order shortcuts; and on ImageNet-B they suffer far larger accuracy drops, revealing heavy reliance on background over foreground cues. Reconstruction-error heatmaps and U-Net cross-attention visualizations expose the mechanism behind each bias. Because diffusion classifiers share the same denoiser as text-to-image models, these single-pass diagnostics also point toward analogous failure modes in generation. Overall, diffusion classifiers exhibit a distinct bias profile from vision-language models, offering guidance for building more robust diffusion-based models.

AI.tldr: 本文针对扩散模型在零样本分类任务中的偏差进行系统性分析，并提出了一套专门的评估基准ASOB-Bench。通过在不同维度下的实验，揭示了扩散分类器与现有VISION-LANGUAGE模型在偏差表现上的不同。
AI.motivation: 尽管扩散模型正被用于零样本分类任务，即通过最小化噪声预测误差实现最佳文本匹配，但其决策机制仍不清晰，因此亟需系统性分析其在实际分类决策中的偏差与弱点。
AI.method: 作者提出ASOB-Bench评估基准，从属性绑定、大小顺序偏差和背景依赖性三个维度系统分析扩散分类器的偏差表现，并通过扩展现有框架，构建更多属性类别和新数据集，结合热力图和注意力可视化揭示其内部机制。
AI.result: 实验发现，扩散分类器比OpenCLIP在属性误绑定上表现更好，但在大小顺序偏差上更为敏感，并且在ImageNet-B测试集上准确率下降更大，显示出对背景信息的依赖。此外，热力图和注意力可视化揭示了不同偏差的形成机制。
AI.conclusion: 扩散分类器与现有视觉-语言模型表现出显著不同的偏差特征，这些发现为未来构建更健壮的扩散模型提供了重要指导。

title: ContiStain: Cross-Domain Relation-Preserving Distillation for Continual Multi-Domain Virtual IHC Staining
summary: A unified multiplex virtual staining model enables scalable and non-destructive multiplex analysis from H&E slides while promoting parameter efficiency, shared pathological knowledge, and consistent cross-biomarker representations. However, in clinical practice, data for new biomarkers are typically acquired sequentially over time. Fine-tuning on such temporally arriving data leads to severe performance degradation on previously learned biomarkers, as sequential optimization disrupts the structured relationships among biomarker representations in the latent space. To address this issue, we propose ContiStain, an IHC multi-domain relational distillation framework for continual virtual staining. We first (i) construct a domain-aware structured feature space using a mixture-of-experts (MoE) feature extractor to reduce representation interference across biomarker domains. Based on this stabilized feature space, we then (ii) propose a relation-preserving distillation strategy that explicitly enforces the consistency of cross-domain token-level cosine similarity matrices between learned biomarker domains during continual adaptation. By maintaining cross-domain structural coherence, ContiStain mitigates forgetting while retaining adaptability to new domains. Experiments on the MIST dataset under a four-domain sequential virtual IHC staining setting show improved stability, reducing FID and ConchFID by 11.1 and 60.9 compared to sequential fine-tuning, enabling scalable and robust multi-domain virtual staining. Code is released at https://github.com/ccitachi/ContiStain.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了ContiStain方法，实现多标志物虚拟染色的持续学习，在新数据到来时能有效防止遗忘并保持表现稳定。
AI.motivation: 多重虚拟染色能提升病理切片的表型解析能力，然而在临床应用中，新的生物标志物数据通常逐步获取，现有方法难以避免后续学习导致对旧生物标志物性能退化（灾难性遗忘）。如何兼顾新旧标志物表现，是难点和实际需求。
AI.method: 提出ContiStain框架，首先用Mixture-of-Experts特征提取器构建结构化特征空间，减少不同标志物间的表示干扰；然后设计关系保持的蒸馏策略，强制新旧领域token级关系矩阵一致性，保持跨领域的结构相关性。
AI.result: 在MIST数据集四领域顺序虚拟IHC染色实验中，对比传统顺序微调，ContiStain分别将FID与ConchFID降低了11.1和60.9，表现更稳定。
AI.conclusion: ContiStain有效缓解了逐步学习新生物标志物时的遗忘问题，实现可扩展、稳健的多领域虚拟染色，在病理分析应用中具有良好前景。

title: CogRad: A Cognitively-Inspired Multi-Agent Framework for Radiology Report Generation
summary: Automated radiology report generation (RRG) can ease radiologist workload, yet most existing systems produce a report in a single forward pass, with no mechanism to check a claim against the image or revisit a finding once stated. We present CogRad, a cognitively inspired multi-agent framework that structures generation around four stages of a radiologist's reading process. A Scout agent discovers anatomical regions directly from image patches via slot attention and assigns region and disease-level triage scores; an Investigator agent concentrates representational capacity on the regions Scout flags as suspicious; a Writer agent compiles these signals into a disease gated visual prefix for a large language model; and a Verifier agent supervises training with a visual entailment loss and, at inference, re-examines its own draft sentence by sentence, regenerating any report it judges insufficiently grounded. On CheXpert Plus, CogRad attains a BLEU-4 of 0.316 and a CIDEr of 0.322, the best scores among the methods we compare against. On IU X-Ray, it attains a BLEU-4 of 0.201 and a CIDEr of 0.724, leading every baseline on every standard NLG metric. We further evaluate CogRad with RadGraph F1, CheXbert F1, and a hallucination analysis to assess clinical accuracy beyond standard text-overlap metrics, complemented by ablation studies and Grad-CAM-based visualizations that characterize each agent's contribution and the model's visual grounding.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了CogRad，一个模仿放射科医生认知过程的多智能体自动报告生成模型，在多个数据集和指标上取得了优异成绩，并有效提升了报告的准确性和可信度。
AI.motivation: 当前自动放射科报告生成工具虽然能减轻医生负担，但普遍采用一次性生成、难以反查或修正结论，导致报告准确性与可靠性受限。
AI.method: CogRad模型借鉴医生的读片流程，设计了Scout（发现可疑区域）、Investigator（聚焦异常区域）、Writer（生成初稿）、Verifier（逐句验证并重写虚假描述）等四个智能体，采用slot attention、视觉前缀和视觉蕴含损失等关键技术实现多阶段协作。
AI.result: 在CheXpert Plus数据集上 CogRad的BLEU-4 达到0.316、CIDEr达0.322，在IU X-Ray数据集BLEU-4达0.201、CIDEr达0.724，均超过主流方法。此外模型在RadGraph F1、CheXbert F1、幻觉分析等临床相关指标均表现优异，结构消融与可视化证明每个智能体及视觉对齐效果。
AI.conclusion: CogRad通过分工协作和逐步审校，大幅提升了自动报告生成的质量与准确性，为临床落地提供可解释性和可靠性强的新机制。

title: PRISM3D: Probabilistic Refinement and Robust Initialization for Physically Consistent Scene Modeling under Extreme Motion Blur
summary: We address the inverse problem of blind 3D scene reconstruction from extremely motion-blurred images, a scenario where traditional Structure-from-Motion (SfM) pipelines fail. Existing approaches typically circumvent this bottleneck by relying on impractical sharp-image supervision. In this work, we introduce PRISM3D, a unified framework enabling robust reconstruction directly from severely degraded inputs. To overcome the lack of a reliable starting point, we propose a Robust Initialization strategy utilizing deep dense tracking method (VGGSfM) to recover global topology where feature matching fails. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first to effectively leverage this paradigm to bootstrap 3D Gaussian Splatting from extreme motion blur. However, while robust, this initialization yields sparse and noisy geometry that causes deterministic optimization to diverge. To resolve this, we propose a coupled solution driven by probability and physics: we adopt a probabilistic formulation for geometric densification via Markov Chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) to robustly populate the sparse priors, while simultaneously modeling physical image formation via continuous Bezier Trajectories. Furthermore, while PRISM3D establishes a highly robust standalone pipeline, the availability of complementary event streams offers an opportunity to push the reconstruction fidelity further. To exploit this, we introduce PRISM3D-E, a multi-modal (RGB + Events) extension that seamlessly integrates high-temporal-resolution events as structural priors to maximize geometric recovery. Because existing datasets lack paired event streams under such severe degradation, we concurrently contribute the PRISM3D-E Benchmark to facilitate rigorous evaluation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that both our standalone RGB framework and its multi-modal extension establish new state-of-the-art performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PRISM3D框架，实现了从极度运动模糊图像中直接进行稳健的3D重建，突破了传统SfM无法处理极端退化图像的限制，并通过多模态扩展和新基准集实现了新的性能记录。
AI.motivation: 传统SfM在运动模糊严重时无法有效重建3D场景，而现有方法多依赖于清晰图像监督，不实用。因此，亟需无需清晰图像作为先验，能处理极端模糊场景的3D重建方法。
AI.method: 1) 提出了PRISM3D，一个可直接处理运动模糊图像的3D重建统一框架；2) 使用深度密集追踪法（VGGSfM）实现鲁棒初始化，即便特征匹配失败也能恢复场景拓扑；3) 采用概率建模的几何密化（MCMC）与连续Bezier轨迹物理建模相结合，克服因初始结构稀疏而导致的优化发散；4) 推出多模态扩展PRISM3D-E，将RGB与高时序分辨的事件流结合，提高重建精度；5) 构建并公开适用于该任务的事件流数据基准集PRISM3D-E Benchmark。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，PRISM3D无论单独使用RGB输入还是结合事件流数据，其效果均超过了现有方法，刷新了极端退化下的3D重建能力。
AI.conclusion: PRISM3D及其多模态扩展为极度模糊图像下的3D重建提供了一种无需清晰监督即可实现高精度重建的新范式，推动了该领域的发展。

title: Ghosts Beneath Textures: Texture-Relation Cues for Cross-Paradigm AI-Generated Image Detection
summary: AI-generated images have proliferated rapidly, motivating extensive research. Most existing AI-generated image detectors are developed and evaluated under image-free generation paradigms, such as noise-based or text-guided generation. However, image-conditioned generation has become increasingly important in practical applications, as it enables more fine-grained control over generated content. Detecting AI-generated images across these two paradigms creates a critical cross-paradigm detection problem that has long been overlooked. To study this problem, we construct ConImageGen, a benchmark for cross-paradigm AI-generated image detection. Evaluations on ConImageGen show that existing detectors fail to generalize reliably across image-free and image-conditioned generation. To address this failure, this paper identifies a cross-paradigm forensic cue and provides a new perspective for generalized AI-generated image detection. Specifically, by suppressing semantic interference, we visualize, for the first time, semantics-irrelevant texture patterns across generation paradigms. These patterns exhibit structured local-global texture relations, indicating a generalizable form of forensic evidence. Motivated by this finding, we shift the focus from directly exploiting explicit artifacts to modeling texture relations and propose DTS-Det, a detection framework that captures and leverages such relations for generalized AI-generated image detection. Extensive experiments validate the effectiveness of our method. DTS-Det achieves state-of-the-art performance across diverse evaluation settings, reaching 99.6% ACC on ConImageGen with a 10.5% gain over the best baseline. It also achieves 93.2%/94.1% ACC in cross-dataset evaluation on PicoBanana/RAID and maintains detection rates of 95.2%/88.1% under reconstruction attacks and black-box adversarial attacks, respectively.

AI.tldr: 本文关注AI生成图像在不同生成范式（无条件生成与以图像为条件生成）之间的检测泛化问题，提出了新的基准和检测方法，大幅提升了检测效果。
AI.motivation: AI生成图像在实际应用中广泛出现，尤其是以图像为条件的生成变得更重要。然而，现有检测器大多仅针对无图像条件的生成，忽略了真实场景中跨范式的检测需求，因此需要针对跨范式的检测方法。
AI.method: 作者构建了跨范式检测基准ConImageGen，发现现有检测器在不同生成范式间泛化性差。通过抑制语义干扰，首次揭示了与语义无关的局部-全局纹理关系作为通用取证线索。基于此，提出了DTS-Det检测框架，专注于建模与利用这种纹理关系，有效提升检测泛化能力。
AI.result: DTS-Det在ConImageGen基准上实现了99.6%的准确率，比最优对比提升10.5%；在PicoBanana和RAID跨数据集检测中分别达到了93.2%和94.1%的准确率；在重建攻击和黑盒对抗攻击下仍然维持95.2%和88.1%的检测率。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的新检测方法在不同生成范式、不同数据集及攻防场景下都表现出优越的泛化能力，可为AI生成内容的实际检测应用提供更可靠的技术支持。

title: GeoSelect: Spatial-Program Execution for Training-Free Referring Remote Sensing Image Segmentation
summary: Referring remote sensing image segmentation isolates the object named by a natural-language expression in an aerial image. Existing training-free methods resolve the expression through implicit vision-language activations or region-text similarity, which gives weak control over the spatial, comparative, and ordinal relations that dominate aerial referring: they cannot represent constructions such as the largest ship or the second court from the left. We propose GeoSelect, a training-free pipeline that reframes referring as the execution of a typed spatial program. A frozen, text-only language model synthesises the expression into a small domain-specific language, a well-formedness checker accepts the program, and a deterministic executor runs it. The central abstraction is a single scored candidate set type under which every operator composes: continuous geometric fields realise position and proximity as dense pixel-level maps, while discrete set and order operators add the extremum, ordinal, counted-union, and relational constructions that fields alone cannot express. Because execution is explicit, every intermediate program, field, and ranking is inspectable, and a reliability ladder degrades any failing program to a field-only special case, so every expression returns an answer. GeoSelect attains 58.86 mIoU on RRSIS-D test and 55.27 mIoU on RISBench test, more than twice the best prior training-free method on RRSIS-D, with no referring supervision and on a single GPU. A controlled comparison with candidates and segmenter fixed attributes the gain to explicit execution, not the backbone; an oracle decomposition localises the residual gap to detection recall on RRSIS-D and selection on RISBench, and an exposure audit confirms robustness to pretraining leakage. Code will be released upon acceptance at the project page https://avalon-s.github.io/GeoSelect/.

AI.tldr: GeoSelect是一种无训练的遥感图像自然语言目标分割新方法，通过可解释的空间程序显著提升了分割精度。
AI.motivation: 现有无训练遥感自然语言分割方法无法准确表达空间、比较和有序等复杂关系（如最大、第二、最靠左等），影响分割精度与语义理解。
AI.method: GeoSelect将表达式理解为空间程序的执行。流程包括：冻结的文本语言模型将自然语言表达编译为领域特定的小型程序，经格式约束与确定性执行。操作符统一在单一候选集结构下组合，既能实现几何空间特征，也能表达例如最大/次序等离散集合与关系操作。系统设计有故障降级保障，每个环节可审查与调试。
AI.result: GeoSelect在RRSIS-D和RISBench测试集上获得58.86和55.27的mIoU，均为最佳无训练方法的两倍以上，无需目标相关监督，单卡即可运行。消融实验显示性能提升来自显式空间程序而非主干网络，并确认对预训练信息泄漏具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: GeoSelect通过显式空间程序和可解释执行机制，实现了无训练条件下对复杂遥感自然语言分割任务的突破，显著超越以往方法，并具备实用可调试性和广泛拓展潜力。

title: SharpSplat: Edge-Regularized 3D Gaussian Splatting for High Fidelity Urban Building Reconstruction from UAV images
comment: Accepted at IEEE International Geoscience and Remote Sensing Symposium (IGARSS) - 2026
summary: Reconstructing high-fidelity 3D building models from UAV imagery is essential for large-scale digital twin development. However, existing 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) techniques often struggle with building facades, failing to capture sharp geometric transitions. To address this, we propose a semantic edge regularization framework that supervises 3DGS to produce crisp architectural boundaries. Our method leverages SAM 3 to generate precise building masks, from which we extract architecturally significant edges. During training, we align rendered image gradients with these extracted edges, forcing the Gaussians to converge into sharp structural geometries. Evaluations across campus environments, dense urban centers, and custom residential datasets demonstrate significant improvements in edge fidelity without requiring architectural modifications to the 3DGS pipeline. Our approach proves robust across diverse building types, roof geometries, and urban densities.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种对3D高斯溅射建模技术的改进方法，利用语义边缘正则化提升无人机影像重建建筑模型的边缘清晰度，在多个数据集上显著优化了建筑结构细节。
AI.motivation: 目前3D高斯溅射(3DGS)方法在处理建筑物外立面时，难以捕捉到清晰的几何转折，从而影响大规模数字孪生中的建筑还原质量。因此，急需提高3D重建模型对结构化边缘的表现能力。
AI.method: 作者提出语义边缘正则化框架，利用SAM 3生成高精度建筑分割掩码，并从中提取关键结构边缘。在训练时，通过对齐渲染图像的梯度与真实边缘，引导高斯点云向清晰的结构几何收敛。整个流程无需更改3DGS基础架构。
AI.result: 在校园、密集城市和住宅等多样化数据集上，所提方法在不更改原有3DGS算法的基础上大幅提升了3D建筑模型边缘的保真度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在多种建筑类型、屋顶结构和城市密度下均表现出强健性，为数字孪生和大规模三维建模带来了更高质量的建筑还原能力。

title: MACRO: Training-free Multi-plane Attention for Closeup Render Optimization
summary: Close-up rendering, zooming into a scene well beyond any training camera, is important for virtual production and interactive 3D content, yet remains an open challenge. 3D Gaussian splatting (3DGS) enables high-fidelity, real-time novel view synthesis, but its rendering quality degrades at close range. Recent diffusion-based methods that enhance the rendering by conditioning on reference images from the training set produce significant artifacts in this setting. We analyze this failure and identify its root cause: the scale gap between the close-up and reference views. We show that the features in reference-conditioned enhancement models are not scale-invariant, causing cross-view attention to retrieve incorrect correspondences when the same content appears at different scales, and that this mismatch cannot be corrected in latent space because the VAE encoder is not scale-equivariant. Building on this analysis we introduce MACRO, Multi-plane Attention for Closeup Render Optimization, a training-free method for high-quality close-up novel view synthesis from 3DGS. MACRO resolves the scale gap by leveraging the scene's known 3D structure: it decomposes the close-up into depth planes, crops and resizes references in image space to match the scale of each plane before encoding, and applies a depth-aware attention mask so each token attends only to scale-matched references. The method requires no architectural changes or additional training. We further contribute two new close-up novel view synthesis benchmarks, the first standardized evaluation protocol for this setting, and demonstrate state-of-the-art results on both, outperforming existing 3DGS and diffusion-based methods on both reconstruction and perceptual metrics. Project page: https://nitzanhod.github.io/MACRO

AI.tldr: 本文提出了MACRO方法，通过多平面注意力机制，无需重新训练即可显著提升3D Gaussian Splatting在特写视角下的新颖视图合成质量，并建立了该场景下的首个标准化评测基准，取得了当前最佳结果。
AI.motivation: 3DGS等现有方法在常规视角下表现优异，但在深入或大幅放大的特写视角下合成质量明显下降，而现有基于扩散的增强方法也会因尺度不匹配导致伪影，阻碍了虚拟制作和交互式3D内容的发展。因此，急需解决特写渲染质量下降的问题。
AI.method: MACRO通过利用场景已知的三维结构，将特写区域分解为深度平面，在编码前将参考图像裁剪并缩放以匹配各个平面尺度，并利用深度感知的注意力掩码确保每个特征仅关注同尺度的参考，从而实现尺度对齐。该方法无需修改网络结构和重新训练，完全推理时适用。
AI.result: MACRO在提出的两个特写新颖视图合成基准上实现了最优性能，无论重建还是感知指标均超过当前主流3DGS和基于扩散的方法，展示了其在特写渲染任务中的领先地位。
AI.conclusion: MACRO有效解决了尺度间隙所导致的特写渲染退化难题，无需额外训练，兼容性强，并推动了该领域的标准化评测，对交互式3D与虚拟制作等场景意义重大。

title: SGF-CDNet: A Consistency-Discrepancy Graph Network over Semantic-Geometric Fused Nodes for Face Forgery Detection
comment: 6 pages, 4 figures. This work has been accepted at ICMEW 2026
summary: The rapid advancement of deepfakes necessitates robust face forgery detection. Although forged faces may lack obvious artifacts, they often contain subtle disharmony among different facial regions. We propose SGF-CDNet, a Consistency-Discrepancy Graph Network (CD-GNN) over Semantic-Geometric Fused (SGF) nodes. First, SGF-CDNet constructs SGF nodes by deeply fusing semantic regions from face parsing with geometric information from facial landmarks, allowing nodes to capture both high-level concepts and precise geometric constraints. Next, a dual-path CD-GNN performs parallel relational reasoning on these nodes across two dimensions: consistency and discrepancy. The consistency path evaluates if facial components follow natural biological patterns, while the discrepancy path mines for structural tensions and feature conflicts introduced by forgeries. By integrating these processes, our model effectively identifies disharmonious relationships between facial components. Extensive experiments on public datasets demonstrate that SGF-CDNet achieves superior performance, establishing it as a reliable solution for face forgery detection.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种结合语义和几何信息、基于一致性与差异性推理的图神经网络(SGF-CDNet)，在人脸伪造检测任务上取得了优异效果。
AI.motivation: 深度伪造技术发展迅速，生成的人脸往往缺乏明显伪造痕迹，但不同面部区域间可能存在细微的不协调，需要更强大、更细致的人脸伪造检测方法。
AI.method: 首先通过面部解析和关键点检测深度融合，构建出语义-几何融合节点(SGF nodes)；再利用一致性-差异性图神经网络(CD-GNN)对这些节点做并行关系建模，其中一致性通路评估面部组件的生物学自然规律，差异性通路挖掘伪造带来的冲突和结构张力。
AI.result: 在公开人脸伪造检测数据集上进行了大量实验，SGF-CDNet模型性能优于已有方法。
AI.conclusion: SGF-CDNet能够高效捕捉和识别面部区域间的微妙不和谐，有效提升人脸伪造检测的鲁棒性和准确率，具有实际应用价值。

title: BAT3R: Bootstrapping Articulated 3D Reconstruction from 2D Image Collections
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2026. Project page: https://jakubzadrozny.github.io/bat3r/
summary: 3D reconstruction of articulated objects from a single image is challenging because large training datasets with paired image and 3D supervision are difficult to obtain. Recent point map-based methods achieve strong performance but rely on synthetic datasets rendered from manually created articulated 3D assets with carefully curated pose distributions. While camera viewpoints can be easily sampled, generating realistic object articulations remains costly and labor-intensive. We propose a training framework that reduces this requirement by leveraging unannotated 2D images collections with only a single rigged canonical mesh per category. Starting from a weak 3D shape predictor trained on canonical-pose renders, we iteratively estimate object articulation and camera pose by fitting the mesh to predicted point maps. The recovered articulations and viewpoints are then used to render updated synthetic training data, progressively improving the predictor. Despite using substantially weaker 3D supervision, our models achieve performance comparable with DualPM, which requires manually curated articulated training datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种仅需单个规范网格和未标注2D图片即可训练3D关节物体重建模型的新方法，其性能接近依赖大量人工标注数据的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有3D重建方法依赖大量配对的图片与3D监督数据，而这些数据难以获取，尤其是复杂的关节物体姿态多样且制作成本高。
AI.method: 作者提出利用仅含单一绑定规范网格与未标注2D图像的训练框架。首先用规范姿态渲染的弱3D预测器启动，然后通过拟合点云图估计物体的关节动作和相机位姿，不断迭代并用恢复的关节动作和视角生成合成训练数据，实现模型逐步优化。
AI.result: 在仅用非常弱3D监督的情况下，该方法能取得与DualPM等依赖人工标注数据集的方法相当的效果。
AI.conclusion: 通过少量3D先验和大量未标注2D图片，可以高效实现3D关节物体的单张图像重建，有效降低训练数据的制作成本。

title: DICT: Data Injection and Contrastive Trajectory Refinement for Conditional Image Generation with Diffusion Models
summary: Diffusion models have become a dominant paradigm for conditional image generation, yet existing approaches generally follow two directions: task-specific designs that can improve performance but limit generalization, and training-free loss guidance that compresses rich conditions into scalar objectives and applies stepwise guidance, leading to information bottlenecks and error accumulation along the sampling trajectory. Given the urgent need for an effective unified framework across diverse conditional image generation tasks, we propose Data Injection and Contrastive Trajectory Refinement (DICT), a training-free inference method that enhances conditional image generation without introducing task-dependent architectures. DICT introduces Data Injection, where noise-perturbed conditional signals are integrated into early denoising stages; by performing guided denoising on these injected signals, DICT adaptively selects and distills task-salient information from the raw condition, effectively preserving spatial richness and ensuring precise condition-to-generation alignment. Furthermore, DICT applies Contrastive Trajectory Refinement across adjacent denoising states, enabling pairwise comparisons that progressively improve sample quality. These designs keep inference simple while improving cross-task transfer under a unified diffusion formulation. Extensive experiments on conditional image generation tasks (e.g., style transfer, image super-resolution, and image deblurring) show consistent gains in fidelity and perceptual quality over representative task-specific and loss-guided baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通用、训练阶段无依赖的新颖推理方法，用于提升扩散模型在多种条件图像生成任务中的表现。无需引入任务特定架构，且在效果上超越了现有主流方法。
AI.motivation: 现有条件扩散模型要么依赖于特定任务设计，难以泛化，要么采用训练外的损失引导，这容易造成信息瓶颈和采样过程中的误差累积。当前迫切需要一种统一、有效的方法，能跨任务提升生成质量。
AI.method: 作者提出了数据注入与对比轨迹精炼（DICT）方法。首先在早期去噪阶段注入带噪条件信号，利用引导去噪自适应提取任务相关信息，避免信息损失，实现条件与生成的一致性。其次，通过对比相邻去噪状态对样本进行精炼，逐步提升样本质量。整个流程无需任务特定结构，且便于跨任务应用。
AI.result: 在风格迁移、超分辨率、去模糊等条件图像生成任务上，DICT在生成保真度和感知质量上，均优于主流的任务特定方法和无训练损失引导基线。
AI.conclusion: DICT方法在保持推理简单的同时，显著提升了多任务条件图像生成的表现，具有较强的跨任务迁移能力，为条件生成扩散模型提供了统一高效的推理解决方案。

title: USE: A Unified Self-Ensembling Framework for Test-Time Prompt Tuning
summary: Test-time adaptation (TTA) has emerged as a popular paradigm for improving the performance of vision-language models (e.g., CLIP) on downstream tasks. Among existing CLIP-based TTA methods, Test-Time Prompt Tuning (TPT) is a pioneering work that optimizes textual prompts using multiple test-time augmentations and remains a strong baseline to date. In this work, we revisit TPT and reveal that its optimization can be interpreted as implicitly learning from self-generated pseudo labels. Building on this perspective, we propose a unified self-ensembling framework (USE) that ensures consistency between the optimization and inference stages. During optimization, we introduce a simple yet effective self-ensembling (SE) strategy that emphasizes the test image itself over its augmented views adaptively to obtain more reliable pseudo labels. To fully exploit the potential of augmentations, we further apply the same strategy at inference time, unifying the objectives of both stages. Notably, SE can also act as a lightweight optimization-free TTA method. Extensive experiments across multiple datasets demonstrate that SE and USE outperform their counterparts, respectively. Furthermore, SE yields consistent performance gains when integrated with existing TTA methods. The code is available at https://github.com/sirujiang/USE.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一的自集成框架（USE）用于视觉-语言模型（如CLIP）的测试时适应（TTA），通过改进伪标签生成方式提升模型在下游任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有CLIP基础的TTA方法中，Test-Time Prompt Tuning（TPT）通过多种测试时增强来优化文本提示，取得了良好效果。但TPT的优化过程实质上是在利用自生成的伪标签，优化方式和推理时存在不一致，有进一步提升空间。
AI.method: 作者提出了一个自集成（SE）策略，在优化阶段自适应地更关注原始测试图像，相较其增强视图以获得更可靠的伪标签，还在推理阶段同样应用该策略，实现了统一的优化和推理目标。SE同时可作为无优化的轻量TTA方法。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上实验表明，SE和整体框架USE均优于现有同类方法。此外，将SE与其他TTA方法结合也能获得稳定的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 自集成策略和统一框架有效提高了视觉-语言模型的TTA表现，为进一步研究提供了新的思路。

title: NavEYE: Vision-Centered Multi-Sensor Fusion-Based Situational Awareness System for Intelligent Surface Vehicles
summary: With the rapid development of sensor and artificial intelligence (AI) technologies, intelligent surface vehicles (ISVs) have gained increasing attention from academia and industry. Their intelligence, reliability, and safety depend heavily on situational awareness in complex navigational environments. To achieve high-quality perception, we develop a vision-centered multi-sensor fusion system, named NavEYE, by exploiting complementary sensors, including the automatic identification system (AIS), radar, and RGB camera. Specifically, we first propose a multi-constrained gated data association method (MCGA) to accurately match low-temporal-resolution AIS data with high-temporal-resolution radar data. Their fusion result is then obtained by selectively implementing distance-aware adaptively weighted fusion (DAWF) and timeliness decay-based stitching fusion (TDSF), which reduce the uncertainty caused by AIS or radar data loss in real-world sensing scenarios. Based on accurate and robust visual object detection, we further associate and fuse AIS, radar, and visual data through joint constraints of normalized bearing and distance features. According to the fusion results, comprehensive information related to ships of interest can be automatically obtained, helping enhance situational awareness and reduce collision risk for ISVs. The feasibility, robustness, usability, and effectiveness of the proposed multi-sensor fusion method and situational awareness system are demonstrated through extensive experiments on a real-world sensing dataset collected from AIS, radar, and camera. The experimental results show the superior performance of our fusion method in both quantitative and qualitative evaluations. In addition, the shipboard NavEYE system can promote navigational safety for ISVs in complex and dynamic environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一套名为NavEYE的视觉主导多传感器融合系统，以提升智能表面航行器（ISV）的环境感知能力，通过结合AIS、雷达和摄像头数据，显著增强复杂环境下的航行安全。
AI.motivation: ISV在复杂航行环境中的智能化、可靠性和安全性高度依赖于环境感知能力。目前，单一感知源容易因数据丢失等问题导致不确定性大，亟需一种高质量多传感器融合方法来提升感知效果。
AI.method: 提出多约束门控数据关联方法（MCGA）用于匹配分辨率不同的AIS与雷达数据；并结合距离自适应加权融合（DAWF）与时效衰减拼接融合（TDSF），以应对数据丢失和噪声。接着，通过规范化方位和距离特征，对视觉、AIS和雷达的多模态数据进行联合约束和融合，最终形成对目标船舶的全面感知。
AI.result: 在真实AIS、雷达及摄像头的采集数据集上进行大量实验，结果表明该方法在定量和定性评估中性能优越，系统的可行性、鲁棒性与实用性突出。
AI.conclusion: NavEYE多传感器融合系统能有效提升ISV在复杂动态环境下的环境感知和航行安全，为船舶智能航行提供有力支持。

title: EgoInertia-MI: A Multimodal Egocentric Vision and IMU Benchmark for Motor Impairment Assessment
summary: Motor impairments, including tremor, bradykinesia, gait abnormalities, and postural instability, are common across many neurological and movement-related conditions. Conventional clinical assessments are often intermittent and may fail to capture subtle temporal variations in motor behavior.
