While wearable IMUs and third-person video have shown promise for objective motor assessment, third-person recordings raise privacy concerns and require constrained acquisition setups. In contrast, egocentric vision provides a more naturalistic and privacyaware alternative. In this work, we introduce EgoInertia-MI, a multimodal benchmark dataset combining synchronized egocentric video and wearable IMU signals for motor impairment analysis. The dataset contains 19 upper- and lower-body activities performed by healthy volunteers simulating varying levels of motor impairment severity levels: no impairment, mild impairment, and severe impairment. We establish two benchmark tasks: action recognition and motor impairment severity estimation, and evaluate multiple unimodal and multimodal baselines. Experimental results show that egocentric video provides strong cues for motor impairment assessment, while multimodal fusion achieves the best overall performance, reaching 0.78 Macro-F1 for severity estimation and 0.93 Macro-F1 for action recognition. These findings highlight the potential of combining egocentric vision and wearable sensing for ecologically valid and privacy-aware motor assessment. Code and data are available at:https://fatemah-alh.github.io/EgoInertia-MI-Page/.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了EgoInertia-MI数据集，结合了同步的第一视角视频和可穿戴IMU信号，用于动作识别和运动障碍严重程度评估，实验验证了多模态融合的优越性能。
AI.motivation: 临床上运动障碍评估多为间歇性，难以捕捉运动行为的细微变化。现有方法（如IMU、第三人称视频）存在隐私风险或使用场景受限。因此，亟需一种自然且隐私友好的运动障碍评估手段。
AI.method: 构建了EgoInertia-MI多模态基准数据集，内容包括健康志愿者模拟不同运动障碍严重程度下，完成19种上、下肢动作的第一人称视频与IMU信号。同时提出了动作识别和障碍严重度评估两大基准任务，并测试了多种单模态和多模态方法。
AI.result: 实验表明，第一视角视频对于运动障碍评估有显著作用，多模态融合（视频+IMU）表现最佳，严重程度估计Macro-F1可达0.78，动作识别Macro-F1可达0.93。
AI.conclusion: 结合第一视角视觉和可穿戴传感器能够实现生态有效且具备隐私保护的运动障碍评估，显示出该方向的巨大应用潜力。

title: A Large-Scale Dataset and a New Method for RemoteSensing Traffic Object Segmentation
summary: Remote sensing imagery plays a crucial role in evaluating regional transportation capacity. However, existing segmentation datasets often lack diversity in object categories and scenes, limiting the ability of models to comprehensively evaluate trans portation capacity in real-world scenes. To alleviate this gap, we construct a large-scale and diverse dataset for transportation object segmentation, named as NWPU-Traffic. This dataset encompass four traffic object categories (car, airplane, ship, and train) and a wide range of scenes from 49 cities across 7 countries, with instance-level annotations to ensure precise segmentation of individual objects, which bridges critical shortcomings in resolution and scene diversity in existing datasets. Leveraging this dataset, we establish a benchmark with several popular segmentation networks. Furthermore, we propose a novel segmentation method that leverages spatial-channel preserving feature interaction and an adaptive feature decoder, enabling robust segmentation across varying scales and complex environments. Extensive experiments and ablation studies validate the effectiveness of our approach. The dataset and code are publicly available at https://github.com/CVer-Yang/NWPU-Traffic.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了NWPU-Traffic数据集，覆盖多类别、多场景交通目标实例分割，并基于此提出新方法，实验证明效果优越。
AI.motivation: 现有遥感图像分割数据集在目标类别与场景多样性上存在局限，影响了对实际交通运输能力的全面评估。
AI.method: 1）构建NWPU-Traffic大规模遥感交通数据集，涵盖4类交通工具（汽车、飞机、船只、火车），场景丰富，并带有实例级标注；2）利用该数据集建立分割基线，并提出新的分割方法，结合空间-通道特征交互和自适应特征解码器，以提升分割性能。
AI.result: 在多种主流分割网络和新方法上进行广泛对比和消融实验，结果表明新方法在多尺度、复杂环境下的分割表现优异。
AI.conclusion: NWPU-Traffic有效弥补了遥感交通分割领域的场景与分辨率短板，提出的方法显著提升了分割准确率，为交通能力评估提供有力工具，且数据集及代码已公开。

title: TESSERA v2: Scaling Pixel-wise Earth Foundation Models
summary: Pixel-wise Earth-observation (EO) foundation models are now achieving state-of-the-art performance via generated spatial embeddings. However, how these models scale and how best to spend a pretraining budget remain poorly understood. We present the largest controlled scaling study for EO to date: 395 training runs on 1,024 GH200 superchips within a fixed pixel-wise Barlow Twins family, each evaluated on 15 downstream tasks. We find that pretraining loss barely predicts downstream performance (|Pearson r| < 0.2), so selecting models by loss wastes a large share of the compute. We also find that, as the training budget grows, the encoder and the data should grow together while the projector stays fixed, which gives a simple rule for allocating compute. Using this rule, we train a family of pixel-wise models (0.5B and 1B, with a 2B model in training) and distill them into compact students for embeddings-as-data deployment. The 21-million-parameter distilled TESSERA v2-1B-M in aggregate outperforms all open and proprietary models tested, some of which are orders of magnitude larger. These students produce Matryoshka representations that are inexpensive to serve: a 16-dimensional prefix keeps 92% of the full 128-dimensional performance at 1/8 of the storage. Upon completion of training we plan to release v2 global embeddings covering 2017-2025. Together, these results give a concrete, empirically grounded recipe for scaling pixel-wise EO foundation models: train large encoders, select by downstream performance, and distil into flexible student models. All code will be released at https://github.com/ucam-eo/tessera.

AI.tldr: 本文对地球观测像素级基础模型进行了大规模、系统性的扩展性和预训练预算分配研究，提出了提升训练效率与下游任务表现的指导方法，并公布了全新的模型和代码。
AI.motivation: 当前像素级地球观测基础模型表现优异但其扩展机制与预训练资源分配最优策略尚不明确。因此急需通过大规模实验探明模型性能与预训练方案的关系，并寻求提升效率的实际方法。
AI.method: 作者在GH200超芯片上进行了395次大规模实验，采用像素级Barlow Twins架构，在15个下游任务上评估模型。系统评估了不同预训练损失与下游性能的相关性，探索了编码器、数据和投影器的扩展规则，并推广蒸馏技术来提升应用效率。
AI.result: 预训练损失与下游表现相关性极低，用损失选模型浪费大量资源。发现随着预算增加，应同步扩大编码器和数据量，而投影器保持不变。采用该准则训练和蒸馏后，21M参数的TESSERA v2-1B-M超越了所有已测开源及专有大模型。通过‘Matryoshka’表示法，大幅降低存储开销且性能损失极小。
AI.conclusion: 提出像素级EO基础模型最佳扩展策略：同步扩展编码器与数据、模型筛选以下游表现为主、并通过蒸馏生成高效部署学生模型。成果具实证依据，并承诺开源相关模型与代码，推动领域发展。

title: Reward Lightning: Fast Video Generation via Homologous Preference Distillation
summary: Achieving simultaneous preference alignment and distillation acceleration in video diffusion models remains an open challenge. Existing methods optimize the two objectives over mismatched representation spaces, where improving one objective often compromises the other. To overcome this, we propose Reward Lightning, a unified framework that aligns and accelerates a video diffusion model within a single shared representation. Its central principle is homology: both objectives are evaluated on identical latent features, which mitigates the gradient conflicts that arise when they are optimized over disjoint representations. As a foundational component, we first introduce a latent reward model (LRM) that scores videos directly in the latent space, without decoding back to the pixel space. Building on the LRM, homologous preference distillation (HPD) reuses this shared backbone to perform adversarial distillation and preference alignment jointly, yielding few-step generators that remain faithful and well aligned. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the LRM surpasses pixel-level and latent-level reward baselines by $11.0\%$ and $14.7\%$ in preference accuracy, and that Reward Lightning generates high-fidelity videos in merely $1$ to $4$ steps, improving the average VBench score by $2.1\%$ while leading in text alignment, motion quality, and visual quality. Project page: https://reward-lightning.github.io.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Reward Lightning框架，实现了视频扩散模型的偏好对齐和蒸馏加速的双重目标，在同一潜在空间中同时优化两者，显著提升了对齐度与生成速度。
AI.motivation: 现有视频扩散模型很难同时高效进行用户偏好对齐与生成加速，因为这两个目标常在不同的表征空间上优化，彼此影响，提升一个会损害另一个。作者希望解决此二者间的矛盾，提升模型的整体性能。
AI.method: 作者提出“同源原则”，即在相同潜在特征空间中同时度量和优化偏好对齐与蒸馏加速。具体做法包括：设计了潜在空间奖励模型（LRM），直接在潜在空间对视频进行评分；基于LRM，提出同源偏好蒸馏(HPD)，利用共享主干网络，同时完成对抗蒸馏和偏好对齐，实现高效与准确。
AI.result: 实验显示，LRM在偏好准确率上相比像素级和潜在空间基线分别提升了11.0%和14.7%。Reward Lightning框架可在1-4步内生成高保真视频，VBench成绩提升2.1%，并在文本对齐、运动质量、视觉质量等指标上均有领先表现。
AI.conclusion: Reward Lightning首次在统一表征下实现了视频扩散模型的高效蒸馏与偏好对齐，缓解了二者的冲突，提升了生成质量与速度，对实际应用具有重要意义。

title: DS-SAC: Density Search for Sample Consensus
summary: Robust geometric model estimation is a fundamental problem in computer vision. RANSAC and its variants remain widely used for this task; however, they rely on stochastic minimal sampling. In this article, we propose Density Search Sample Consensus (DS-SAC), a deterministic robust estimation framework, that avoids repeated random sampling by searching dense regions. Starting from an initial model estimated from the available points, the method performs local exploration via forward and backward search. To facilitate global exploration, DS-SAC recursively partitions the point set using signed residuals and searches each valid partition for high-consensus models. We show that DS-SAC has polynomial complexity with respect to the number of points, making it an efficient alternative to stochastic consensus-based methods. Experiments on large-scale real-world datasets for homography, fundamental matrix, and essential matrix estimation show that DS-SAC achieves higher AUC scores, competitive or lower median pose errors, and faster runtime compared with widely used robust estimators, including RANSAC, MAGSAC, LO-RANSAC, and GC-RANSAC.

AI.tldr: 提出了DS-SAC，一种确定性的鲁棒几何模型估计方法，相比于RANSAC等传统随机方法，DS-SAC通过密度搜索与递归分割，实现了更快且稳定的模型估计，并在多种实际任务上表现优异。
AI.motivation: RANSAC及其变体虽然被广泛用于鲁棒几何模型估计，但它们依赖于随机采样，效率和稳定性存在不足。因此，需要一种高效、确定性的替代方法。
AI.method: 作者提出了DS-SAC方法，避免了随机采样。方法先从初始模型出发，通过局部的前向和后向搜索提升模型，再使用有符号残差递归分割点集，在每个有效分区内搜索高一致性的模型，从而实现全局高效搜索。
AI.result: 在大规模实际数据集（同源矩阵、基础矩阵和本质矩阵估计任务）上的实验显示，DS-SAC在AUC分数上高于主流算法，位姿误差与最优算法持平或更低，运行速度也更快。
AI.conclusion: DS-SAC作为一种确定性方法，在保证估计精度的同时，大幅提升了效率，优于常用的随机共识算法，是鲁棒模型估计领域的重要进步。

title: InSpace: Structure-Aware 3D Indoor Scene Generation from a Single 360° Image
summary: Recent advances in single image-to-3D generation have enabled high-quality asset synthesis, yet extending these capabilities to indoor scene generation remains challenging. Existing methods focus on asset-level generation while neglecting the structural layout, which is essential for downstream applications and serves as the spatial anchor for grounding assets. However, a single image with a limited field of view lacks the spatial coverage to recover a coherent global layout. To this end, we use a 360° image represented in equirectangular projection (ERP) and propose InSpace, a structure-aware framework for 3D indoor scene generation. InSpace comprises three stages: (1) estimating partial scene geometry as spatial priors, (2) generating coarse scene structure with view-selective cross-attention, and (3) producing detailed layout and asset geometry with textures through a global-local hybrid attention, using flow matching. We also propose ERP-FRONT, a paired ERP-Image-to-3D indoor scene dataset based on 3D-FRONT. Experiments show that InSpace generates complete 3D indoor scenes with structural layout, along with separate textured assets from a single ERP image, achieving strong performance across 3D and 2D metrics. Project Page: https://kookie12.github.io/InSpace-Project-Page/

AI.tldr: 本文提出InSpace方法，通过360°全景图像生成结构化3D室内场景，实现高质量、布局明确的三维重建。
AI.motivation: 单幅图像生成3D资产已有突破，但室内场景生成因结构布局难以还原仍有挑战。通常资产级生成方法忽略了空间结构，难以支撑下游应用。单张常规视角范围窄，不利于全局布局恢复。
AI.method: 作者利用equirectangular projection（ERP）全景图像，提出三阶段InSpace框架：1）估算部分场景几何，作为空间先验；2）通过视角选择性交叉注意力生成粗略场景结构；3）基于全局-局部混合注意力和流匹配，生成详细布局和有纹理资产。此外，作者构建了ERP-FRONT数据集。
AI.result: InSpace方法可从单张ERP图像生成结构化完整的3D室内场景（含可分离的纹理化资产），在3D和2D评价指标上表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 该工作显著提升了单图室内3D场景生成的完整性与结构合理性，并推动空间感知和资产生成结合，在实际应用前景广阔。

title: Full Glyph Images Beat Token Embeddings: A Controlled Study for Transformers
summary: Modern language models generally represent text as sequences of discrete token embeddings, an assumption deeply rooted in current practice but rarely questioned. We challenge this representation, especially for Chinese, by replacing index-based token embeddings entirely with a single rasterized image of the character sequence, processed by a vision encoder composed of a shared ResNet and a shallow Vision Transformer. To isolate the role of input representation, we construct a dual-branch controlled framework in which both a Vision-based model and an index-based baseline share an identical decoder backbone, training objective, optimizer, and data curriculum. Any performance difference is therefore attributable to the input modality only. Across all tested decoder backbones, the Vision-based model consistently outperforms the baseline, reaching a peak accuracy of 0.429 versus 0.355 for the index-based baseline,that is, a 21% relative improvement, while converging in about half the number of training epochs. The advantage emerges especially within the first five epochs (under 21% of total data) and persists under moderate character corruption: the corrupted Vision model matches the clean index-based baseline. Ablation studies reveal that the advantage requires both spatially coherent input and a ViT encoder with 2D positional encodings. A cross-script comparison on English shows the advantage does not transfer directly to alphabetic writing systems, suggesting that the uniform visual density and radical structure of Chinese characters are enabling conditions. These findings suggest that transformers are more modality-agnostic than commonly assumed, and that discrete tokenization is not a fundamental requirement for Chinese language modeling.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将中文文本序列转换为单一图像输入到视觉编码器（ResNet+ViT），从而取代传统基于索引的离散token embedding，并且实验表明新方法在准确率和收敛速度上显著优于传统做法。
AI.motivation: 当前语言模型普遍采用离散token embedding表示文本，但这种做法起源已久且很少被质疑，但对于象形性较强的中文，这种表示可能并不是最优。作者希望探索替换token embedding的方法对语言建模的影响。
AI.method: 作者提出将完整的中文字符序列栅格化成一张图像，并用ResNet和Vision Transformer(ViT)的组合视觉编码器处理。同时建立双分支对照实验，确保除输入数据模态外，其他训练参数一致（解码器骨干、训练目标、优化器、数据计划都相同），以此比较vision-based和index-based输入的效果。
AI.result: 在所有解码器骨干测试中，vision-based模型准确率始终高于传统索引输入：最高可提升21%，且收敛速度约为传统方法的一半。在前五个epochs内优势尤为明显，即使在字符噪声干扰下，vision模型表现也优于baseline。消融实验表明优势依赖于图像的空间一致性和ViT的2D位置编码。
AI.conclusion: 变换器（transformer）对输入模态其实并不敏感——文字形态输入（如中文）并不必须通过离散tokenization，视觉连续表示反而更优。这一方法不适用于字母文字（如英文），说明中文独特的视觉密度和构字结构起到关键作用。

title: SAGE: Synchronized Action-Gaze Recognition and Anticipation for Human Behavior Understanding
summary: Human object interaction (HOI), gaze pattern, and their anticipation are intricately linked, providing valuable insights into cognitive processes, intentions, and behavior. However, most existing models handle gaze and actions separately, missing both their interdependence and the advantages of a unified solution. This paper presents a novel unified framework, SAGE (Synchronized Action-GazE), which integrates simultaneous recognition and anticipation of both HOI and human gaze into a single unified end-to-end trainable model. Our approach leverages a transformer-based architecture and incorporates gaze data into spatiotemporal attention mechanisms to simultaneously predict current and future human actions and gaze behavior. We explore this bidirectional relationship between gaze and actions under different scenarios, whether requiring a close-up, detailed view (egocentric) or a wider, more contextual view (exocentric), making our framework versatile for various applications. Additionally, due to lack of datasets for comprehensive analysis of both HOI and gaze in exocentric videos, we establish a new benchmark Exo-Cook to facilitate further research in this domain. Experiments on three benchmark datasets: VidHOI, EGTEA Gaze+, and Exo-Cook show that jointly modeling gaze and actions across current and future frames achieves consistently strong results, often surpassing specialized state-of-the-art models tailored to individual tasks. By unifying actions and attention in a comprehensive way, our work lays the groundwork for more intuitive human-machine interaction.

AI.tldr: 提出了一个统一的Transformer框架（SAGE），同时对人-物交互（HOI）和注视行为进行识别和预判，且在多个数据集上效果优异，推动了人机交互研究。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通常分别处理注视（gaze）与人-物交互（HOI），未考虑二者相互影响，也缺乏统一的预测方案，因此需要一种融合模型提升应用价值及认知理解。
AI.method: 设计了名为SAGE的Transformer结构，将注视信息引入时空注意力机制，实现HOI与注视的同步识别及预测。针对不同场景（第一/第三视角），采用适应性建模，并新建了Exo-Cook数据集用于第三视角下的HOI和注视研究。
AI.result: 在VidHOI、EGTEA Gaze+和Exo-Cook三个数据集上，SAGE模型在当前与未来帧的动作和注视共同预测任务上均优于或超越仅专注于单任务的现有最优模型。
AI.conclusion: 统一的动作与注视建模不仅提升了预测表现，也为更具直觉的人机交互系统奠定了基础，推动了相关研究领域发展。

title: Paired Uterine Whole-Slide Images and Pathology Reports for Multimodal Computational Pathology
summary: Uterine diseases represent an important category of gynecologic pathology and require accurate histopathological assessment for diagnosis and treatment planning. Whole-slide images (WSI) have enabled the digital transformation of pathology workflows and provided new opportunities for artificial intelligence (AI) in computational pathology. In particular, multimodal models that jointly analyze histopathology images and pathology reports have shown promising potential for automated pathology report generation and AI-assisted diagnosis. However, the development of such systems remains limited by the scarcity of datasets that pair whole-slide images with clinically meaningful pathology reports. Instead, existing pathology datasets focus on patch- or slide-level annotations of a single endpoint (e.g., disease class), which do not fully capture the rich information in full clinical diagnostic workflow reports. Here, we introduce TUM-Uteria, a uterine pathology dataset comprising WSIs paired with diagnostic pathology reports at both the case and slide levels, collected from a tertiary medical center. The dataset contains 216 clinical cases, comprising 455 slide-level WSI-report pairs. The dataset underwent a structured multi-stage validation procedure involving board-certified pathologists to ensure reliable annotations. TUM-Uteria supports research in computational pathology, including whole-slide image analysis, multimodal learning, and automated pathology report generation.

AI.tldr: 该论文介绍了TUM-Uteria宫腔疾病病理数据集，该数据集包含了全视野切片图像（WSI）与病例和切片级别的病理报告对，旨在推动数字病理和AI辅助诊断的发展。
AI.motivation: 现有的病理学AI研究受限于数据集缺乏，尤其是缺少与WSI配对的临床病理报告，而真实医疗工作流程中远不止单一疾病标签，因此有必要构建更接近真实临床的多模态数据集。
AI.method: 研究团队从三级医疗中心收集216例宫腔病理临床案例，总计455组WSI-报告配对，并通过多阶段病理专家审核确保数据高可靠性。数据集覆盖病例和切片两个层级，具备结构化信息。
AI.result: 成功建立了一个结构完善、经过专家验证的宫腔全视野切片与病理报告配对数据集TUM-Uteria，为多模态学习、全视野图像分析、自动病理报告生成等任务提供了基础。
AI.conclusion: TUM-Uteria数据集弥补了病理数据不足的缺陷，为推动计算病理学、多模态模型和智能辅助诊断在宫腔疾病中的应用提供了关键资源。

title: SiamJEPA: On the Role of Siamese Student Encoders in JEPA
summary: Recently, Joint Embedding Predictive Architectures (JEPAs) have attracted significant attention in the computer vision and machine learning communities as a promising framework for self-supervised representation learning. Unlike masked autoencoders that reconstruct pixels, JEPA models learn representations by predicting latent embeddings of masked regions. Existing JEPA-based methods, such as I-JEPA and V-JEPA, typically employ a single encoder in the student network. In contrast, using Siamese encoders for student network is more naturally aligned with brain-inspired representation learning frameworks, yet their role in JEPA models remains largely unexplored. In this paper, we investigate the effect of Siamese student encoders in JEPA-based representation learning. To this end, we propose SiamJEPA, masked Siamese student encoders equipped with an exponential moving average (EMA) teacher network. SiamJEPA can also be viewed as a JEPA formulation of the brain-inspired representation learning model PhiNet. Through extensive experiments on ImageNet linear probing, we demonstrate that Siamese encoders act as an effective regularizer for the JEPA objective, improving representation separability and accelerating learning during the early stages of training. Furthermore, SiamJEPA consistently outperforms comparable single-encoder JEPA variants under limited training budgets and achieves higher linear probing accuracy than Masked Autoencoders (MAE) which requires longer training. Our findings reveal that Siamese student encoders are not merely an architectural choice but constitute an important inductive bias for predictive representation learning. These results provide new insights into the design of JEPA-based models and suggest that incorporating Siamese student architectures offers a simple yet effective approach for improving self-supervised representation learning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型的自监督表示学习方法——SiamJEPA，通过在JEPA框架中引入Siamese（孪生）学生编码器，显著提升了模型的学习效果，并优于以往的单编码器和MAE方案。
AI.motivation: 当前JEPA方法主要采用单一编码器学生网络，但这与脑启发（brain-inspired）表示学习框架不完全一致，且Siamese学生编码器在JEPA中的潜力尚未被深入研究，因此作者希望探索其实际效果。
AI.method: 作者提出了SiamJEPA：在学生网络中采用掩码Siamese编码器，并配合EMA teacher（指数滑动平均教师）网络。模型通过预测掩码区域的潜在嵌入（而非像素）实现无监督表示学习，并在ImageNet线上探测实验中进行评估。
AI.result: 实验证明：引入Siamese学生编码器能有效正则化JEPA目标，提高表示的可分性，训练初期加速学习。在相同或更低训练预算下，SiamJEPA表现优于单编码器JEPA变体和需要更长训练时间的MAE。
AI.conclusion: Siamese学生编码器不仅仅是结构选择，更是提升预测式表示学习的重要归纳偏置。这为JEPA模型设计提供了新见解，也表明使用Siamese结构能简洁有效地改善自监督表示学习性能。

title: Enhancing Implicit Neural Representations with Image Feature Embedding for Unsupervised Cardiac Cine MRI Reconstruction
summary: Cardiac cine Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) is a critical diagnostic tool that provides dynamic insights for radiologists. To accelerate acquisition, under-sampled k-space data is often used, requiring reconstruction methods that combine coil sensitivity encoding with prior information to recover missing data. Deep learning approaches have gained more attention for leveraging data-adaptive priors. While supervised learning approaches are a common choice, they depend on fully sampled reference data, which is not always available. Unsupervised methods eliminate the need for fully sampled reference data, which can be advantageous in cardiac cine MRI reconstruction. Among them, implicit neural representations (INRs) have shown great potential due to their simple architecture and good quality reconstructions. In this work, we propose an image-domain dual-branch INR framework, termed I-FP-INR, which extends the original INR design by introducing an additional feature-processing branch. This design aims to extract complementary feature embeddings to enhance the overall representation, thereby benefiting reconstruction. Extensive evaluations on both public datasets and in-house data show consistent improvements over baseline methods in reconstruction quality, with strong robustness across varied scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的心脏电影MRI重建方法：I-FP-INR（图像域双分支隐式神经表示），可在无需完全采样数据的情况下，提高重建质量。
AI.motivation: 现有MRI重建常依赖于深度学习监督方法，但这些方法需要全采样参考数据，现实中不易获取。无监督方法虽然无需参考数据，但提升重建质量和鲁棒性仍有挑战。隐式神经表示（INR）因结构简单且重建效果好而受到关注，本文旨在通过改进INR以进一步提升效果。
AI.method: 提出了I-FP-INR架构，在传统INR基础上增加特征处理分支，从图像域提取互补特征嵌入，提升模型的表达能力和重建效果。
AI.result: 在公共数据集及自有数据集上进行大量实验，I-FP-INR在不同场景下都展现出比对照方法更优的重建质量和更强的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的I-FP-INR方法无需完全采样数据即可进行心脏电影MRI重建，且在保有INR简单结构的基础上，通过双分支特征增强显著提升了重建性能。

title: Seeing Once is Enough? Online Geometry-Aware Token Pruning for 3D Question Answering
comment: published at ICLR 2026 Workshop on Efficient Spatial Reasoning
summary: Recent Multi-modal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated remarkable performance on 2D question answering tasks. However, extending these models to the 3D question answering remains challenging, as they typically require multiple views of the scene, which incurs substantial computational cost at inference. To mitigate this issue, existing solutions rely on strategic frame selection or token-merging algorithms that require preprocessing in advance all frames of the scene, i.e., an offline fashion. In contrast, we propose the first online token-pruning method that can be integrated seamlessly with current MLLM models for 3D question answering tasks, without additional training and with lower memory usage.Our key insight is to project each input frame into a shared voxel space using depth information and camera pose, identifying spatially-overlapped regions across frames and selectively pruning redundant image tokens before they enter the language model. Our method enables efficient online processing while reducing up to 50% of token usage. We apply this approach to Qwen2.5-VL-7B and Qwen3-VL-8B, demonstrating improved performance on the ScanQA, SQA3D, and OpenEQA-HM3D benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在线token剪枝方法，用于提升多模态大模型在3D问答任务中的推理效率与性能，无需离线预处理，减少内存消耗，并在多个公开基准上验证有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态大模型在2D问答表现优异，但在3D场景问答中推理成本高，常需要多视角输入且依赖离线帧处理，严重影响效率和应用落地。亟需一种高效、在线且无需额外训练的帧/特征选择方法。
AI.method: 作者提出首次在线token剪枝方法：利用深度信息和相机位姿将每帧投影到共享体素空间，通过检测空间重叠区域实时剪除冗余图像token，在输入语言模型前实时处理，兼容现有多模态大模型，无需离线预处理和额外训练。
AI.result: 该方法在Qwen2.5-VL-7B和Qwen3-VL-8B模型上测试，在ScanQA、SQA3D和OpenEQA-HM3D基准集上表现优异，实现token使用减少高达50%，同时推理性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 线上体素空间剪枝方法显著提升3D问答任务的计算效率和性能，减少内存消耗且不影响甚至提升最终准确率，对多模态大模型的实际3D应用有重要意义。

title: Sparse4D-Radar: An Efficient and Robust Framework for Surround-View 3D Object Detection via 4D Radar-Camera Fusion
summary: In recent years, 4D imaging radar has gained wide attention in autonomous driving for its robustness against harsh weather and ability to output target velocity. Nevertheless, mainstream 4D radar-camera fusion methods only support front-view perception, lacking mature solutions for surround-view sensing. Directly expanding these pipelines to full 360° coverage introduces excessive computation cost and limits real-world deployment. To tackle these limitations, this work proposes Sparse4D-Radar, an efficient robust surround-view multi-modal fusion framework. We first design a Deformable Fusion module to embed radar-camera features into sparse queries, constructing the lightweight base version Sparse4D-Radar-Base. Two dedicated modules are further introduced to boost localization accuracy and modality stability: Velocity-Consistency Sampling (VCS) refines features via radar velocity cues for motion awareness, and Adaptive Modality Gating (AMG) dynamically adjusts cross-modal fusion weights according to feature confidence. Combining all components, we build Sparse4D-Radar-Acc for high-precision detection demands. Comprehensive experiments on OmniHD-Scenes verify that our approach achieves state-of-the-art surround-view 3D detection performance. Compared with prior arts, our method obtains over 7% mAP and 10% ODS improvements under complex driving scenes while running at nearly 10 FPS, striking a favorable trade-off among detection accuracy, environmental robustness and inference efficiency. Our open-source code is available at https://github.com/Aiuan/Sparse4D-Radar.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Sparse4D-Radar，一种高效且稳健的全景（环视）多模态融合框架，用于自动驾驶中的4D成像雷达与摄像头数据融合，实现了高精度、低延迟的360°环境感知。
AI.motivation: 当前主流的4D雷达-摄像头融合方法多仅支持前视感知，无法满足自动驾驶对环视感知的需求，且现有扩展到360°的方法计算成本高，不适合实际部署。
AI.method: 提出Deformable Fusion模块将雷达与摄像头特征映射到稀疏查询中，构建轻量级基线Sparse4D-Radar-Base；为增强定位和模态稳定性，又引入Velocity-Consistency Sampling（速度一致性采样）和Adaptive Modality Gating（自适应模态门控）模块。结合以上组件，形成高精度版本Sparse4D-Radar-Acc。
AI.result: 在OmniHD-Scenes数据集上的实验表明，Sparse4D-Radar在复杂驾驶场景中3D目标检测表现优异，与现有方法相比，mAP提升超过7%，ODS提升超过10%，且推理速度接近10 FPS（每秒10帧）。
AI.conclusion: Sparse4D-Radar结合高检测精度、环境鲁棒性和推理效率，在环视3D感知领域达到新水平，适合实际自动驾驶场景部署，同时已开源实现。

title: The Multipath Blind Spot: $K$-Agnostic Robust Calibration for Sparse-Anchor Metric Depth from Frozen Foundations
summary: Monocular depth foundations predict domain-general relative depth but lack absolute scale; a handful of sparse metric anchors from a range sensor can calibrate them to metric depth, an attractive alternative to metric-supervised training. Existing sparse-anchor calibration methods, however, assume the anchors are clean, whereas real sensors produce outliers that are present with the wrong value -- time-of-flight multipath, mixed pixels -- not merely missing. We show that the established residual-on-CFA calibration recipe collapses under such outliers, and that the strongest publicly deployed method, VI-Depth, has a structural multipath blind spot: robust to missing anchors, it falls behind an unprotected baseline on three of four datasets when anchors are present but wrong. We propose Multipath-Robust Anchor Calibration (MRAC), a parameter-free, inference-time wrapper that gates anchors by foundation consistency -- a Theil--Sen fit and a median-absolute-deviation test against the foundation's own relative-depth ordering -- before a single call to the calibration head. MRAC adds no learned parameters, runs its selection in $\approx 50\,μ$s on CPU, and serves anchor budgets $K \in [5,200]$ from one checkpoint. On a $320$-cell benchmark with a same-backbone, same-architecture control, MRAC strictly wins $84\%$ of same-backbone cells across all four outlier families and, against VI-Depth, wins all twelve corrupted multipath cells and all sixteen KITTI cells, reducing KITTI multipath AbsRel by $3.2\times$ ($0.489$ to $0.151$) at zero retraining.

AI.tldr: 提出了MRAC方法，提高了单目深度基础模型在有测距异常值锚点时的标定鲁棒性，优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 单目深度估计模型依赖标定实现绝对尺度，利用真实传感器提供的稀疏锚点可以避免大规模有标签数据训练，但现有方法对异常值（如多径、混合像素）敏感，导致实际应用效果下降。
AI.method: 提出了Multipath-Robust Anchor Calibration（MRAC），在校准前通过基础模型的一致性检验（Theil--Sen拟合与中位数绝对偏差MAD测试）筛除异常锚点，无需新训练参数，推理时高效。
AI.result: 在四类异常数据集上，MRAC在相同主干网络条件下84%的单元获得最好表现。相较VI-Depth，MRAC在多径和KITTI数据集均获全胜，大幅降低绝对相对误差，且无需重新训练。
AI.conclusion: MRAC方法只需轻量推理处理即可大幅增强单目深度基模型对异常锚点的鲁棒性，为实际部署提供可行选择。

title: SOV-CAD: Stepwise Orthographic Views Guided CAD Modeling Sequence Reconstruction
summary: Reconstructing Computer-Aided Design (CAD) modeling sequences from images is crucial for preserving design intent and supporting parametric editing. However, existing methods typically generate full CAD sequences holistically, overlooking the iterative, feedback-driven nature of human design workflows. We address this limitation by introducing the rich stepwise visual supervision: at each modeling step, the system observes the target's orthographic projections, the projections of the incrementally constructed model, and the active sketch, enabling informed action selection. To effectively leverage this on-the-fly feedback, we propose SOV-CAD, a framework that formulates CAD reconstruction as a sequential decision-making task and employs offline reinforcement learning with a Decision Transformer architecture. This design incorporates continuous visual feedback guided by geometric alignment rewards, resulting in a more accurate and human-like modeling process. Extensive experiments show that SOV-CAD surpasses state-of-the-art methods in CAD sequence reconstruction while exhibiting strong data efficiency. Code of SOV-CAD is available at: https://github.com/LukePhong/SOV-CAD

AI.tldr: SOV-CAD提出了一种基于视觉反馈、逐步监督的CAD建模序列重建方法，在准确性和数据效率上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有CAD建模序列重建方法忽视了人类设计流程中的迭代和反馈，因此生成的序列缺乏人类思维的合理性和可编辑性。
AI.method: 提出了SOV-CAD框架，将CAD建模序列重建视为逐步决策任务，引入Rich Stepwise Visual Supervision（在每一步通过目标正投影、当前模型投影及当前草图进行反馈），利用离线强化学习与Decision Transformer架构，根据几何对齐奖励进行训练。
AI.result: SOV-CAD在CAD序列重建准确性和数据效率方面超过了最新方法。
AI.conclusion: 逐步视觉反馈和决策转换器架构能够更有效地模拟并重建符合人类设计习惯的CAD建模序列，其代码已开源。

title: FRFDet: Efficient UAV Small Object Detection with Symmetric Sampling and Scalable Fusion
summary: Small object detection in Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) imagery remains challenging under adverse conditions, including complex weather, low illumination, and sensor noise. These challenges mainly stem from severe background clutter, fine-grained detail degradation, and suboptimal semantic-spatial feature fusion, which jointly hinder robust small-object representation. To this end, we propose FRFDet, a lightweight yet effective single-stage detector tailored for UAV-based small object detection. FRFDet proposes two plug-and-play modules: Inverse Bidirectional Sampling (IBS) and Scale-Feature Relationship Cross-Fusion (SFRCF). IBS preserves critical spatial details via channel expansion-compression and bidirectional pattern reconstruction, improving feature alignment. SFRCF explicitly models scale-dependent fusion behaviors, revealing that inter-group element-wise multiplication favors compact models, while inter-group additive fusion benefits larger architectures. Extensive experiments on VisDrone, UAVDT, HazyDet, and MS COCO demonstrate that FRFDet achieves state-of-the-art performance among lightweight detectors with low computational cost, compact parameters, and fast inference, making it well suited for resource-constrained UAV platforms.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对无人机图像小目标检测的新型轻量级检测器FRFDet，通过创新的特征融合和采样机制，有效提升在复杂环境下小目标检测的性能，并在多个数据集上表现优异。
AI.motivation: 小目标检测在无人机图像中因天气、照明和背景杂乱等因素表现不佳，现有方法难以兼顾检测精度和计算资源消耗，亟需面向无人机平台的高效、轻量化方法。
AI.method: 提出FRFDet单阶段检测框架，包含两个可插拔模块：逆向双向采样（IBS）用于保留空间细节和提升特征对齐，尺度-特征关系交叉融合（SFRCF）用于显式处理尺度相关的特征融合机制。
AI.result: 在VisDrone、UAVDT、HazyDet和MS COCO等多个数据集上，FRFDet作为轻量级检测器在检测精度、参数数量和推理速度上均优于现有同类方法。
AI.conclusion: FRFDet兼顾高效性与高性能，适用于资源受限的无人机平台，为小目标检测提供了有力工具。

title: HCSU: A Dataset and Benchmark for Fine-Grained Historical Calligraphy Style Understanding
comment: Accepted at ECCV 2026. 17 pages, 5 figures, 5 tables
summary: Automated fine-grained perception of calligraphy styles--a task vital to cultural heritage preservation--remains a critical challenge for Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs), largely constrained by existing datasets that suffer from modal mixture and flattened labels. To bridge this gap, we introduce HCSU, the first comprehensive dataset tailored for fine-grained Historical Calligraphy Style Understanding. HCSU comprises 39,307 meticulously curated character images from 49 historically prominent calligraphers across 10 dynasties, systematically decoupling authentic ink manuscripts (Tie) from stone rubbings (Bei) to resolve the long-standing modal mixture problem. Moving beyond conventional flattened labels, HCSU provides hierarchical expert-written aesthetic descriptions, enabling two rigorous evaluation protocols: fine-grained style discrimination and interpretable aesthetic reasoning. Extensive evaluations reveal a persistent gap between calligraphy-related knowledge and visually grounded style perception: state-of-the-art LVLMs show non-trivial performance but remain sensitive to script-level, textual, and source-specific cues, and often struggle to ground aesthetic judgments in fine-grained brushwork evidence. Ultimately, the HCSU benchmark exposes fundamental limitations in current multimodal architectures, aiming to inspire the evolution of expert-level visual reasoning for cultural heritage preservation. The dataset is available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/Tongji209/HCSU.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了首个专为历史书法风格细粒度理解设计的数据集HCSU，旨在提升多模态模型在书法风格识别和美学解释方面的能力。
AI.motivation: 现有大模型在书法风格细粒度识别面临挑战，主要受限于数据集存在模态混杂和标签扁平的问题，缺乏能支持精细风格理解的高质量数据。
AI.method: 作者构建了HCSU数据集，包含39307个字符图像，覆盖49位重要书法家和10个朝代，明确区分墨迹与碑刻，配备分层美学说明，并设计了风格判别与美学推理两类评测协议。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，现有视觉-语言大模型虽表现不俗，但在风格与美学识别上仍依赖脚本、文本和数据来源特征，难以基于笔法证据进行细粒度美学推断。
AI.conclusion: HCSU暴露了当前多模态架构在专业视觉推理方面的局限，强调未来需提升模型在文化遗产保护等领域的专家级视觉推理能力。

title: Beyond Scene Priors: Fine-Grained Traffic Scene Reasoning with Benchmarking and Query-Guided Small-Object Focus
summary: In safety-critical traffic scenarios, answering complex questions relies on minute, localized visual cues. However, standard Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) tend to over-attend to backgrounds, overwhelming crucial small objects during visual-language alignment, a failure mode we term 'critical evidence dilution.' Furthermore, existing visual question answering (VQA) datasets rarely expose this flaw, as they lack large-scale, distractor-heavy evaluations that require pinpointing local evidence. To bridge this evaluation and architecture gap, we introduce the Fine-Grained Traffic Reasoning Benchmark (FGTR-Bench) and the Text-Guided Small-Object Reasoning MLLM (TSR-MLLM). FGTR-Bench comprises 40,236 single-image Multiple-Choice Questions (MCQs) created via multi-agent generation, consistency checks, and expert audits, alongside a disjoint 4,947-sample blind test split. To resolve evidence dilution, TSR-MLLM, built on Qwen3-VL-4B, uses a query-conditioned Text-Guided Small-Object Focus (TG-SOF) map. Applied once at the decoder boundary, the map adds sparse Top-K gated residuals to the most question-relevant vision slots while leaving text tokens unchanged. Together with lightweight decoder adaptation, TSR-MLLM preserves single-pass inference without external detectors or image re-encoding. Under matched settings, TSR-MLLM outperforms the strongest 4B baseline by 2.1 points on FGTR-Bench (74.1% overall), with larger gains on evidence-local tracks. Furthermore, it remains competitive on DriveQA-V (CARLA Signs) under greedy decoding without task-specific fine-tuning.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了针对交通场景中复杂问题解答的新基准(FGTR-Bench)和新多模态大模型架构(TSR-MLLM)，提升了关键小目标识别和推理能力。
AI.motivation: 标准的多模态大模型容易忽略图像中的关键小物体，导致‘关键信息稀释’。现有VQA数据集很少暴露这一问题，也缺少专门评估对干扰多、小目标定位能力的数据，阻碍了模型针对安全关键场景的提升。
AI.method: 作者构建了包含4万多个多选题的细粒度交通推理基准(FGTR-Bench)；提出TSR-MLLM模型，核心创新是基于文本引导的小目标关注机制TG-SOF，针对提问以稀疏残差方式增强关键视觉槽，并与轻量化解码器适配，无需外部探测器或二次编解码。
AI.result: 在FGTR-Bench上，TSR-MLLM单次推理准确率比同量级最强基线高2.1百分点(74.1%)，关键证据定位测试提升更明显；在DriveQA-V新任务上，也有较好表现，无需任务特定微调。
AI.conclusion: TSR-MLLM有效缓解了多模态模型在安全关键场景下的关键信息稀释问题，为小目标敏感的VQA提供了更高效的方案，新基准也推动了该类问题的系统化研究。

title: Perceiving Better Moments: Cover Frame Reselection and Enhancement for Live Photos with the Live2K Dataset
summary: Modern smartphones capture Live Photos, short video bursts surrounding a still image, offering a dynamic and engaging photographic experience. However, the cover photo and video components are generated by two distinct imaging pipelines: the photo stream undergoes full computational photography processing, while the video stream is constrained by real-time efficiency and heavy compression. This intrinsic separation produces a substantial quality gap in resolution, color fidelity, and dynamic range between the cover photo and video frames. When users reselect an alternative frame from the video to replace an imperfect cover, the chosen frame often suffers from severe degradation, making direct replacement visually unsatisfactory. Restoring such frames requires simultaneous enhancement of spatial detail and color appearance, a task considerably more challenging than ordinary super-resolution or color enhancement. To address this, we define the Live Photo Cover Frame Reselection and Enhancement (LPRE) task, which leverages the intrinsic cues available within each Live Photo: the high-quality cover image as a structural and color reference, the user-reselected low-quality frame as the reconstruction target and several adjacent video frames providing temporal cues. Building upon this formulation, we construct Live2K, a real-world dataset of 2,042 Live Photos, and develop a unified one-stage baseline that integrates multi-frame fusion, guided color enhancement and super-resolution, establishing the first benchmark for Live Photo enhancement research.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了智能手机Live Photo中封面照片与视频帧之间存在显著画质差距的问题，并提出了专门的增强任务与数据集，对原始视频帧进行高质量恢复。
AI.motivation: 在Live Photo中，静止封面照片和动态视频采用了完全不同的成像处理流程，导致两者间有明显的清晰度、色彩和动态范围差别，影响用户选择替代封面帧时的体验。解决这个问题有实际应用意义且技术上具挑战性。
AI.method: 作者首先定义了Live Photo封面帧重选与增强任务（LPRE），利用高质量的封面图片做为结构和色彩参考，目标为劣质的用户重选帧，同时结合临近的视频帧提供时序信息。基于此，提出了Live2K数据集（2,042组实例），并设计了一种一阶段基线方法，集成了多帧融合、引导色彩增强和超分辨率。
AI.result: 构建了首个针对Live Photo增强的基准数据集与方法。实验证明，融合结构、色彩和时序信息能够显著提升重选帧的画质。
AI.conclusion: 本文为Live Photo帧画质增强提供了系统性的任务定义、数据集和基线方案，为后续相关研究奠定了基础。

title: SeeMe: Mitigating Hallucinations in Large Vision-Language Models through Effective Visual Token Engineering
summary: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) have achieved remarkable progress in visual understanding tasks such as image captioning and visual question answering. However, they remain susceptible to hallucinations, generating content that is inconsistent with the actual visual input. Existing methods primarily intervene at the decoding stage, while overlooking a critical source of hallucinations: irrelevant or noisy visual tokens that mislead the decoding process. To address this issue, we propose SeeMe, a training-free framework that introduces the concept of feature engineering from traditional machine learning into LVLMs. SeeMe restructures visual tokens through a three-stage token engineering process to suppress hallucination sources while preserving informative visual evidence. Experiments on MME, POPE, and AMBER benchmarks across four LVLMs demonstrate that SeeMe consistently reduces hallucinations and improves output consistency, providing a novel perspective for mitigating hallucinations in LVLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种训练无关的新方法SeeMe，通过重构视觉token，有效减少了大型视图-语言模型(LVLMs)中的幻觉问题。
AI.motivation: 虽然LVLMs在视觉任务上有显著进展，但依旧容易出现幻觉，即生成与输入内容不符的信息。现有工作多在解码阶段干预，忽视了视觉token噪声的影响。
AI.method: SeeMe框架借鉴传统机器学习中的特征工程思想，通过三阶段token工程流程，在不改变训练流程的前提下，重构视觉token以压制噪声来源，保留有效视觉证据。
AI.result: 在MME、POPE和AMBER三个基准测试及四个LVLMs模型上实验，SeeMe方法显著减少了幻觉发生，提高了输出一致性。
AI.conclusion: SeeMe为减少LVLMs中的幻觉问题提供了新视角，验证了无需训练即可通过token工程提升模型输出可信度。

title: CritiqueDriveVLM: From Verifier-Guided Reinforcement Learning to Latent Thought Distillation for Autonomous Driving
summary: End-to-end Vision-Language Models (VLMs) show immense potential in autonomous driving. However, standard Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) often suffers from reasoning hallucinations and conservative biases. While traditional tool-augmented frameworks and Chain-of-Thought (CoT) approaches mitigate these issues, they incur exorbitant token consumption and unacceptable latency, rendering real-time deployment impractical. To resolve this reliability-efficiency trade-off, we propose CritiqueDriveVLM, a novel unified three-stage framework internalizing reasoning directly into the VLM. First, we introduce Critique-Driven Multi-Turn Reinforcement Learning (RL) guided by a multi-dimensional verifier. By providing granular scalar feedback and a multi-turn penalty, we force the policy to internalize logical deduction, cultivating a robust System-2 Teacher that achieves high accuracy without fragile external tools. Subsequently, we propose Latent Thought Distillation to overcome the latency bottleneck. By aligning the Student's latent representations with the Teacher's fully converged reasoning states, we compress deep logical capabilities into a fast, CoT-free System-1 Student. Extensive experiments on the widely-used DriveLMM-01 benchmark demonstrate remarkable improvements. Compared to the base model, our tool-free Teacher significantly boosts Multiple Choice Quality (MCQ) from 55.54% to a state-of-the-art 76.54%. Crucially, our distilled Student preserves competitive reasoning depth while drastically minimizing generation length to an average of merely 28 tokens. This slashes inference latency by 88% (from 3482 ms to 416 ms), paving a highly robust pathway for low-latency autonomous driving.Our source code is available at https://github.com/MICLAB-BUPT/CritiqueDriveVLM.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效且可靠的视觉-语言模型（VLM）训练框架CritiqueDriveVLM，既提升了推理准确性，又显著降低了推理延迟，解决了自动驾驶场景下现有方法在效率和可靠性之间的权衡难题。
AI.motivation: 现有的端到端视觉-语言模型在自动驾驶中具有巨大潜力，但传统的有监督微调容易出现推理幻觉和保守偏差，借助工具增强和链式思考（CoT）虽可缓解问题，却大幅增加token消耗与推理延迟，无法满足实际低延迟需求。因此，迫切需要一种在提升模型推理能力的同时，兼顾推理效率的方法。
AI.method: 提出了三阶段的CritiqueDriveVLM框架：（1）以多维尺度验证器指导的多轮批判驱动强化学习训练Teacher，使用细粒度反馈与惩罚促进逻辑推导能力；（2）提出潜在思维蒸馏，将Teacher完整推理状态对齐到Student的潜在表示，实现无需CoT的快速推理；（3）最终得到兼具高推理深度与低延迟的Student模型。
AI.result: 在DriveLMM-01基准上，去工具化的Teacher模型将MCQ（多项选择题准确率）从55.54%提升至76.54%，达成当前最优。同通过潜在思维蒸馏，Student模型在保持强推理能力的同时，将生成长度缩短到平均28个token，推理延迟从3482ms大幅降至416ms，减少88%。
AI.conclusion: CritiqueDriveVLM成功在视觉-语言模型中实现了高可靠性的推理内化，以及出色的推理效率，为低延迟自动驾驶场景提供了有力的方法支持。

title: Topology-Driven Transferability Estimation for 3D Medical Vision Foundation Models
summary: The growing number of medical vision foundation models highlights the need for effective model selection. However, mainstream selection methods rely on exhaustive fine-tuning, which is computationally expensive. Most of the existing Transferability Estimation (TE) metrics are primarily designed for image-level classification. They fail to preserve spatial relationships and fine-grained boundary details, which are crucial for the segmentation task. Additionally, while image-level tasks typically process a single feature vector per input, dense prediction tasks in 3D medical imaging require voxel-wise evaluation against dense annotations. To bridge these gaps, we propose a \textit{non-parametric, topology-driven} framework that estimates transferability directly from the alignment between the sparse 1-skeleton graph of dense features and semantic labels via Minimum Spanning Trees (MST). We decouple the alignment into two complementary geometric scales: Local Boundary-Aware Topological Consistency (LBTC) to assess boundary separability, where we prove that the MST leakage rate serves as a finite-sample lower bound on the Bayes error; and Global Representation Topology Divergence (GRTD) to evaluate the overall anatomical layout. Crucially, we formally justify a counterintuitive mechanism: Although without fine-tuning, the randomly initialized segmentation decoder acts as a topology-preserving spatial projector, reducing the variance of pairwise distance estimates and stabilizing global alignment evaluation. Fused via a task-adaptive gating mechanism, these dual metrics adapt to diverse clinical complexities. Evaluated on a large-scale benchmark of 114,000 3D medical volumes across diverse anatomical tasks, our topological framework achieves state-of-the-art transferability estimation with an average weighted Kendall (outperforming by 0.36) while accelerating evaluation by 56 times.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的非参数、基于拓扑的迁移性估计方法，用于快速评估医学视觉基础模型在三维分割任务中的可迁移性，有效改善现有指标对空间与边界信息把握不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 随着医学视觉基础模型数量增长，如何在大规模模型库中有效选取表现最优模型变得重要。常规方法依赖于耗时的微调过程，而现有迁移性估计指标又大多针对图像级分类，缺乏对空间结构和精细边界的考量，且不适合3D医学分割等密集预测任务。
AI.method: 作者提出了一种基于最小生成树（MST）的非参数拓扑驱动框架，无需微调，通过观察特征与标签的1-骨架稀疏图的对齐情况估算迁移性。该方法分为局部（边界可分性，LBTC）和全局（解剖结构拓扑，GRTD）两个尺度进行分析。局部指标MST泄漏率数学上成为贝叶斯误差的下界；全局指标通过拓扑分布差异考量。同时，作者创新性地利用随机初始化的分割解码器作为空间投影工具，减小距离估计方差，增强评测稳定性。最后将两类指标通过自适应机制融合，以应对多样化临床任务。
AI.result: 在包含11.4万个3D医学影像的大规模基准测试中，该方法在转移性评估准确度（加权Kendall指标）上显著优于现有方法0.36分，且评测速度提升了56倍。
AI.conclusion: 该工作提出了适用于3D医学图像分割的非参数拓扑转移性评估新范式，兼具高效与高准确率，有力支持多模型快速选优，并为迁移性度量理论打下基础。

title: Hierarchical Multi-to-Single-Modal Knowledge Distillation for Disruption Prediction in EAST
summary: Plasma disruption is a critical threat to tokamak safety. Existing data-driven predictors mainly rely on time-series diagnostic signals, while visible images provide complementary spatial cues including plasma deformation, local brightening, and radiation-structure evolution. Although the image modality improves the model's discriminative capability, it also substantially increases the computational cost during inference. To address this issue, we propose a hierarchical multi-to-single-modal knowledge distillation framework for disruption prediction on a synchronized EAST multimodal dataset. During training, visible images and time-series signals are used to train a multimodal teacher, which learns disruption precursor representations through Transformer-based encoders and a prototype-guided spatiotemporal hypergraph module. During inference, only the time-series student is retained, with multimodal knowledge transferred through graph-structure-level, representation-level, and decision-level distillation. On the 640-discharge EAST dataset, the results demonstrate that the proposed framework can preserve the discriminative advantages of multimodal learning while substantially reducing inference cost, and providing an effective route for efficient disruption prediction in EAST. The source code of this paper will be released on https://github.com/Event-AHU/OpenFusion.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种多到单模态知识蒸馏框架，实现了高效等离子体破裂预测。训练时用图像与时间序列信号，多模态模型学习破裂征兆；推理时只需时间序列数据，显著降低推理成本且保持高判别力。
AI.motivation: 等离子体破裂严重威胁托卡马克安全，现有方法多依赖时间序列信号，忽视了图像中的关键空间信息。而直接采用图像虽提升准确率，但计算开销过大。因此，亟需一种既能利用多模态优势又能高效推理的预测方法。
AI.method: 提出一种分层多到单模态知识蒸馏框架。训练阶段，用可见光图像与时序信号，通过Transformer编码器和原型引导的时空超图学习多模态知识。推理阶段，仅保留时间序列学生模型，并通过结构级、表示级和决策级知识蒸馏，转移多模态知识。
AI.result: 在EAST 640次放电数据集上实验，结果显示该方法在大幅降低推理成本的同时，保留了多模态学习的判别特性，实现高效、准确的等离子体破裂预测。
AI.conclusion: 提出的知识蒸馏框架为EAST等离子体破裂预测提供了高效可行的解决方案。该方法兼顾多模态判别力和推理效率，适用于实际安全监测需求。

title: HeartVolMesh: Cardiac Volumetric Mesh Reconstruction via Covariance-Guided Graph Deformation
summary: Accurate patient-specific tetrahedral cardiac meshes are essential for in-silico trials, yet common segmentation-then-modelling pipelines can blur thin-wall anatomy and offer limited cross-case correspondence. We propose HeartVolMesh, which lifts each template vertex to an anisotropic Gaussian kernel and uses a 3D CNN-GNN to predict per-vertex displacements and Cholesky-parameterized covariances from volumetric images. Training is guided by a covariance-aware negative log-likelihood loss with lightweight mesh regularization. For volumetric meshing, we warp a fixed tetrahedral template to the reconstructed surface via staged alignment, non-rigid registration, and deformation propagation, preserving connectivity and correspondence by construction, with resolution controlled by template density. Experiments show consistent gains over deformation-based baselines in surface mesh accuracy and volumetric mesh fidelity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HeartVolMesh，一种结合3D CNN与GNN的心脏四面体网格生成方法，实现了更高精度和解剖结构对应性，并优于传统变形方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的分割-建模流程在心脏薄壁结构精度和跨病例结构对应性方面存在问题，影响个体化虚拟试验的准确性。
AI.method: 提出HeartVolMesh方法，将模板网格顶点映射为各向异性高斯核，用3D CNN-GNN网络预测每点位移及其协方差，并通过协方差感知的负对数似然损失和轻量网格正则约束进行训练，通过分阶段对齐、非刚性配准和变形传播将四面体模板变形成目标心脏结构，保证连通性和对应性。
AI.result: 在表面网格精度和体积网格保真度方面，相比传统变形方法，实验结果显示HeartVolMesh有一致提升。
AI.conclusion: HeartVolMesh能高效生成高质量、具对应性的个性化心脏四面体网格，为虚拟临床试验等应用提供更可靠的基础。

title: Beyond Random Sampling: Distribution-Aware Alignment for Semi-Supervised Medical Image Segmentation
summary: Precise medical image segmentation is crucial for clinical diagnosis and treatment planning, yet relies heavily on expensive expert annotations. Semi-supervised medical image segmentation (SSMIS) offers a cost-effective solution but typically operates under the assumption of independent and identically distributed (i.i.d.) data, defaulting to random sampling. While statistically valid at scale, this strategy suffers from severe representation bias in low-data regimes, failing to capture the heterogeneous medical data manifold. To address this, we propose a highly data-efficient framework driven by distribution alignment. First, we introduce an offline Distribution-Aware Sample Selection strategy. By leveraging Vision Foundation Models (VFMs) and our designed Density-K-Center algorithm, we explicitly identify representative structural anchors, establishing a more representative labeled domain. Second, to bridge the remaining distribution gap, we propose the Memory-guided Copy-Paste (MCP) module. Tailored for the inherent class imbalance in medical scans, MCP leverages a semantic memory mechanism to retrieve historically consistent priors for cross-domain alignment, encouraging semantic consistency. Coupled with an easy-to-hard progressive schedule, this framework effectively mitigates early-stage pseudo-label noise. Extensive experiments on six diverse 2D and 3D datasets demonstrate strong segmentation performance, particularly in extremely low-labeled scenarios (\eg, 1/16 ratio).

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新颖的数据分布对齐方法，用于提升低标注情境下的半监督医学图像分割性能。
AI.motivation: 在临床医学图像分割中，精确分割通常依赖于大量专家标注，成本高昂。半监督技术能节约标注劳动力，但现有方法假设数据独立同分布，样本选取随机，导致在小样本场景下存在代表性偏差。
AI.method: 方法包括两部分：1）引入基于视觉基础模型（VFM）和自主设计的Density-K-Center算法的离线分布感知样本选择策略，优化标注样本的代表性；2）提出带有语义记忆机制的Memory-guided Copy-Paste（MCP）模块，实现跨域分布对齐和类间均衡，结合易到难的训练进度以减少伪标签噪声。
AI.result: 在六个大型2D和3D医学图像数据集上进行了实验，尤其在极低标注比例（如1/16）时显著提升分割性能。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过高效的样本选择和分布对齐策略，有效缓解了小样本和类别不均衡问题，为低标注医学图像分割提供了更具代表性和鲁棒性的解决方案。

title: AdaptiveSplat:Texture Aware Controllable 3D Gaussian Allocation for Feed-Forward Reconstruction
summary: Current feed-forward 3D reconstruction methods predict pixel aligned Gaussian primitives, resulting in highly redundant representations. A natural solution is to prune the redundant Gaussians, but naive pruning introduces severe artifacts and often requires inference time fine-tuning, breaking the feed-forward paradigm. Based on previous works, high frequency regions require more Gaussian primitives, while low frequency regions can be represented with significantly fewer primitives. Motivated by this, we propose a novel approach to explicitly control the number of Gaussians by leveraging local texture information. Our approach achieves this through three key components: (1) texture estimation to capture spatial variation in scene detail, (2) texture-aware pruning that removes redundant Gaussians from low frequency regions, and (3) an adaptive Gaussian head that predicts the modified attributes of the retained primitives without breaking the feed-forward paradigm. Experiments on RE10K, ACID, DL3DV, Tanks and Temples, and DTU demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach, while ablation studies validate the contributions of its key components.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用局部纹理信息控制高斯基元数量的3D重建方法，显著减少冗余，提高重建效率和质量。
AI.motivation: 现有的前馈式3D重建方法通常预测逐像素对齐的高斯基元，导致表示冗余。直接裁剪冗余高斯基元会引入伪影且常需推理时微调，违背前馈设计思路，因此需要更智能的裁剪机制。
AI.method: 方法包括三部分：(1) 纹理估计模块以捕捉场景细节变化，(2) 基于纹理的裁剪，在低频区域去除多余的高斯基元，(3) 自适应高斯头，对保留的基元进行属性预测，同时保持前馈推理流程不变。
AI.result: 在RE10K、ACID、DL3DV、Tanks and Temples和DTU等多个公开数据集上实验表明，所提方法能有效降低高斯基元冗余、提升重建效率，且无明显重建伪影。消融实验亦证实各个模块的贡献。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法能够在不破坏前馈范式的前提下，通过纹理感知有效去除冗余基元，实现高效、低伪影的3D重建，在多个数据集上取得领先表现。

title: EMPURPLE: A Free Lunch for Diffusion Distillation based on the Information Bottleneck
summary: Diffusion models achieve impressive image-generation quality but remain expensive at inference time. Diffusion distillation reduces sampling steps, yet many distilled models, including SDXL-Lightning and distribution matching distillation methods, suffer from degraded Fréchet Inception Distance (FID). We analyze this phenomenon through a PAC-style generalization bound. Our analysis suggests that aggressive early-step redirection of the velocity field makes the distillation target harder to learn, enlarging the train-test gap. As a result, early-step output distributions differ between training and inference, causing distribution mismatch in the intermediate noisy latent used as next-step inputs. We empirically validate this mechanism by showing reduced diversity in both intermediate features and final outputs. To address this issue, we propose EMPURPLE, a simple training-free method that recycles intermediate latents sampled from the original model. EMPURPLE is model-agnostic and improves FID by 7\% to 20\% across DMD2, Hyper-SD, FlashSD, and SDXL-Lightning. The repo is: https://github.com/TheLovesOfLadyPurple/Empurple-Training-Free-Algorithm-To-enhance-Diversity-of-The-Diffusion-Distillation-Model

AI.tldr: 扩散模型尽管生成效果好，但推理成本高，蒸馏方法可加速推理但易损失FID分数。本文通过理论和实验分析原因，并提出EMPURPLE无训练改进方法显著提升多种模型FID。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散蒸馏模型通过减少采样步数提速，但常见方法如SDXL-Lightning等会导致生成图像质量下降（FID变差），研究其背后的根本原因，并提升模型性能。
AI.method: 理论上，通过PAC泛化界证明，蒸馏早期对速度场的大幅改变导致模型难以学习及推断时分布不匹配。实验上，通过分析中间特征和生成多样性验证机制。提出EMPURPLE——一种无训练、模型无关、循环利用原模型中间潜变量的方法。
AI.result: EMPURPLE方法在DMD2、Hyper-SD、FlashSD、SDXL-Lightning等多种模型上提升FID 7%-20%，同时验证了分布不匹配导致多样性损失问题的假设。
AI.conclusion: 造成蒸馏后模型生成质量下降的关键在于早期分布偏差，EMPURPLE能有效修复该问题并提升最终效果，适用于多种扩散模型。

title: AquaStereo: Enabling Underwater Stereo Matching via Depth-Conditioned Diffusion and Geometry Self-Distillation
summary: Learning-based stereo matching models struggle in underwater environments due to scarce in-domain data and the difficulty of extracting discriminative correspondences from degraded imagery. In this work, we present $\textbf{AquaStereo}$, a perception-enhanced framework with a data simulation pipeline and a self-distillation strategy that jointly address data scarcity and feature degradation in underwater stereo matching. First, a depth-conditioned diffusion pipeline renders underwater stereo pairs while preserving binocular geometry, with a lightweight left-right consistency module ensuring geometric alignment. Training on this synthetic corpus effectively narrows the terrestrial-underwater gap and improves zero-shot robustness. Second, a frozen binocular teacher trained on clean terrestrial pairs guides a student exposed to rendered underwater pairs with perturbations. A stage-weighted sequence loss is performed to align the student's disparities with the teacher's geometry, while a clean-branch supervision with shared pseudo targets prevents scale drift. To further enhance feature stability under turbidity and low texture, we introduce learnable perception frames, a perception-enhanced feature formulation that constructs robust matching descriptors by fusing temporal cues from two auxiliary views encoded by a video backbone with semantic features extracted by a strong image encoder. Extensive experiments demonstrate that $\textbf{AquaStereo}$ substantially improves robustness and zero-shot generalization in challenging underwater scenarios. The code is available at https://github.com/qz-wei/AquaStereo.

AI.tldr: AquaStereo是一种针对水下立体匹配的增强感知框架，结合了合成数据生成和自蒸馏，提高了模型在恶劣水下环境中的鲁棒性与泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 当前的立体匹配模型在水下环境应用困难，主要因为缺少水下数据样本，以及水下图像退化导致特征难以匹配。
AI.method: 提出AquaStereo框架，包括（1）基于深度条件的扩散管线生成水下立体对，左-右一致性模块保证几何对齐，使用合成语料训练以缩小域间差距；（2）自蒸馏策略，冻结的双目教师网络在陆地数据上训练，引导学生网络适应有扰动的水下数据，采用加权序列损失和伪标签监督；（3）引入可学习的感知帧，将视频时序特征与图像语义特征融合，增强特征稳定性。
AI.result: 实验表明，AquaStereo在多种具有挑战性的水下场景中显著提升了模型的鲁棒性与零样本泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 所提AquaStereo框架有效破解了水下立体匹配中的数据不足与特征退化难题，为相关任务带来更强的适应性和提升空间。

title: Road-Aware Anomaly Segmentation with Query-Guided Polygons and CLIP in Autonomous Driving
comment: Accepted to IEEE IV26. Code is available at https://github.com/chrisyan/RAAS
summary: Traditional semantic segmentation models operate under a closed-set assumption and struggle to recognize unknown or unexpected objects-an essential capability for autonomous driving. As a result, such models often misclassify or overlook out-of-distribution (OOD) road anomalies, posing safety risks in open-world environments. We present a lightweight, postprocessing, road-aware anomaly segmentation framework that requires no retraining, no OOD data, and no auxiliary supervision. Our approach builds on a mask transformer-based segmentation network by exploiting query-level mask confidence and deriving a polygonal road prior to detect gap regions that may correspond to anomalies. To further suppress false positives, we introduce a CLIP-based zero-shot semantic filtering module using in-distribution prompts, with optional generalized OOD prompts. By jointly leveraging spatial priors and semantic verification, our framework produces robust and interpretable anomaly predictions. Evaluation on three public benchmarks-Fishyscapes, SMIYC, and RoadAnomaly-shows consistently strong performance. In particular, our method outperforms the training-free baseline Maskomaly on most metrics and achieves the highest AP on Fishyscapes LostAndFound. These results demonstrate the practicality and deployability of our approach for real-world autonomous driving systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需重新训练、无需OOD数据和辅助监督的轻量级后处理道路异常分割框架，用于提升自动驾驶环境下异常目标的识别能力。
AI.motivation: 传统语义分割模型假设闭集，经常无法识别未知或异常目标，导致在真实开放道路环境下存在安全风险。因此亟需提升模型对分布外异常的检测能力，特别是在自动驾驶应用中。
AI.method: 在基于mask transformer的分割模型基础上，通过查询级别的mask置信度和多边形道路先验找出可能的异常区域。为降低误报，引入利用CLIP的零样本语义过滤模块，根据分布内提示词（以及可选的OOD提示词）进一步筛选异常。方法无需重新训练，不需要OOD数据或额外监督信号。
AI.result: 在Fishyscapes、SMIYC和RoadAnomaly三个公开基准上，方法在大多数评测指标上优于无训练基线Maskomaly，尤其在Fishyscapes LostAndFound数据集上取得了最高AP表现。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了无需重新训练和额外数据即可实现高效、可靠的道路异常检测，具备实际部署和应用于自动驾驶系统的潜力。

title: Aura: Consistent Multi-Subject Video Generation via VLM-Grounded Semantic Alignment
summary: Subject-driven and multi-element video generation are central to controllable video synthesis, but existing methods still struggle to preserve identity consistency and model complex relationships among multiple subjects. In this paper, we propose Aura, a unified framework for high-fidelity and identity-consistent video generation. To better capture scene dynamics and subject interactions, we introduce AI director-level captions that provide dense and structured descriptions of video content. We further leverage a vision-language model (VLM) with learnable queries to extract multimodal semantic features from textual and visual references, covering both global semantics and fine-grained visual cues. To bridge the representational gap between the VLM and the Diffusion Transformer (DiT), we design a two-stage alignment strategy that progressively maps VLM features into the DiT feature space. For visual conditioning, we adopt token concatenation to inject reference information directly into the generation process. To distinguish heterogeneous subject types and reduce common copy-paste artifacts, we develop a subject-aware RoPE-Shift mechanism. To further differentiate reference images of different categories, we introduce subject-aware learnable tokens. In addition, we introduce Memory Tokens to balance the training signal across examples with different numbers of reference subjects. During inference, Progressive-APG (Adaptive Prompt Guidance) further alleviates oversaturation and improves semantic alignment with user prompts. Finally, we build a high-quality video-subject image dataset through a dedicated data construction pipeline. Extensive experiments show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on both single-subject generation and more challenging multi-element scenarios.

AI.tldr: 提出了Aura，一个针对高保真、身份一致视频生成的统一框架，整合了AI导演级字幕、视觉-语言模型、双阶段特征对齐等方法，有效提升了多主体复杂场景的视频生成质量。
AI.motivation: 现有视频生成方法在保持主体身份一致性和建模多主体复杂关系方面表现不足。视频生成对多元素、可控性和高保真度需求日益提升，急需突破性的统一解决方案。
AI.method: 1.引入AI导演级字幕，提供结构化、密集的视频内容描述；2.使用可学习查询的视觉-语言模型，提取文本和视觉参考的多模态语义特征；3.设计双阶段特征对齐策略，逐步让VLM特征融入扩散式Transformer（DiT）特征空间；4.通过Token拼接直接植入视觉条件信息，发明主体感知RoPE-Shift和可学习Token，减少粘贴伪影和区分不同类别主体；5.新增Memory Token优化不同参考主体数量时的训练平衡；6.推理阶段采用Progressive-APG提高语义对齐与防止过饱和。
AI.result: 在单主体和多元素场景下，Aura显著超越了现有方法，实现了业界领先的身份一致、多元素视频生成效果，并构建了高质量新数据集。
AI.conclusion: Aura作为统一视频生成框架，有效提升了多主体、高保真视频生成的能力，解决了身份一致性与复杂关系建模难题，在相关领域具有显著推广和应用价值。

title: Framework and Multi-modal Dataset for Roadwork Zone Detection and Geo-localization
comment: Accepted to IEEE IV25. The RZDG dataset and code can be found at: https://github.com/chrisyan/RZDG
summary: Autonomous vehicles often rely on high-definition (HD) maps for navigation; however, these maps are not frequently updated and often lack semi-static information, such as temporary roadwork zones, which can significantly alter the road network. This limitation underscores the urgent need for an accurate global position of roadwork zones. However, the absence of publicly available datasets for evaluating roadwork zone detection and geo-localization models has hindered the development of reliable autonomous driving systems. To address this challenge, we propose the Roadwork Zone Detection and Geo-localization (RZDG) dataset, which includes both simulated and real-world data, providing multimodal sensor inputs along with comprehensive annotations. The dataset supports multiple perception tasks, including image semantic segmentation, 3D object detection, and object geo-localization. In addition, we introduce a tracker-based roadwork zone detection and geo-localization (RZDG) pipeline, an extension of AB3DMOT, for accurate object geo-localization in roadwork zones. We benchmark our approach on the RZDG dataset, demonstrating its effectiveness in detecting roadwork zones and transforming object positions from the local coordinate system to the global coordinate system. A prediction is considered a true positive (TP) if its estimated position falls within one meter of the ground truth. Our experimental results show that our approach achieves high accuracy on both real and simulated data. Specifically, we report: Precision: 0.565 (real) / 0.615 (simulated) Recall: 0.898 (real) / 0.809 (simulated) F1-score: 0.597 (real) / 0.665 (simulated).

AI.tldr: 本文提出了用于道路施工区域检测与地理定位的数据集（RZDG），并基于该数据集设计了相应的方法，显著提升了检测与定位精度。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶车辆依赖高精地图，但地图更新不及时，难以反映临时性道路变化，尤其是施工区域，造成安全隐患；而且当前缺乏用于评估施工区检测和定位的数据集，制约技术发展。
AI.method: 1）构建了包含真实与仿真数据的多模态RZDG数据集，并提供全面标注，支持多任务感知（图像分割、3D检测、地理定位）；2）提出基于跟踪的检测与地理定位管线（扩展自AB3DMOT）以提升定位精度。3）设计了严格的评价准则：检测点与真值坐标误差小于1米视为TP。
AI.result: 提出方法在RZDG数据集上实现了较高的检测与定位准确度。真实数据Precision 0.565，Recall 0.898，F1-score 0.597；仿真数据Precision 0.615，Recall 0.809，F1-score 0.665。能有效完成本地坐标到全局坐标的转换与施工区检测。
AI.conclusion: RZDG数据集和所提方法可有效检测与精准定位道路施工区域，为自动驾驶感知系统提供了重要资源和方法支撑，促进了现实场景下的高可靠性构建。

title: IRIS: An Intelligent Vision-Language System for Ocular Surface Diseases via Topic Tree and Scene-Driven VQA Generation
summary: While Large Vision-Language Models (VLMs) demonstrate remarkable generic capabilities, their clinical reasoning in specialized domains like ocular surface diseases (OSDs) is severely hindered by a paucity of high-fidelity, multimodal instruction-tuning data. To dismantle this data bottleneck, we introduce IRIS, an Intelligent Recognition and Interaction System tailored for fine-grained OSD understanding via external eye photography. First, we curate IRIS-120K, the largest and most comprehensive OSD visual question-answering (VQA) dataset to date. Crucially, to overcome the semantic shallowness of conventional image-caption pairs, we propose a synergistic data generation paradigm to explicitly inject clinical priors. Our data engine operates via a dual-branch framework: 1) a Topic Finding Tree (TFT) that hierarchically anchors visual features to precise anatomical and pathological concepts, enforcing rigorous medical deduction logic; and 2) a Scene-driven strategy that synthesizes role-adaptive clinical dialogues to ensure pragmatic generalization. By explicitly aligning a compact 4B-parameter VLM on this structurally enriched corpus, IRIS achieves state-of-the-art performance, comprehensively outperforming both generalist and specialized medical VLMs with up to 34B parameters. Our findings underscore that structured knowledge injection profoundly prevails over sheer parameter scaling, unlocking the potential for resource-efficient, expert-level AI deployment on mobile edge devices for scalable OSD screening. Code, datasets, and model weights will be publicly released by this repo.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了IRIS系统，专为眼表疾病（OSDs）识别与问答，依托全新高质量数据集和结构化知识注入，使中小型视觉-语言模型在此领域超越了更大规模模型。
AI.motivation: 当前大规模视觉-语言模型在专业领域（如眼表疾病）面临高质量多模态指令微调数据稀缺的挑战，限制了它们临床推理能力。
AI.method: 1. 构建IRIS-120K数据集，为目前最大最丰富的眼表疾病视觉问答数据集。2. 提出双分支数据生成机制：一是Topic Finding Tree（TFT），将视觉特征与解剖和病理概念层次化绑定，注重医学推理逻辑；二是场景驱动策略，合成贴合临床实际的专家对话内容。3. 用结构化丰富知识微调一个4B参数的VLM模型。
AI.result: IRIS模型在OSD相关任务上显著优于通用或已知医学视觉-语言大模型（即便参数量远大），在结构化知识介入下效果尤为显著。
AI.conclusion: 结构化医学知识注入比单纯增大参数规模更为有效，有望实现资源高效且专业级别的AI部署，促进眼表疾病的规模化移动筛查。

title: Last-Meter Precision Navigation for UAVs: A Diffusion-Refined Aerial Visual Servoing Approach
summary: In this work, we study the last-meter precision navigation for UAVs, e.g., autonomously reaching a target within the final 10 meters using monocular vision. This task is challenging due to scale ambiguity, rotation discontinuities, and the need for fine-grained spatial reasoning. Existing methods often fail under large viewpoint changes or lack generalization to unseen environments. To this end, we propose DreamNav, a coarse-to-fine diffusion-refined aerial visual servoing framework. In the first coarse-estimation stage, a robust regression policy employs a trigonometric parameterization to predict rotation by jointly modeling sine and cosine components, effectively mitigating optimization instabilities caused by angular periodicity. Given this coarse estimate, the second diffusion-refined stage utilizes a pre-trained world model to simulate future visual observations for candidate actions, selecting the trajectory that minimizes visual discrepancy with the target through a process of visual imagination. To support rigorous evaluation, we contribute PairUAV, a large-scale benchmark comprising 4.8 million image pairs across 72 scenes, curated from the University-1652 dataset. Extensive experiments show DreamNav outperforms strong visual servoing and foundation model baselines in accuracy and generalization, with zero-shot transfer to unseen scenes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的无人机最后一米级精确导航方法DreamNav，通过单目视觉与粗到细的扩散优化机制，有效提升导航精度和泛化能力，并引入大规模评测基准PairUAV。实验结果显示，其在精度与泛化上超越现有基线方法。
AI.motivation: 无人机需要在实际应用中精确地导航到目标点，但最后几米的精细定位由单目视觉实现时，存在尺度不明确、旋转不连续及空间推理难题，现有方法在视角变化大和新环境泛化时表现不佳。
AI.method: DreamNav框架分为两阶段：第一阶段使用稳健回归策略，通过三角参数化联合建模旋转的正弦和余弦分量，提高角度优化稳定性并获得粗略估计；第二阶段利用预训练世界模型，对备选动作做视觉想象，对比与目标的视觉差异，选择最优轨迹。作者还构建了包含480万幅图像对的新基准PairUAV以支持评测。
AI.result: 大量实验显示，DreamNav在最后一米导航精度和泛化能力（如零样本迁移到新场景）方面，均优于现有视觉伺服和基础模型方法。
AI.conclusion: DreamNav能显著提升单目视觉无人机最后米级导航的鲁棒性和通用性，为无人机精细导航和空中伺服应用带来新方案。

title: HASSL: Hierarchy-Aware Self-Supervised Learning Framework for Single Cell Microscopy
summary: Hierarchical structure is common in image data, where fine-grained clusters often merge into larger, coarser semantic groups. In biological cell images, current self-supervised learning models often suppress this hierarchy, as coarse factors such as imaging modality can obscure finer morphological attributes in the latent space. We propose a hierarchy-aware self-supervised training framework to address this problem. Our method combines two components: a distillation framework with a segmentation teacher to improve morphological awareness in the latent space, and a hierarchy-aware contrastive loss based on HDBSCAN to improve decision boundaries between closely related subtypes at different hierarchical levels. Together, these components reduce the tendency of self-supervised learning to overemphasize coarse factors and instead align embeddings with semantic and morphological cues. This yields biologically meaningful sub-clusters driven by fine morphological detail. We train and evaluate our method on a curated corpus of 2.3 million single cells aggregated from 20 microscopy datasets, both labeled and unlabeled, covering 208 cell classes. Our method improves over baseline and counterpart methods, increasing average top-K accuracy by 2.8%, top-9 retrieval on the dataset with the deepest hierarchy by 6.3%, and downstream F1-score for biologically relevant drug classification from perturbed cell morphology by 7.8%.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种层次感知的自监督学习框架，用于生物细胞图像中更好地区分和理解细粒度层次结构，实现了更准确的语义和形态子群识别。
AI.motivation: 细胞图像中普遍存在着层次结构，然而现有自监督学习方法经常受制于粗粒度因素（如成像方式），从而掩盖了重要的细粒度形态学属性，导致潜在空间对细微生物学差异的表现不足。
AI.method: 方法包括两部分：1) 利用分割教师模型的蒸馏框架，增强潜在空间对形态学特征的表达能力；2) 基于HDBSCAN的层次感知对比损失，优化不同层级下相关子型之间的判别边界，从而更准确地保留语义和形态学层级关系。
AI.result: 在2.3百万单细胞样本（来自20个显微镜数据集，含208个细胞类别）的实验中，该方法在基线和同类方法上分别实现了top-K准确率提升2.8%、在最深层级数据集上的top-9召回提升6.3%、以及药物分类下游任务的F1分数提升7.8%。
AI.conclusion: 该框架抑制了自监督模型对粗粒度因素的过度依赖，有效对齐了潜在空间中的语义和形态信息，实现了具有生物学意义的细粒度子群发现和更优的下游表现。

title: Event Detection in Videos: A Framework for the Development of New Methods
summary:
Event detection tasks in videos, the most important aspect of video surveillance, aim to detect events either at the pixel-level, frame-level, or clip-level. Plenty of methods intended for event detection in different environments, for various applications, and within different acquisition techniques were introduced. Naturally, the attempts were made as well to classify these algorithms in terms of detection of performance or in terms of real-time abilities. Nevertheless, the lack of a large-scale dataset as well as rigorous performance evaluation methods have biased such comparisons as well as the development of the methods.
  Given the diversity of existing approaches, we believe it is essential for researchers to position their work within such a rich landscape. Thus, we propose a rigorous framework for developing new methods in event detection for videos. Specifically, this framework is based on three main pillars: datasets, performance evaluation, and scenarios for deploying methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个严谨的视频事件检测方法开发框架，包含数据集、性能评估、应用场景三大支柱，以促进研究的规范化和公平对比。
AI.motivation: 现有视频事件检测方法多样，但由于缺乏大规模数据集和严格的性能评估，方法间对比不公平，影响了领域发展。
AI.method: 作者提出建立一个包含数据集、性能评估体系和应用场景的统一框架，用于指导新方法的开发和评价。
AI.result: 框架有助于统一研究标准，规范方法开发，促进领域健康发展。具体实验或数据未在摘要中体现。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的框架能帮助研究者更好地定位和比较自己的方法，也推动视频事件检测技术的发展和应用。

title: The Good, the Bad, and the Brittle: Benchmarking Robustness and Generalisation of Histopathology Foundation Models
summary: How robust and generalisable are pathology foundation models and have their scaling limites been reached? We benchmarked twelve pathology foundation models (PFMs) and ResNet baselines using our Robustness Evaluation and Enhancement Toolbox (REET) across eleven clinically realistic perturbations and a dissimilarity-driven Non-Redundant K-fold validation (NR-Kfold) protocol. We introduce a Perturbation Performance Index (PPI) to summarise accuracy trends under controlled perturbation sweeps and analyse robustness scaling with parameter count. We show that PFMs consistently outperform CNNs in both robustness and domain generalisation, yet model scaling shows diminishing returns: mid-sized models such (UNI2/Virchow-2 etc.) achieve comparable or greater resilience than larger systems. NR-Kfold analysis further reveals systematic accuracy loss and increased variability when training-test similarity is broken, underscoring the need for explicit distribution-shift evaluation. These findings suggest that the next generation of pathology foundation models must prioritise data quality, multimodality information and domain alignment over parameter count to achieve genuine clinical reliability.

AI.tldr: 本文系统对比测试了12个病理学基础模型和ResNet基线模型的稳健性、泛化能力和可扩展性，提出新指标PPI。结果显示，基础模型优于CNN，但规模扩展收益递减。建议未来方向关注数据质量和多模态融合。
AI.motivation: 当前基础模型在医学病理图像分析中应用前景广阔，但其在现实应用中的稳健性、可推广性及模型扩大规模的效果尚不清楚。因此，论文试图系统评估这些模型的实际表现，并探讨规模扩展的瓶颈。
AI.method: 作者引入了Robustness Evaluation and Enhancement Toolbox (REET)工具箱，设定11种临床场景下的扰动，对12个病理基础模型和ResNet进行基准测试。使用新颖的非冗余K折验证（NR-Kfold）协议评估域泛化，并设计扰动性能指数（PPI）量化模型在受控扰动下的表现。
AI.result: 基础模型在模型稳健性和领域泛化方面均优于传统CNN。模型规模增加带来收益递减，中等规模（如UNI2，Virchow-2）の模型表现有时优于更大模型。NR-Kfold显示，当训练-测试分布不同（分布偏移）时，所有模型表现下滑且方差大。
AI.conclusion: 本文认为仅靠增加参数量难以显著提升病理基础模型的真实临床表现。未来模型需关注数据质量、多模态融合以及领域分布对齐，以实现更稳健的实际应用。

title: Transferability Between Understanding and Generation in Unified Multimodal Models
comment: Accepted at ECCV 2026. Project Page: this https URL
summary: Unified Multimodal Models (UMMs) integrate image understanding and generation within a single architecture, yet how the two tasks interact remains understudied. We investigate $\boldsymbol{\mathsf{transferability}}$ in UMMs: whether training a capability on one task improves the same capability on the other without explicit supervision. Through controlled experiments, we empirically find that transferability depends on architecture-models with fully shared transformer backbone and a unified visual encoder exhibit consistent cross-task transfer, while loosely coupled designs show little or none. Leveraging this transferability, we propose a practical training strategy. The most straightforward way to improve a target generative capability (e.g., counting) is to fine-tune generation directly, but this can degrade visual quality due to distribution shift. Instead, we train the corresponding understanding task and let it transfer into generation, which improves capability-specific generative performance while minimizing distribution shift. We validate this across three capabilities-counting, spatial relation, and text recognition/generation-showing that cross-task transferability can be systematically exploited in UMMs.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了统一多模态模型（UMMs）中图像理解与生成任务之间的能力可迁移性，并提出了一种利用能力迁移提升生成能力的实用训练策略。
AI.motivation: 尽管统一多模态模型能同时进行图像理解和图像生成，但这两项任务之间的联系及能力的相互促进尚缺乏系统研究。作者希望弄清一项任务的能力训练是否能无监督地提升另一项任务的相同能力。
AI.method: 通过控制变量实验，比较了共享Transformer主干和视觉编码器的紧耦合架构与松散耦合架构在能力迁移上的差别，并探索将理解任务训练迁移到生成任务的策略来提升生成效果。
AI.result: 发现只有在模型架构高度共享（紧耦合）时，能力迁移才显著有效。采用将理解任务能力迁移至生成任务的训练策略后，不仅提升了生成任务中特定能力（如计数、空间关系、文本识别与生成），同时也大幅降低了分布偏移对视觉质量的影响。
AI.conclusion: 任务间能力迁移可在结构合理的统一多模态模型中被系统性地利用，新的训练范式能够有效提高生成类任务的能力，并优于直接微调生成端的策略。

title: ResearchStudio-Reel: Automate the Last Mile of Research from Paper to Poster, Video, and Blog
summary: Research dissemination, turning a paper into a poster, a talk video, and a blog post, is still a manual last mile. Prior automation treats each artifact in isolation that each re-extract the paper from scratch, usually ship one-way renders the author cannot reopen in PowerPoint or Word, and gates quality on soft VLM-preference scores that plateau while load-bearing sections still read as empty. We argue this last mile is best built as a composition of skills: thin agent-readable contracts that share one upstream extractor and wrap deterministic primitives in a measured-fill loop whose exits are hard pass/fail render gates. We instantiate this as ResearchStudio-Reel, five Claude Code and Codex skills organized into one shared extractor (Paper2Assets), three editable generators (Paper2Poster, Paper2Video, Paper2Blog), and one interactive convergence layer (Paper2Reel). Paper2Assets extracts each paper once into a shared bundle that can be reused by every downstream skill; The three generators produce a print-ready poster, a synchronized talk video, and a bilingual blog that stay factually consistent and round-trip through PowerPoint or Word; Paper2Reel then binds all three into a self-contained HTML viewer whose section-level clicks jump the video, slides, captions, and blog to matching content. On the Paper2Poster benchmark, our posters lead every aesthetic and information sub-criterion against both prior automated systems and single-shot frontier LLMs, surpassing the authors' own on aesthetics under two held-out VLM judges and winning overall on 84% to 93% of papers; capability audits further show that, by uniquely pairing narration-aligned on-slide highlights with a bilingual blog gated by layout-aware DOCX repair, ResearchStudio-Reel is the only pipeline to ship all three editable artifacts. Project is available at https://aka.ms/ResearchStudio

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了ResearchStudio-Reel系统，实现了科研论文高质量自动转化为海报、视频和博客等多种易编辑的传播形式，且性能超越现有自动化和大模型方法。
AI.motivation: 当前论文传播（如转化为海报、视频、博客）多为人工操作，现有自动化方法各自独立且产物难以编辑，且自动化内容在核心部分往往质量不高。作者希望提升自动生成科研传播物的编辑性、一致性和质量。
AI.method: 作者提出了基于多技能组合、共享抽取器和可编辑生成器的ResearchStudio-Reel系统，包括：1）Paper2Assets一次性抽取论文内容，供下游多模块共享；2）Paper2Poster、Paper2Video、Paper2Blog可编辑地生成一致的海报、视频和双语博客，并可回导PPT/Word；3）用Paper2Reel整合所有成果，实现HTML交互展示。此流程强化了内容一致性和可编辑性，通过测量-填充循环及严格通过/拒绝判据提升生成质量。
AI.result: 在Paper2Poster基准下，所生成海报在美观性和信息性各项指标上均优于现有系统和前沿LLM生成，甚至在美观性超越原作者人工版。84%-93%论文整体获胜。可用性测试表明，系统唯一可稳定产出三类可编辑成果（海报、视频、博客）。
AI.conclusion: ResearchStudio-Reel有效提升了学术内容自动传播的质量和可用性，是首个可一键生成三类高质量且可编辑传播品的自动化系统，推动了学术成果传播自动化的发展。

title: Wan-Streamer v0.2: Higher Resolution, Same Latency
summary: We present Wan-Streamer v0.2, a latency-preserving upgrade of the native-streaming, end-to-end audio-visual interaction model. v0.2 keeps the v0.1 modeling formulation, but raises the interactive output stream from 192x336 to 640x368 while preserving approximately 200 ms model-side signal-to-signal latency at 25 FPS. The higher-resolution stream supports scene-grounded mid-shot agents whose posture, gaze, hands, nearby objects, and local scene layout remain legible during real-time conversation. To support the larger visual stream without adding user-visible delay, v0.2 keeps the thinker as a single-GPU low-latency path for streaming perception, the short language/state Transformer pass that builds the generation cache, and final decoding. The performer becomes a multi-GPU Ulysses-style context-parallel group for the expensive next-unit latent generation. Each performer rank writes incoming K/V into a pre-sharded local cache. The long high-resolution latent video sequence is split across ranks for denoising and gathered through Ulysses communication, while the much shorter audio latent sequence is generated without sequence sharding. In this split, the thinker's language/state computation reaches the performer only as K/V conditioning, so no separate language sequence has to be communicated inside the performer group. This concentrates additional hardware on visual generation while preserving the compact thinker-performer boundary, keeping total remote interaction latency at approximately 550 ms when a 350 ms bidirectional network budget is included.

AI.tldr: Wan-Streamer v0.2是一种升级版的端到端音视频交互模型，提升分辨率的同时保持低延迟。
AI.motivation: 为了解决在实时互动场景中，提升音视频流分辨率带来的延迟增加问题。
AI.method: 保持了v0.1的基础模型结构，通过分离高消耗的视觉生成（利用多GPU的Ulysses方式并行化）与低延迟的推理、缓存生成等关键步骤以降低延迟。视觉数据流在多GPU间分片处理，音频数据则无须分片，最终汇聚保证全流程延迟不增加。
